name: StateDemocrats.com
subject: A quick check-in with less than six months to go…
disclaimer_text: Paid for by State Democrats Committee (StateDemocrats
body:
Do you think Democrats in Congress are doing enough to oppose Donald Trump + the MAGA agenda right now?
#

**We want to hear from you directly about this, Peter.** With the 2026 midterms just six months away, we're doing a quick check-in with our most engaged supporters to see how people are feeling about Democrats in this critical moment. **Will you take 30 seconds today to share your thoughts?**
---

**Do you think Democrats in Congress are doing enough to oppose Donald Trump and the MAGA agenda right now?** ✅ **Yes** – I can see Democrats are fighting hard
⚠️ **Kind of** – I think they could be doing more
❌ **No** – I think Democrats need to step it up even more
❓ **I’m not sure** **[CONFIRM YOUR CHOICE: CLICK HERE](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/104325?t=1&akid=10437%2E614464%2ENuzZqy)**
---

---

---
Peter,
Team Collins here.
There is a massive push in Washington right now to add a 51st state and permanently alter the American flag.

clean_body: | Peter, Team Collins here. There is a massive push in Washington right now to add a 51st state and permanently alter the American flag. The Senate is completely divided, and the stakes for our democratic process could not be higher. If Radical Democrats get their way, it would fundamentally change the balance of power and silence our Common-Sense voices. We need to know exactly where you stand before any permanent decisions are made. You are our firewall against these radical changes. | Right now, our opponents and outside special interest groups are pouring money into Maine, flooding the digital airwaves with attacks designed to distort Susan's record of independent leadership. They think they can use out-of-state money to buy up every ad slot to drown out common sense. We cannot let them have the last word. The Radical Left has an endless supply of dark money that they are using to drown out the truth. We need your help, now more than ever, to keep our ads on the digital airwaves. Don't let the screens go dark. Help us keep the truth on the airwaves! the only Republican Senator in a state Kamala Harris won, Senator Susan Collins is the Democrats' . This isn't just about politics; it's about protecting Mainers and building a firewall that Chuck Schumer's millions cannot breach. | Paid for by Collins for Senator P.O. Box 1096 Bangor, ME 04402 |

Derek, In just a second, we’re going to ask you to [**chip in $7 to the DNC.**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em-dnc-may-2026-gfr?refcode=em_20260509_7054_fr&amount=7&refcode2=7054_22930333_sJ6vJn&akid=7054%2E22930333%2EsJ6vJn) We know what you might be thinking: _Why should I donate today?_ **The truth is that the resources we raise _right now_ — while primaries are still underway and races are heating up — will determine the number of voters we’ll be able to reach before Election Day.** And here’s the thing, Derek: Trump and his Republican allies are already scaling up their efforts to reach those same voters. Trump and his MAGA allies have a total of _$843.6 million_ on hand. That’s money they’ll spend on attack ads, registering more Republican voters, and persuading those who may still be undecided. _If we don’t have the resources to go toe-to-toe with them, we won’t win back Congress._ [**That’s why we’re asking: Can we count on you to chip in $7 to the DNC now? name: Michele Tafoya
subject: Taking a sledgehammer to this broken system
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Tafoya for Senate
body:
This is an open seat. Our sitting Senator announced her retirement, meaning there’s no incumbency advantage.
| [](https://links.trueamericanconservatives.com/s/c/zeNaoabnyAyuviNvGAfU381jyh7bS_yFsGZGzs3lrEBXjVhZC38qYxNjOn60FOnWRWzdRAh3Oz5xd4f2atnup4mp4BzZHGGXd8COHRXLo6jsjMaOmujZaQPku_zBn34mrEUYgQkv_rFMno1fZZXHrZnum5-EKst6SxlO0ye_B8A-Y_FFhNhWI9REWEnFf-ioCYb7lcNqkeIGM5QpF_kqL_e4lmqUj_ObbQU6b5IN8NFra8A3x5mJoZc-RplV5VpM6ru39iWgTey92s-5OV56U2-rpA4okpIKsGVXrdkop1RgeKXhCwpiYfcPUOSBTAvkzaqwscnaAy10encks1-UM_AZh8_232OrVZaPkqSFMwi5Gqf52WJGKH1PZLXn8eB_k05E05YMgQsjfxIQQFhTYwTtdm7PViflXJRfRMChm4SWWHDACjeVIYyEhkrs5uTA-3nGw0QI039aTc_ykY71yXvhNmbImx6q6hOR1SVmK-s0BI-4pNz03Msdy7zvPWR1x-Hf_bIe4j-CZDaKtepZ4GeghRscyDta8VNMMwM1_Dag7AhobTmdtJXiIwIsX4j1pDtjJhQ04UFmumk-gAZwjfhYwotulP_B4VXBuRTP4t1LnBg6blB0ChEJp0i4jyii3Bzj8dnusdqoIt1AoIfvCSKothi5LstMYMpD7misBgOWhkJ9izKlaBXIda4vAwjBUZ3Y8ldSCyQNTHi8ygkm_iImmhftlBiyUWe5amKiVVNZDhzdLjuD-4RxtA5ki2yAxw8cCDRBtop8D5opI0w4WQcQ0qv5NLenK3-fwNp4ZStCDaWv94-OZ0iFVm-SNBUUFzBl/MHkxvG3Kw049ebTHilN1e7k62Kya00YA/20)
---
Hi Peter - this is Michele Tafoya.
I had a great life reporting from the sidelines of some of the most memorable football games in sports history. I don't come from the world of politics. Some folks on the far-Left say that makes me unqualified to run for politics.
I say being an outsider is an asset.
Why? Because the career politicians are the ones running this country into the ground. They oversaw unprecedented fraud, they sold us out to enrich themselves, and they pitted Americans against each other for cheap political gain - the kind of thing that drives normal people like you and me nuts.
[My candidacy for U.S. Senate will take a sledgehammer to this broken system.](https://links.trueamericanconservatives.com/s/c/WGDI_8h-kEaUa0RUUp8rx4EpaY1shmxjX1pId8Sge6TTc1QgJadbgqVXtppgLsCchJiKXU6SlGDIPUjjnRVmk09ZAApptb427dyYd8vmySlryYh51lzA5WKoSC_3cC6bvZJnN1-WuHcgXixYSszwyGdOPuQpxqSZqka9fmOBN_EOhF3fopnyHSEFAAIaVYWoac5WjU9JzwhN-mu9FiKP4LFjMOiw6bdP53RIB5zEqY47e9rA__VNUQJ4SPADqSm8Xi-ewEwoBg7kRpEjUjoIkJu8EDACDHoYQp9a7QC9SF1dgOihtH4-ZhlORvAh6bmh21FWSSlf3ZHEa2ffgBBZD74XIAfnkBluc_1vmfhsFmk3YYWzkCcgZOBxzHFS6S--EWGAeAlynyAzOH88RIZOVnqzTZVpzdeDNDb_SlMrHIlEVQpfOzS6VX6XY0qottHzVLrkLO0IbEYnvlVT4qtWNh4kMMgXbDTDetfZO09UhJ0nIrHVXcXg3GoGHNdxEdsxwYVk3sH8_OP_-DRTYn2cw5udePTSPYEpHVSaXaDiPHdDq6zlYNHa6DKxtL5u8V37juQCQS5cuqLehFWd5clxJNjZvcf9c7Iu8xXusA2x-1LfzplpbJJQTKHa-5HaNhOjBTbmQeWn4rBNSUK72bZbvk_xPA7qzHRNzvrCmN7dOjV6DbiNayujGwB4vl91TfD2fceokhZG8Ci0uABzcQ74937piCWe5Jgnov_oBPkAaTKbEOhEvgHeb16KQsr3mWWyZ5Uhgp92YsgPsk3dA7GNY3MvqqP7X6o7o00igEAkm0HpYGL4zwqdYyWeYnzuNoGlJF0q/_PTQvbyFdBaiAg7L3fjhaUUKsK9RPfVb/20)
Unfortunately, the system is fighting back. My opponents are quintessential political elites with a vast network of mega-donors and deep connections with special interests. Like I said, they've been at this for a long time...
But I have three (big!) things working in my favor:
1\. This is an open seat. Our sitting Senator announced her retirement, meaning there's no incumbency advantage.**
**2\. My opponents are racing each other to the far-Left. One of my opponents stunned voters by saying she regretted voting for the Laken Riley Act. The other is the sitting Lt. Governor, who was in power during the rampant fraud allegations. These extreme records don't appeal to most Minnesotans.
3\. No one in this race will outwork me. I made it to the very top of my industry by being willing to do what it takes to win. We're holding events in every corner of the state, our ads are hard-hitting, and I've got the grit and determination to win. If we can raise the funds, this race is over.
That last point is important.
[Unlike my opponents, I’m an outsider. I’m building this campaign from scratch. That means I’m wholly and completely reliant on grassroots donors to power us. I’m hoping you could help us out there.](https://links.trueamericanconservatives.com/s/c/0CrHJuQwGrZ9BRdQw2Hv3kPSVpuy5L8SJfG1Y0rEq1ZJ3PPscb7ypUWqEU6fE_masuM3T56mvF6eSzTxA81vtwfH1ghT62O4zaPcVdRi5SJJ9nsX2OzrXIpIGjU237aBlN1nvmHuEMKqy_CQMMrb7e3EKnoYL8YzDUvjGUtKwKHKFf7ojXciS-1t39IPTMPSh5DDIA0jCKADSiLXMyVDZa8bvralVcG7GJpTocIWwfw6Oi7w1o2DjmmdPleg7cfTzeHaB5o8RdDqBvdZC4OCWzGj3SYOTfSgPsGxO4Z1CUHQB5BCnVR8UEc-jL5AyRRnyHxQRJGy3NvmXYVPlDqrz-EssCaEr6W_MErKWNrmaSu_3r2DCiUbCG-SPegcdeK2P87gg2WDEzPUJyisnIrbekP736wzKLw0d_IJZ9UJGLwBHZX8SQQIDeaW_VXH-qnZgfkibaDK8G7DkFHpYMxMhStb3G_SPUyL_QD0Cx-sQRFBwfVebQCb2JQ9Ef37t3U8flID1_oJMVRReHAcn9FI5UJ7JNvJer8wtuqvsIuxtHOYRrqSIbRPkC2A-GTogz7ufjYOyQZl8J0i1R_Cm5-02rUUHvafQu8iwNF2ZXwrfqq4OWgm56zIfMe-eU_WIe42Mhzsg48vYAMIn40u1FbGRZBc-UsrMe2xb617gyn-vQCV355nqFK-THo4arq4CpeuXbQhVDg3H7heo8zc69bqaYYG9typVaDRlpevgzR4jSNiSdoiVTPm509m_mChLKlQM0fZVyRUnZuO9lTyrjAt29GrHuBAmmUCKwNiCNWIVP-pAf_BlIueNy6rgUg-i5HFlRkZ/f4qaHaoPgxnrjUUQKinUMxJV9OvUJiKX/20)
Our fast-approaching major deadline is when we have to make important financial decisions for the entire year. If we come up short of any of our goals, we'll be forced to pull back our ad plans and slash our voter contact budgets.
Nothing would be worse for our race.
The only way we can shock the world and flip this race is by collecting the resources we need to max out our budgets.
We crunched the numbers, and we'll need to raise another $100,000 by the end of the month. That's the bare minimum needed to fully fund all our campaign operations.
I'm hoping everyone reading this can pitch in at least $15 toward that goal. If you can spare it, I respectfully ask for your support before our all-important deadline. Think you can help us out?

clean_body: This is an open seat. Our sitting Senator announced her retirement, meaning there’s no incumbency advantage. | Hi Peter - this is Michele Tafoya. I had a great life reporting from the sidelines of some of the most memorable football games in sports history. I don't come from the world of politics. Some folks on the far-Left say that makes me unqualified to run for politics. I say being an outsider is an asset. Why? Because the career politicians are the ones running this country into the ground. They oversaw unprecedented fraud, they sold us out to enrich themselves, and they pitted Americans against each other for cheap political gain - the kind of thing that drives normal people like you and me nuts. Unfortunately, the system is fighting back. My opponents are quintessential political elites with a vast network of mega-donors and deep connections with special interests. Like I said, they've been at this for a long time... But I have three (big!) things working in my favor: 1\. This is an open seat. Our sitting Senator announced her retirement, meaning there's no incumbency advantage. 2\. My opponents are racing each other to the far-Left. One of my opponents stunned voters by saying she regretted voting for the Laken Riley Act. The other is the sitting Lt. Governor, who was in power during the rampant fraud allegations. These extreme records don't appeal to most Minnesotans. 3\. No one in this race will outwork me. I made it to the very top of my industry by being willing to do what it takes to win. We're holding events in every corner of the state, our ads are hard-hitting, and I've got the grit and determination to win. If we can raise the funds, this race is over. That last point is important. Our fast-approaching major deadline is when we have to make important financial decisions for the entire year. If we come up short of any of our goals, we'll be forced to pull back our ad plans and slash our voter contact budgets. Nothing would be worse for our race. The only way we can shock the world and flip this race is by collecting the resources we need to max out our budgets. We crunched the numbers, and we'll need to raise another $100,000 by the end of the month. That's the bare minimum needed to fully fund all our campaign operations. I'm hoping everyone reading this can pitch in at least $15 toward that goal. If you can spare it, I respectfully ask for your support before our all-important deadline. Think you can help us out? | | | | | | | | Thanks for taking the time to read this email! Together, we're going to make history - I can feel it. Be brave. Do good.- Michele Michele TafoyaRepublican for Senate, Minnesota Imagine the look on Tim Walz's face when voters reject his handpicked candidate and elect a Republican for the first time in 20 years!That's what I 'm picturing...This is Michele Tafoya - I'm not a politician, and I've never run for office before.But I made the decision to run for U.S. Senate because my state has fallen so far in such a short amount of time. We have the opportunity of a LIFETIME to win, and I've never been one to give up when the going gets tough.I have a hunch you aren't either. | | Paid for by Tafoya for Senate 3500 Vicksburg LN N, STE 267, Plymouth, MN 55447 If you would like to opt-out of important updates like this,

body:

Friend, In three days, Governor Bill Lee and Tennessee Republicans dismantled Tennessee’s only majority-Black congressional district, the result of generations of civil rights work, because Donald Trump told them to. Republicans repealed a law that had protected Tennesseans from exactly this kind of mid-decade power grab. They stripped the requirement that voters be notified when their district changes. Then they passed new maps, signed them, and walked out. **This is not politics as usual. This is a civil rights emergency.** Yesterday, the Tennessee Democratic Party filed a federal lawsuit to challenge this racist and reckless scheme. But a lawsuit is just one part of the fight. Their antics will create chaos for voters, split up communities, and leave thousands of Tennesseans unsure where to vote or who represents them. We need resources _**right now**_ to protect voters, organize in every corner of the state, and fight back in court and on the ground. **That's why I'm asking you personally.** [**Will you stand with us and help fund the legal defense and voter protection effort this state needs?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/131101946/619981024/1709264364?refcode=260509-email&Refcode=260509-email-dcs&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83NzEzNCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmNDE2Y2RmZC0xMzRjLWYxMTEtOGVmMi0wMDBkM2ExNGI2NDAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=ZYpb7xF6HcoPkD3OvqeRTFG_yghA88AdAioJrHG8lqg=) | [STAND WITH TNDP](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/131101947/619981025/-1270985636?refcode=260509-email&Refcode=260509-email-dcs&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83NzEzNCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmNDE2Y2RmZC0xMzRjLWYxMTEtOGVmMi0wMDBkM2ExNGI2NDAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=ZYpb7xF6HcoPkD3OvqeRTFG_yghA88AdAioJrHG8lqg=)

subject: The “water glass trick” used by the US military silences tinnitus in seconds
body:
How do soldiers avoid ear ringing? They do THIS with a glass of water (takes 15 secs) | | | [](https://links.newsletter.marketdailypro.com/u/click?_t=7a28bbb892d5463fb7f7674bdc2d44f2&_m=9b0f960748c5417499321eff921cdf14&_e=orj-X6BBt2bdP9CMwdPZIWPzOo3aM0R2CYX_sAXIgFrdt1GRIwxuZsdnlTpm20ws57GxoOmXjwkW2nO32CQYwT3fp2IVIHS9vnFvEFNq4Su3tsPx1SUPdb1PiZPB1poCnpZOP9r5zKY1xaKQk2twwka3tEOuqfrCAG6mmhpSAl5yxVAX392trmVcfpg8rIJ0fh53V6Mh6nK9NuYsT0Lh6CPYNTw1PpFiLSzngmSyM1bSBqkSlP5ly6qu9QipEHAT1oRqjfQVc2Tomoyd90X_JNCRpmWySvcTR5a9akqGRQ3zmjq-3hoXeZfebQMK6QLMptPTfR6c_NEFfItDABPNKA%3D%3D)
---
| |
# THE “WATER GLASS TRICK” USED BY THE US MILITARY SILENCES TINNITUS IN SECONDS

---
| | | | |
---
Soldiers have to listen to gunfire, explosions, and heavy machinery every day.

As a result, many develop an unbearable ringing in their ears that makes it impossible to concentrate and do their job effectively.

This is why the US military secretly developed [a little-known trick using a glass of water](https://links.newsletter.marketdailypro.com/u/click?_t=7a28bbb892d5463fb7f7674bdc2d44f2&_m=9b0f960748c5417499321eff921cdf14&_e=orj-X6BBt2bdP9CMwdPZIVs5ulD0XY6XxhXD-PSR6dh2uAQHwb0_tqdkq3RJeccJ14NecB9_ECXq_7qGni_-MoHgUq9P0urD0ps6Ihv4mwX2Kt8JT6tXeXfwEy1hTZHhp2oShij5yRO4wzuMWO2OOqd8RdgVIFuQDrIs7rBRzgOi4r9nAVl7DRrgEphgxqKflmmBsCZe2Kb81mvoIyeQSjb_sbsBSp5tH54jbwDP8jaXBjNFiQRgOOuEK2DSdyCxLSow_JK-naASm0ZBXfpHW1x30WJOaLI1cpKBj7eLQWtKr19TlrXJu9lC7tO-WGmKIMkJf9Ae5_1_456IWGW-40YNydOE5z1twJPRHiOhqm-eM8etEKJ-Ej9ldDlm1mU_hdJ8cfZDa2QX9FitMGQN1ZZZXF1WlikCduY0ElhcSIc6GmoolcImY_mO80yOJ7kbyw78MZwfjkhnBjoHGg1dCEUYxVKzqGwfR1_Pbbyju7eos4LB6KpaqndTc7zz9oAipheBTwgJYFIZ-TmlDotFV6m2BIOusCts1N8ElnXfatZl45PKqctBZwcYmzG3QzjMYZo3vzYI5u-i5T7rxGQ-nA%3D%3D) that silences the sounds for good - no matter what was causing them in the first place.

Here’s how to do it:

**1\. Grab a 12-oz glass of COLD water (must be cold)**
**2\. name: The PreBorn! Team
subject: An excellent way to honor a mom this Mother's Day
body:
This Mother’s Day weekend, many people will call their moms

| | | | [](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2z0lpkfkr407oftqtgojsmhp2ama5g85kevp7o64o_rp22sh2s8i6epr0s5g69p74chh2bs)
---
Friend of Life, This Mother’s Day weekend, many people will call their moms, sit around a table together, or take a moment to remember the woman who gave them life. In those moments, it becomes clear just how much of who we are has been shaped by someone who chose to step into motherhood, even when it required sacrifice, patience, and strength. **But not every woman will experience Mother’s Day that way.** Right now, there are women sitting alone, trying to decide if they will become mothers at all. Everything around them is telling them to move quickly, to decide before they have time to process what’s happening, before they have space to ask questions, before they have ever seen the life they carry. Some of them are sitting in their cars, staring at the doors in front of them, telling themselves this is the only way forward, even though something inside them keeps asking them to wait just a little longer. **[And if nothing interrupts that moment, the decision will be made in minutes.](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zeqqecq5p5ssf013s6018hjio33qeidv3u8ms44g_rp22sh2s8i6epr0s5g69p74chh2bs)** That is why PreBorn! exists. Because when a woman is given the chance to see her baby on an ultrasound, something begins to change. The screen lights up. The heartbeat fills the room. What once felt distant suddenly becomes real in a way she cannot ignore. For the first time, she is no longer choosing in fear or pressure, but with clarity. And more than 80% of women choose life in that moment. Months later, she is not carrying the weight of a decision she cannot undo or wondering what might have been. She is holding her baby. **[This Mother’s Day, there is no more meaningful way to honor a mom in your life than by helping another woman become one.](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zsfaau2016qn7eg8ga8h18b5bkk29saioh5vb3so_rp22sh2s8i6epr0s5g69p74chh2bs)** $28 provides one ultrasound, and that single moment can change everything. Will you step into that moment today?
---
[**Give Now**](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2z8oegu73o55i7nsato9fc120k5sv6kva5qo9fm3o_rp22sh2s8i6epr0s5g69p74chh2bs)
---
Grateful for you,

The PreBorn! Team
---
PreBorn!, P.O. Box 78221, Indianapolis, Indiana 46278, 800-941-0151
---

Pop Acta Media | GOP Presidential
---
_PO Box 2221 Fort Collins, CO 80522_

# **[Gas prices keep climbing — but relief may come sooner than you think](http://trk.libertyledger.-GFcN1AdI69HYA)**
---
While Americans are paying a premium for gasoline, the Iranians are filling up for just 12 cents a gallon. With the Strait of Hormuz blockaded, Iran is desperately trying to use up its oil inside the country — going as far as burning it off at wellheads and hauling it over land in pickup trucks using buckets.But this isn’t sustainable. Sooner or later, something will have to give.To find out what happens next and what it means for American gas prices and energy security, Glenn Beck speaks with oil and gas expert Tim Stewart. Glenn asks Stewart how long before Iran is forced to shut down oil operations.“From what we gather, they are almost there,” says Stewart.

name: The PreBorn! Team
subject: Not every woman will experience Mother's Day
body:
This Mother’s Day, while many of us are celebrating the women who gave us life, there are women quietly deciding if they will become mothers at all.

| | | | [](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z155kqo6t704um21832kb8jecdfqgta3dd54q2eo_rp22sh2s8i6epr0s5i64or2c1h2bs)
---
Friend of Life, She’s sitting in her car, staring at the building in front of her, trying to convince herself this is the only way forward, even though something inside her keeps saying, _wait... just wait._ She tells herself she doesn’t have time to think. That if she slows down, she might not be able to go through with it. That it’s easier to just move forward with the abortion and deal with everything else later. No one has told her she can pause. No one has told her she can see her baby first. And if nothing interrupts this moment, her decision will be made in minutes. This is the reality for thousands of women right now. And it’s why this moment matters so much. Because when a woman is given the chance to see her baby on an ultrasound, something begins to change in a way that is hard to describe until you see it happen. The screen lights up, the heartbeat fills the room, and suddenly what felt distant and abstract becomes real. She’s no longer thinking about “getting through something.” She’s looking at her child. And in that moment, everything shifts. [**More than 80% of women choose life after seeing their baby on an ultrasound.**](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zeo2jiont0a6guk3ajvi5s9996c3pk6h3kv732t0_rp22sh2s8i6epr0s5i64or2c1h2bs) But what matters just as much is what happens after. Months from now, she is not trying to push down a memory or carry the weight of a decision she cannot undo. She is holding her baby. **[This Mother’s Day, while many of us are celebrating the women who gave us life, there are women quietly deciding if they will become mothers at all.](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zvieh372tsbsaism78mgpveon0bpvpp4qefj3sho_rp22sh2s8i6epr0s5i64or2c1h2bs)** You can step into that moment. $28 provides one ultrasound. And right now, that ultrasound could be the reason she pauses long enough to see, to understand, and to choose life. Will you help her before that moment passes?
---
[**Give Now**](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z7403d9293i9hsc20cq6234ltkh3rqtu47hpg1io_rp22sh2s8i6epr0s5i64or2c1h2bs)
---
Grateful for you,

The PreBorn! Team
---
PreBorn!, P.O. Box 78221, Indianapolis, Indiana 46278, 800-941-0151
---

Pop Acta Media | American Action News
---
_PO Box 1177 Fort Collins, CO 80522_
_[**unsubscribe**](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z69kk46v7gqrd2sj237rp8cpe4qalj3lll7j4umo_rp2ash2s8gb2sbgebjqf9tge5rrasbjkgqracjkmoq37d1m65qbfctjmkrncst66uqrf9bjmpqn4djm69qb4d9nkvijbo9getqb3cdkmppmeo0n6mq39cdjkorrbcp4mni66o30cljm8oh1k8gn48n24hjmeo71chh66oj0c8iv0)_ | _[manage data preferences](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zs338a0pnql18jk73oot1bu089nfcku4vq0js97g_rp22sh2s8i6epr0s5i64or2c1h2bs)_

[](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z3jiesttbgappfhhvdnuafmgf6pbu06fvu7o5c3o_rp22sh2s8i6epr0s5i64or2c1h238h5e8he49h666qbcdli6uon49fg)

name: Dinesh D'Souza
subject: Please let me explain
body:
| | |
---
| | [](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zbbbkd6qc1e0gqtici51454nab3teg6bncsreoq8_rp22sh2s8i6epr0s5i69o76c9h2bs)
Friend,

I promise I won’t take up much of your time.

In my film _2000 Mules_ , I exposed one of the greatest scandals in American history - the hijacking of the 2020 presidential election.

Today, I'm proud to join forces with Stand in the Gap, a non-profit organization dedicated to supporting the patriots who exercised their First Amendment rights in protest of the _outcome_ of that election.

**I want to reach as many people as I can with this request...**

I told their founder, Shane Jenkins, that I would help him raise $20,000 before the end of the month to help Stand in the Gap provide help, hope, and healing to the January 6th patriots.

Even a donation of $10 can give a January 6th patriot the support they need.

[If that is all you need to hear, then please contribute $10 or any amount you can generously afford using the button below:](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z1hp1qc3oqdstddtb5vml5275aqcnnf01a421vao_rp22sh2s8i6epr0s5i69o76c9h2bs)
[Donate Now](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zopqe1c71828eae85gvdu5cjq7tvr2gkcg9f5qj8_rp22sh2s8i6epr0s5i69o76c9h2bs)
**Otherwise, let me explain why I’m asking you to donate at least $10:**

$10 because the _“crime”_ these patriots committed was fighting for their country.

$10 because even though they’ve been pardoned, many of them are struggling to get back on their feet.

$10 because Stand in the Gap is providing them with the resources they need to successfully reintegrate into their communities, find work, reconnect with family, and restore their rights.

[$10 because no one should have to face these hardships alone.](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zudbsco23mdueal1lomnsrdskoukh1q20mhs7mrg_rp22sh2s8i6epr0s5i69o76c9h2bs)

Not only are these men and women patriots, but they come from all walks of life — law enforcement, veterans, white-collar professionals, blue-collar workers, and all races and religions.

_And they were hunted down in a political persecution that denied them their constitutional rights._

**Stand in the Gap exists to provide real, practical help, like rent money, job training, transportation, legal referrals, trauma counseling, and health insurance, to help these persecuted patriots move on with their lives.**

Your gift today can help one of these patriots find the help, hope, and healing they need to succeed in their second chance.

**Friend, can I count on you to contribute $10 or whatever you can afford to Stand in the Gap? Click any button below to give today.**
[Donate $10](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zcm88splu9miv8u9ie2p269igvnvmgs6bkgeeq1o_rp22sh2s8i6epr0s5i69o76c9h2bs)

[Donate $35](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2znr5afhpi1ggmqiuse8thgr3qvg4a47spm053qhg_rp22sh2s8i6epr0s5i69o76c9h2bs)

[Donate $50](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zp0h24tssv9qq285f6ut463nssfu1d52ugepbi68_rp22sh2s8i6epr0s5i69o76c9h2bs)

[Donate $100](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zvnehrjoom5t4u9dd25tlp2e4s87l3a1atse5948_rp22sh2s8i6epr0s5i69o76c9h2bs)

[Donate $250](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z9ojtion21v3aqb1n27pptaa7ntm5ttdp85stub0_rp22sh2s8i6epr0s5i69o76c9h2bs)

[Donate $500](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z0or5e2h0flnce8f6rk64g02jec31jonvdb3bed8_rp22sh2s8i6epr0s5i69o76c9h2bs)

[Donate $1,000](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zbk1gl7k46q4furisg2p9un1hokshtftjbud7mj8_rp22sh2s8i6epr0s5i69o76c9h2bs)

[Donate Any Other Amount](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2ziffghevitio6i9aomg5lhci32kutbkuboqph6uo_rp22sh2s8i6epr0s5i69o76c9h2bs)
Thank you,
Dinesh D'Souza

P.S. If you're still reading this email and I haven't convinced you to donate $10 or more, please consider what January 6th patriots still face...
* Harassment on social media and in their personal lives
* Difficulties in finding a job
* Homelessness
* Loss of rights, like the right to vote or own a firearm
* Mental health challenges that their families can never understand

All they did was stand up for their beliefs. They do not deserve this sort of treatment.

But for just $10, you can help Stand in the Gap give pardoned January 6th patriots the support they need to succeed at their second chance.
[Donate Now](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zi73ki0vrddgstiunqtk36ap28v5sq5dulu2ec0g_rp22sh2s8i6epr0s5i69o76c9h2bs)

Stand In The Gap is registered as a 501(c)(3) non-profit organization. All contributions are tax-deductible to the extent permitted by law. Stand In The Gap’s tax identification number is 93-1417599.

name: Brad for Georgia
subject: ICYMI: RAFFENSPERGER RELEASES NEW STATEWIDE TV AD: “MUD”
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY BRAD FOR GOVERNOR, INC
body:
| | | | | [|
---](https://us.list-manage.com/1HPo0nE6vKz?e=6036811227&c2id=73967910c0edbe1e25be629224bd5a72)
| |

**FOR IMMEDIATE RELEASE**
May 8, 2026
**RAFFENSPERGER RELEASES NEW STATEWIDE TV AD: “MUD”**
_Ad contrasts Brad Raffensperger’s focus on Georgia families with opponents’ mudslinging_
ATLANTA — Today, the Brad Raffensperger for Governor campaign released a new statewide television ad titled “Mud,” highlighting the growing contrast in the Republican primary between Brad Raffensperger’s Georgia-focused campaign and opponents spending millions attacking each other.
---
[|
---](https://us.list-manage.com/1G7SwliQGmC?e=6036811227&c2id=73967910c0edbe1e25be629224bd5a72)
| |
“Hardworking Georgians are struggling to make ends meet and they’re looking for a proven leader who can deliver real results,” said Brad Raffensperger. “Sadly, when they turn on the TV, open their mailbox, or pick up their phone, all they see are a couple of spoiled rich guys throwing mud at each other. Georgians deserve better. As Governor, I’ll focus on what actually matters: making Georgia more affordable, keeping our communities safe, and fighting for the hardworking families who make this state great.”
The ad reinforces Raffensperger’s record as a Christian conservative businessman and proven public servant who has consistently stood on principle and delivered results for Georgia.
“Mud” is part of a broader statewide television and digital advertising effort as voters continue casting ballots during Early Voting ahead of the May 19 Republican Primary Election.
**Transcript:**
_Creepy Rick Jackson and Big Baby Burt Jones are too busy slinging mud at each other to care about you.__Georgia deserves better.__Brad Raffensperger is a Christian, conservative, businessman.__He created hundreds of great jobs.__And stopped Biden and Abrams from rigging Georgia’s elections.__As Governor, Brad will cap your property taxes.__And champion school choice for our families.__Conservative Brad Raffensperger. For Governor._
**Media Contact:**
[ Ryan@BradForGeorgia.com]()
985.956.2016
---

name: The Flyover
subject: Super El Niño, Baseball Legend Dies, and 3-Day Ceasefire
body:
A "super El Niño" climate pattern [could develop during the middle of the year](https://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJykkL2O3CAUhZ8Gd4wuP7ahoEgiTbdpU1oXuIyJGLAws6t5-8h5hS2PjnR0vu_Px_aBueT6-I1PciO1rdLXWWgM6tv5OqhTqZn9UuynaB5P8lhKoQfVuEmQC4eZC9gi5vLe9BRdIpKkJnJiXY2GdQE57c5qZRaDswqz0ZYEglUASqYUvNAzTtldazALEACLljdrY0wxGhPRggHLNFDMo_Xb35br2CmVd_ukfgvtORW3j3GcTP1g8s7kHY-L4qqu0EcOhZi8U-E118ZDyU8cxPdX7zlgJb4TDh57ez32wTvmyqP1KpLBEIy2wprkvQC7Ju-BvE7L1F08vnIp-VxWpuHxxFz-nxnf1_jp5L8AAAD__2uGhkI), impacting global temperatures and rainfall patterns, according to the World Meteorological Organization.

| | |
---
| [](https://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJykkEGO4yAQRU-Dd7GKgmCzYDEzkXeZ7SwRNkXCNIEIk7hz-1a6I_UBelnvSfW__r-jPbqYYj79dRcyLRSbaVsTtUbVrrcrVUo5sj-C_eZldivNLqVEJ8reIqDawX7HwXoX08PKzptAhCQ6MnwYRgmDAuzOhsPgQWikWYd5UIiLkItCvyx85hpdF83zG-w5cAAlsdfa--D9OHqnYQTNJJCPrdT-f4m5nSmkR7lT7Zdy6ZI5t3ZdmfjFcGI4bdvWP-p7q29PzXByIdiFiamEQNVGz8QBpRIDQ_VUXwA4vu71NgsmDq-Ib4hMHLJrsWSXdrKXXTX-usWU4qoGJuF0cTF9Nmo_3_Ju8CMAAP__DH-F_Q) | |
# Sunday, May 10, 2026

**Happy Mother's Day!** On this day in 1908, Anna Jarvis held [the first official Mother's Day service](https://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJykkL1uhDAQhJ_GdEZr4-OncJFEoru0KZHJLrCRsU-2c4i3j0iXOu3MaDTzfdynu2PPYX13O9myxCnQkT2VQmnK3w9K5AOLt0a8qji7TLPz3tNKAScNupVwkwomdOzPyVRoFyJNTUVWdV1voGtBV5tdOmPoNmOjutkNCMbMRqm2MQ5hQaUrtlcb3BQogNboehgQF8S-RzdAD4MwQMglpvorcigbLf6MT0r1Z9wrb7dSHlk0L0KPQo_HcdTHHM_LFHq8Ll0q5SKfnFYO7IQe91g2SlmiO-VMqwuSg_wTkhslyrJsJHOJ6RR6rJLFx8Hec247YWDdHfvfEeX_-J5W_wQAAP__nsCF3g) at Andrews Methodist Episcopal Church in Grafton, West Virginia, to honor her mother. She sent [500 white carnations](https://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJyk0EGOpCAUANDT4E7z-SLqgsXMJO5qtr00WHyVyhcM0Jq6faf7Cn2Bt3gfj_lhPfuw_bcHmbLGOdCdmUqhNOfPkxJx8OJfK_7KuNhMi2Vm2ii4GQF1DV0tYXbW83tWlTMrEVJbkZF9PyjoNWC1GwWI3SDVMmolSUI7Di1qPSz62elWq8qbbw06CRJAK2zG0bnVuWFwdoQBRqGAnC8xNa_oQ9lp5Xe8KDXPeFRs9lLOLNo_AieB033fTThzs8VL4HRSPJkETjYEWx82eVu_bLp8bvZyVMm48_bMPuteKNgO6_lHLb__uAx-BQAA___jKnMu) to the church for the service and later campaigned for Mother's Day to become a national holiday. In the early 20th century, Americans rallied around the stories of hope and redemption built by Father Edward Flanagan and Boys Town. But over time, skepticism over broad moral ideals eroded support for the community of homeless and delinquent boys, as noted in ["Whatever Happened To..."](https://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJyk0LFuqzAUxvGnMVvQ4dgx9uAh90YZKqVb1W7I4OPg6oAjcILy9hV9ha7fJ_2G_-e1u_rEab69-4lcibmbaVuZSqGlWx93WojnJP5L8a_JvV-p98xMN5pDh4D6AMdDA13wiV-dqoKLREiyIte0rVHQasBqdAhWDpZia1XbWxgIpTcalIk9aKOxSm7X4NhAA6AV1taGEEMwJngLBqxQQCGVvNTfOc1lpMiv_KSlHvJUsRtLua9CngReBF62batf-VEePe3_vvgyjEJenkKem9OEX2-H80dR1eLCfUvMadWtUHCbfOJfsvw9xtPhTwAAAP__26Vxlg) In case you missed it, this week on _The Flyover Podcast_ , host Ayla Brown shared new concerns about what heavy AI use may be doing to our brains. ## Frontier Jet Hits Pedestrian
A Frontier Airlines plane [hit and killed a pedestrian on the runway](https://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJykkLHO4yAQhJ8Gd0QYg20KiruT0uXaK62FXScbEbAwSZS3P_n_H-EvZ0YazXz_LssFOHG-_oUH-baWJdN7T9Qa1WV_blQpZRZ_BvG7LwF2CpBSoitlXLTSo1RW9mpB4PRZTId-JdI0dOT7aZqNmkalu5sHo9fB2jkQzm4MykFcIQxGk51tRN2xP9qU7VWv1Gj0yTnEFXGeEZyalRNGEXIr9XQvnNuN1vQpL6qnWB5d8rfWtl0Mv4Q-C32G7XhxRIeojWMioc9I-UVVAtet1CbXWnLjbyNxJrlR3UuWnO_PSijrM7_hI2myg7VBB0JHcQhAxsSgRhOdjj1CVz1ub06J93ESRl0fwOlrVvs50JfX_wMAAP__i2WLsw) of Denver International Airport during takeoff on Friday night, causing an engine fire and forcing passengers to evacuate. The unidentified person [jumped the perimeter fence](https://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJykkM2O6yAMhZ-G7Kgch_wtWNx7pex6t7OMSDEtUxcioK3y9iNmHmFkyZJt-dM55-O8no1nH67_zYN0cXEN9M5MpVBa83OnRBy8-NeJv23cTKbNMDNdKdgVAQcJvWxhtcbzsarGakeE1DWk23GcFIwDYHPTm3LYWUBUClU_AbaXrnVbrd5R3zVeVxr0LbQAg8LTPFvrrJ0ma2aYYBYKyPoS0-kz-lBu5PiIL0qnS3w0rG-l7Fl0fwQuApdw7DGXehK4VLDABfraZoHLM8tqUuDiUgzFU5LGJ_aBstzZBJK5JH-nLO-eOcudLNWNCTIGaSm8fj72mIpMz_A2h0xUJ4FLk7Td357Z52EUCq4P4_lbZPl9vC-NXwEAAP__502QLA) and crossed the runway before being hit by the moving plane at close to 11:19 p.m. The person was at least partially sucked into one of the engines, which ignited the brief engine fire. Transportation Secretary Sean Duffy said in a Saturday morning statement, _"The trespasser on the runway was then struck by Frontier Airlines Flight 4345[during takeoff at high speed](https://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJykkL2unDAQRp_GdEbGsPwULpJIdDdtSmTs8eLdWRuNZyG8fbR5hVt_0qdzzp-v5ctGjOn-277AcMhLgrMgMAMt5b0DAaYofrXiZ5NXW2C1iAh3SH7RSvdS3WSjFm8jXktXeRMANLQVmGYYxk4NvdLVZtbRrZ3rJxeaabQ9rFY3aui7ybVhvTmoovm8qVujGqX6TtfT5H3wfhy9ndSoJtEp8JEz1Y8cE28Q8MoHUO3yq0KzMe9FtD-EnoWez_OsQ_77UfnsQs9M9gAUeg6UE0cg-QCWhSk-ochnRCxyByo5SQ_pAJI20p6JJb3TaS_J9gk5BFnAvSnyJVcC67aKjN_PiBhLP4hO3V824n8m_n7Nw-h_AQAA__-Pfo39). The pilot stopped takeoff procedures immediately."_ A dozen people reported minor injuries and [five were transported to local hospitals](https://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJykkL1uwzAQg59G3hScL_6RBw1tAW_p2tGQo3N8rSwZ0jVB3r5w-widCIIACX4fl-niOHC8vbuNrCxpivQogUQoT-V7p0whsno7q9c6za7Q7EIIdKPoJwTsNLS6hsk7Ds-pqbxdiJDOFdm6700DfQdYrbYj09SuHtoruHmecQYaOu_RGGhMR1ixPdqgraEG6Bo8DYP3i_fGeDeAgUE1QJ4l5dNn4igrLeGZ7pRP17RVwa4ie1HnF4WjwlFWWjmEI1M4rmmj45XCsYgT0g8n11Xh2JoeTAt6ySkKU9aOc-BIRXuK9z-_pyx6J09FMruoD_kihWOVrd8fHAKXrlcN3DbHv4uV_J_j3eJPAAAA__8SsYib).
## Super El Niño Possible
A "super El Niño" climate pattern [could develop during the middle of the year](https://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJykkL2O3CAUhZ8Gd4wuP7ahoEgiTbdpU1oXuIyJGLAws6t5-8h5hS2PjnR0vu_Px_aBueT6-I1PciO1rdLXWWgM6tv5OqhTqZn9UuynaB5P8lhKoQfVuEmQC4eZC9gi5vLe9BRdIpKkJnJiXY2GdQE57c5qZRaDswqz0ZYEglUASqYUvNAzTtldazALEACLljdrY0wxGhPRggHLNFDMo_Xb35br2CmVd_ukfgvtORW3j3GcTP1g8s7kHY-L4qqu0EcOhZi8U-E118ZDyU8cxPdX7zlgJb4TDh57ez32wTvmyqP1KpLBEIy2wprkvQC7Ju-BvE7L1F08vnIp-VxWpuHxxFz-nxnf1_jp5L8AAAD__2uGhkI), impacting global temperatures and rainfall patterns, according to the World Meteorological Organization. Exceptionally warm waters will boost tropical activity later in October and November raising the [risk of direct impacts](https://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJyk0L2O3SAUBOCnwR1XgH_ABUUSyd2mTWkdw-H6JBgswOvs20c3kfIC244-jUbz4219A4qUnt_hQNtCXhPeNWJrWNZ6nVgwJmLfevZV5g0qbhBjxCcmvyqhJi5GLsXqgeLHOnTeBkSFfYdWam0GoSehut1u46YlaGmClsbPPnix6UFuGrce5Dx2ZF9tYpRCCjEN6jHP3gfvjfEwCyNmNgj01HJ5_MyU2o4hfuR3LA-Xjy7avbWzsv4LUwtTy33fD3DuuhHa_s8wtWBiatmvUshBwlcQeaKUecs8XBj5CY4COf7f8IpQc-KUXEGoyAvVX5WHXLiDSCGXRMB3uIGIH_ibXGZqkcYYoceuWH_eFCPVSbNBPA-g-Hdu-_zR71b9CQAA__9SWJTW) in Hawaii, Southern California, and parts of Mexico. El Niño can also have a stabilizing effect on severe weather. The conditions typically subdue the hurricane season in the Atlantic. The climate pattern is a cyclical and natural warming of patches of the equatorial Pacific Ocean. The [majority of model forecasts suggest](https://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJykkM1uwyAQhJ8G34iWxT_4wKGt5Ft67dHCZomp1hDZNFHevnKqqg_Q6-5oZr75OI9nFzmmy7tbyZaQx0T3nakU2sb960obcYriTYtXlSe30-SYmS6U_IiArYRGKhi9i_wY68rbQISkK7Kq60wNXQtYLbZtVG9qNxlAJK37oEj5CcOsdWOUMlW0hxs0ChRAW-Op770P3hvjXQ8GelED-VjydvrMMZWFAj_yjbbTnNeK7VLKdRf6ReAgcLiTK8vPT-BwEAkcZo6rK_R3-O0PnXySSmKZYsoy5I1mtxe5uschqjbrr_fIHPe2EzVcVhf5GVz-P9nN4ncAAAD__06cfgk) at least a 50-50 chance for a "super El Niño," one in which ocean surface temperatures are at least 2 degrees Celsius warmer than average.
## List: Top Roller Coasters in the US
Phoenix at Knoebels Amusement Park in Elysburg, Pennsylvania was chosen as [the best roller coaster in the United States](https://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJyk0L1u6zAMxfGnkTcbFCN_DRruLeAtXTsadEglKhgrkJQEefsifYXO5-A3_L-O65Gixv38SVfxNaR1l2dRqVXyWu43yaJ7NB8H89-mjYpspKpylp1XBBxa6FsLK1PU1-oa9kEE5dCIt-M4ORgHwObirbVoR0Y7APW99JubeRpccJuEYG3fRP_WoLdgAQaH3TwzB-ZpYpphgtk4EI415e47xb1eJOgrPSR3p3Rt1F9qvRVz-GdwMbhY2KTU7l6oJqbX-2NwoSdlLgaX99jmpCq5PSUqVbLBpcmeb8-oGsswGgfnK0X95evfwzw8_gQAAP__2Kx3EQ) in a new survey from _USA Today_ 10Best. The classic wooden roller coaster, with panoramic views of the surrounding hills, finished ahead of Phantom's Revenge at Kennywood (West Mifflin, Pennsylvania) and Time Traveler at Silver Dollar City (Branson,__ Missouri). The survey chose Silver Dollar City as America's [best theme park](https://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJyk0LFugzAQxvGnMRvouBiMBw9tJbZ07Ygu3BHcGoxsJ1HevkpfofP36Tf8v87TmXzw-_WTNnFlidMujxykFElTvh2SJOxefZzUexsvlOVCIQS5ys4TAvY1dHULE5MPz0lX7BYRlFMlrjVm0GB6wGp1lrU2mgCgN4PtQJOeuwGNIBk7z7by7qVB10IL0GtsrGVemIeBycIAVmkQ9iWm5jv6vayyhGe8S2rmuFXBraUcWZ3eFI4KxxYukktzy1Qi0_P1UTjSgxJnheNrrMsqm9QHpR-FY5UcHw8fgs-9URquG_nwR5f_R7k7_A0AAP__lQR1Bg), embracing the identity of an 1880s mining town. The Hotel Hershey (Hershey, Pennsylvania) topped the list of [best theme-park hotels](https://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJykkD1uhDAQRk9jOtDYePkpXCSR6DZtSjQww-JkwMj27mpvH5ErpP4-vSe9r-t4RS9-v33ixi4vYdz5mYRz5jim-8GRZffqo1bvOkyYeEIR4RvvNBowTQmXUsNI6OU12oLcwmy4Ltjptu0stA2YYnVL280LIUx6ptlyPVPX27lpe5wICaDw7qTBRYMGaKyp-p5oIeo6wh466JUFJp9DrL6D3_PKi7zCg2M1h60Qt-Z8JFW_KTMoM2iYOOXqnjAHwtf5UWbAJ0ZKygznWOaVNy4PjD_lGjKLMkMRHR1PL-JT0yoLtw29_Any_9M8nPkNAAD__zm6eR8) for its wide range of sports and recreation facilities.

➤** Former Atlanta Braves manager** and Baseball Hall of Famer Bobby Cox died at 84. Cox led Atlanta to 14 straight division titles, five National League pennants, and the 1995 World Series championship. He retired with 2,504 wins--the fourth most among MLB managers. **Whatever happened to Father Flanagan and Boys Town?** Father Edward Flanagan built Boys Town on one of the most radical ideas in early 20th century America: that there was "no such thing as a bad boy." In 1917, the Irish-born Catholic priest opened a small home for homeless and delinquent boys in Omaha, at a time when troubled children were often dumped into prisons or brutal reform schools. What began as a modest shelter soon grew into a self-governing village where boys elected mayors, judges, and commissioners, an experiment in citizenship wrapped in Christian charity. [Here's Father Flanagan talking about its origins](https://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJyk0DFu7CAQANDT4G6tYWyDKSj-j-Ru06a02GWwiWZhBWQt3z5KrpALvOJ9XNerixzT9u4eZFvIa6KjMrVGZa1fTyrEKYq3QfyX-eYq3Rwz00bJrwioLjBdJKzeRT7XsfM2ECENHVmp9TyCVoDdbqW5G6lQBUQ1yQG1HnUwbho9SdCAXbQ_GkwSJIAasTfG--D9PHtnYAYjRiAfWy79Z46p7RT4zC8q_T0_OrZ7a88qhn8CF4HLcRz9LZ-15SP1uWwClz3WlsspcAmu7VQugV1ym0tdsf55ROZYlRYjbA8X-Vdtf_94WfwOAAD__4cIdCE). The timing was perfect. During the Depression, Americans were desperate for stories of redemption and hope. Boys Town offered both. Then Hollywood arrived. The 1938 film _Boys Town_ , starring Spencer Tracy as Flanagan and Mickey Rooney as a hardened juvenile delinquent, turned the priest into a national folk hero. [You can watch the trailer here](https://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJyk0LFuqzAUxvGnMVvQ4dgx9uAh90YZKqVb1W7I4OPg6oAjcILy9hV9ha7fJ_2G_-e1u_rEab69-4lcibmbaVuZSqGlWx93WojnJP5L8a_JvV-p98xMN5pDh4D6AMdDA13wiV-dqoKLREiyIte0rVHQasBqdAhWDpZia1XbWxgIpTcalIk9aKOxSm7X4NhAA6AV1taGEEMwJngLBqxQQCGVvNTfOc1lpMiv_KSlHvJUsRtLua9CngReBF62batf-VEePe3_vvgyjEJenkKem9OEX2-H80dR1eLCfUvMadWtUHCbfOJfsvw9xtPhTwAAAP__26Vxlg). Tracy won an Oscar, donations poured in, and Boys Town became one of the most admired charities in the country. For mid-century America, it symbolized the belief that compassion, discipline, and community could rescue almost any child. But Boys Town also belonged to a particular vision of America. It belonged to an America that believed moral authority could reform society, institutions could shape character, priests and civic leaders deserved trust, and national culture could unite around common myths. That America began to vanish after the 1960s. The country grew more skeptical of churches, paternalism, and grand moral crusades. Experts shifted toward foster care and smaller community programs instead of giant residential campuses. Fundraising controversies in the 1970s further tarnished Boys Town's saintly image. The organization survived by reinventing itself as a broad nonprofit network focused on behavioral health, counseling, and family services. [Boys Town still exists today](https://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJykzzFuwyAUgOHT4C3WMwYDA0NbKVu6dkS4PByqF4iABuX2VXuFHuD_pe_j4i4-UcrHu7-h7bG4jKMR9o7Vte87VqSc2NvKXpey-4a7JyI8MAfHgW8nkKcFXPCJnk5MwUZEjuuEdlFKC1Ab8OlqAaXQUq8GDSowal9WDWAiRi6FlOuU7O8N5AILwCb4bEwIMQStgzegwTABGFIvdf4qKfcrRnqWB9b5s9wmstfe742tL4yfGT-PMea9PFsvI8-lHoyfp2rDfSSi1DbFBBw3n-gv7v9nPyz_CQAA__-GQWrX). What disappeared was the myth. _Did you know the story of Boys Town or see the classic Spencer Tracy movie? Let us know your thoughts by replying to this email._

clean_body: A "super El Niño" climate pattern , impacting global temperatures and rainfall patterns, according to the World Meteorological Organization. | | | | | | Sunday, May 10, 2026 ---|--- Happy Mother's Day! On this day in 1908, Anna Jarvis held at Andrews Methodist Episcopal Church in Grafton, West Virginia, to honor her mother. She sent to the church for the service and later campaigned for Mother's Day to become a national holiday. In the early 20th century, Americans rallied around the stories of hope and redemption built by Father Edward Flanagan and Boys Town. But over time, skepticism over broad moral ideals eroded support for the community of homeless and delinquent boys, as noted in In case you missed it, this week on The Flyover Podcast , host Ayla Brown shared new concerns about what heavy AI use may be doing to our brains. Researchers are warning about a trend they call "cognitive surrender," but is AI really making us worse thinkers? More importantly, how can we avoid falling into the trap ourselves? . Today's sponsor, , is sharing simple, practical tips to help you cut expenses and create extra breathing room--even small changes can make a meaningful difference. | Frontier Jet Hits Pedestrian A Frontier Airlines plane of Denver International Airport during takeoff on Friday night, causing an engine fire and forcing passengers to evacuate. The unidentified person and crossed the runway before being hit by the moving plane at close to 11:19 p.m. The person was at least partially sucked into one of the engines, which ignited the brief engine fire. Transportation Secretary Sean Duffy said in a Saturday morning statement, "The trespasser on the runway was then struck by Frontier Airlines Flight 4345. The pilot stopped takeoff procedures immediately." A dozen people reported minor injuries and . Super El Niño Possible A "super El Niño" climate pattern , impacting global temperatures and rainfall patterns, according to the World Meteorological Organization. Exceptionally warm waters will boost tropical activity later in October and November raising the in Hawaii, Southern California, and parts of Mexico. El Niño can also have a stabilizing effect on severe weather. The conditions typically subdue the hurricane season in the Atlantic. The climate pattern is a cyclical and natural warming of patches of the equatorial Pacific Ocean. The at least a 50-50 chance for a "super El Niño," one in which ocean surface temperatures are at least 2 degrees Celsius warmer than average. List: Top Roller Coasters in the US Phoenix at Knoebels Amusement Park in Elysburg, Pennsylvania was chosen as in a new survey from USA Today 10Best. The classic wooden roller coaster, with panoramic views of the surrounding hills, finished ahead of Phantom's Revenge at Kennywood (West Mifflin, Pennsylvania) and Time Traveler at Silver Dollar City (Branson, Missouri). () ➤ A viral crowdfunding campaign has pledged $337 million to revive bankrupt Spirit Airlines, though experts say regulatory hurdles and the carrier's $8.1 billion debt make the effort unlikely to succeed. () | Whatever happened to Father Flanagan and Boys Town? Father Edward Flanagan built Boys Town on one of the most radical ideas in early 20th century America: that there was "no such thing as a bad boy." In 1917, the Irish-born Catholic priest opened a small home for homeless and delinquent boys in Omaha, at a time when troubled children were often dumped into prisons or brutal reform schools. What began as a modest shelter soon grew into a self-governing village where boys elected mayors, judges, and commissioners, an experiment in citizenship wrapped in Christian charity. . The timing was perfect. During the Depression, Americans were desperate for stories of redemption and hope. Boys Town offered both. Then Hollywood arrived. The 1938 film Boys Town , starring Spencer Tracy as Flanagan and Mickey Rooney as a hardened juvenile delinquent, turned the priest into a national folk hero. . Tracy won an Oscar, donations poured in, and Boys Town became one of the most admired charities in the country. For mid-century America, it symbolized the belief that compassion, discipline, and community could rescue almost any child. But Boys Town also belonged to a particular vision of America. It belonged to an America that believed moral authority could reform society, institutions could shape character, priests and civic leaders deserved trust, and national culture could unite around common myths. That America began to vanish after the 1960s. The country grew more skeptical of churches, paternalism, and grand moral crusades. Experts shifted toward foster care and smaller community programs instead of giant residential campuses. Fundraising controversies in the 1970s further tarnished Boys Town's saintly image. The organization survived by reinventing itself as a broad nonprofit network focused on behavioral health, counseling, and family services. . What disappeared was the myth. Did you know the story of Boys Town or see the classic Spencer Tracy movie? This email could change someone's life

| | [](https://email.alert.republicantaskforce.com/c/eJyUkL2unDAQhZ_GdKDxDzgULiJd0d20KdHseGCtGGOZ2SSPH7FSHuC253w6-nR-fq6fmHIq-w88ODTZ1natNTNenFkO5r81YyqrATP1MPYabkB3MUSKqKnjoL3_5mAGZ7tngFF7azeN6OaRgA0ZesC2-dFb1lvsUrinYNSgwYKDgWiiOMJMM_rReaccYOYmQ-P6euREWASvX9vZiAc6jy6Hp0i9lP2uzKLMcjG9Gg9YOJ5yE3cmWGKfSi9P7nesyiwVeyRJZ1F2ecmxEh4V016U_fhvpMz0bs4iXETZjyZb10Ksf1LO6Zq8crAfmPLbQ75w1-9g_gUAAP__cLV1zw)
Friend,

I promise I won’t take up much of your time.

In my film _2000 Mules_ , I exposed one of the greatest scandals in American history - the hijacking of the 2020 presidential election.

Today, I'm proud to join forces with Stand in the Gap, a non-profit organization dedicated to supporting the patriots who exercised their First Amendment rights in protest of the _outcome_ of that election.

**I want to reach as many people as I can with this request...**

I told their founder, Shane Jenkins, that I would help him raise $20,000 before the end of the month to help Stand in the Gap provide help, hope, and healing to the January 6th patriots.

Even a donation of $10 can give a January 6th patriot the support they need.

[If that is all you need to hear, then please contribute $10 or any amount you can generously afford using the button below:](https://email.alert.republicantaskforce.com/c/eJyUkL2unDAQhZ_GdKDxDzgULiJd0d20KdHseGCtGGOZ2SSPH7FSHuC253w6-nR-fq6fmHIq-w88ODTZ1natNTNenFkO5r81YyqrATP1MPYabkB3MUSKqKnjoL3_5mAGZ7tngFF7azeN6OaRgA0ZesC2-dFb1lvsUrinYNSgwYKDgWiiOMJMM_rReaccYOYmQ-P6euREWASvX9vZiAc6jy6Hp0i9lP2uzKLMcjG9Gg9YOJ5yE3cmWGKfSi9P7nesyiwVeyRJZ1F2ecmxEh4V016U_fhvpMz0bs4iXETZjyZb10Ksf1LO6Zq8crAfmPLbQ75w1-9g_gUAAP__cLV1zw)

**Otherwise, let me explain why I’m asking you to donate at least $10:**

$10 because the _“crime”_ these patriots committed was fighting for their country.

$10 because even though they’ve been pardoned, many of them are struggling to get back on their feet.

$10 because Stand in the Gap is providing them with the resources they need to successfully reintegrate into their communities, find work, reconnect with family, and restore their rights.

[$10 because no one should have to face these hardships alone.](https://email.alert.republicantaskforce.com/c/eJyUkL2unDAQhZ_GdKDxDzgULiJd0d20KdHseGCtGGOZ2SSPH7FSHuC253w6-nR-fq6fmHIq-w88ODTZ1natNTNenFkO5r81YyqrATP1MPYabkB3MUSKqKnjoL3_5mAGZ7tngFF7azeN6OaRgA0ZesC2-dFb1lvsUrinYNSgwYKDgWiiOMJMM_rReaccYOYmQ-P6euREWASvX9vZiAc6jy6Hp0i9lP2uzKLMcjG9Gg9YOJ5yE3cmWGKfSi9P7nesyiwVeyRJZ1F2ecmxEh4V016U_fhvpMz0bs4iXETZjyZb10Ksf1LO6Zq8crAfmPLbQ75w1-9g_gUAAP__cLV1zw)

Not only are these men and women patriots, but they come from all walks of life — law enforcement, veterans, white-collar professionals, blue-collar workers, and all races and religions.

_And they were hunted down in a political persecution that denied them their constitutional rights._

**Stand in the Gap exists to provide real, practical help, like rent money, job training, transportation, legal referrals, trauma counseling, and health insurance, to help these persecuted patriots move on with their lives.**

Your gift today can help one of these patriots find the help, hope, and healing they need to succeed in their second chance.

They do not deserve this sort of treatment. But for just $10, you can help Stand in the Gap give pardoned January 6th patriots the support they need to succeed at their second chance. Stand In The Gap is registered as a 501(c)(3) non-profit organization. All contributions are tax-deductible to the extent permitted by law. Stand In The Gap’s tax identification number is 93-1417599. | | | | | | | | | | | | | Pop Acta Media | Republican Task Force PO Box 461 Fort Collins, CO 80522 | _

subject: You helped her walk out free
body:
https://click.parlermailer.com/?qs=ABB7InYiOjEsImQiOjQ4NzJ9AAwAAAAAAI4iHZon0CiG9jXkKWahRkzcoJ8XS9VXjyYyOOX9fZXlvyUfny8Cb6sriLf5hI7134CZ5RPokpEyU4Mee5eso0BEz0eZ3EMI2NsBIg-y
View in browser
A Special Message from our SponsorPlease note that views expressed in this message do not necessarily reflect those of Parler and do not constitute an endorsement or recommendation by Parler.
Sound of FreedomFreedom doesn’t feel real at first… until it is. ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌
‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌
https://click.parlermailer.com/?qs=ABB7InYiOjEsImQiOjQ4NzJ9AAwAAAAAAI4iHZooCQOr8T6_zUM-UOtEe3K_dx1vxvyp5YbedjJ6VXWa8MdOxuJhgBm_MVaFDFGpcH-1Nq1Ny3hM98u23Gz6yuMVsKYy1YKaXFJ3

GOD'S CHILDREN ARE NOT FOR SALE

Friend,

She thought it was just another buyer.

Another message. Another hotel room and another piece of herself she would have to leave behind.

She had no reason to think anything would change.
But this time, someone was coming.

She received the message.

A time. A place. Nothing unusual.

That’s how traffickers keep control. Everything feels routine. Predictable.

But behind that message, a rescue plan was already in motion.

Our partners made contact through the ad. They spoke like buyers and kept everything normal.

Because that’s what it takes to reach victims like her and get close enough for the opportunity to pull them out.

Her trafficker dropped her off like property, pretending to be something he wasn’t.

https://click.parlermailer.com/?qs=ABB7InYiOjEsImQiOjQ4NzJ9AAwAAAAAAI4iHZopjLsDsnNrNvNMkl_BDUHhs2sO-Z7TkqihX4WO8Y6VSQ0zukFyQcPojF0S7jvevbmGT3Lmiw1R5Js5AQw1c2Q_fB9Y10t39wZ-
Give now. Help set them free.

But law enforcement was ready. Watching. Waiting.

And when he drove away, they moved in. The man that was controlling her life was arrested.

https://click.parlermailer.com/?qs=ABB7InYiOjEsImQiOjQ4NzJ9AAwAAAAAAI4iHZoq7dvtYoVGvJrNsOqMKjQ3xCeX3cP3S1SVFlyNDhTotCl9GPvRrBHVCEn8PYdT_Pin8hQOxaXrOky5sXZOFkP70m1IBI-m36zz

She walked into the hotel, up to the room and knocked quietly. When the door opened, she didn’t look up right away. Because this was survival. This was routine.

But then everything changed.

“No one here is going to hurt you.”
“You’re not in trouble.”
“We know who you are and we can get you out.”

They called her by her real name, then something shifted.

She didn’t run or speak. She froze. Because freedom doesn’t feel real at first. It feels like another trap.

So they waited. Calm. Patient.

“You don’t have to go back.”

More silence until, she spoke out, “…what happens to me?”

“We walk out together.”
“And you don’t go back.”

She took a step.
Then another and just like that, everything changed.
She walked out FREE.

https://click.parlermailer.com/?qs=ABB7InYiOjEsImQiOjQ4NzJ9AAwAAAAAAI4iHZorc65vTZ0UVSebIJsUJriBTmH3WrG-aoSRbnroifoAir3dP67BwKg3SXVx2XU4BiwigPhmRnW6NMSLjJKUizdLf_u7Q1VLgHHt

https://click.parlermailer.com/?qs=ABB7InYiOjEsImQiOjQ4NzJ9AAwAAAAAAI4iHZosSVWbfQ3vBFzNoDRqqzDGpkSGZiSxTh4B0yTvM4zFVcAnzW1SF1FE6woZoJsgmG6PYSvBFKW-KTS_XAVLV73tvMCdJJ78uYCb
Give now. Help set them free.

Friend, this is what the Sound of Freedom Foundation makes possible.

We exist for this moment.

To stop the sale of God’s children.

After the Sound of Freedom film opened the world’s eyes, we turned awareness into action.

We work through five key areas:

- We help prevent trafficking before it starts by strengthening vulnerable families.

- We support rescue operations like the one you just read about.

- We educate parents and communities to recognize the warning signs.

- We raise awareness so the world cannot look away.

- And we fight for laws that protect children and bring traffickers to justice.

But none of this happens without people like you.

Right now, another child is in that same place - believing no one is coming.

But you can change that.

https://click.parlermailer.com/?qs=ABB7InYiOjEsImQiOjQ4NzJ9AAwAAAAAAI4iHZotSasqyT1Bre2k4GxsJZsPGnmItXPDiq2AvBjtJZcfPynp1Q622D6qFVUPWzy2Qr38ja8_APD5sAhMiqX3RTmDf4jxbIiM59SW
Give now. Help set them free.

Jesus said, “Let the little children come to me… and do not hinder them.” (Matthew 19:14)

Today, YOU can help remove that barrier.
You can help bring freedom.

Please give now.

Help fund rescues, protect children and help stop the next story before it begins.

And if you can’t give today:

Pray.
Share this message.
Speak up.

Because silence is what allows this to continue.

But action brings FREEDOM.

Today, you can help a child take that first step out.

With gratitude and prayer,

https://click.parlermailer.com/?qs=ABB7InYiOjEsImQiOjQ4NzJ9AAwAAAAAAI4iHZouENC90uvSx2KF9S6njyMI8h6a8uAzLJcajjRsh8PVoxK84LeS2YPssrWSVc-osyR_bEw_MNjMVcsZu_E_4NCS0gGxjitdiRoe

Eduardo Verástegui
Sound of Freedom, Producer
For the Sound of Freedom Foundation

https://click.parlermailer.com/?qs=ABB7InYiOjEsImQiOjQ4NzJ9AAwAAAAAAI4iHZovJbl_E6VHxScq6SU2-0hmhV767tdotUq4yCq6K0n7hJaUnichDAv863q_JwUDZUg_LojMoR2J-DE8IPQA4BSB44CivNRBsnfX
Support the Sound of Freedom Foundation

6671 Southwest Freeway, Suite 700, Houston TX 77074

subject: Want a MK-45? My boss said "make them disappear"
body:

I was doing a final walkthrough of the warehouse this morning and spotted a pallet that shouldn't be there... We still have exactly **40 MK-45 Crossbows** sitting in the back—and they’re currently blocking the incoming summer inventory. My boss said: **“Make them disappear.”** So, here is the deal: If you cover the small shipping fee to get it to your door, I’m authorized to send you an MK-45 Crossbow for **$0.00**. Yep. A pro-grade crossbow, on the house. **[[YES — Send My FREE MK-45 Crossbow Now]](https://links.tacticalusa.com/a/1534/click/6829/11767687/5f2ea6acf83ffac26427ed92430ce7b546c49770/cee9fb4cd7147f49e8ea21763b76b0dfbe507d18)** **Ready to Shoot:** Ships with 5 bolts included. No assembly, no missing parts. Grab it and go. **Built Like a Tank:** Ultra-light fiberglass body. It’s rugged enough for real use without weighing you down. **The 50lb "Sweet Spot":** Fast, powerful, and easy to cock without destroying your shoulder. **No-BS Setup:** It’s tactical gear that works exactly how it’s supposed to, the moment it lands. **The Catch:** I only have **37 units**. Once that pallet is empty, this specific link will automatically shut down and the offer is dead. This email is only going to a small group of our top gear-heads, but it’s strictly first-come, first-served. **Claim your MK-45 here before the pallet is cleared:** **[[YES — Send Me My FREE MK-45 Crossbow]](https://links.tacticalusa.com/a/1534/click/6829/11767687/5f2ea6acf83ffac26427ed92430ce7b546c49770/cee9fb4cd7147f49e8ea21763b76b0dfbe507d18)** Best,

Dan _The TacticalUSA Warehouse_ **P.S.** If you’re seeing this, we still have at least one unit available. But please don’t wait—once the "40" is hit, I can't override the system to get you another one at this price. [**[Claim your $0 Crossbow here]**](https://links.tacticalusa.com/a/1534/click/6829/11767687/5f2ea6acf83ffac26427ed92430ce7b546c49770/cee9fb4cd7147f49e8ea21763b76b0dfbe507d18)

name: The Texas Flyover
subject: Deadline for Tax Protest, Severe Weather Update, and a new H-E-B
body:
Texas [homeowners have until May 15](https://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJykkLGSpSAQRb8GM15BD8oYEGxiNptuaCE0Qi1PLOh56t9vObXzBZN01HXvPefPx_xhU07b-ts-0dAZyrzh0TISYZ09Wp_ThqFUsudeC2Gjhi-cQcDARc-lmL1N-ZpV580i_Cg7NFLrdyXFqFUXDSwB9ABeLNqjGgc1BCmCBunQOe2xS-YOE70UUgro3x7j4NUyBDdqC-8uLEwJ9IlKfVBEwtO2kK_ywvpw5dllE4n2xt5-MZgYTMdxPFxO7i_E8tmobPcXg-nGYjDl4mxmMN2dDCbRf5-vYL7XsmOli5M9-X9g_q2B232vxbqYtpVHrMhANx7LwanwkNZI_CqflS8p3xVdNX4_Us6pDZopsT5tyl-b6WemXwb-BQAA__8tWJS_) to protest their 2026 property tax appraisals as rising valuations give many residents a strong incentive to challenge assessments.

| | |
---
| [](https://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJykkbuOGzEMRb9G09mQKHkexRQBjKmyaYNUAi1xbCF6OBI9a_99MJst023LSx7i4P58s28YYsjXH5ho5udabKb3FomZqvWEPoZMa6mMz3stTI0bbWRBQn-Qp4OS1mOIL2s6P1-kn1RHsxqG0Sg5Daa7zaPBQQNeQI6j1l6uEoyWSk0OwACZLsw7TJ6UVErCSR-n3ptLv7ppQBjdehFGkg9c6pFvxPTEtsZX2ageXUldnG_M9yb0NwGLgKWRe1Q6YiZfeN8QsGCiGhzmw0ZMFXM7OMpMdY829yFjr1hfNlEqNWAUemnlUR1ZVzwJfV6-_1IS-nEU0D842UQ-PJLQZ0oY4ufw34nQ5xtWj-23RffnM3KY7hiuWejz_z92dfb39xBjaP0gjLzu3A9B_lot2wx_AwAA__-tn6RP) | |
# Sunday, May 10, 2026
---|---
**Happy Mother's Day!** On this day in 1979, the Federal Reserve Bank of Dallas was [designated](https://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJykkD2O6yAURleDO1uA-YkLite4y2untC7mEiMRE8FVHO9-5GxhqlN9R5_Oz325Q8ppf_yHJzr6xLLseLSMRFiXgBBy2jGWSvB51ULYqOEbF8ml6bnuBV8CpHwuqgvO8zCJDp2w9qYEn6zqNjcGE0BrFYUcYdVcWx8499pLjDcDvkvuknEtuBBc6nGYTFDexHWyIG9r9ExxDIlKHWhDwg-0mM_yxjqs5dlltxG9Ghv_MTkzOR_HMVDboOzX86HUB5Pzd9UHOHt_XmByxp3qRTuarrrwOlLOqRnLFH88IeWvnP6W5O3kbwAAAP__Y0B2kg) a historic landmark. It was designed by the Chicago firm of Graham, Anderson, Probost, and White, and it opened in 1921. In case you missed it, this week on _The Flyover Podcast_ , host Ayla Brown shared new concerns about what heavy AI use may be doing to our brains. Researchers are warning about a trend they call "cognitive surrender," but is AI really making us worse thinkers? More importantly, how can we avoid falling into the trap ourselves? [Listen here](https://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJykz01qxCAUAODTmN2E508Ss3BRWgJdTCl00aVofM4IThz0ZX5uX9or9AIffN9He3Qpp-304S5o6BGL3fDeMhJhtQFdyGnDWCq5x7UWwkYNb2gFiPEAw4GDDS7lp1VdMB7CzDs0fJq04jBPqjsbB6PyOsaouYdRI4YYYFij0j7yWfoumV8MBg6cgxhkP49B-TGu8-SEXqNnCjAkKrWnMxI-XIv5WW5Y-7VcumzORNfG5AsTCxPLs-y09x6ZWD43ub-L7Wt_PTG5EJNvEkRXTbjeU86pjRNTcLq4lP8k-t__ZsRPAAAA__-sT27_). Today's sponsor is [American Veterans Center](https://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJykkbuOGzEMRb9G09mQKHkexRQBjKmyaYNUAi1xbCF6OBI9a_99MJst023LSx7i4P58s28YYsjXH5ho5udabKb3FomZqvWEPoZMa6mMz3stTI0bbWRBQn-Qp4OS1mOIL2s6P1-kn1RHsxqG0Sg5Daa7zaPBQQNeQI6j1l6uEoyWSk0OwACZLsw7TJ6UVErCSR-n3ptLv7ppQBjdehFGkg9c6pFvxPTEtsZX2ageXUldnG_M9yb0NwGLgKWRe1Q6YiZfeN8QsGCiGhzmw0ZMFXM7OMpMdY829yFjr1hfNlEqNWAUemnlUR1ZVzwJfV6-_1IS-nEU0D842UQ-PJLQZ0oY4ufw34nQ5xtWj-23RffnM3KY7hiuWejz_z92dfb39xBjaP0gjLzu3A9B_lot2wx_AwAA__-tn6RP). They're reminding us that Memorial Day is a time to pause and reflect on the sacrifices made by those who served our country. This year carries even more significance as America approaches its 250th birthday. [The American Veterans Center](https://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJykkbuOGzEMRb9G09mQKHkexRQBjKmyaYNUAi1xbCF6OBI9a_99MJst023LSx7i4P58s28YYsjXH5ho5udabKb3FomZqvWEPoZMa6mMz3stTI0bbWRBQn-Qp4OS1mOIL2s6P1-kn1RHsxqG0Sg5Daa7zaPBQQNeQI6j1l6uEoyWSk0OwACZLsw7TJ6UVErCSR-n3ptLv7ppQBjdehFGkg9c6pFvxPTEtsZX2ageXUldnG_M9yb0NwGLgKWRe1Q6YiZfeN8QsGCiGhzmw0ZMFXM7OMpMdY829yFjr1hfNlEqNWAUemnlUR1ZVzwJfV6-_1IS-nEU0D842UQ-PJLQZ0oY4ufw34nQ5xtWj-23RffnM3KY7hiuWejz_z92dfb39xBjaP0gjLzu3A9B_lot2wx_AwAA__-tn6RP) is leading one of the most meaningful ways to honor that legacy.

## Fight Your Tax Bill This Week
Texas [homeowners have until May 15](https://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJykkLGSpSAQRb8GM15BD8oYEGxiNptuaCE0Qi1PLOh56t9vObXzBZN01HXvPefPx_xhU07b-ts-0dAZyrzh0TISYZ09Wp_ThqFUsudeC2Gjhi-cQcDARc-lmL1N-ZpV580i_Cg7NFLrdyXFqFUXDSwB9ABeLNqjGgc1BCmCBunQOe2xS-YOE70UUgro3x7j4NUyBDdqC-8uLEwJ9IlKfVBEwtO2kK_ywvpw5dllE4n2xt5-MZgYTMdxPFxO7i_E8tmobPcXg-nGYjDl4mxmMN2dDCbRf5-vYL7XsmOli5M9-X9g_q2B232vxbqYtpVHrMhANx7LwanwkNZI_CqflS8p3xVdNX4_Us6pDZopsT5tyl-b6WemXwb-BQAA__8tWJS_) to protest their 2026 property tax appraisals as rising valuations give many residents a strong incentive to challenge assessments. Property values rose significantly across every major Texas metro this year, pushing assessments higher in Harris, Travis, Tarrant, and Bexar counties. Officials are encouraging homeowners to protest higher property appraisals, saying [the free process requires](https://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJykkLGutCAUhJ8GOwygwlpQ_I3d_u0tzVEOKwkrBk4W9-1v3NzkPsCtppgvM5P5us93CDHsj__wREunT_OOtUQkwjw7BBfDjj5lgvPIibBQwRfOSijNxcClmB2E-J77xtlFuFE2aKUxt16K0fTNZrtVQKcXY4YRlPcrrqiM7EA6Db7zugn2ChODFFIKNXTtqF2_aL-OBtRt9QvrBbpAKbe0IeEJxcd3emFu1_Rsot2IjsK6f0xNTE211vYD_S6-OKamJaYHU9OWKqfEf7xLD8z05gQnFg674zXsTE1Ntu6oIcZQtGG9eDwhxE8l_e2ol1XfAQAA__8B4YBf) no attorney, possibly lower tax bills, and yield real savings. Homeowners must present evidence of comparable sales or assessment errors during informal Appraisal Review Board hearings, though experts say many Texans skip the process and overpay taxes. Texas property owners can [review Texas Comptroller guidelines](https://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJykkLGO8yAQhJ8Gd7EWgsEuKP7GXf72SmttlgQJBwQrx3n70-Ue4cqRRjP6vq_bcsOY4vP-H3dyfIa8POnVEjFTXTyhT_FJIVfGs9TM1LjRQYsCZS4wXCQsHmN6L7rzbgU_yY6ctHbUEiaru4cLYTTeB2nXoLUe7ApBgx69ITQTTtRF9zMGgwQpQQ3XfjJeryZsk0U1bmEVGshHzrXnBzGd2EJ654Nqv-W9S-7BXJq4_hNqFmre8l645pSo9p9yf8-HUDPjSU2oudRcqPL7wnj-xg-UUHNXnS-vmFJsxgoN9x1j-nzw38wcTn0HAAD__1wKemw) for protesting and appealing property appraisals through local review boards, arbitration, or state district court.
## Abbott Renews Wildfire Disaster Proclamation
Gov. Greg Abbott [amended and renewed](https://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJykkLHOrCAQhZ9GOwywKFpQ3MZub3tLM8KgJAgGJu7u29-4_yP87cyXk--cf8_lCSGGtP2FAw29fV4SvmpEIiyLQ3AxJPS5ELzPkgkrVbxwkVwOjPdM8MVBiJ9Ftc6s3E2iRSO0HpXgk1btbnqulFqlVL0A_bDea-25VROfRjnyVbXB3GG8F1wILvtHNw1OrYO3kwY5Wr82iqMLlEtHOxK-ofr4yReWzuajjWYnOmvz-NPIuZHzlq_uC3Vbvho533UaOZ-50s8XS8qFwbpmIgYHJldZwRtjPhRkLwTasTCbkwsUcqrMhQqVsLCzZBvhgPvMQmIHfNht3xbjzleIMdRBN4pvB4T41aPfjXoZ-T8AAP__2LOPFg) Texas's fire weather conditions disaster proclamation on Friday, extending emergency authority across 40 counties in the Panhandle and South Plains. The order covers a wide swath of West Texas--from Dallam and Sherman in the far northwest to Lubbock, Garza, and Kent to the south--where hot, dry, and windy conditions have elevated wildfire risk heading into summer. Counties under the proclamation include Armstrong, Bailey, Briscoe, Carson, Castro, Cochran, Collingsworth, Crosby, and over 30 others. The timing coincides with National Wildfire Awareness Month. [Fire officials across Texas](https://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJyk0DHO4yAQhuHT4I4IMDamcLGNu3_bLa0JDMloibFg4iS3XzlX2HZGeqXn-_Oz_gBl2m6_4YEzv1NZN3y1jMxY14gQM22YSmV477UwNm544GqUGaUapFZrBMqf1XZxvqrodYezdm6yWnlnu_vsJ7STjx70pHWyLnkL0ANce-e9U6qj-YypQSutlRn6ix-jvY4peAdmCukqrMJIXOqF78j4hpbypxxYL6E8ujzfmfcm-l_CLMIsf48nng9hFqhMIaMwy2kSZsklQBZmCbhxhSy_MZmooiwpUSDITb4ox-9pr7hDxbhha5JpbxKejWmTXOGgJkN5bvwRZjGjlwOOMSWr5ImQtp8m6SevZdAppsFpbVB3dY77i3KmNjph1e0BlL8I_r_pj9n8CwAA__9_Q5iT) are urging residents to clear brush, avoid outdoor burning, and know their evacuation routes as fire season ramps up.
## Texas Tops Alabama for SEC Title
Texas claimed its[ first SEC softball title](https://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJykkLuu5CAQRL_GzjxqHjYmINhksrvphlYDzQwSHixozePvV55fuGGppKOq8-9n-8Fc8uP2F3dy_E51e9CrF2KmtkXCWPKDUm2M76NVps6dnrRJkMsE8yRgi5jLZ9NjdB6iFSM5YcyqBVijx7sLMcpZCi9MWAVqqfXqZzJ2WSEp0DBmd8JgFiAEyFld7BK1X1KwBuUakh80UMxc24XvxPTGnsqnPqldQt3H4u7MRx_Un0FeB3nF4zxwVmdonEOhQV47hanXxB5LmbCgxx2nL2zqoTaaovIRlAzCzgq99ovUVlEMKSUVxOzH5uLxyqXkvphBw23HXL4L-Hfenk7-DwAA___8DoGT) Saturday, beating No. 2 Alabama in Lexington, Kentucky, in the Longhorns' second season since joining the conference. Junior ace Teagan Kavan [dominated in the circle](https://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJykkT3u2zAMxU8jbwooxp-Dhy7a_l07GrRExwJky5CYOLl94QA9QRcSIMgf38P78zP9UIhhf_ymjUd5L2na-SyRRThPnsnHsPOSstD7yEm4SOEXTwjYami0gclTiJ-prvw4gx9MxaPpur42MHR1tY7k-8HdZ8fcEN3nlhqHjozpucEeqanCeMGgMWAMYHO_Da2v53ZxQ0fYu2VWNbAPkvJNVhZ-U1niJ70431zaqjiuIkdR918KrUJ7nuftWUiSp8-1oNAWSflz9SNlKQqtSzHyg69RWmSmGBXaS4VCC81VBoWWIs20kf6-1DG8WD8PT8JFF5cy68JO_wNoSc-808a7aLfSdoS0lzUc-nuo0A4ABjpoATqFtsqjP84QYyhtp2p4bBTi14_8XwqvEf8GAAD__wu7nXY), striking out 12 and allowing just one run as the Longhorns beat Alabama 7-1. The reigning Women's College World Series Most Outstanding Player capped off a strong tournament run that included a two-hit shutout of Ole Miss. Texas, the defending national champion, now claims the SEC's automatic bid to the NCAA Tournament. The [selection show airs today](https://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJykkL2u4yAQRp8GdxMB8U9cUGzj7m67pTWGwSDxJ-DmJm-_cl7htkejc0bfv6_9C33w6fyLkVR_2bwn-mmBeqe6G0ITfCKba8dXqblT642etEsuZ-ATCL4b9OG9j4NRBzerGEiJZXmMgq_LODhlx0M8DnHodZ4kR7HoFRe-cCkeerrf18GrS8YnwYXgcrrf1tmMx2z1uqB8aHuwkZPxPddbd9Tphc2Gd35Svekch6Bc76Wx-x8mNyY3aiWVSq3VnON1weT23ZjcPhAqBcJGF7iyTG58YnKL-HYUwTdwVAkuCZyEtcF3AZsrxFwJusMEkoPOIdBJ0LLtB4YAOidLlZIm0A5j8Tk158tVGaoy5ceH4Nu8sJGfEX34fN5_t_dTyf8BAAD__yy-lwE) on ESPN2.
| [](https://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJykkbuOGzEMRb9G09mQKHkexRQBjKmyaYNUAi1xbCF6OBI9a_99MJst023LSx7i4P58s28YYsjXH5ho5udabKb3FomZqvWEPoZMa6mMz3stTI0bbWRBQn-Qp4OS1mOIL2s6P1-kn1RHsxqG0Sg5Daa7zaPBQQNeQI6j1l6uEoyWSk0OwACZLsw7TJ6UVErCSR-n3ptLv7ppQBjdehFGkg9c6pFvxPTEtsZX2ageXUldnG_M9yb0NwGLgKWRe1Q6YiZfeN8QsGCiGhzmw0ZMFXM7OMpMdY829yFjr1hfNlEqNWAUemnlUR1ZVzwJfV6-_1IS-nEU0D842UQ-PJLQZ0oY4ufw34nQ5xtWj-23RffnM3KY7hiuWejz_z92dfb39xBjaP0gjLzu3A9B_lot2wx_AwAA__-tn6RP) This year's National Memorial Day Parade, [hosted by Honorary Grand Marshal Gary Sinise](https://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJykkT2P2zAMhn-NvCXQl-1o8FAg8NTrWnQSGJFOhEpWKjG-5N8Xvt7Y7Va-5EM8eH---TeIKa7XH5Bp4udS_ErvLREzVY8EmOJKS6kMz3stTI0bbeS11MNB9gclPUJML287nC4SnepoUuN4skq60Xa3yfWoFQZrUIVxsdirk7OglUMHRl1MF6cdJnsllZK6N0c3oL0MS3Aj6FNYLsJKwsilHvlGTE9oS3qVjeoxlNyl6cZ8b8J8E3oWem4UHpWOsBIW3jeEniFTjQHWw0ZMFdZ2CLQy1T3awoeMv0J9-Uy51AhJmLmVRw3kQ0ES5jx__-WccVro4cHZZ8L4yMKcKUNMn8N_F8Kcb1AR2m8P4c9nFCDfIV5XYc7_f9jVCe_vMaXYhlFYed25H378tVa2Sf8NAAD__2RppP0), is set to be the largest in its history. It stands as a powerful tribute to the men and women who made the ultimate sacrifice to defend our freedoms. What makes this event even more meaningful is how it is funded. [The American Veterans Center receives no federal funding for the parade](https://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJykkbuOGzEMRb9G09mQKHkexRQBjKmyaYNUAi1xbCF6OBI9a_99MJst023LSx7i4P58s28YYsjXH5ho5udabKb3FomZqvWEPoZMa6mMz3stTI0bbWRBQn-Qp4OS1mOIL2s6P1-kn1RHsxqG0Sg5Daa7zaPBQQNeQI6j1l6uEoyWSk0OwACZLsw7TJ6UVErCSR-n3ptLv7ppQBjdehFGkg9c6pFvxPTEtsZX2ageXUldnG_M9yb0NwGLgKWRe1Q6YiZfeN8QsGCiGhzmw0ZMFXM7OMpMdY829yFjr1hfNlEqNWAUemnlUR1ZVzwJfV6-_1IS-nEU0D842UQ-PJLQZ0oY4ufw34nQ5xtWj-23RffnM3KY7hiuWejz_z92dfb39xBjaP0gjLzu3A9B_lot2wx_AwAA__-tn6RP). It is made possible entirely by private citizens who believe in honoring those who served. Your support helps bring this national moment of remembrance to life while also funding year-round efforts to preserve veterans' stories, educate future generations, and produce documentaries that highlight the true cost of freedom. If honoring our veterans matters to you, [this is a meaningful way to take part](https://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJykkbuOGzEMRb9G09mQKHkexRQBjKmyaYNUAi1xbCF6OBI9a_99MJst023LSx7i4P58s28YYsjXH5ho5udabKb3FomZqvWEPoZMa6mMz3stTI0bbWRBQn-Qp4OS1mOIL2s6P1-kn1RHsxqG0Sg5Daa7zaPBQQNeQI6j1l6uEoyWSk0OwACZLsw7TJ6UVErCSR-n3ptLv7ppQBjdehFGkg9c6pFvxPTEtsZX2ageXUldnG_M9yb0NwGLgKWRe1Q6YiZfeN8QsGCiGhzmw0ZMFXM7OMpMdY829yFjr1hfNlEqNWAUemnlUR1ZVzwJfV6-_1IS-nEU0D842UQ-PJLQZ0oY4ufw34nQ5xtWj-23RffnM3KY7hiuWejz_z92dfb39xBjaP0gjLzu3A9B_lot2wx_AwAA__-tn6RP).
