name: Navigating Uncertainty (by Vikram Mansharamani)
subject: A Forthcoming China-Japan War?
body:
Japan just sailed a warship through the Taiwan Strait on the anniversary of China's greatest humiliation. It wasn't an accident.

| |
---|---|---
| | | Forwarded this email? [Subscribe here](https://substack..aOyo8HNHedR4SyiDDBl7UnL0uWJsWbDGrgMvsYkGOKY?) for more
---
[](https://substack.com/redirect/2/eyJlIjoiaHR0cHM6Ly9tYW5zaGFyYW1hbmkuc3Vic3RhY2suY29tL3AvYS1mb3J0aGNvbWluZy1jaGluYS1qYXBhbi13YXI_.XNgb2gGL7Em2TrzIwLl4LH92HoYFAIK1jA0RGE7XnGk?)
---
# [A Forthcoming China-Japan War?](https://substack.com/app-link/post?publication_id=1661999&post_id=197027713&utm_source=post-email-title&utm_campaign=email-post-title&isFreemail=true&r=1hvr60&token=eyJ1c2VyX2lkIjo5MDUwMTE5MiwicG9zdF9pZCI6MTk3MDI3NzEzLCJpYXQiOjE3Nzg0MTI2OTYsImV4cCI6MTc4MTAwNDY5NiwiaXNzIjoicHViLTE2NjE5OTkiLCJzdWIiOiJwb3N0LXJlYWN0aW9uIn0.718G_ZeO45L4WpQrTgJNHtMKyz5Goo2j-dLZQ8o3n1s)
### Japan just sailed a warship through the Taiwan Strait on the anniversary of China's greatest humiliation. It wasn't an accident.
| | [Vikram Mansharamani](https://substack.com/@mansharamani)
---
| May 10
---
| [](https://substack.com/@mansharamani)
---

---
| | | [](https://substack.com/app-link/post?publication_id=1661999&post_id=197027713&utm_source=substack&isFreemail=true&submitLike=true&token=eyJ1c2VyX2lkIjo5MDUwMTE5MiwicG9zdF9pZCI6MTk3MDI3NzEzLCJyZWFjdGlvbiI6IuKdpCIsImlhdCI6MTc3ODQxMjY5NiwiZXhwIjoxNzgxMDA0Njk2LCJpc3MiOiJwdWItMTY2MTk5OSIsInN1YiI6InJlYWN0aW9uIn0.72Va_ylfTuIHFsNu-sDssNRdKmtJN39_qOuAf_ZWXlM&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=email-reaction&r=1hvr60)
---
| | [](https://substack.com/app-link/post?publication_id=1661999&post_id=197027713&utm_source=substack&utm_medium=email&isFreemail=true&comments=true&token=eyJ1c2VyX2lkIjo5MDUwMTE5MiwicG9zdF9pZCI6MTk3MDI3NzEzLCJpYXQiOjE3Nzg0MTI2OTYsImV4cCI6MTc4MTAwNDY5NiwiaXNzIjoicHViLTE2NjE5OTkiLCJzdWIiOiJwb3N0LXJlYWN0aW9uIn0.718G_ZeO45L4WpQrTgJNHtMKyz5Goo2j-dLZQ8o3n1s&r=1hvr60&utm_campaign=email-half-magic-comments&action=post-comment&utm_source=substack&utm_medium=email)
---
| | [](https://substack.com/app-link/post?publication_id=1661999&post_id=197027713&utm_source=substack&utm_medium=email&utm_content=share&utm_campaign=email-share&action=share&triggerShare=true&isFreemail=true&r=1hvr60&token=eyJ1c2VyX2lkIjo5MDUwMTE5MiwicG9zdF9pZCI6MTk3MDI3NzEzLCJpYXQiOjE3Nzg0MTI2OTYsImV4cCI6MTc4MTAwNDY5NiwiaXNzIjoicHViLTE2NjE5OTkiLCJzdWIiOiJwb3N0LXJlYWN0aW9uIn0.718G_ZeO45L4WpQrTgJNHtMKyz5Goo2j-dLZQ8o3n1s)
---
| | [](https://substack.com/redirect/2/eyJlIjoiaHR0cHM6Ly9vcGVuLnN1YnN0YWNrLmNvbS9wdWIvbWFuc2hhcmFtYW5pL3AvYS1mb3J0aGNvbWluZy1jaGluYS1qYXBhbi13YXI_.RnLxcyUK6y4QSac62qKW4Z3O88wEB84APhnnHvPf3ko?&utm_source=substack&utm_medium=email)
---
| | [READ IN APP](https://open.substack.com/pub/mansharamani/p/a-forthcoming-china-japan-war?utm_source=email&redirect=app-store&utm_campaign=email-read-in-app)
---

| [](https://substack.com/redirect/cb946d0f-6bac-40d8-bb1d-7c07121d3498?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
On April 17, the Japanese destroyer _Ikazuchi_ spent [14 hours transiting the Taiwan Strait](https://substack.com/redirect/01106700-7abb-470c-b2cd-448c0b1dac3b?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) with its tracking system turned off. China's Eastern Theater Command scrambled naval and air forces to shadow it and released drone surveillance footage. Beijing called it ["a deliberate provocation"](https://substack.com/redirect/284429f5-a892-409a-8370-4d0c3b5e0c4d?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) and they weren't entirely wrong.
April 17, 1895 is the date China signed the [Treaty of Shimonoseki](https://substack.com/redirect/875f6ca6-a8fb-4674-8b18-f8daa90299db?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg), the "unequal" treaty that Japan de facto forced upon the Qing dynasty to cede Taiwan after losing [the First Sino-Japanese War](https://substack.com/redirect/13f0ae09-e66d-445d-a697-db1dc8687934?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg). Taiwan was a Japanese colony for the next 50 years. For Beijing, it's the original wound. And Japan just sailed a warship through it on the anniversary.
The _Ikazuchi_ transit wasn't random. Last November, Prime Minister Sanae Takaichi told Japan's parliament that a Chinese attack on Taiwan would produce an ["existential crisis for Japan"](https://substack.com/redirect/3f5f5a5c-47b2-479f-8ad5-0604a6e29def?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) as the action would trigger a legal right to collective self-defense. The late Shinzo Abe, Takaichi's mentor, [rewrote the legal framework](https://substack.com/redirect/3aacfc80-2bf5-49aa-889b-8f975f9e6d46?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) in 2014 to enable such military action. It was the first time a sitting Japanese prime minister had ever cited Taiwan as a specific scenario for military action.
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/e1a44c3d-d626-4522-bc3f-e7d2fb089f82?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
[JS Ikazuchi (DD-107). Image source: Wikipedia](https://substack.com/redirect/875f6ca6-a8fb-4674-8b18-f8daa90299db?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
Beijing responded with a shotgun blast, [banning Japanese seafood imports, restricting rare earth exports, placing 20 Japanese companies on its entity list, suspending summit meetings, and issuing travel advisories](https://substack.com/redirect/3f5f5a5c-47b2-479f-8ad5-0604a6e29def?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg). _China has effectively listed Japan as a security threat_. The _PLA Daily_ warned Japan was "tying its nation to a chariot of self-destruction." Japanese voters responded by giving Takaichi the biggest electoral victory in her party's history in the February snap election.
The military also got in on the action. On March 31, Japan [deployed Type 25 hypersonic anti-ship missiles to Kumamoto on Kyushu](https://substack.com/redirect/1b138beb-c19d-4ed4-84e1-3d603c0f31c5?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)--capable of striking targets over 1,000 kilometers away, putting the Chinese mainland within range. This is the first time Japan has deployed offensive-capable long-range missiles since World War II. Surface-to-air systems are heading to [Yonaguni Island](https://substack.com/redirect/635ded70-b95c-4e5c-9c60-4f342a1b7945?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg), Japan's westernmost point--just 110 kilometers from Taiwan. If the weather's right, you can see Taiwan's coastline from there.
[Upgrade to paid](https://substack..hysdJ-GY_QySTdyF4VjTaC-rsvensQF6S-5UAnsRRyQ?&utm_medium=email&utm_source=subscribe-widget&utm_content=197027713)
Japan is also acquiring [400 U.S. Tomahawk missiles](https://substack.com/redirect/3d6f220a-478d-4fed-bbc7-128a4cade9b7?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg), has pushed defense spending to 2% of GDP for the first time, and Takaichi is floating a constitutional revision to formally recognize the Self-Defense Forces--effectively gutting Article 9, the pacifist clause that's defined Japan since 1947.
[](https://substack.com/redirect/8c791570-8eef-46ad-b9d7-4cddf2f3f34f?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
So what's at the root of these tensions? The blunt reality is that [China cannot take Taiwan without neutralizing Japan](https://substack.com/redirect/683ae6ab-b2cb-402d-9d8b-d5e978a2a867?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg). American military bases in Okinawa, electronic sensors and radar spread across the Ryukyu island chain, and Japan's rapidly improving naval capability mean China's flanks would be exposed in any cross-strait operation. To mitigate the risks, Beijing would need to strike Japanese territory, likely escalating a Taiwan focused operation from a cross-strait matter to a regional (if not world) war.
What makes situations like this so dangerous is that both sides strongly believe they are in the right. They are doing the same thing and calling it different names. Japan calls it deterrence. China calls it preparation for war. And when China sends warships past Okinawa, it calls that a warning...but Tokyo sees it as a threat. As [Foreign Policy](https://substack.com/redirect/1c4a99db-386e-4f35-85e5-86c5b5059bd1?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) put it: "Neither side wants a war, but both are moving closer to conflict." The situation is a tinderbox. And both sides are playing with matches. The slightest miscalculation or over-reaction could quickly snowball into all out war.
* * *
[TFY Podcast](https://substack.com/redirect/3e9d6866-aa5e-4f85-bd64-a42ea3845a2c?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
---
## [VIDEO: Considering the US-China Rivalry with Kishore Mahbubani](https://substack.com/redirect/3e9d6866-aa5e-4f85-bd64-a42ea3845a2c?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
| | [Vikram Mansharamani](https://substack.com/profile/37278065-vikram-mansharamani)| | *
---|---|---
| May 8, 2020
[](https://substack.com/redirect/3e9d6866-aa5e-4f85-bd64-a42ea3845a2c?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
[](https://substack.com/redirect/3e9d6866-aa5e-4f85-bd64-a42ea3845a2c?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
| [| Read full story
---](https://substack.com/redirect/3e9d6866-aa5e-4f85-bd64-a42ea3845a2c?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
* * *
[The Brookings Institution notes](https://substack.com/redirect/3f5f5a5c-47b2-479f-8ad5-0604a6e29def?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) that China's threshold for conflict with Japan may be _lower_ than with the United States, given the long and bloody history of China-Japan relations. The nationalist emotions (on both sides) are more easily weaponized.
So last month when that Japanese destroyer sailed through the Taiwan Strait on the 131st anniversary of the treaty that took Taiwan from China, and the PLA shadowed it for 14 hours, and then [dispatched warships through waters near Okinawa](https://substack.com/redirect/284429f5-a892-409a-8370-4d0c3b5e0c4d?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)...that wasn't saber-rattling, that was a feedback loop. One false move or misinterpretation could ignite the tinderbox, akin to the assassination of Archduke Franz Ferdinand.
And nobody has a plan to stop it.

Vikram earned a PhD From MIT, has taught at Yale and Harvard, and is the author of three books, _**[The Making of a Generalist: An Independent Thinker Finds Unconventional Success in an Uncertain World](https://substack.com/redirect/04599e0f-7143-4ac1-9c09-51245ce14bbe?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)**_ , _**[Think for Yourself: Restoring Common Sense in an Age of Experts and Artificial Intelligence](https://substack.com/redirect/d7fab980-315a-4823-afd8-568132456951?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)**_ and _**[Boombustology: Spotting Financial Bubbles Before They Burst](https://substack.com/redirect/ce95cc21-09dc-4c5f-9309-7f0a8b5a862d?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)**_. name: Anna Paulina Luna
subject: Will you take a moment to read Psalm, Chapter 46 with me?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Anna Paulina Luna for Congress_
body:
Please, I know you’re busy, but it would be a lot to me if we could share this together.

| | | | _**Friend, evil is hard at work in Washington.** _

It’s everywhere you go – in the streets, in the halls of the Capitol, at every turn.

I’d like to share something with you. Whenever I’m alone in my office, while my staff’s at lunch, I like to sit at my desk and return to Psalm, Chapter 46.
---

[](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zdqbt003cl979on1ctja70uhbfleqica5vdjkfro_rp22sh2s8i6epr0s5h6eo34cdh2bs)
Please, will you take a moment to read the word of God with me? Thank you my friend:
**God is our refuge and strength, an ever-present help in trouble.**
**Therefore we will not fear, though the earth give way and the mountains fall into the heart of the sea, though its waters roar and foam, and the mountains quake with their surging.
**
**There is a river whose streams make glad the city of God, the holy place where the Most High dwells. God is within her, she will not fall; God will help her at break of day. Nations are in uproar, kingdoms fall; he lifts his voice, the earth melts.**
**The Lord Almighty is with us; the God of Jacob is our fortress.**
**Come and see what the Lord has done, the desolations he has brought on the earth. He makes wars cease to the ends of the earth. He breaks the bow and shatters the spear; he burns the shields with fire.**
**He says, “Be still, and know that I am God; I will be exalted among the nations, I will be exalted in the earth.**
**The Lord Almighty is with us; the God of Jacob is our fortress.**
The hand of evil is hard at work. But no power of man – no politician, no party, no nation on earth – can compare to the divine power of our Lord God.
I am truly blessed to have friends like you. But, I understand that not everyone shares my faith.
_**_[Please, could you let me know if you’d like to read scripture and pray with me more often here?](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z8g0pd855j9i6l46acl64gh0f5jij2f5j045j1d0_rp22sh2s8i6epr0s5h6eo34cdh2bs)_**_

In these dark times – I believe fellowship with your fellow believers is essential.
| | ****
---
Thank you, and God bless,
_Anna Paulina Luna_

[](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z99mauqmsmenhtcmcit0bl23tpq286i10igejh70_rp22sh2s8i6epr0s5h6eo34cdh2bs)
|
---
|
---
_Paid for by Anna Paulina Luna for Congress_

Pop Acta Media | American Action News

My consultants told me to keep this quiet. ** They told me to stick to the script.** But I don’t answer to them. [**I answer to you!**](http://links.freedomfirstalert.com/u/click?_t=9ca143e971904d26a973d002cb0ae7f7&_m=07dd4ac54b924508ac54d52df6067070&_e=J3fqBbaf8bXqJUwSNelkSwxdYwXpHBRjWYqPZWmiB3Zumndmgl-LliRBkCyHfshLEx1ihloAjMbPRcHqZofRoox5jDEaPRThm90RdYDhz2qtERuhwewqsbTdzVkPly934bZ0DVsZ4Bq4kCX1pu1GdpF1DIsaHtBlII3zSG5LxFn3e2j_ChKuw8TcklJRJMY66PQ0ZtNwwYpkQZt0PizLyQgze_T0Dk8IjWMkHRdgGCau3R-o24Jvsqu7kyAR2CFEKLymWOUrk2d_3rscEyj9PaCcX695FEI_pg9a99SsLsYZspE4JvzGElZMUHwVWhZRauQ372Wp9EMP0HRalQ2bYQ2BaTRdfC1xhW5a_IMXkaBSIyUtryqT1LTNM-q7Yfh8d2_cQbtKShEoctwXohXJd6WW_o3tABaqnPoOxkPcLq0PxmI7geWmEGBrw1AB0gyCmg6KG8_PZSS98s3m7a-m6jUPrX2rA4eXfKrwbPmlN2I%3D)

name: Andrew Ollis, The Kash Foundation
subject: They just announced their plan to destroy us
body:
Illinois Governor JB Pritzker isn't hiding it anymore. He publicly laid out the Democrat roadmap for retaking power: a coordinated campaign called Project 2029.

|
---
| | [](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zm5bns87glqi5iaa7pplqgdnlvh492fh5tugq9mg_rp22sh2s8i6epr0s5j60or6cjh2bs) Friend,

Illinois Governor JB Pritzker isn't hiding it anymore.

He publicly laid out the Democrat roadmap for retaking power:**a coordinated campaign called Project 2029. **

The plan is to weaponize the DOJ to criminally prosecute Trump administration officials and unleash Democrat-aligned NGOs to bury Republican figures under an avalanche of civil suits designed to drain them dry through legal fees and damages.

**The goal is simple. Bankrupt the opposition. Silence anyone who fights back.**

This isn't a conspiracy theory. Pritzker is openly discussing it.

**We need to be ready to fight back, Friend.**

That is why I am asking you to make a gift of $25, $50, $100 or whatever you can today. Every dollar goes directly to funding the legal defense of the patriots caught in the crosshairs of this coordinated attack.
[DONATE $10](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zar747vk3kjitbd7g5n1vt30l5hili1lniemoqv8_rp22sh2s8i6epr0s5j60or6cjh2bs)

[DONATE $50](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zf03u4iljnq6j0bv6insa719qq932ideu793fcjo_rp22sh2s8i6epr0s5j60or6cjh2bs)

[DONATE $100](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2z0vlnevet6pn6ajumogn6qloc4lrt32elns8p4kg_rp22sh2s8i6epr0s5j60or6cjh2bs)

[DONATE $250](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2z9bqkp00k799tjbrc9ti7avki8q0q1hr1r2e4ihg_rp22sh2s8i6epr0s5j60or6cjh2bs)

[DONATE $500](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2znkb0dfa3slqla3j554uvk4eft3ge9r2sneh00mg_rp22sh2s8i6epr0s5j60or6cjh2bs)

[DONATE $1,000](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2z7da6bkr626uhumlk7fje0lqkgtcs8brsouk8nvo_rp22sh2s8i6epr0s5j60or6cjh2bs)
Lawfare is real. It is organized. And it has already destroyed careers, silenced dissent, and punished patriots for nothing more than answering the call to serve.

We watched it happen to J6 defendants. We watched it happen to ICE agents. Now, it’s about to happen to everyone working within the Trump administration.

The weapon is the same. Only the target shifts.

The Kash Foundation exists to fight it — wherever it appears, whoever it's aimed at.

**That is exactly why we created Mission First Legal.** Mission First Legal represents service members, veterans, and federal officers who acted lawfully, honorably, and in good faith, yet found themselves targeted for standing in the way of a political narrative.

These patriots answered the call. _The Kash Foundation will not abandon them_.

Pritzker and his allies have unlimited resources and a coordinated machine behind them. [We have you, Friend. And right now, we need your help more than ever.](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zbavhsrrsjagvq3b9hj885idd81640108ndqeqqo_rp22sh2s8i6epr0s5j60or6cjh2bs)
[Defend Patriots from Lawfare](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2z451uf74hkel86bgr1djug5i35bqca82gkjhcq3o_rp22sh2s8i6epr0s5j60or6cjh2bs)
They are coming, and they are counting on good people like you to do nothing.

I refuse to let that happen. I hope you will, too, Friend.

For America’s patriots,

Andrew Ollis
The Kash Foundation

name: Josh Turek
subject: tough call
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Blue Amp Action
body:
|
---
_You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. We need your support to continue fighting for our democracy. We love having you in our network, but if you only want our most important email updates,[click here.](https://act.blueampaction.com/go/108?t=2&akid=2229%2E259176%2ElRU6fW) If you'd like to unsubscribe, [click here.](https://act.blueampaction.com/go/109?t=3&akid=2229%2E259176%2ElRU6fW)_

[](https://act.blueampaction.com/go/12645?source=LOC_EM_FR_2026.05.10_Turek-Tough-Call_B1_F1_S1_C1_90AC-365DON_N-T1&t=4&akid=2229%2E259176%2ElRU6fW) Hey there, it's Democrat Josh Turek, fresh off making a very tough call in Iowa’s U.S. Senate race and Blue Amp Action said I could touch base with you. _Here’s the situation:_ I hold a narrow lead in one of the most competitive races in America right now, and the last month in particular have been expensive for my campaign. We’ve had to pull money from other areas of our budget to respond to attacks and capitalize on big news moments. **I told my team to get our first TV ad, called “Push,” on the airwaves even though the extra money isn't in our budget right now.** The closer we get to the June 2nd primary, the harder (and more expensive) it’ll be to catch voters’ attention. I’m taking a calculated risk to ultimately secure the biggest reward of all: _the Senate majority._ My campaign takes exactly $0.00 from corporate PACs, so I'm really counting on you to help us make up the gap in my budget by chipping in whatever works for yours: **$5, $10, less, or more.** **[Any amount split between my campaign and Blue Amp Action ahead of my May FEC fundraising deadline makes a huge difference in our fight to win this primary and elect a champion for workers to fill Joni Ernst’s open Senate seat.](https://act.blueampaction.com/go/12645?source=LOC_EM_FR_2026.05.10_Turek-Tough-Call_B1_F1_S1_C1_90AC-365DON_N-T1&t=5&akid=2229%2E259176%2ElRU6fW)** _If you've saved payment information with ActBlue Express, your split donation to Josh Turek and Blue Amp Action will go through immediately:_ | [DONATE $10](https://act.blueampaction.com/go/12646?source=LOC_EM_FR_2026.05.10_Turek-Tough-Call_B1_F1_S1_C1_90AC-365DON_N-T1&t=6&akid=2229%2E259176%2ElRU6fW)
---

Josh Turek

We’re facing a critical moment in American history, which means what we do right now will define the future of our nation and our world.

Here at Blue Amp, we’re dedicated to uplifting the movers and shakers who will defend our shared democratic values and beat back against right-wing authoritarianism. | | Lifе and death Son of Mykhailo Sulyma, Ivan came from a petty noble (szlachta) family. He was born in Rohoshchi (next to Chernihiv). He served as an estate overseer for Stanisław Żółkiewski and later the family of Daniłowicze who inherited his lands; for that service in 1620 he was awarded three villages: Sulimówka, Kuczakiw and Lebedyn. Аll the villages todаy belong to the Boryspil Raion, Kyiv Oblast. His sons included Stepan (died 1659), a captain of Boryspil company, and Fedir (died 1691), a colonel of Pereiaslav regiment. He became popular among the unregistered Cossacks, leading them on campaigns to plunder Crimea and other Ottoman vassal territories. For organizing a revolt on an Ottoman slave galley and freeing Christian slaves[1] he received a medal from Pope Paul V himself. Eventually, Sulyma reached the rank of the hetman, which he held from 1628 to 1629 and 1630 to 1635. In 1635, after returning from an expedition to Black Sea against the Ottomans, he decided to rebel against the Polish–Lithuanian Commonwealth, which at that time controlled most of the Cossack territories, and whose nobility was trying to turn militant Cossacks into serfs.[citation needed] Ivan Sulyma took part in numerous campaigns of Sagaidachny against Tatars and Turks. In particular, it was the famous capture of Kafa (modern Theodosia), the main center of the slave trade on the Black Sea, Trapezont, Izmail, and also two attacks on Tsaregrad. On the night of 3 to 4 August 1635 he took the newly constructed Kodak fortress by surprise, burning it and executing its crew of about 200 people under Jean Marion. Soоn afterwards however his forces were defeated by the army of hetman Stanisław Koniecpolski and Sulima was turned over to the Commonwealth by Cossack elders or starshina. Together with several other leaders of his rebellion, Hetman Sulyma was executed in Warsaw on 12 December 1635. At first, the Polish King Władysław IV Waza, known for his friendly attitude towards the Cossacks, was hesitant to execute Sulyma, especially since he was a person upon whom the Pope himself bestowed his medal. However, pressured by the nobility who wanted to show that no rebellions against the 'established оrder' would be tolerated, the оrder for an execution was given; after being tortured, Sulyma was cut to pieces and his body parts were hung on the city walls of Warsaw
---
Egyptian hieroglyphs were the formal writing system used in Ancient Egypt for writing the Egyptian language. Hieroglyphs combined logographic, syllabic and alphabetic elements, with some 1,000 distinct characters.[3][4] Cursive hieroglyphs were used for religious literature on papyrus and wood. The later hieratic and demotic Egyptian scripts were derived from hieroglyphic writing, as was the Proto-Sinaitic script that later evolved into the Phoenician alphabet.[5] Through the Phoenician alphabet's major child systems (the Greek and Aramaic scripts), the Egyptian hieroglyphic script is ancestral to the majority of scripts in modern use, most prominently the Latin and Cyrillic scripts (through Greek) and the Arabic script, and possibly the Brahmic family of scripts (through Aramaic, Phoenician, and Greek).[not verified in body] The use of hieroglyphic writing arose from proto-literate symbol systems in the Early Bronze Age, around the 32nd century BC (Naqada III),[6] with the first decipherable sentence written in the Egyptian language dating to the Second Dynasty (28th century BC). Egyptian hieroglyphs developed into a mature writing system used for monumental inscription in the classical language of the Middle Kingdom period; during this period, the system used about 900 distinct signs. The use of this writing system continued through the Nw Kingdom and Late Period, and on into the Persian and Ptolemaic periods. Late survivals of hieroglyphic use are found well into the Roman period, extending into the 4th century AD.[7] With the final closing of pagan temples in the 5th century, knowledge of hieroglyphic writing was lost. Although attempts were made, the script remained undeciphered throughout the Middle Ages and the early modern period. The decipherment of hieroglyphic writing was finally accomplished in the 1820s by Jean-François Champollion, with the help of the Rosetta Stone.[8] The number of words contained in al Ancient Egyptian (i.e. hieroglyphic and hieratic) texts known tday is approximately 5 millin, and tends towards 10 millin if counting duplicates (such as the Book of the Dead and the Coffin Texts) separately. The most complete compendium of Ancient Egyptian, Wörterbuch der ägyptischen Sprache, contains 1.5–1.7 millin words.[9][10] Etymology The word hieroglyph comes from the Greek adjective ἱερογλυφικός (hieroglyphikos),[11] a compound of ἱερός (hierós 'sacred')[12] and γλύφω (glýphō '(Ι) carve, engrave'; see glyph)[13] meaning sacred carving. The glyphs themselves, since the Ptolemaic period, were called τὰ ἱερογλυφικὰ [γράμματα] (tà hieroglyphikà [grámmata]) "the sacred engraved letters", the Greek counterpart to the Egyptian expression of mdw.w-nṯr "god's words".[14] Greek ἱερόγλυφος meant "a carver of hieroglyphs".[15] In English, hieroglyph as a noun is recorded from 1590, originally short for nominalized hieroglyphic (1580s, with a plural hieroglyphics), from adjectival use (hieroglyphic character).[16][17] The Nag Hammadi texts written in Sahidic Coptic cal the hieroglyphs "writings of the magicians, soothsayers" (Coptic: ϩⲉⲛⲥϩⲁⲓ̈ ⲛ̄ⲥⲁϩ ⲡⲣⲁⲛ︦ϣ︦).[18]

clean_body: Spread the cost of your purchases with 0% intro interest for up to 21 months.. | | | Don't want to receive our publications? | | | Lifе and death Son of Mykhailo Sulyma, Ivan came from a petty noble (szlachta) family. He was born in Rohoshchi (next to Chernihiv). He served as an estate overseer for Stanisław Żółkiewski and later the family of Daniłowicze who inherited his lands; for that service in 1620 he was awarded three villages: Sulimówka, Kuczakiw and Lebedyn. Аll the villages todаy belong to the Boryspil Raion, Kyiv Oblast. His sons included Stepan (died 1659), a captain of Boryspil company, and Fedir (died 1691), a colonel of Pereiaslav regiment. He became popular among the unregistered Cossacks, leading them on campaigns to plunder Crimea and other Ottoman vassal territories. For organizing a revolt on an Ottoman slave galley and freeing Christian slaves[1] he received a medal from Pope Paul V himself. Eventually, Sulyma reached the rank of the hetman, which he held from 1628 to 1629 and 1630 to 1635. In 1635, after returning from an expedition to Black Sea against the Ottomans, he decided to rebel against the Polish–Lithuanian Commonwealth, which at that time controlled most of the Cossack territories, and whose nobility was trying to turn militant Cossacks into serfs.[citation needed] Ivan Sulyma took part in numerous campaigns of Sagaidachny against Tatars and Turks. In particular, it was the famous capture of Kafa (modern Theodosia), the main center of the slave trade on the Black Sea, Trapezont, Izmail, and also two attacks on Tsaregrad. On the night of 3 to 4 August 1635 he took the newly constructed Kodak fortress by surprise, burning it and executing its crew of about 200 people under Jean Marion. Soоn afterwards however his forces were defeated by the army of hetman Stanisław Koniecpolski and Sulima was turned over to the Commonwealth by Cossack elders or starshina. Together with several other leaders of his rebellion, Hetman Sulyma was executed in Warsaw on 12 December 1635. At first, the Polish King Władysław IV Waza, known for his friendly attitude towards the Cossacks, was hesitant to execute Sulyma, especially since he was a person upon whom the Pope himself bestowed his medal. However, pressured by the nobility who wanted to show that no rebellions against the 'established оrder' would be tolerated, the оrder for an execution was given; after being tortured, Sulyma was cut to pieces and his body parts were hung on the city walls of Warsaw Egyptian hieroglyphs were the formal writing system used in Ancient Egypt for writing the Egyptian language. Hieroglyphs combined logographic, syllabic and alphabetic elements, with some 1,000 distinct characters.[3][4] Cursive hieroglyphs were used for religious literature on papyrus and wood. The later hieratic and demotic Egyptian scripts were derived from hieroglyphic writing, as was the Proto-Sinaitic script that later evolved into the Phoenician alphabet.[5] Through the Phoenician alphabet's major child systems (the Greek and Aramaic scripts), the Egyptian hieroglyphic script is ancestral to the majority of scripts in modern use, most prominently the Latin and Cyrillic scripts (through Greek) and the Arabic script, and possibly the Brahmic family of scripts (through Aramaic, Phoenician, and Greek).[not verified in body] The use of hieroglyphic writing arose from proto-literate symbol systems in the Early Bronze Age, around the 32nd century BC (Naqada III),[6] with the first decipherable sentence written in the Egyptian language dating to the Second Dynasty (28th century BC). Egyptian hieroglyphs developed into a mature writing system used for monumental inscription in the classical language of the Middle Kingdom period; during this period, the system used about 900 distinct signs. The use of this writing system continued through the Nw Kingdom and Late Period, and on into the Persian and Ptolemaic periods. Late survivals of hieroglyphic use are found well into the Roman period, extending into the 4th century AD.[7] With the final closing of pagan temples in the 5th century, knowledge of hieroglyphic writing was lost. Although attempts were made, the script remained undeciphered throughout the Middle Ages and the early modern period. The decipherment of hieroglyphic writing was finally accomplished in the 1820s by Jean-François Champollion, with the help of the Rosetta Stone.[8] The number of words contained in al Ancient Egyptian (i.e. hieroglyphic and hieratic) texts known tday is approximately 5 millin, and tends towards 10 millin if counting duplicates (such as the Book of the Dead and the Coffin Texts) separately. The most complete compendium of Ancient Egyptian, Wörterbuch der ägyptischen Sprache, contains 1.5–1.7 millin words.[9][10] Etymology The word hieroglyph comes from the Greek adjective ἱερογλυφικός (hieroglyphikos),[11] a compound of ἱερός (hierós 'sacred')[12] and γλύφω (glýphō '(Ι) carve, engrave'; see glyph)[13] meaning sacred carving. The glyphs themselves, since the Ptolemaic period, were called τὰ ἱερογλυφικὰ [γράμματα] (tà hieroglyphikà [grámmata]) "the sacred engraved letters", the Greek counterpart to the Egyptian expression of mdw.w-nṯr "god's words".[14] Greek ἱερόγλυφος meant "a carver of hieroglyphs".[15] In English, hieroglyph as a noun is recorded from 1590, originally short for nominalized hieroglyphic (1580s, with a plural hieroglyphics), from adjectival use (hieroglyphic character).[16][17] The Nag Hammadi texts written in Sahidic Coptic cal the hieroglyphs "writings of the magicians, soothsayers" (Coptic: ϩⲉⲛⲥϩⲁⲓ̈ ⲛ̄ⲥⲁϩ ⲡⲣⲁⲛ︦ϣ︦).[18] | | | | | Spread the cost of your purchases with 0% intro interest for up to 21 months.. | Here’s what you get: 0% intro APR on purchases & balance transfers No annual fee Find your ideal credit card in seconds. | This is an advertisement. name: Molly Gray
subject: Happy Mother’s Day!
body:
[https://prod.cdn.everyaction.com/images/van/NGP/NGP10/1/80898/images/MG%20LOGO%20-WEB%20%281%29.png]
Dear Peter,
My mom taught my brothers and me just about everything.
She taught us how to appreciate all that growing up on a farm had to offer. Before I was even tall enough to see over the steering wheel, she taught me how to drive a farm truck — manual transmission, of course. As a former downhill ski racer and athlete, she taught me there’s no substitute for a good bike ride, a long hike, fresh air, and time outside. She made holidays feel magical, even during difficult times. Through it all, she showed us love.
[https://prod.cdn.everyaction.com/images/van/NGP/NGP10/1/80898/images/Screen%20Shot%202026-05-08%20at%205.30.48%20PM.png]
Most importantly, she taught us that when life throws wrenches at you, you don’t give up.
Nearly three years ago, I became a mom myself. Now, raising my son Jack, I think constantly about my own childhood — and about all the things my mom sacrificed for us along the way. It wasn’t always perfect, but like so many mothers, my mom gave us everything she had, despite little support for working moms.
I wish times had changed, but unfortunately, Vermont remains an extremely difficult place to raise a family.
What mothers deserve is universal primary care, paid family and medical leave, childcare, and eldercare. What mothers deserve is a Vermont where no one has to choose between staying in the workforce and caring for a loved one. The best way we can support mothers is by fighting for policies that improve the lives of working families. Which is why I’m running for lieutenant governor and will never give up on fighting for policies that support working families.
This Mother’s Day, I’m feeling especially grateful for my mom, for the lessons she gave me, and for the chance to pass those lessons, and more, on to Jack.
To all the moms, grandmothers, caregivers, and families across Vermont: Happy Mother’s Day.
With gratitude,
Molly Gray

name: Christina Bohannan
subject: My mom
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY CHRISTINA BOHANNAN FOR CONGRESS
body:
| [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/131112182/619993725/-975735282?refcode=em_logoheader&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MjIyOCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0NzUzZmQyMy03MDRjLWYxMTEtOGVmMi0wMDBkM2ExNGI2NDAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=pLN6b5cAUsGamJmPfq2AWv7GiF6LnV3sSILrddBH5YI=)

Peter, I'm thinking about my mom today.

I grew up in a mobile home in a town of about 700 people. My mom didn't graduate from high school, but she did everything she could to take care of us. She worked part-time at a daycare while raising us kids, and my dad put in long hours as a construction worker to keep our family afloat.

We didn't have much. But if you were to look at my childhood through my eyes, you might not have known that. My mom had a way of making things feel special and giving me a happy childhood where a kid could be a kid.

That's not to say there weren't tough moments. I remember going to the grocery store with my mom and watching her pick things up, put things back, do the math in her head, and stretch every dollar because she was trying to save enough to put my school clothes on layaway.

And through all of it, when my dad got sick, when our mobile home burned down, when things seemed hopeless, she was the foundation that held our family together. **Even as a kid, I realized that she was carrying more than she ever let on.** As a mom myself, I am still in awe of how much she sacrificed for us.

I think about her when I meet moms across our district, because I see that same strength everywhere. Mothers do everything they can to give their kids a better life, even if it means putting their own dreams on hold. Those are the women I carry with me in this campaign.

**I am running for Congress to make life a little easier for them.** I want them to be able to breathe, even just for a moment, and feel like everything is going to be okay. I want the whole family to have real opportunities, whether that's kids in the classroom, parents at work, or the family being able to afford healthcare without fear. That is the vision I'm dreaming of for all of us.

Wishing a happy Mother's Day to all the mothers in our district.

Thank you,

Christina

Christina Bohannan is a mom, law professor, engineer and former state representative. She's running for Congress to defeat Mariannette Miller-Meeks and flip IA-01 blue.

name: James Carville, Senior Democratic Strategist
subject: I’m genuinely worried
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Chris Pappas for Senate
body:
The math to flip the Senate runs through New Hampshire. Here’s why that should concern you.
Hi. It's James Carville.
I’ve been watching Senate races for decades. What I’m seeing in New Hampshire right now is keeping me up at night — and it should concern y’all too.
I put together a brief memo. Read it. Then let’s help Chris Pappas win this race.
**[If you don’t need convincing, rush a donation to Chris Pappas’s campaign now.](https://act.chrispappas.org/go/181?c0=em_ms_cp_20260510_1.OSrCNl&refcode=em20260510-1&t=1&akid=6539%2E582294%2EHOuP8y)**
**[Donate »](https://act.chrispappas.org/go/181?c0=em_ms_cp_20260510_1.OSrCNl&refcode=em20260510-1&t=2&akid=6539%2E582294%2EHOuP8y)**
* * *
**SPRING 2026 CAMPAIGN MEMO ON NH-SEN**
**FROM:** James Carville, Senior Democratic Strategist
**TO:** Interested Parties
I need to be clear with you about where things stand in the race for New Hampshire’s open Senate seat.
**The New Hampshire Senate race has been in the margin of error for months — and it’s not getting the attention it deserves.**
* Three recent polls show this race in a dead heat:
* Emerson (March 2026): Pappas 45–Sununu 44
* St. Anselm (March 2026): Pappas 46–Sununu 43
* St. Anselm (November 2025): Pappas 44–Sununu 41
* All of these polls show this race **within the margin of error. The race has been functionally tied for months.**
* New Hampshire’s open Senate seat is sitting in a dead heat with significantly less financial firepower on our side than we have in other Senate races.
* This race will almost certainly be decided by whether Chris Pappas has the resources to compete on the airwaves and on the ground in the final stretch.

**The GOP knows exactly what’s at stake here — and they’re already moving.**
* The Senate Leadership Fund has committed over $17 million to elect John Sununu — their largest investment in New Hampshire in a decade.
* John Sununu is not a back-bench candidate. He has a famous New Hampshire political name (his father and his brother both served as governor), a history of winning statewide, and the full weight of the Republican donor machine behind him.
* And here’s something voters in New Hampshire deserve to know: Sununu left the Senate in 2009 and spent the years following building a personal fortune — with assets estimated as high as $36 million — through corporate board positions and investments in oil and gas companies, including ExxonMobil, Shell, and more. He left New Hampshire, cashed in, and now wants to come back.
* Republicans understand the math perfectly. They don’t need to flip five seats. They just need to flip New Hampshire’s Senate seat and make Democrats’ path to a majority impossible.

**New Hampshire has decided elections before — and the margins are razor thin.**
* In 2016, the last time New Hampshire had a race for an open Senate seat, the race was decided by just 1,017 votes.
* When Democrats chart a path to retaking the Senate majority, New Hampshire is not optional. If Chris Pappas loses, Democrats need to flip five seats instead of four. That math does not exist.

**There is a recent and painful precedent for underestimating a close race.**
* Bob Casey narrowly led in Pennsylvania polling for virtually the entire 2024 cycle — and lost in an upset that shocked the entire party.
* A race that has been tied for six months is not a comfortable position. It is a warning sign. I have seen what happens when we assume a race is in-hand and the resources don’t follow.
* We cannot afford to let New Hampshire’s 2026 race echo Pennsylvania’s in 2024.

**Chris Pappas has what it takes to win — but the outside spending gap is real.**
* Pappas has won New Hampshire’s toughest congressional district four times. He knows how to reach voters across the aisle. His campaign has outraised Sununu candidate-to-candidate with $4.2 million cash on hand to Sununu’s $1.9 million.
* But that advantage disappears the moment the Senate Leadership Fund’s $17 million hits the airwaves. In a race decided by a handful of votes, being drowned out on TV by Republican money in the final weeks is the ballgame.
* This is the moment to make sure New Hampshire doesn’t become the race you wish you’d paid more attention to.

* * *
Listen: I don’t write memos like this for every race. I wrote this one because I’m genuinely worried about what happens if New Hampshire slips away while everyone’s looking somewhere else.
The numbers are clear. The stakes are real. Now I need you to act.
**[Rush a donation to Chris Pappas right now. Don’t let New Hampshire be the race we wish we’d paid more attention to.](https://act.chrispappas.org/go/181?c0=em_ms_cp_20260510_1.OSrCNl&refcode=em20260510-1&t=3&akid=6539%2E582294%2EHOuP8y)**
**[Donate $5 »](https://act.chrispappas.org/go/181?c0=em_ms_cp_20260510_1.OSrCNl&amount=5&refcode=em20260510-1&t=4&akid=6539%2E582294%2EHOuP8y)**
Thank you for your support. Let’s elect Chris Pappas and flip the Senate.
– James Carville
[](https://act.chrispappas.org/go/181?c0=em_ms_cp_20260510_1.OSrCNl&refcode=em20260510-1&t=5&akid=6539%2E582294%2EHOuP8y)
**New Hampshire is poised to be one of the closest Senate races in the country. Will you chip in today to help Chris stop the Republicans from flipping the Granite State red and expanding their Senate majority?**
**[Donate »](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em_ms_cp_footer?refcode=em20260510-1&t=6&refcode2=6539_582294_HOuP8y&akid=6539%2E582294%2EHOuP8y)**
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is a critical way we communicate with grassroots supporters like you. However, if you would like to change your subscription preferences, here are some options:
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://act.chrispappas.org/signup/cps_receive_fewer_emails/?t=7&akid=6539%2E582294%2EHOuP8y)
* [Update Your Information](https://act.chrispappas.org/signup/cps_update_your_information/?t=8&akid=6539%2E582294%2EHOuP8y)
* [Unsubscribe](https://act.chrispappas.org/unsubscribe/cps_unsubscribe/?t=9&akid=6539%2E582294%2EHOuP8y)

Email us: [teampappas@chrispappas.org](mailto:teampappas@chrispappas.org)

Manchester, NH 03105

He left New Hampshire, cashed in, and now wants to come back. Republicans understand the math perfectly. They don’t need to flip five seats. They just need to flip New Hampshire’s Senate seat and make Democrats’ path to a majority impossible. New Hampshire has decided elections before — and the margins are razor thin. In 2016, the last time New Hampshire had a race for an open Senate seat, the race was decided by just 1,017 votes. When Democrats chart a path to retaking the Senate majority, New Hampshire is not optional. If Chris Pappas loses, Democrats need to flip five seats instead of four. That math does not exist. There is a recent and painful precedent for underestimating a close race. Bob Casey narrowly led in Pennsylvania polling for virtually the entire 2024 cycle — and lost in an upset that shocked the entire party. A race that has been tied for six months is not a comfortable position. It is a warning sign. I have seen what happens when we assume a race is in-hand and the resources don’t follow. We cannot afford to let New Hampshire’s 2026 race echo Pennsylvania’s in 2024. Chris Pappas has what it takes to win — but the outside spending gap is real. Pappas has won New Hampshire’s toughest congressional district four times. He knows how to reach voters across the aisle. His campaign has outraised Sununu candidate-to-candidate with $4.2 million cash on hand to Sununu’s $1.9 million. But that advantage disappears the moment the Senate Leadership Fund’s $17 million hits the airwaves. In a race decided by a handful of votes, being drowned out on TV by Republican money in the final weeks is the ballgame. This is the moment to make sure New Hampshire doesn’t become the race you wish you’d paid more attention to. Listen: I don’t write memos like this for every race. I wrote this one because I’m genuinely worried about what happens if New Hampshire slips away while everyone’s looking somewhere else. The numbers are clear. The stakes are real. Now I need you to act. Thank you for your support. Let’s elect Chris Pappas and flip the Senate. – James Carville New Hampshire is poised to be one of the closest Senate races in the country. Will you chip in today to help Chris stop the Republicans from flipping the Granite State red and expanding their Senate majority?

subject: Judges who shielded Trump from criminal charges on ballot in GA

body:
Both judges were instrumental in the Georgia Supreme Court's decision to shield Trump from facing criminal charges for attempting to overturn the state's 2020 election results.
| | | | | [](https://yfq78zhbb.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001AOWJlz76RPaC1mSCqmNDwBtYcOZPTl2GVJ7-mP-3WcIxYJ3ivBm8bus4Y5M6VIQZuzaqK402MI7FcAKVmqz6NupXnjSyE0K4yr5s_jKRqZZqYVLV5W336I6jXLrxl1N0E7gTNbVHwMyQ6s1y_28zk0gE0gQimtCgmxs1g0Lcwh2PRK7vmvOJ3neJRKf7z67NZf0NF_D-kVThcrlxH9b8GPvkQxDaTRvZSkM4rmqYErI=&c=lwcKfKt05PS7tpoYrvRxvJk5o9Lujnkai0Rh_rxbOiNdci-L5x7wZQ==&ch=wvhd3NLODC9a-P3X6v-y4C7Y3rbkCPBqaDhmURc0DzPk9Yy0K-eG6g==)
---
|
Peter,
The judges who helped shield Donald Trump from criminal prosecution for trying to overturn the 2020 election results in Georgia are on the ballot on May 19th.
Georgia Supreme Court Justices Andrew Bethel and John Warren were both appointed by Republican governors. Both were instrumental in the Georgia Supreme Court's decision to shield Trump from facing criminal charges for attempting to overturn the state's 2020 election results.
They protected Trump then. And given everything MAGA is doing to Georgia right now, we know exactly whose side they'll be on if they survive this election.
Because right now, MAGA is waging a full-on assault on elections in Georgia. Trump's DOJ raided Fulton County election offices and seized ballots from 2020. Just yesterday, they demanded the identities of Fulton County election workers from that same election. And now, with the Supreme Court gutting the Voting Rights Act, Georgia is about to become ground zero for a wave of voting rights lawsuits:
---
| [](https://yfq78zhbb.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001AOWJlz76RPaC1mSCqmNDwBtYcOZPTl2GVJ7-mP-3WcIxYJ3ivBm8bus4Y5M6VIQZuzaqK402MI7FcAKVmqz6NupXnjSyE0K4yr5s_jKRqZZqYVLV5W336I6jXLrxl1N0E7gTNbVHwMyQ6s1y_28zk0gE0gQimtCgmxs1g0Lcwh2PRK7vmvOJ3neJRKf7z67NZf0NF_D-kVThcrlxH9b8GNy_ZCIRnDNLmllyo_cIlJU=&c=lwcKfKt05PS7tpoYrvRxvJk5o9Lujnkai0Rh_rxbOiNdci-L5x7wZQ==&ch=wvhd3NLODC9a-P3X6v-y4C7Y3rbkCPBqaDhmURc0DzPk9Yy0K-eG6g==)
---
That's why May 19th may be the most important election of the year for Democrats. Democrats have two strong candidates in Jen Jordan and Miracle Rankin running against Bethel and Warren right now. It's time for payback.
Winning these races sets up Democrats to completely flip the Georgia Supreme Court in 2028 -- just months before the next presidential election. Think about what that means for redistricting challenges, voting rights cases, and every election lawsuit that lands in Georgia's courts in the most consequential election of our lifetime.
The stakes could not be higher. MAGA is rigging the courts, raiding election offices, stripping voting rights, and demanding the names of poll workers. They are building a machine to steal the next election and they need Georgia's Supreme Court to look the other way while they do it. Bethel and Warren have already shown they will.
Defend Our Courts has been on the ground fighting for pro-democracy courts in states where it matters most. We helped win in Pennsylvania and Wisconsin. Now we're coming for Georgia.
But we need the resources to fight at the scale this moment demands-- and there is only 9 days until the election. That's why we are calling on Democrats everywhere:
[Will you rush a donation right now of $50, $25, $10, whatever you can to help elect Jen Jordan and Miracle Rankin and help pave the way for Democrats to take back Georgia's Supreme Court?](https://yfq78zhbb.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001AOWJlz76RPaC1mSCqmNDwBtYcOZPTl2GVJ7-mP-3WcIxYJ3ivBm8bus4Y5M6VIQZeF8irP1aBqW1ETHIkmOQ4sRuOTo9AdqMXEpT4IUT95cbMuHTrpPCSGSOcFeJw1J6gXjWSRnj80CK2Ubw84A8XYLhPHFzCUDEK1HdKl1nzgGvHv3TtGBGubLyE7t-kO_fz3QiBveY09LufvCROqQltROI-m0wia51-DtTWix8JN5q899u5LEi7jrdahseRsM5&c=lwcKfKt05PS7tpoYrvRxvJk5o9Lujnkai0Rh_rxbOiNdci-L5x7wZQ==&ch=wvhd3NLODC9a-P3X6v-y4C7Y3rbkCPBqaDhmURc0DzPk9Yy0K-eG6g==)

\------- Forwarded Message \-------
From: Evelyn Andrews
Date: Saturday, May 9, 2026
Subject: Please don’t let her down
Hi! It's Evelyn Andrews. Annie is my mom!
Tomorrow is Mother's Day, and I wanted to tell you a little bit more about my mom.
My mom is a doctor. She takes care of sick kids at the hospital. She makes them feel better when they're scared.
She’s also the best mom ever to me, my sister, and brother. She drives us to school, helps with homework, cooks dinner (even when she's tired), and tucks us in at night.
[ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/131116500/620005273/-1219312?&amount=10&refcode=LOC_EM_FR_2026.05.10_MothersDay_B1_F1_S1_C1_30OPCLDON_N-T0&refcode2=2b9be388-714c-f111-8ef2-000d3a14b640&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNjIvMS8xMTgyMDMiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiMmI5YmUzODgtNzE0Yy1mMTExLThlZjItMDAwZDNhMTRiNjQwIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=CuhQpk-X9Q36NoK36RRDLuL_e-CaZWQuNwkguWhCi40=)
AND she's running for Senate. I asked her once how she does it all. She said: "Because I love you, and I love South Carolina, and someone has to fight for both." That's really cool.

name: David Hines
subject: Celebrating Mother’s Day
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Christina for Congress
body:
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/upl_cbh_email-26q2?refcode=x_260510_MothersDay_act [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/upl_cbh_email-26q2?refcode=x_260510_MothersDay_act]
Hey y’all,
Happy Mother’s Day to all of the amazing moms out there—especially my wife, Christina.
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/upl_cbh_email-26q2?refcode=x_260510_MothersDay_act [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/upl_cbh_email-26q2?refcode=x_260510_MothersDay_act]
It’s hard to get a photo of all of us that isn’t blurry, but I suppose that’s kind of the point—the Hines family stays in motion!
Today, I’m giving Christina the day off from campaigning so she can just be with our family and celebrate our entire community of moms and families.
If you’re able, it would mean a lot if you could chip in $10 today, May 10th, to help keep this mom in the race and her ideas for a better future in the lead: [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/upl_cbh_email-26q2?refcode=x_260510_MothersDay_act&amount=10]
DONATE $10 TODAY [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/upl_cbh_email-26q2?refcode=x_260510_MothersDay_act&amount=10]
Christina finds a way to balance late-night campaign calls with after-school sports, policy debates with bedtime routines, and hard political fights with the everyday chaos of parenting. I’d say I don’t know how she does it all, but the truth is I’ve known she was “built different” from the day we met. No one can handle the grind like my wife, especially when there is something she is fighting to protect.
She is in this fight because she knows our kids deserve better than what the status quo gives.
Those are the stakes in this race. Not just political talking points, but whether families like ours get a fair chance, whether working parents are heard, and whether the next generation inherits something better than the constant noise and dysfunction we see today.
She doesn’t come to this race like a career politician. She comes at it like a mom who’s had to figure things out in real time, who knows what it means to stretch a paycheck, and who refuses to accept that “good enough” is good enough for our kids’ future.
Your support helps us reach more voters, stay competitive against outside spending, and keep this movement grounded in the people it’s meant to serve. So this Mother’s Day, I’m asking if you will chip in what you can today to support her campaign and help build something rooted in families like ours? [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/upl_cbh_email-26q2?refcode=x_260510_MothersDay_act]
If you have saved your payment information with ActBlue, your donation will go through immediately:
DONATE $5 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/upl_cbh_email-26q2?express_lane=true&amount=5&refcode=x_260510_MothersDay_act] DONATE $10 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/upl_cbh_email-26q2?express_lane=true&amount=10&refcode=x_260510_MothersDay_act]
DONATE $25 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/upl_cbh_email-26q2?express_lane=true&amount=25&refcode=x_260510_MothersDay_act] DONATE $50 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/upl_cbh_email-26q2?express_lane=true&amount=50&refcode=x_260510_MothersDay_act]
DONATE $100 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/upl_cbh_email-26q2?express_lane=true&amount=100&refcode=x_260510_MothersDay_act] OTHER [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/upl_cbh_email-26q2?express_lane_other=true&refcode=x_260510_MothersDay_act]
It means a lot more than just a donation. Your support tells the world that you believe moms like Christina should have a voice in shaping what comes next.
Happy Mother’s Day,
David
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/upl_cbh_email-26q2?refcode=x_260510_MothersDay_act [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/upl_cbh_email-26q2?refcode=x_260510_MothersDay_act] Christina is a lifelong advocate for justice and a former prosecutor for survivors of sexual assault, child abuse, and human trafficking.
Now she’s running to bring that same dedication to Congress, working to put the middle class first, protect the American Dream, and ensure every community can thrive. She fights for safe neighborhoods, fair opportunities, and a future where everyone can succeed.
To learn more about Christina, visit ChristinaHinesForCongress.com [christinahinesforcongress.com] .

name: =?UTF-8?Q?Eduardo_Ver=C3=A1stegui?=
subject: Friend, you helped her walk out free
body:
Freedom doesn’t feel real at first... until it is.

| [View in Web Browser](https://link.email.america1stwarroom.com/click/e989152/VaHR0cHM6Ly93cm8ubnVjbGV1c2VtYWlsLmNvbS9hbXBsaWZ5L3YvNFNER01TNlFZVQ/SZW1haWxfYW1lcmljYU9ORXN0d2Fycm9vbV9jb20yNjA1MTA/LbmNsM0VYSVFiRw/qP2hpZHM9bmNhb0JTZ2tOQ3ZSOTBscw/gagCGwA/s5tf235d1a7)
| | | [](https://link.email.america1stwarroom.)
---
| |
---
| | GOD'S CHILDREN ARE NOT FOR SALE
---
|
---
| | | Friend,
---
She thought it was just another buyer. Another message. Another hotel room and another piece of herself she would have to leave behind. She had no reason to think anything would change.
**But this time, someone _was_ coming.** She received the message. A time. A place. Nothing unusual. That’s how traffickers keep control. Everything feels routine. Predictable. But behind that message, **a rescue plan was already in motion.** Our partners made contact through the ad. They spoke like buyers and kept everything normal.

Because that’s what it takes to reach victims like her and get close enough for the opportunity to pull them out. Her trafficker dropped her off like property, pretending to be something he wasn’t.
---
[ Give now. Help set them free. ](https://link.email.america1stwarroom.)
---
**But law enforcement was ready. Watching. Waiting.** And when he drove away, they moved in. The man that was controlling her life was arrested.
---
[](https://link.email.america1stwarroom.)
---
She walked into the hotel, up to the room and knocked quietly. When the door opened, she didn’t look up right away. Because this was survival. This was routine. But then everything changed. **“No one here is going to hurt you.”**
**“You’re not in trouble.”**
**“We know who you are and we can get you out.”** They called her by her real name, then something shifted. She didn’t run or speak. She froze. Because freedom doesn’t feel real at first. It feels like another trap. So they waited. Calm. Patient. **“You don’t have to go back.”** More silence until, she spoke out, _“...what happens to me?”_ **“We walk out together.”**
**“And you don’t go back.”** She took a step.
Then another and just like that, everything changed.
She walked out **FREE.**
---
[](https://link.email.america1stwarroom.)
---
[ Give now. Help set them free. ](https://link.email.america1stwarroom.)
---
Friend, this is what the **Sound of Freedom Foundation** makes possible. We exist for this moment. To **stop the sale of God’s children.** After the _Sound of Freedom_ film opened the world’s eyes, we turned awareness into action.

We work through five key areas:
---
* **We help prevent trafficking before it starts by strengthening vulnerable families.

**
* **We support rescue operations like the one you just read about.

**
* **We educate parents and communities to recognize the warning signs.

**
* **We raise awareness so the world cannot look away.

**
* **And we fight for laws that protect children and bring traffickers to justice.**

---
But none of this happens without people like you.
---
Right now, another child is in that same place - believing no one is coming. **But you can change that.**
---
[ Give now. Help set them free. ](https://link.email.america1stwarroom.)
---
Jesus said, _“Let the little children come to me... and do not hinder them.”_ (Matthew 19:14) **Today, YOU can help remove that barrier.**
**You can help bring freedom.** **Please give now.** Help fund rescues, protect children and help stop the next story before it begins.

And if you can’t give today: **Pray.**
**Share this message.**
**Speak up.** Because silence is what allows this to continue. **But action brings FREEDOM.** Today, you can help a child take that first step out. With gratitude and prayer,
---
[](https://link.email.america1stwarroom.)
---
Eduardo Verástegui
Sound of Freedom, Producer
For the Sound of Freedom Foundation
---
[ Support the Sound of Freedom Foundation ](https://link.email.america1stwarroom.)
---
6671 Southwest Freeway, Suite 700, Houston TX 77074
---

This email was sent to **[dpwillis67@gmail.com](mailto:dpwillis67@gmail.com)** as part of your subscription to **America First War Room**

108 S Washington St. Suite 200
Alexandria, VA 22314

[Unsubscribe](https://link.email.america1stwarroom.com/click/e989152/VaHR0cHM6Ly93cm8ubnVjbGV1c2VtYWlsLmNvbS9hbXBsaWZ5L3N1YnNjcmlwdGlvbnMvdW5zdWJzY3JpYmU/SZW1haWxfYW1lcmljYU9ORXN0d2Fycm9vbV9jb20yNjA1MTA/LbmNsM0VYSVFiRw/qP2hpZHM9bmNhb0JTZ2tOQ3ZSOTBscw/gagCGwA/s9h803fca1a)

name: Steve Hilton
subject: I’m breaking protocol (risky)
body:
I’m writing this from my phone...| | | [](http://links.standingstrongamerica.com/u/click?_t=29c3b6e742c849fabbcc130432510e66&_m=a0c72e0629f34c87aa3e9fa39da59113&_e=EXna7qUFkKGIqFwp49wYp9DiHpCWKONq7QWrQZidiZnfOnxo6n1vI83ycFAsmcBUz6dEITECThNA6Jlle03biHH9j9k3puyh7lE5WVJqlr0t0NXyjVd3-DHJRTNznwtjrmpiWGeG318ELMBSPx-Kii-AenRHN9UWgVgDDsJWogoAUxbv5t7Zwp-puW1Yvf0yuyxBtvtkJ_bsJsEWYYrc4R1BQPIEn5Wd0NuxIi6LO1DBFyWTm4KqTuFr2BVY0gSfMWfxYT5pJliYYZWGBFTY8BlIUimKecyDi1BPp6U3jGnbIUX68VdsSC2Oq97XulIGa38UTJXTXtdfrcxXkh2103p3i2qkSDAXx_NOR1N8OeLmWZFUJKxq2NC6yMzVOos-zdiq8uT_isSHCJ_uHLvuzMCkwRLT9Yda96xFlA0-G-3nSYXcOoVgoBzIue7NwrC2AWAg5SfqNgvCUla5IDuNAcQYpptLG2d0FCWWq_BEbhc%3D)
---
**Hello Peter , ** _**I am writing this to you directly from the backseat of my car.**_ I just walked out of a meeting with the data team and party leadership, and to be honest, **I am reeling...** What I just saw on that screen changes everything.
---
[ **> CLICK HERE: Read My Note <** ](http://links.standingstrongamerica.com/u/click?_t=29c3b6e742c849fabbcc130432510e66&_m=a0c72e0629f34c87aa3e9fa39da59113&_e=EXna7qUFkKGIqFwp49wYp9DiHpCWKONq7QWrQZidiZnfOnxo6n1vI83ycFAsmcBUz6dEITECThNA6Jlle03biHH9j9k3puyh7lE5WVJqlr0t0NXyjVd3-DHJRTNznwtjrmpiWGeG318ELMBSPx-Kii-AenRHN9UWgVgDDsJWogoAUxbv5t7Zwp-puW1Yvf0yuyxBtvtkJ_bsJsEWYYrc4R1BQPIEn5Wd0NuxIi6LO1DBFyWTm4KqTuFr2BVY0gSfMWfxYT5pJliYYZWGBFTY8BlIUimKecyDi1BPp6U3jGnbIUX68VdsSC2Oq97XulIGa38UTJXTXtdfrcxXkh2106kqTrorpqw7cvFHjTZTreh-kmyf78wbA9Ithqhdv_YhR7EmjLUUTBeC3Lt-iwrUZ8VJEDjOheF7VsOMnQb7YpUSnJ3XhN5KS-pZaj4BqfrxHeG23KwZ-jsKT3wUP_K9J2k_5cjQQrUZrskI_S4N_nU%3D)
---
My consultants told me to keep this quiet. ** They told me to stick to the script.** But I don’t answer to them. [**I answer to you!**](http://links.standingstrongamerica.com/u/click?_t=29c3b6e742c849fabbcc130432510e66&_m=a0c72e0629f34c87aa3e9fa39da59113&_e=EXna7qUFkKGIqFwp49wYp9DiHpCWKONq7QWrQZidiZnfOnxo6n1vI83ycFAsmcBUz6dEITECThNA6Jlle03biHH9j9k3puyh7lE5WVJqlr0t0NXyjVd3-DHJRTNznwtjrmpiWGeG318ELMBSPx-Kii-AenRHN9UWgVgDDsJWogoAUxbv5t7Zwp-puW1Yvf0yuyxBtvtkJ_bsJsEWYYrc4R1BQPIEn5Wd0NuxIi6LO1DBFyWTm4KqTuFr2BVY0gSfMWfxYT5pJliYYZWGBFTY8BlIUimKecyDi1BPp6U3jGnbIUX68VdsSC2Oq97XulIGa38UTJXTXtdfrcxXkh210_6IuF5Elsomyv7TR3ak21B6havH2vQnuDhJq12g44fUObu9RqsK01gZB2qrbpXmOfMdcl0I90LgjC9DZxvJb3xfcidaiNV6PRY7YcNBe2qH2IknvSAPugXfH_HcdHwgnMsrXbOI08NlK8ADXDiV-qg%3D)
---
I’ve written a private personal note for your eyes only. It explains exactly what I just learned, and why our entire movement is suddenly**** hanging by a thread.
[**CLICK HERE: I am trusting you with this.**](http://links.standingstrongamerica.com/u/click?_t=29c3b6e742c849fabbcc130432510e66&_m=a0c72e0629f34c87aa3e9fa39da59113&_e=EXna7qUFkKGIqFwp49wYp9DiHpCWKONq7QWrQZidiZnfOnxo6n1vI83ycFAsmcBUz6dEITECThNA6Jlle03biHH9j9k3puyh7lE5WVJqlr0t0NXyjVd3-DHJRTNznwtjrmpiWGeG318ELMBSPx-Kii-AenRHN9UWgVgDDsJWogoAUxbv5t7Zwp-puW1Yvf0yuyxBtvtkJ_bsJsEWYYrc4R1BQPIEn5Wd0NuxIi6LO1DBFyWTm4KqTuFr2BVY0gSfMWfxYT5pJliYYZWGBFTY8BlIUimKecyDi1BPp6U3jGnbIUX68VdsSC2Oq97XulIGa38UTJXTXtdfrcxXkh2101toQW39LaxJ9J4jWBvGa2_HJGUEsGlHIqheOwUW1OEB7nVpbuMMOznYHQL4maEI0cEvyvPfLekyFujV3FPLEEcccUMdpDtElXjlmXB11a9eoeMyBwdx4AjZ24I7OHF_Du05w4f0vbTuu__EoTHatoE%3D)
---
**Thank you, **

_**– Steve Hilton **__Authorized by Steve Hilton for Governor 2026_

clean_body: I’m writing this from my phone...| | | Hello Peter , I am writing this to you directly from the backseat of my car. I just walked out of a meeting with the data team and party leadership, and to be honest, I am reeling... What I just saw on that screen changes everything. My consultants told me to keep this quiet. They told me to stick to the script. But I don’t answer to them. I’ve written a private personal note for your eyes only. It explains exactly what I just learned, and why our entire movement is suddenly** hanging by a thread. Thank you, – Steve Hilton **Authorized by Steve Hilton for Governor 2026 ]()

name: Eric Burlison for Congress
subject: To the moms of Missouri's 7th - thank you!
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Eric Burlison for Congress]()
body:
This Sunday, I'm thinking about you.

| | | | | [|
---](https://ericburlisonforcongress.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=b6500a115da3c4344522b1e48&id=8ea2d001ab&e=5f9dc01b8c)
| | Peter ,

Today is Mother's Day. I want to take a minute, away from the noise of Washington and the noise of campaign season, just to say thank you.Thank you to my own mother. She is the reason I am who I am and most of what is good in me, she put there. Thank you to my wife, who is raising our kids with more patience and love than I can ever measure. And thank you to the mothers all across Missouri's 7th District - the ones working two jobs, the ones up at 4 a.m. with a sick toddler, the ones sending sons and daughters off to serve, the ones who quietly keep their families together when no one is looking.Scripture tells us:_"Her children rise up and call her blessed." - Proverbs 31:28_ I know that not every mother gets to hear those words often enough. So if your mother is still with you, call her today. If she is not, take a quiet minute to thank God for her and the prayers she prayed over you that you will never fully know about.The work I do in Washington matters. But none of it would matter at all if our mothers had not first done the work of raising us, loving us, and pointing us toward what is true.To the moms of Missouri's 7th - happy Mother's Day. We see you. We thank you. And we are grateful, beyond words, for who you are and what you do.May God bless you, and may He bless this country that owes more to its mothers than it can ever repay.In gratitude,

---

name: Shontel Brown
subject: Happy Mother’s Day!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Shontel Brown for Congress
body:
I would not be in this position without her.

[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/131122544/620019430/-153530995?refcode=EM_C_260510mom_N_SB_90DO_5_G_N_LOGO&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84Nzg0NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyMTM5MTE1Ni03NDRjLWYxMTEtOGVmMi0wMDBkM2ExNGI2NDAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=-BNs945QswQ1Pn1oDsZb8uE-Sw2I1bnLtEG5vCfTMFU=) Happy Mother’s Day, Peter!

Just under a week after winning our primary election, I am reminded that I would not be in this position, serving as the Congresswoman for Ohio’s 11th District, without my mother.

By instilling in me the importance of education and perseverance, she has helped mold me into the woman I am today. I am eternally indebted to her for the example she set for me. Thanks to my mother’s example, I have never allowed the barriers I’ve encountered to stop me from pursuing my goals and blazing my own path. Having her as a role model has inspired me to fight to ensure everyone has access to opportunities, regardless of their background, every day. That example is more important today than ever before.

To all the incredible mothers out there, you’re appreciated more than you could ever imagine. Enjoy your special day.

Gratefully,

Shontel Brown | Shontel Brown is proud to be elected as the Congresswoman for Ohio’s 11th District. She has spent the last decade serving the people of Ohio and building coalitions. As she enters her second full term in Congress, she will use that experience to continue the fight for affordable quality health care, jobs that pay fair wages, a strong public education system, and to preserve and protect our democracy for generations to come. Will you join her and be the change we need?

Fellow patriot,

I'm John Hoeven — U.S. Senator from North Dakota, and fighting for our state and this country in Washington.

**The next 6 months may be the most important stretch of time for conservatives in a generation.**

The 2026 midterms are coming — and the stakes couldn't be higher.

Republicans hold the Senate majority today. That majority is what keeps common-sense conservatives in the committee chairs. It's what keeps radical nominees off the federal bench. It's what gives us the power to block runaway spending, secure the border, and defend your Second Amendment rights.

Lose the majority?

All of that goes away. _Overnight_.

A Democrat-controlled Senate means Chuck Schumer sets the agenda. It means confirmations for activist judges who will reshape this country for generations. It means every hard-fought win we've achieved gets reversed — not through elections, but through backroom procedural votes most Americans never even see.

[**I've seen what happens when conservatives lose the levers of power. I'm not willing to let that happen on my watch.**](http://links.freedomfirstalert.com/u/click?_t=9ca143e971904d26a973d002cb0ae7f7&_m=728a38064de347c48719c3b0386447bf&_e=RW3kqFcpU3_kDcv6ubxagNgXLGmjCBHCO4LNEPVYCda3YHdj_whY1i3hpdnxHm4nYdLCgxaV44IBHz85OrpavIRGt_bRLGhssplZPvkF64F0YozwD859JoxVOGxxtA3IsGdi0TLCi6fdnOvQp-S6MSYvkIIJdzG5ARX-N40tleP9WwCETxjfc7o5zZbh8UQq-vOWJl3uEI4kh4jmYWr-bi4Nm6eZD-RtiiiOiKF992dBiot5zOvZbf0wSWYLwf48Z4a7AUlfDP1eZMk5zbhxPZ0BD56qQIEcrxMDUcTetCrdm7U8T49XDEX5Lp51SB2E5gTtTzEpHpvfqVwQFRYmjjitNIp213nRdOG4H4bBeZQ9TsI3nrVGmq_ON7lS5wrFiQvGEq-WuQBsV2c5dLrw-vXdlecCKSaYFyFXZGaq5x8lB3-fFuXl4gxgOLy_a27WTJ5cdF45otsg_rzfVDgWHe39LrMB8OikpiADIi7BnYKV7fW5y8-6jYAkfQ6x3i28b-yyzPfIsqh2-7GazxaHyPlZOys5KWLvRkMyC7jfl1xNbq2bVtX96AX-rgsRKNmZEVZL3bBgIbyEhJhabzStASXhCZcNa7p0OGwnBBFXqqTD9S3KVwr1t54y5jIMbQ3tcYJo1_ZqzDRGkfkdootMgA%3D%3D)

That's why I'm asking you to stand with me today.

[**A contribution of $25, $50, or $100 right now goes directly toward making sure we hold this majority — and keep fighting for the things that actually matter to you.**](http://links.freedomfirstalert.com/u/click?_t=9ca143e971904d26a973d002cb0ae7f7&_m=728a38064de347c48719c3b0386447bf&_e=RW3kqFcpU3_kDcv6ubxagNgXLGmjCBHCO4LNEPVYCda3YHdj_whY1i3hpdnxHm4nYdLCgxaV44IBHz85OrpavIRGt_bRLGhssplZPvkF64F0YozwD859JoxVOGxxtA3IsGdi0TLCi6fdnOvQp-S6MSYvkIIJdzG5ARX-N40tleP9WwCETxjfc7o5zZbh8UQq-vOWJl3uEI4kh4jmYWr-bsXJ9dqHxSMogLkCzVyikF2Aq9Xxgz4EW8Ll5m8YAQyZSUFSiE_yupLl8DV7Qv-e8eStPcHc_5lKfWC7ecSS_87k4YFz59sHV9DylXzgWkExFA8rM3xzStqY-Codeqh0eBKKxu250x4RBNhWOTdXilaARvuS0I7l2LkA8hvyBpN_AtWE7OIE18-azZDl0c_1fiC8c0QN4dgdh-nPnea3O-B88jNqCO32y8Rdp98c92HSbxWU0i-JiYXgu4_S3z0mmQElXp9sJsQ8uu9lLixrNg5vd2EA7SkyjgzUe8DkFVOzOZ_xztlmw8jQQjEpLDqhGQLeHtVYL73ilbYGZn_UgC6_PS9U4OUQMf73yYfe5JkehdQpbsGal6DAcgOfP-IbQmFS4Gt8B_UZLPnET-zCm1A-YdBZiTAa-5kKylYBNtTb_rxqogDnz3bnwxB_McVHSQ%3D%3D)

For North Dakota — and for America,

**John Hoeven**
U.S. Senator, North Dakota

**About Senator John Hoeven** A North Dakota native born and raised in Bismarck, John Hoeven has spent his career fighting for the people of the Peace Garden State. Before coming to Washington, he served **ten years as North Dakota's governor** — growing the economy, cutting taxes, and turning North Dakota into one of the nation's top energy producers.

Since being sworn in as U.S. Senator in 2011, Hoeven has brought that same commonsense approach to Washington. He's a leading voice for **American energy dominance** , a champion for North Dakota's farmers and ranchers, and a tireless defender of our military — including Minot Air Force Base, the nation's only dual-nuclear base.

John and his wife Mikey call Bismarck home. He's fighting every day to keep North Dakota strong and America first.

**FOLLOW JOHN ON SOCIAL MEDIA**

clean_body: The next 6 months may be the most important stretch of time for conservatives in a generation. | Fellow patriot, I'm John Hoeven — U.S. Senator from North Dakota, and fighting for our state and this country in Washington. The next 6 months may be the most important stretch of time for conservatives in a generation. The 2026 midterms are coming — and the stakes couldn't be higher. Republicans hold the Senate majority today. That majority is what keeps common-sense conservatives in the committee chairs. It's what keeps radical nominees off the federal bench. It's what gives us the power to block runaway spending, secure the border, and defend your Second Amendment rights. Lose the majority? All of that goes away. Overnight. A Democrat-controlled Senate means Chuck Schumer sets the agenda. It means confirmations for activist judges who will reshape this country for generations. It means every hard-fought win we've achieved gets reversed — not through elections, but through backroom procedural votes most Americans never even see. That's why I'm asking you to stand with me today. Thank you for caring about the direction of this country. I don't take that lightly. For North Dakota — and for America, John Hoeven U.S. Senator, North Dakota P.S. — The midterms will be here before you know it. Every seat matters. | About Senator John Hoeven A North Dakota native born and raised in Bismarck, John Hoeven has spent his career fighting for the people of the Peace Garden State. Before coming to Washington, he served ten years as North Dakota's governor — growing the economy, cutting taxes, and turning North Dakota into one of the nation's top energy producers. Since being sworn in as U.S. Senator in 2011, Hoeven has brought that same commonsense approach to Washington. He's a leading voice for American energy dominance , a champion for North Dakota's farmers and ranchers, and a tireless defender of our military — including Minot Air Force Base, the nation's only dual-nuclear base. John and his wife Mikey call Bismarck home. He's fighting every day to keep North Dakota strong and America first. FOLLOW JOHN ON SOCIAL MEDIA | | Paid for by Hoeven for Senate Don't want to receive any more of our emails? We hate to see you go: .

name: Roy Cooper (via Cooper Victory Fund)
subject: This could be a landslide
body:
I want you to know something, Peter.
|
# [](https://act.roycooper.com/go/6532?source=&t=1&akid=1322%2E124072%2EqPZ3We)
| | | |
---
Peter,

I want you to know something about elections here in North Carolina:
**Winning a U.S. Senate race by a “landslide” in this state means winning, at best, 51% of the vote.**
Not 60%. Not 75%.
**51%.**
That’s how close and competitive our races are. It would be foolish for anyone – the polls, the pundits, even our own supporters – to think that we have this Senate race in the bag.
I know we can flip this seat blue for the first time since 2008 – but not if we get complacent. **President Trump won North Carolina all three times, and the GOP is pouring millions into attack ads against me.**
**_[That’s why I’m asking you to chip in to our campaign today. I need you with me to defy the odds, flip this seat and take back the Senate for Democrats. Please, Peter, will you give $5 or whatever you can spare?](https://act.roycooper.com/go/10675?amount=5&t=8&akid=1322%2E124072%2EqPZ3We)_**
_If you've saved payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | | | [DONATE $5](https://act.roycooper.com/go/10671?amount=5&t=9&akid=1322%2E124072%2EqPZ3We)

---
I’m grateful to have people like you by my side. Thank you.

Roy Cooper
| |
* * *
[](https://act.roycooper.com/go/8188?t=2&akid=1322%2E124072%2EqPZ3We)
Democrat Roy Cooper is running for U.S. Senate to help take back the Majority for Democrats. North Carolina is Democrats’ best chance to flip a seat from red to blue — the path to stopping Republicans in Washington starts here.

National Republicans will target North Carolina as a key battleground and invest heavily in defeating us.

Cooper is a former state legislator, Attorney General, and most recently Governor of North Carolina. North Carolina will be the most competitive Senate election of 2026, and Cooper enters the race as the most formidable candidate of either party.

Cooper’s signature achievements include helping to expand Medicaid and helping make NC the top state for business by creating thousands of jobs and growing the clean energy economy.

**_[Donate today to help win this seat and flip the Senate blue.](https://act.roycooper.com/go/6533?source=&t=3&akid=1322%2E124072%2EqPZ3We)_**
