name: Navy SEAL Adam Schwarze
subject: Apparently they think I’m a threat
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Schwarze for Senate
body:
I’m starting to gain some traction in the race for Minnesota Senate, and so my political opponents are starting to go negative on me. | [](http://links.freedomtrainalert.com/u/click?_t=2d4f229f156142619b4e4f956d2d65c9&_m=f4c4f90904a04d6b96479f8dafd36d37&_e=Wxech8ZlrJH-DzxphdZq0UdBLpaEwsiVvJAGYtDV5E2BADh25jY9sMfKRgaC2Mwe9LY7hK_LHMyTdxdwntFKddnMJDKf4KXu8QCYoe93uK0taL0Wb78-qPe4_wnpFQupuz8Wqkzw-ogPc6e4g-0NqJcwfA15vivxqr98CLsckyWGX3GCiTiyxLAp-Ilia_eQ9Y9drFuRo9ekaUsSkNR4xZA1RP1XOq4aJ4XT1XaYy_6qK3pYzFyzGw0TFwYKnYr9Sc8ox9Kp_JXBGEkI5OGFsxmDkhYeO58h_PmnLq9TzwOteOulNjwXMgKchj5DCNRRfhUOKn75BdUXitr8y-_G4mPguvU7LhpWYHerVQaeN8jagkan9qdOftBHqq43e2JffCLLegBw4EKGS5Tse_MvHQcVyz70CegkEZSzCzVaVOl4BgYCqZ9Jbud1p04yBlbTdUFz53THpBDES1yTktP9wbrFTzaF1QaW-Ws7pNXKbVc4-G9XMIvlQVfgjlJ7gadGbctcB8-HJAIZOoDWsz7gEUcKldm1YLgn-23At1qafCojevfr5VSUMwo11kgDfUvyj8wVxNjWs268ic5jzRbAVr990Bzc19MJOEV_kCnnUplmvfTSj5sTHEn_-ULL2ezJgnttsl2qJ7q8nNFI9wB5cFtdFgDUbPNjscHFq9llWsaM4RdCFwc11yfiljCyEWde3AJswJx8NPrMnnpmfJujuuFyt2exN4qROGzK82vE16_YW017YTpW-ipJp9j0xgWi63HlErp8wWlCh4QO9X7d3A%3D%3D)

---
Peter,

**As a former Navy SEAL** , I’m used to being under attack. But the lies being told by my opponents who want to serve you in the US Senate is a new one for me. Something so sipmle that I’ve said on the campaign trail, or a position I’ve taken that my opponents may disagree with? **

It’s funny how an opponent can turn pretty much anything that comes out of a campaign into a flat out lie.
**
Though I’ve been in the Minnesota Senate race for about a year now, I’m no household name by any means. But our campaign is beginning to attract the attention of voters around the state as I continue to win straw poll after straw poll **(12 and counting now).** Over the weekend we just won the Congressional District 3 straw poll by a wide margin!

**I knew I would be attacked at some point - but I naively believed it wouldn’t be so dirty or so intense.**

_[](http://links.freedomtrainalert.com/u/click?_t=2d4f229f156142619b4e4f956d2d65c9&_m=f4c4f90904a04d6b96479f8dafd36d37&_e=Wxech8ZlrJH-DzxphdZq0UdBLpaEwsiVvJAGYtDV5E2BADh25jY9sMfKRgaC2Mwe9LY7hK_LHMyTdxdwntFKddnMJDKf4KXu8QCYoe93uK0taL0Wb78-qPe4_wnpFQupuz8Wqkzw-ogPc6e4g-0NqJcwfA15vivxqr98CLsckyWGX3GCiTiyxLAp-Ilia_eQ9Y9drFuRo9ekaUsSkNR4xZA1RP1XOq4aJ4XT1XaYy_6qK3pYzFyzGw0TFwYKnYr9Sc8ox9Kp_JXBGEkI5OGFs2ah7R5AnH4nCyNlWGU3iJcjqCwBmwTxdwPB_0yLGivPG-3qSLRXSv5LifovhhEhDqjb_yQD_O8vuxGhjy27a3FOjubRx80x4W3W9RhyDGhzNMkzOeBZyr6-Y2ReYSIPS3be7_lWKGDVtXPJldqoXW95Ato1FCtxpreWqC5mL9TnWhD1MYYh3yIMEYLWCk_6LoPrD3ePToahneZnXNg7DXOXMfU_6dHu03eWv97AcjP4gnH-QRYTPNfRvFqQQrDB60qlVH6H-TVpWoyD1XHjd11efN3u5mUecfPsgWL9Hh1zg45Ws5FwfkOJ1HNNABMDOIDYJxbPt0M6MT2aMTcnZKLMZeK0Knb7R5yfBoCA3xVuQntfoOCiT2MWxHR4EZ6zJrur-N0Y7ihDWMkJsfbETWu3tp1exkNnaB0S5ZG3EgEZCpmqk9mQ66-BPukNcx2kSBQQ1I9xv0bhicXysofGhOCQ4NdMHtWQUpQEC4wMvJIyC9L0VDwR514Mb-ixsQbjxQ%3D%3D)_
Personally, I can take the hits. I get it, my opponents see me as a threat. But here’s the deal: the Senate seat in Minnesota is too important to let petty grievances get in the way of defeating Democrats and taking back this Senate seat for the Republican Party.

I know it may not be much to you, but **[if you’re able to chip in $5 to my people-powered campaign right now](http://links.freedomtrainalert.com/u/click?_t=2d4f229f156142619b4e4f956d2d65c9&_m=f4c4f90904a04d6b96479f8dafd36d37&_e=Wxech8ZlrJH-DzxphdZq0UdBLpaEwsiVvJAGYtDV5E2BADh25jY9sMfKRgaC2Mwe9LY7hK_LHMyTdxdwntFKddnMJDKf4KXu8QCYoe93uK0taL0Wb78-qPe4_wnpFQupuz8Wqkzw-ogPc6e4g-0NqJcwfA15vivxqr98CLsckyWGX3GCiTiyxLAp-Ilia_eQ9Y9drFuRo9ekaUsSkNR4xZA1RP1XOq4aJ4XT1XaYy_6qK3pYzFyzGw0TFwYKnYr9Sc8ox9Kp_JXBGEkI5OGFs6igSu7Z7fRE5krKd3XfP7OFlMhsUFMEXI6Gpj-s_k1QC2nLVWwxunODOPTBo-yAwLuKMiH9kyCzYDsDM_r0JrWPfDkwLmexoaysD3rkkn1SZRURZLxTA9u9tCNg42I76vCDG_TFgR_HR_oeoYX5rfWmseDbLcWhxEtvvH_yFzS9n2OnlqY_GHDFULSNGD3gTqP4kIbFf3trMGNbEvBbB-ZY125wOnXimNtB0TeLkNFfqWu9x1-fvWbczEY2BNwky49jc3QIKZzptlhdpbjJdl9Huj5Qn83917OnKsI_l7zQLSPJL6v-1DHiQUEQao71yMU4CARxfD8Tsx2S5cEBmW6Mo-OJZrvoJmcTS1MP8Stcnwwg7Zhzpk2FWTP6tJgPtv69EdLgIySErOmieoBhkNz7g5F0pNOIiWT1KF5PVEKwB1weK0BYRgBl7f0t5e1oVZH3FZqnj4VuRHRiovcLpKv_jmz3n52LF3YX_uMiGlU3Ja2FuHPfjbOjdzBGjdshxA%3D%3D)** , I can tell you that we’ll be one step closer to doubling the number of Navy SEALS who have served in the U.S. Senate.

[**SEND A NAVY SEAL TO THE SENATE
**](http://links.freedomtrainalert.com/u/click?_t=2d4f229f156142619b4e4f956d2d65c9&_m=f4c4f90904a04d6b96479f8dafd36d37&_e=Wxech8ZlrJH-DzxphdZq0UdBLpaEwsiVvJAGYtDV5E2BADh25jY9sMfKRgaC2Mwe9LY7hK_LHMyTdxdwntFKddnMJDKf4KXu8QCYoe93uK0taL0Wb78-qPe4_wnpFQupuz8Wqkzw-ogPc6e4g-0NqJcwfA15vivxqr98CLsckyWGX3GCiTiyxLAp-Ilia_eQ9Y9drFuRo9ekaUsSkNR4xZA1RP1XOq4aJ4XT1XaYy_6qK3pYzFyzGw0TFwYKnYr9Sc8ox9Kp_JXBGEkI5OGFs7mpAnUH3X32ZpU4X5WM3xtgKMhbh0haDkmV_0edvohr9ElrznPSf_TWpql0q-SDESilCWKC9LpYD_GL-DKTqmxASfCN5GY6qq36TYtrlYr_F72johhcwrF4sqUJ9xFy5aSpgmZSozgOSpKFIUNA6yIvHo4RIvAbuBFHFjm3LOx1Ss9xl_xHQdxe0xClgAZck5BPDJGr4xfysurzquxCXmMtP835qAvYTKgW9o3IKPHcKAmkEtZPIuZw3ILu-2ooEus6_oKL-X6uSLHy88Ov-Utxf30ulAXIorgMN2bP-qA1QTLMcm4BaoCmIGF3AapU-GRfIdDWchHiqQHZGFWZjhhVaZw9xLSR_a29G55qLEsYej2jW0cRcm-RkzHIyDVMzhu-sUEMWohN5zQy7zkNEJa0t92B7uhu-XbCcawLbDb8DH9xeZolbPTyiZLMHaVHcyx7aCbMiXz6UI-lfH09tSy7apztVnGY14vvgsQZv2WTl6FLibh5c8ix79YTVBX_kg%3D%3D)
You may not know me - or even live in Minnesota, but **here is what I can tell you today:** I’m not running for the Senate to make contacts in D.C. that can get me a cushy job in the private sector like a lot of folks. **I’m running because this country has given me every opportunity available and my service to Old Glory didn’t end when I left the military.**

I have a lot of fight in me, **[I just can’t fund this Senate campaign myself and I won’t be a DC swamp paid for candidate](http://links.freedomtrainalert.com/u/click?_t=2d4f229f156142619b4e4f956d2d65c9&_m=f4c4f90904a04d6b96479f8dafd36d37&_e=Wxech8ZlrJH-DzxphdZq0UdBLpaEwsiVvJAGYtDV5E2BADh25jY9sMfKRgaC2Mwe9LY7hK_LHMyTdxdwntFKddnMJDKf4KXu8QCYoe93uK0taL0Wb78-qPe4_wnpFQupuz8Wqkzw-ogPc6e4g-0NqJcwfA15vivxqr98CLsckyWGX3GCiTiyxLAp-Ilia_eQ9Y9drFuRo9ekaUsSkNR4xZA1RP1XOq4aJ4XT1XaYy_6qK3pYzFyzGw0TFwYKnYr9Sc8ox9Kp_JXBGEkI5OGFs33kPPUvoa-gduEAmJcpUvfTn8Ea3UjFOf4nQ7ecHG46JrnSUWLix0IQ4AhAsWoRNkkdei5833vMXMrbAAlsZT67qltJwlwa4NKKz5U8KpiGGTDheDFF9EJJGH7PQekUC0bG4l2z7njQOXZz9NrotsGm9oKtYDxD6DHKiCItvXWl1-v1GeV9NwYsWFs1YPea-dQ2_zAbtYsR9a4rtJpOMWb6OExJb4b9NCmSgPNtG9YvvRvIEMlWT3fnt5v6ykWsd-9Tbcy6zFt3eU_koH1hfNPaY8K0UmPi4HQ6urwkhg5jBeIzcHuoWdSAKEfCubsqWpTQbos4-rLkTBG2kFLom1SNndZIBel4Z0IKv6zMtk-D-PBf2tk0ukSErfJ2EF4esERgnfvWaaREKuu6II4KDKIvTW1n0ZdTxdEiT0i4U9FnD9sRZ4oM_cG-qV1gRiqzsV1tDsmYJ3W4P632tGy6utnATcBCV25aRAmdVn5Knnb8pb86lQrGlAlUdbLm5q10hw%3D%3D)** , which is why we have to send emails like this one to patriots like you.

For love of country,
Adam Schwarze
Republican Candidate for U.S. Senate - Minnesota
_**Former Navy SEAL officer

clean_body: I’m starting to gain some traction in the race for Minnesota Senate, and so my political opponents are starting to go negative on me. | Peter, As a former Navy SEAL , I’m used to being under attack. But the lies being told by my opponents who want to serve you in the US Senate is a new one for me. Something so sipmle that I’ve said on the campaign trail, or a position I’ve taken that my opponents may disagree with? It’s funny how an opponent can turn pretty much anything that comes out of a campaign into a flat out lie. Though I’ve been in the Minnesota Senate race for about a year now, I’m no household name by any means. But our campaign is beginning to attract the attention of voters around the state as I continue to win straw poll after straw poll (12 and counting now). Over the weekend we just won the Congressional District 3 straw poll by a wide margin! I knew I would be attacked at some point - but I naively believed it wouldn’t be so dirty or so intense. Personally, I can take the hits. I get it, my opponents see me as a threat. But here’s the deal: the Senate seat in Minnesota is too important to let petty grievances get in the way of defeating Democrats and taking back this Senate seat for the Republican Party. I know it may not be much to you, but , I can tell you that we’ll be one step closer to doubling the number of Navy SEALS who have served in the U.S. Senate. You may not know me - or even live in Minnesota, but here is what I can tell you today: I’m not running for the Senate to make contacts in D.C. that can get me a cushy job in the private sector like a lot of folks. I’m running because this country has given me every opportunity available and my service to Old Glory didn’t end when I left the military. I have a lot of fight in me, , which is why we have to send emails like this one to patriots like you. For love of country, Adam Schwarze Republican Candidate for U.S. Senate - Minnesota Former Navy SEAL officer Marine Corps Veteran Proud Minnesotan FOLLOW ADAM ON SOCIAL MEDIA | | Paid for by Schwarze for Senate Adam Schwarze is a former Navy SEAL and Marine. Use of his military rank, job titles, and photographs in uniform does not imply endorsement by the Department of the Navy or the Department of Defense.

name: John Donisi, Team Gina
subject: My Mother’s Day surprise for Gina
body:
I have a special request for you today:
# [](https://ginafortexas.com/?refcode=em_ms_gh_header)[](https://ginafortexas.com/?refcode=em_ms_gh_header)
Hi Peter, it’s Gina’s husband, John.
I have a special request for you today:
**[Will you sign Gina’s Mother’s Day card? I want to surprise her with it, and I’d love to fill it with as many names and kind notes as possible so she can feel the love and support behind this campaign.](https://act.ginafortexas.com/signup/em_ms_gh_20260510_endorse/?source=em20260510-1088&t=1&akid=1088%2E299639%2E2ikN2C)**
Mother’s Day is about the women and mother figures who show up, who carry the weight, who keep going, who fight for their kids and their communities. **That’s Gina.**
You see, Gina never planned to run for office — _she even made me promise I’d never run._
But then someone tried to shut down our son’s public school. And she did what any mom would do. **She fought back.**
She ran for school board and helped keep that school open. Then she ran for the Texas House and spent years fighting for public schools and working families.
I’ve watched her continue to show up through the hardest moments a parent can face. I’ve seen her fight for workers, families, and kids who deserve a fair shot. And I’ve seen her stay steady, even when politics gets ugly, because she’s in this for the people of Texas.
That’s why she’s running for governor. Because she believes Texas can be better and because she refuses to let Greg Abbott and his donors keep writing the rules while working families pay the price.
**Gina is an amazing wife, mother, friend, and partner, and I’m so lucky to be her husband.**
So today, I want to surprise her with something meaningful.
**[To make this Mother’s Day extra special, will you add your name to her Mother’s Day card, Peter? It would mean so much to Gina.](https://act.ginafortexas.com/signup/em_ms_gh_20260510_endorse/?source=em20260510-1088&t=2&akid=1088%2E299639%2E2ikN2C)**
[Sign the Card »](https://act.ginafortexas.com/signup/em_ms_gh_20260510_endorse/?source=em20260510-1088&t=3&akid=1088%2E299639%2E2ikN2C)
I can’t wait to surprise Gina later today! Thank you for signing the card, Peter.
John Donisi
Husband, teammate, and proud Texan

[ Donate » ](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em_ms_gh_footer?refcode=em20260510-1&t=4&refcode2=1088_299639_2ikN2C&akid=1088%2E299639%2E2ikN2C)
[ Donate Monthly » ](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em_ms_gh_footer?refcode=em20260510-1&recurring=1&t=5&refcode2=1088_299639_2ikN2C&akid=1088%2E299639%2E2ikN2C)
---
Email us: [info@ginafortexas.com](mailto:info@ginafortexas.com)
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way we keep in touch with people like you, so thank you for reading to the end.
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://act.ginafortexas.com/signup/receive-fewer-emails_gov/)
* [Update My Personal Information](https://act.ginafortexas.com/signup/update-your-information_gov/?t=6&akid=1088%2E299639%2E2ikN2C)
* [Unsubscribe](https://act.ginafortexas.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe_gov/?t=7&akid=1088%2E299639%2E2ikN2C)

Pol. Ad. paid by Gina Hinojosa Campaign

body:

Last year, Pete Hegseth shamelessly removed Nancy Lacore from her position as Chief of Navy Reserve.
She was a three-star vice admiral with thirty-five years of service and thousands of sailors under her command, but they just showed her to the door for NO REASON.
That tells you everything you need to know about Republicans’ hare-brained leadership. Experience and integrity don’t matter if you don’t fall in line.
But everyday folks are tired of this chaos. They’re exhausted by the noise. And they’re FED UP with Republican leaders who prioritize pageantry over delivering real results.
Luckily, Nancy’s running for Congress to restore honor, integrity, and commitment.
She’s the leader we deserve – we NEED – in South Carolina’s First District. And if you’re serious about flipping the House and restoring integrity in Congress, will you split $25 to support Nancy’s campaign and Resist Reclaim Rebuild? [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/rrr-lacore]
DONATE NOW TO HELP NANCY FLIP THIS SEAT! >> [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/rrr-lacore]
Pete Hegseth made a massive mistake in removing Nancy Lacore.
And it’s going to backfire – BIG TIME.
Because SC-01 will be one of the most competitive battlegrounds in the country this cycle. This race could easily decide control of Congress.
Luckily, Nancy isn’t the type to back down from a challenge.
She has the grit, discipline, and credibility to not only win this race but deliver for South Carolina.
And Republicans are going to throw serious money into this race for that reason. That’s why grassroots support matters so much. The stakes couldn’t be higher.
So, I’ll ask again: will you split a donation of $25, $50, or whatever you can spare between Resist Reclaim Rebuild and Nancy’s campaign to help them flip this must-win seat and help take back the House? [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/rrr-lacore] [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/rrr-lacore]
CHIP IN TO DEFEAT PETE HEGSETH'S ROTTEN SCHEME! >> [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/rrr-lacore]
They tried to push her out. Let’s send her to Congress instead.
– James Carville

name: Jill Biden
subject: What’s on my mind this Mother’s Day
body:
---
| [](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em-dnc-may-2026-gfr?amount=7&refcode=em_20260510_7038_fr&refcode2=7038_22930333_LQt1_c&akid=7038%2E22930333%2ELQt1_c)
---
Derek —
One day, when I was teaching writing at a community college, a student of mine came to class with her four-year-old. The moment I locked eyes with my student, I could see her distress, and I knew exactly what happened: Her babysitter had fallen through but she couldn’t afford to miss the class. She set up her son with a box of crayons and some paper in the corner of the room, and I tried to give her a smile when I saw her looking at him nervously — praying he’d make it through.
**That’s just what moms do. If the carefully-planned matrix of work, and school, and drop-offs and pick-ups falls apart, you just figure it out.**
This year, more and more moms are having to figure it out. They’re making difficult decisions about their finances, the safety of their families, and their futures — because the chaos of the Trump administration is making life harder for _everyone_.
There’s something that fills me with hope, though: **All of you.**
People like you are turning out in record numbers to elect leaders who will help us make real progress. In Virginia, Governor Abigail Spanberger is fighting to make life easier for mothers through programs like paid family and medical leave. In New Jersey, Governor Mikie Sherrill declared a State of Emergency on utility costs, and her administration is already working to lower costs for working families.
It’s in the spirit of motherhood to fight for a better world, to want to leave our children with more than we had, to lift them up. As a mom, there’s nothing more heartening than watching you all fight for a better world, and knowing that we are all in that fight together.
So this Mother’s Day, I’m writing to say _thank you_ for continuing to fight — on behalf of myself and so many other mothers.
I appreciate all that you do,
[](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em-dnc-may-2026-gfr?amount=7&refcode=em_20260510_7038_fr&refcode2=7038_22930333_LQt1_c&akid=7038%2E22930333%2ELQt1_c)
---
Jill Biden
P.S. If you’re looking for a quick, high-impact way to contribute to the fight for a better future, [**chipping in to the DNC today**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em-dnc-may-2026-gfr?amount=7&refcode=em_20260510_7038_fr&refcode2=7038_22930333_LQt1_c&akid=7038%2E22930333%2ELQt1_c) is a great place to start. They’ll put your donation to work immediately to elect Democrats up and down the ballot, across the country — this November and beyond.

_If you gave recently via check or mail, our system may not have yet processed your gift. We are appreciative and thank you greatly for your support._

name: Claire Low, NDRC
subject: Inside the dangerous (and growing) threat to women’s voting rights
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the National Democratic Redistricting Committee, John Bisognano, President
body:
It’s hard to believe this is actually real. But we can’t afford to ignore it.
| [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/131128824/620038314/-3547583?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxMy8xLzg5Mjk0IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjhkMzA2ZWVmLTc5NGMtZjExMS04ZWYyLTAwMGQzYTE0YjY0MCIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=eWKxc8AFhh9CSmzOD33mzDTOFxYeA3n6F0W0cMXXucs=&emci=3bdc706c-e64a-f111-8ef2-000d3a14b640&emdi=8d306eef-794c-f111-8ef2-000d3a14b640&ceid=8431045)
---

Peter, you may want to sit down for this. **There’s a growing contingent of anti-democracy extremists who are against women exercising our right to vote. They’re not even hiding it.** Sure, this sounds straight out of _The Handmaid's Tale_ — but this isn't a shocking TV plotline, and the players involved aren't just random trolls on the fringes of the internet. **These are voices of major influence in the Republican Party:**
* Doug Wilson, a right-wing pastor whom Pete Hegseth invited to lead a Pentagon prayer service, said _the 19th Amendment should be repealed and that women should forfeit their right to vote_ when they get married.
* Kai Schwemmer, the influencer-turned-political director for College Republicans of America, has advocated for "family voting" — _effectively revoking a woman’s right to vote_ and instead only allowing the patriarchal head of the household to cast a ballot.
* And Peter Thiel, the tech billionaire with a long history of financially boosting J.D. Vance’s career, has written that the suffrage movement was "bad for democracy."

**It’s hard to believe this is real. But we must take threats like this seriously.** **All of this dangerous rhetoric is part and parcel with Republicans’ attempts to consolidate power and silence the will of the people** — from the nationwide effort to manipulate congressional maps to the egregious barriers to voting of the SAVE Act. There’s even a movement afoot to restrict voting rights to property owners. **We cannot let these extremist voices eradicate our democracy.[Your gift will help as the NDRC fights back against schemes seeking to suppress voting, especially the litany of attacks targeting women, people of color, young voters, the disabled, and the elderly.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/131128825/620038315/1630712388?refcode=don_ndrc_tier1_email_AntiDemExtremists_email_20260510-NDRC-Tier1-AntiDemExtremists_&utm_source=email&utm_medium=email&utm_term=don&utm_content=20260510-NDRC-Tier1-AntiDemExtremists_&utm_campaign=AntiDemExtremists&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxMy8xLzg5Mjk0IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjhkMzA2ZWVmLTc5NGMtZjExMS04ZWYyLTAwMGQzYTE0YjY0MCIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=eWKxc8AFhh9CSmzOD33mzDTOFxYeA3n6F0W0cMXXucs=)** | _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_

clean_body: It’s hard to believe this is actually real. But we can’t afford to ignore it. | Peter, you may want to sit down for this. There’s a growing contingent of anti-democracy extremists who are against women exercising our right to vote. They’re not even hiding it. Sure, this sounds straight out of The Handmaid's Tale — but this isn't a shocking TV plotline, and the players involved aren't just random trolls on the fringes of the internet. These are voices of major influence in the Republican Party: Doug Wilson, a right-wing pastor whom Pete Hegseth invited to lead a Pentagon prayer service, said the 19th Amendment should be repealed and that women should forfeit their right to vote when they get married. Kai Schwemmer, the influencer-turned-political director for College Republicans of America, has advocated for "family voting" — effectively revoking a woman’s right to vote and instead only allowing the patriarchal head of the household to cast a ballot. And Peter Thiel, the tech billionaire with a long history of financially boosting J.D. Vance’s career, has written that the suffrage movement was "bad for democracy." It’s hard to believe this is real. But we must take threats like this seriously. All of this dangerous rhetoric is part and parcel with Republicans’ attempts to consolidate power and silence the will of the people — from the nationwide effort to manipulate congressional maps to the egregious barriers to voting of the SAVE Act. There’s even a movement afoot to restrict voting rights to property owners. We cannot let these extremist voices eradicate our democracy.= | If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: = | = = | = = | = With President Trump and the GOP repeatedly pushing for the anti-voter SAVE Act and the threat of measures like these floating around in the halls of power, we have no time to waste. Thank you for making a difference in this critical moment, Claire Low Director of Political and Campaigns National Democratic Redistricting Committee = = | | Paid for by the National Democratic Redistricting Committee, John Bisognano, President. | | | | | | | ---|---|---|---|---|---|--- National Democratic Redistricting Committee 712 H St NE, #25 Washington, DC 20002 United States if you'd like to receive fewer emails from the NDRC. Text MAPS to 36787, STOP to end. Msg and Data rates may apply**

Friend,

I promise I won’t take up much of your time.

In my film _2000 Mules_ , I exposed one of the greatest scandals in American history - the hijacking of the 2020 presidential election.

Today, I'm proud to join forces with Stand in the Gap, a non-profit organization dedicated to supporting the patriots who exercised their First Amendment rights in protest of the _outcome_ of that election.

**I want to reach as many people as I can with this request...**

I told their founder, Shane Jenkins, that I would help him raise $20,000 before the end of the month to help Stand in the Gap provide help, hope, and healing to the January 6th patriots.

Even a donation of $10 can give a January 6th patriot the support they need.

[If that is all you need to hear, then please contribute $10 or any amount you can generously afford using the button below:](https://email.updates.conservativeinnovation.com/c/eJyUkMGKhDAMQL-m3pQmatVDDwuDt9nrHiXTBidQa7Eddz9_cWA_YG8heTwe-bovd5Igcf2kja07ZTnykgJT5sBlY_5JgSQuqNHUuq9BXwBU3jpvWqzYwjCMHWIPU_W03YgE4PXkcDK9YSQeulHDMAF576ASe5l0Dxo66KFtRmLUj854cA8Y_EN1-pU8Fc6N22Pm46QiJ0uM-zXtsXH7VgX7LCVl1X4onBXOmd3r4IYi-71cxLUrFH0tsS5PrldKCudENblLotr5VbbF0ZZI1qja21-WQvO-7LFwLKq9uVOqw_r0LSFINoPq9LqRhHdH-cfLTou_AQAA___wmHcV)
[Donate Now](https://email.updates.conservativeinnovation.com/c/eJyUkMGKhDAMQL-m3pQmatVDDwuDt9nrHiXTBidQa7Eddz9_cWA_YG8heTwe-bovd5Igcf2kja07ZTnykgJT5sBlY_5JgSQuqNHUuq9BXwBU3jpvWqzYwjCMHWIPU_W03YgE4PXkcDK9YSQeulHDMAF576ASe5l0Dxo66KFtRmLUj854cA8Y_EN1-pU8Fc6N22Pm46QiJ0uM-zXtsXH7VgX7LCVl1X4onBXOmd3r4IYi-71cxLUrFH0tsS5PrldKCudENblLotr5VbbF0ZZI1qja21-WQvO-7LFwLKq9uVOqw_r0LSFINoPq9LqRhHdH-cfLTou_AQAA___wmHcV)
**Otherwise, let me explain why I’m asking you to donate at least $10:**

$10 because the _“crime”_ these patriots committed was fighting for their country.

$10 because even though they’ve been pardoned, many of them are struggling to get back on their feet.

$10 because Stand in the Gap is providing them with the resources they need to successfully reintegrate into their communities, find work, reconnect with family, and restore their rights.

[$10 because no one should have to face these hardships alone.](https://email.updates.conservativeinnovation.com/c/eJyUkMGKhDAMQL-m3pQmatVDDwuDt9nrHiXTBidQa7Eddz9_cWA_YG8heTwe-bovd5Igcf2kja07ZTnykgJT5sBlY_5JgSQuqNHUuq9BXwBU3jpvWqzYwjCMHWIPU_W03YgE4PXkcDK9YSQeulHDMAF576ASe5l0Dxo66KFtRmLUj854cA8Y_EN1-pU8Fc6N22Pm46QiJ0uM-zXtsXH7VgX7LCVl1X4onBXOmd3r4IYi-71cxLUrFH0tsS5PrldKCudENblLotr5VbbF0ZZI1qja21-WQvO-7LFwLKq9uVOqw_r0LSFINoPq9LqRhHdH-cfLTou_AQAA___wmHcV)

Not only are these men and women patriots, but they come from all walks of life — law enforcement, veterans, white-collar professionals, blue-collar workers, and all races and religions.

_And they were hunted down in a political persecution that denied them their constitutional rights._

**Stand in the Gap exists to provide real, practical help, like rent money, job training, transportation, legal referrals, trauma counseling, and health insurance, to help these persecuted patriots move on with their lives.**

Your gift today can help one of these patriots find the help, hope, and healing they need to succeed in their second chance.

**Friend, can I count on you to contribute $10 or whatever you can afford to Stand in the Gap? Click any button below to give today.**

clean_body: This email could change someone's life | | | |ARCHIVE| | | Friend, I promise I won’t take up much of your time. In my film 2000 Mules , I exposed one of the greatest scandals in American history - the hijacking of the 2020 presidential election. Today, I'm proud to join forces with Stand in the Gap, a non-profit organization dedicated to supporting the patriots who exercised their First Amendment rights in protest of the outcome of that election. I want to reach as many people as I can with this request... I told their founder, Shane Jenkins, that I would help him raise $20,000 before the end of the month to help Stand in the Gap provide help, hope, and healing to the January 6th patriots. Even a donation of $10 can give a January 6th patriot the support they need. Otherwise, let me explain why I’m asking you to donate at least $10: $10 because the “crime” these patriots committed was fighting for their country. $10 because even though they’ve been pardoned, many of them are struggling to get back on their feet. $10 because Stand in the Gap is providing them with the resources they need to successfully reintegrate into their communities, find work, reconnect with family, and restore their rights. Not only are these men and women patriots, but they come from all walks of life — law enforcement, veterans, white-collar professionals, blue-collar workers, and all races and religions. And they were hunted down in a political persecution that denied them their constitutional rights. Stand in the Gap exists to provide real, practical help, like rent money, job training, transportation, legal referrals, trauma counseling, and health insurance, to help these persecuted patriots move on with their lives. Your gift today can help one of these patriots find the help, hope, and healing they need to succeed in their second chance. Friend, can I count on you to contribute $10 or whatever you can afford to Stand in the Gap? Click any button below to give today. Thank you, Dinesh D'Souza P.S. If you're still reading this email and I haven't convinced you to donate $10 or more, please consider what January 6th patriots still face... Harassment on social media and in their personal lives Difficulties in finding a job Homelessness Loss of rights, like the right to vote or own a firearm * Mental health challenges that their families can never understand All they did was stand up for their beliefs. They do not deserve this sort of treatment. But for just $10, you can help Stand in the Gap give pardoned January 6th patriots the support they need to succeed at their second chance. Stand In The Gap is registered as a 501(c)(3) non-profit organization. All contributions are tax-deductible to the extent permitted by law. name: David Hogg
subject: Celebrating mothers today
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY LEADERS WE DESERVE, LEADERSWEDESERVE
body:
Happy Mother’s Day to all the amazing, courageous, loving moms out there.
# [](https://act.leaderswedeserve.com/go/852?refcode=em20260510-1&t=1&akid=3457%2E587540%2E4h86Ut)
Peter,
Today, we’re celebrating the incredible mothers out there who show up for their families every single day — and the mothers in public office who show up for all of us.
Mothers like **Sen. Tammy Duckworth** , who was the first sitting senator to give birth while in office. And just ten days after giving birth, she showed up on the Senate floor to cast her vote with her infant daughter in her arms (who was dressed in a tiny blazer so she didn’t violate the Senate dress code).
Tammy made history that day. She fought to change the Senate rules to allow senators to bring infants onto the floor, because she refused to choose between being a mother and doing her job. And because of her, no senator will be faced with that choice again.
Mothers like **Rep. Ayanna Pressley** , who has spent her career fighting for the mothers the system has failed most. Black women are disproportionately impacted by maternal health issues, dying at nearly three times the rate of non-Black mothers. Ayanna fought to extend postpartum Medicaid coverage to a full year, expand access to doula and midwifery care, and make sure a safe pregnancy is a right — not a privilege.
Mothers like our own Leaders We Deserve candidates. **Mai Vang** is a working mom and Sacramento City Council member, where she established an $8 million first of its kind Children’s Fund for kids impacted by poverty and trauma. Now she’s running for Congress in California’s 7th District to continue fighting for the kids and families of her community.
And **Lauren Babb Tomlinson** , who is taking on a crowded congressional primary in California’s 6th District with a 15 month old at home. She’s spent her career at Planned Parenthood fighting to make sure every mother has access to the care she deserves.
Both of these leaders are running because they know what’s at stake for mothers and working families. They live that reality every single day. And those are exactly the kind of leaders we need more of.
Happy Mother’s Day to all the amazing, courageous, loving moms out there. We wouldn’t be here without you. ❤️
— David
* * *

body:
They mutilated children. Now, we’re holding them accountable.
_Please see a special message from our sponsor. If you would like to unsubscribe, visit this[link](http://links.redconservatives.com/s/u/92SEeK0vwbOlWbFMlH20zlaDt1UZbLe6pRWZJHKBDuFCWiFfS1QhjNytFDZcdfTic8XDaQzIgAyBSlB2w2LUazvV6XS5mfY7XxucxN-qSKl7rQYdPqQ_EtZdLMHVvlFlbH-98Jkp1CnMK0WHmEK6eVYwjj3OTun_ZfhRw7-4ewT46iRGeVptyvmF/UTmBKRkWb1ybD977vvkMK3TW6ZZdqz8W/20)_

---
Peter,

For too long, the medical establishment got away with mutilating children in the name of "gender-affirming care."

They gave puberty blockers to 13-year-olds, performed double mastectomies on 15-year-olds. And when the complications started -- when the regret set in -- the medical establishment walked away. _**No consequences. No accountability. Just billions in profit.**_

[_**The Chloe Cole Act changes that.**_](http://links.redconservatives.com/s/c/FCDt0v8Cc6FVVZdVaPso_LxOEolpF1cLEad1YVFMKCcjMCbrg1Z6mUSfUaC8fve35UywxMv69LtBBcd6ToujN0--HgiuND-jrHrNcJL7F2KxKiCrDviyWLugdh-Gc5J5MQ3s6v0kbU99aVNvaD44zRgfwR4A5AOhwdxSjuF8SeewSy-iQx43YexstxkIJysI4f1e4aJNAY1hnakvs2Avwh1G1cn42MUJAuheS_4gGVjJHg5BhGU0Y66O3EObauEwSW_-KlIHugsJ0cNsNKS0idgQstcr6IRfRUIqtu62hZEsYXFY0rDn4WoVkYveACw8yP--OIDoXjnAMk6Bx_jGn_TF6dVLyPouBkhODtsKZYzopqEBzS4942-zEfk7TEpeM60Dp9i2vx3BxtRI7jdd9naptyDn1_FIxcjnE8eyAFjllAKB88qs8Ps8tFSapBDxcbBR6fo5N6wUQMKuUR6Aup5JUfDi7AofxG0AenNN9bR48YceXVKVqydBCny6LR4IYWF7hDWd3QRBb5zPRLFZXDojOa-Mlt6ccMNJbOK-fJu_Iyw8meSNXYFozGRToh18Kklu_gvplFmR6aUgsATY_cDPuttyMWVDJszBrZ4pM8AMwGvVIiepTyzNmLs4TylQuDuqESoBUCgjnR_rpbmPtqxY0Jtyjrw-NuFJCn1A2HLePZF0RMJg5o-6TJOWcp0b3Lf3/srJEqfBP8P0Zpszjx4SQSzXq9WWhuORl/20)

This bill gives victims (and their parents) of this medical malpractice the legal power to sue the doctors, hospitals, and clinics responsible for these **irreversible harms. **

---
| | [](http://links.redconservatives.com/s/c/3y2DjRpjEutJS41OW6ZIY3QIJHmW3oR_2CY_YMaAEIjwrmxxHa8zqQ9OWrM5eJ6-AmdR4Ca3gnJ8VT5IdJyzmENrslMoiIOPCkWz0iK1ocMUMtcnei3f2S9cc1SZf1NFdv16trCti5BDhnvWBzhPWtsH6vzxFt2BaadBFnfeb36m_PEf06I_Z3lBiRK59jnDMZVjnesuBp9UsWKK86mALWQ29wQOKHMK17vsga9v81XXE-NFE3A3pRG7XlgvXW1zCZL6jgQ-pFY9UlWJPFpqKS-r-IEZdRGm2YuTiicdFW1xOQlrFuEo8C1c-rdu5joTiSsvPY_6DfNugX7xN7H6p8IfAubIfOceUqC0XUoH3TFxbjp4swCdEOG-M2gnotMoz90x6oo3Q5DFuM8ej9Ul0hNvb5qGp2tz4sr9j5GjdzFTlU7AlBhmTi9_GaVfp5nuOF4JJpLpoolibshx5V1mMxjeYkxvwWgm86T1LBJ4qClxRpdo5ptPKLDUhe4-KrYlYQKCkd3pMe46x4hxARcSTo7W5OSaMzKAOmyCB1diDw_EzLUkrvFzeA5hX-U6Go7_H-Byo7FcYfvFiEl08oqC1D_ICdziPMb-FtEyhw-parDkCpXG3z50EvlcPaWKixKuKTLPJQcYezLK7Yo1iaWPQHNXw8MF9CHKiF6tZ5-7f0wrugBWa9wdH1ykPTKqndEDbJSy/Ql1ax1PCQSn-G8APgEKwSuc5FN1DMgmN/20)

_Grateful to spend this Mother 's Day surrounded by family and the incredible Murphy Moms - starting with church and ending around the table together._
_Wanted to reshare this[column from last year](https://substack.com/redirect/7909d6f4-b0d9-4918-b19c-7c9304b3a66b?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) honoring our family's matriarch. Her love, strength, faith, and example continue to shape all of us every single day._
_Love you, Mom. 💕_
* * *
I always joke that my mom left Jesus for my dad, Jack Murphy.
It usually gets a laugh, but it's also sort of true.
She was a Catholic nun. And then, one day, she wasn't.
She spent years serving in the Immaculate Heart of Mary order, following in the footsteps of her beloved aunt Mary Logan (aka Sister M St. Thomas), who spent over fifty years as a Catholic nun. My Mom believed she was devoting her life to the highest calling possible. While she was in the convent, her twin brother Billy served in Vietnam with the 101st Airborne. Both wore the uniform of their beloved church and country, respectively.
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/cd62c4ef-d312-4576-a501-ffb5bda7855a?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
My mother at Immaculate Heart of Mary convent, 1965
And then, one day, she left it all behind. Not because she lost faith, but because she found something else worth believing in. One that eventually involved raising three rambunctious kids in a row house in Northeast Philly. She made sure everyone in the neighborhood knew that the Murphys led with values, sending us to Catholic school, and raising first-generation college graduates.
What she never left, though, was her love of our faith, family, and community. A regular devotee to 6:30 a.m. daily mass, she gave us kids a choice: deliver the morning _Philadelphia Inquirer_ before school or join her at church. My brother JJ and I chose the paper route and did it on roller skates and a shopping cart filled with that day's papers.
She may have left the Church's walls, but she never left its principles--later serving as a Eucharistic Minister.
There's a reason all three Murphy kids ended up in public service. My sister has spent over two decades as a public school teacher. My brother served in the Air Force, completing two overseas deployments before continuing his work in public safety down in Florida. I also went into the military and later, political public service. That wasn't a coincidence. That was Margie Rapone Murphy's influence on her kids.
On Saturdays, when all we wanted to do was run outside to play or head to our baseball/basketball/soccer/hockey games, she made us do chores first. Make our beds, vacuum the living room and basement, and dust. Not as punishment, but because pride starts at home. She'd then have us fix up our neighborhood block--sweeping the sidewalks, picking up litter, and helping our elderly neighbors by mowing their lawns or shoveling their steps for free when it snowed. I can still hear the hum of her Hi-Fi stereo blasting her 'Hi God' records, with classics like "I wish I were a butterfly" ("I'd thank you God for giving me wings").
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/20289dbb-e994-4c2b-8d40-c911f8a4c9d6?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
My mother and father in Wildwood, New Jersey
That was her gospel: if you wanted the world to be better, you started with your own house and your own street. It was a row house mentality-- expressing gratitude by taking care of the people to your left and right.
On Sundays, there was no skipping church. And there was _definitely_ no hiding in the back pews. First three rows. Always. Dressed in our Sunday best. No shorts and always there for Holy Days of Obligation. Which is probably why now, when I take my own kids to weekly mass, I make sure to sit towards the back as a sign of rebellion. Partly out of guilt, because I'll never be as good as her, but also out of gratitude. Gratitude for a mom who showed us that faith isn't something you talk about--it's something you live. She made sure we understood the importance of faith and family as a treasured gift.
These days, she's happiest when surrounded by her ten grandchildren and three great-grandchildren. Whether it's a family graduation, a special trip to Disney World, or our annual Jersey Shore trip to Wildwood, she's the one keeping everyone fed and sunscreened, holding the newborns more than anyone else, giving the new parents a much-needed break. And somehow, even at 78, she's still one of the first on the dance floor at every family wedding.
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/9d636270-258f-49a1-8150-405d2ffef33a?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
My mother with just a few of her grandchildren
At West Point, we taught cadets to let your troops eat first. But I saw that kind of leadership long before I wore a uniform. I saw it at our kitchen table. My mother never sat until everyone else's plate was filled---and usually with a second helping on the way.
My mom's legacy is built on little things that added up to a big life.
So this Mother's Day, I want to say thank you to the woman who gave us grit, grace, and the gospel of doing the right thing--even when no one's watching. Who led with action, not just words. Thank you, Margaret "Margie" Rapone Murphy--who left a convent but never left her calling. Who gave us a blueprint for how to live a life with purpose. Who taught us that strength doesn't necessarily mean muscles, but having a selfless heart and leading with love.
She is a person with more heart, drive, and devotion than anyone I've ever known. It's why our daughter Maggie is named after her-- and not surprisingly, they're "besties."
Happy Mother's Day, Mom. I love you. As does everyone who's ever known you. Sorry I didn't become the parish priest you always hoped for--but watching the way you love my kids shows me you know I also made the right choice. Can't wait to be at church with you later this morning-- even if, much to your chagrin, I'm still sitting towards the back pews.
-Patrick

Annual paid subscribers in the U.S. will receive a digital copy of my 2008 memoir, . And Thank God She Did. | | | May 10 | | | | | | | | | | | | Grateful to spend this Mother 's Day surrounded by family and the incredible Murphy Moms - starting with church and ending around the table together. Wanted to reshare this honoring our family's matriarch. Her love, strength, faith, and example continue to shape all of us every single day. Love you, Mom. 💕 I always joke that my mom left Jesus for my dad, Jack Murphy. It usually gets a laugh, but it's also sort of true. She was a Catholic nun. And then, one day, she wasn't. She spent years serving in the Immaculate Heart of Mary order, following in the footsteps of her beloved aunt Mary Logan (aka Sister M St. Thomas), who spent over fifty years as a Catholic nun. My Mom believed she was devoting her life to the highest calling possible. While she was in the convent, her twin brother Billy served in Vietnam with the 101st Airborne. Both wore the uniform of their beloved church and country, respectively. | | ---|---|--- My mother at Immaculate Heart of Mary convent, 1965 And then, one day, she left it all behind. Not because she lost faith, but because she found something else worth believing in. One that eventually involved raising three rambunctious kids in a row house in Northeast Philly. She made sure everyone in the neighborhood knew that the Murphys led with values, sending us to Catholic school, and raising first-generation college graduates. What she never left, though, was her love of our faith, family, and community. A regular devotee to 6:30 a.m. daily mass, she gave us kids a choice: deliver the morning Philadelphia Inquirer before school or join her at church. My brother JJ and I chose the paper route and did it on roller skates and a shopping cart filled with that day's papers. She may have left the Church's walls, but she never left its principles--later serving as a Eucharistic Minister. There's a reason all three Murphy kids ended up in public service. My sister has spent over two decades as a public school teacher. My brother served in the Air Force, completing two overseas deployments before continuing his work in public safety down in Florida. I also went into the military and later, political public service. That wasn't a coincidence. That was Margie Rapone Murphy's influence on her kids. On Saturdays, when all we wanted to do was run outside to play or head to our baseball/basketball/soccer/hockey games, she made us do chores first. Make our beds, vacuum the living room and basement, and dust. Not as punishment, but because pride starts at home. She'd then have us fix up our neighborhood block--sweeping the sidewalks, picking up litter, and helping our elderly neighbors by mowing their lawns or shoveling their steps for free when it snowed. I can still hear the hum of her Hi-Fi stereo blasting her 'Hi God' records, with classics like "I wish I were a butterfly" ("I'd thank you God for giving me wings"). | | ---|---|--- My mother and father in Wildwood, New Jersey That was her gospel: if you wanted the world to be better, you started with your own house and your own street. So this Mother's Day, I want to say thank you to the woman who gave us grit, grace, and the gospel of doing the right thing--even when no one's watching. Who led with action, not just words. subject: More floaters than last year? Here's what that means.
body:
When floaters start getting worse, this is what's happening inside | | | [](https://links.newsletter.marketdailypro.com/u/click?_t=7a28bbb892d5463fb7f7674bdc2d44f2&_m=005acfe4e42a40dd999665f23093fd7c&_e=NMSqUcpIK6bVvF1coCIAyiI-N5iufhITZwjLM5fGrY7TnD21rXogcATL9A02eLugc1An0ZuPPxaG8Uf_bIQrWxeGokrK0CoPsUQxqKS64tT7XSfmm2799iVQs49RIpyY5HZTcVi8KLyEObnK8-XuUJ9igxNtP8I03bogXXhbzg5d3ZrlLJkpZZfiCEJh3BA4CF0nijsIhoni22mSPxeVKe845Bt9XWhzrPIvlEXMYeisqHC3v5_5d7D6I1IiBb8_tA242Nt1-DPnOp8g4kG4Dr3WgIZeb7T7LyBy_1Ru7nptPfWrisaoRO9yc4xBTcWx4ivHgHZDYQO6RhHJfL6ETA%3D%3D)

They started as one or two.

Now there's more.

Strings. Cobwebs. Shadows drifting across everything you look at.

Most people assume it's just something to ignore.

Turns out, floaters multiply when blood vessels in your eyes keep collapsing. Each one is a piece of debris your eyes can no longer clear out.

The more you see, the further along the damage is.
[](https://links.newsletter.marketdailypro.com/u/click?_t=7a28bbb892d5463fb7f7674bdc2d44f2&_m=005acfe4e42a40dd999665f23093fd7c&_e=NMSqUcpIK6bVvF1coCIAykNfyKqRLq729yXqrcH3je65CyDPpadija3hxm4O_TMxHqCV5TILeCSFe7YHdH1-ZeweDuelrkQ8BJKQkM4GD5BtFWhSvkWjU-ozL-CR4qDq_MT2bCnXCABwW7lY4pBsBAgK_Mk3UsTFOyMVsXB9Jzhu-BnX5nvJ3AlidAtiY-iPfTJzNZil0iS3TcoRKz339MynbZ2LHxnOKaPHdOb1mGlnPwG7RAwYKEQDWuYEO69o5d2dTYCc5dOKGbV4lCG_-hVqvlFF9zJDptp55iPPUua99o7jBBRYmtE4YBrXOFrSLGnDKjgHjLsKAiJmobUkhTHt47vyB3KxthUurIZBdCCFzR3Xz4j3tmlhFlkHPaFWh8LMOj3-Hh-QoWtZDDKtrIKhgDMnULiU4VCCBfsL7rOc1SHzMiwAhn20tlCg3i_Ws6jeGnPHz3bBDCxLfEdqIXuzXxBmeZZhrM6_tR4sQCgBuMZfjJ62jtGPKte5mjY27Hz6T2oPUS5aEPlPNIDZ5rpnnJA47rMJhr-ac1-MPMF6OikINTx_8fQg-dhEqlDxGLDgkFl6OrZ5dErJXa72tg%3D%3D)

name: Sen. Chuck Grassley
subject: 50 years in D.C. and I’ve never seen this.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Rogers for Senate
body:
Friend, the radical shift I’m seeing in Washington is unlike anything in history. Read my personal note on how we fight back.

| | | [](https://links.rogersforsenate.com/u/click?_t=293de5a6223e4436ab53fb8020578890&_m=ce31f269025746f5bf4e97999c23a606&_e=RlGFvcaPLcydIjfdS0iDSy7ZIDv0V6eVzXyMeTcIGtjjWKV5jPd2JuWAy1WadTWf2HpDFDVWzHyBx6420Qk8nL0hVrQD6p4dJx5b0UHL4oKzMn79Fdxh6-oj29OQCQHS4K4A8EoGHBCWKg7UvXzWaKK6PtfVR3NbHsJsTs9uaPHS5CGu3QctygXQ_eBxpqYkw6NuuuCn5ZojOxbs0I7TMx_EQnt2u98hG9Zg_Cis97y-i6llQOcnFUw5saSlWX-lK3DaN5K69vUxurg50RNCEkg5r69hrg-cst-PIClaqkq7ObfkGaratVjiDcngqu9zSOOgqFpCXfu-dyDFNajuIODb2LqzJ6xZbw1wUsRY0gnoxdldzmeO4kLX1wLrcrvaacJBGyj02YpGPFDXaBotfD9tFib0sgI7CB1u0y_Abf3rTW2tbBnpxxsIVoss_On7psrr9RBMHJriIU_mbg-4BYiCdhceQZxZIatydTrxUmSllFLDSozLCdEw40AsFOlX0c3sQEW7QDegYC9zsY15OhTDn5kaRE8pDKCf8DWAT3l5jtdhe5auCN_85ZMM6GXvKnpG52rDpRcIDyoEsG89vzCXJWRz7VEf8uVU1beyFf1fxNMSvyJlie3KTeeDfI_uxL9VPe_MShfOPfORMoA9Jqmyvt2WUv8YSBDs_9BC1pcP5rC0Ppg8KmyoWN6F8_VL_2Oxm45SFuBK0QYWnwI6YpISRIH8GN-35VH00YW5MI5VRrTV121yjBFCyfBLaRYA_WOaFQgwPf0-kIHS2Xb5qooEGDOq__tLiTqOlC2DNTk%3D)
---
Friend, When you’ve been in Washington for as long as I have, you’d think I’d have seen it all.

But I’ve never seen a Democrat Party so radical and so motivated. We need to fight back, and we need to do it now.

[I wrote you a message. name: VoteVets HQ
subject: 🪖 To EVERY VoteVets supporter: We're humbly asking for your support 🇺🇸
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY VOTEVETS, VOTEVETS
body:
Peter — Please, don’t skip this 1 minute read.
#
Peter - please, don’t skip this 1 minute read.
When we think about the people who have done the most to support VoteVets over the years, it’s not the people who write the biggest checks who come to mind.
It’s the people who were there when everything was on the line.
Like you, Peter.

Your support, voice, and participation have helped us run some of the most powerful and impactful ads out there. It has helped us continue to be one of the most impactful and effective organizations in politics, even with all that Trump throws our way.
Your support helps us win races that otherwise wouldn’t even be competitive.
It’s helped us fight for things that matter most to Veterans. It has stopped more efforts to privatize the VA than we can count. It won things like the PACT Act, ensuring Veterans suffering from toxic exposures could get the treatment they need and deserve.
Thank you.

But here’s an interesting fact: out of almost 2 million people who have taken action with VoteVets, only 1% have made a donation online to support our work.
Today, we’re asking you to join that select group.

Our average donation is $24. Some give more, many give less. But with Trump coming for everything we hold dear, all that matters is that you’re choosing to power our work with a donation.
We’ll put it right to work fighting and fighting back against these liars and hypocrites, and defending our Constitution at a moment when it is in extreme peril.
[**If helping VoteVets lead this fight from the front seems worth a $5 donation to you, we’re humbly asking you to make a donation before midnight. We really need you. Thank you.**](https://act.votevets.org/go/2927?c0=vv-pac-em-may26.in4ulI&refcode=em260510-1-60&t=1&akid=35138%2E3013755%2Eu4-R-2)

name: this will only take a minute via Fight For Reform
subject: please don’t skip this.... (re: Presidents Biden and Obama)
disclaimer_text: paid for and provided by End Citizens United Nonfederal, P
body:
| Fight for Reform is dedicated to electing Democrats, transforming our broken campaign finance system, and ending _Citizens United_ state by state. If you would like to get fewer emails, [**_click here._**](https://act.fightforreform.org/go/59469?t=1&akid=24229%2E4449941%2EYfBFUA) If you would like to unsubscribe, [**_click here._**](https://act.fightforreform.org/go/59470?t=2&akid=24229%2E4449941%2EYfBFUA) **_CONGRATULATIONS, TEAM!_** You have been hand-picked from a diverse pool of highly educated Democrats to represent your area in our Joe Biden and Barack Obama Legacy Survey. [](https://act.fightforreform.org/go/74018?t=3&akid=24229%2E4449941%2EYfBFUA) [ **dpwillis67@gmail.com: Please begin your survey now to represent Democrats in your area >> **](https://act.fightforreform.org/go/74018?t=4&akid=24229%2E4449941%2EYfBFUA) | [Begin your Legacy Survey now >>](https://act.fightforreform.org/go/74018?t=5&akid=24229%2E4449941%2EYfBFUA)
---
[ **** 5,000 responses needed before midnight to validate our Democratic data ****](https://act.fightforreform.org/go/74018?t=6&akid=24229%2E4449941%2EYfBFUA)
Team, with Trump’s Presidency over 1 year in, we're dreaming of the days when he wasn’t President.

We’re looking back to administrations that we admired and respected — but we want to understand how Democrats in your city feel.

You were the only Democrat selected from your area to complete this survey, so your response is absolutely critical.
[ **Please, begin your President Biden and President Obama Legacy Survey to represent Top Democrats in your area! We need your response to validate our data >> **](https://act.fightforreform.org/go/74018?t=7&akid=24229%2E4449941%2EYfBFUA)
[Take the survey now >>](https://act.fightforreform.org/go/74018?t=8&akid=24229%2E4449941%2EYfBFUA)
---
[ **** 5,000 responses needed before midnight to validate our Democratic data ****](https://act.fightforreform.org/go/74018?t=9&akid=24229%2E4449941%2EYfBFUA)
Thank you for your participation,

Fight for Reform
| This message was sent to: dpwillis67@gmail.com
[ _Click here to get fewer emails._](https://act.fightforreform.org/signup/Less-Emails?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&t=10&akid=24229%2E4449941%2EYfBFUA) | [_Click here to unsubscribe._**](https://act.fightforreform.org/unsubscribe/unsubscribe-2022?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&t=11&akid=24229%2E4449941%2EYfBFUA)
---
|

If you'd like to receive fewer emails, **[click here.](https://act.fightforreform.org/signup/Less-Emails/?t=12&akid=24229%2E4449941%2EYfBFUA)**
If you'd like to unsubscribe, **[click here.](https://act.fightforreform.org/unsubscribe/unsubscribe-2022/?t=13&akid=24229%2E4449941%2EYfBFUA)**
Thank you for supporting Fight For Reform, a State Level Project of End Citizens United. The Supreme Court's 2010 _Citizens United v. FEC_ decision completely changed the landscape of American politics -- it opened the door for billionaires, corporations, and special interests to spend unlimited, untraceable money to influence our elections.
| | [DONATE TO FIGHT FOR REFORM NOW →](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/loc_ffr_2025_footer?refcode=LOC_EM_FR_2025.X.X_X_FOOTER_X__F1_S1_C1__FOOTER&t=14&refcode2=24229_4449941_YfBFUA&akid=24229%2E4449941%2EYfBFUA)
---
Your support is critical to helping us reject the Big Money status quo in states and cities across the country by electing champions of campaign finance reform and voting rights to state government, and passing reform ballot initiatives.
With your support we can harness the power of our grassroots supporters to influence decision makers and put control back in the hands of the people.
| | [DONATE TO FIGHT FOR REFORM NOW →](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/loc_ffr_2025_footer?refcode=LOC_EM_FR_2025.X.X_X_FOOTER_X__F1_S1_C1__FOOTER&t=15&refcode2=24229_4449941_YfBFUA&akid=24229%2E4449941%2EYfBFUA)
---

If you'd like to donate to support our efforts, please **[click here:](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/loc_ffr_2025_footer?refcode=LOC_EM_FR_2025.X.X_X_FOOTER_X__F1_S1_C1__FOOTER&t=17&refcode2=24229_4449941_YfBFUA&akid=24229%2E4449941%2EYfBFUA)**

subject: Please let me explain
body:
[](http://links.makingamericathegreatest.com/u/click?_t=79fa4a3daf024a0a886c5b498ff32e32&_m=c6ed9091f2544e8b9b39406b51ff9dd2&_e=lbcUnkG2TdsYvX6V2CFHiEKOw0j_WR549NpjML-FRXB_-JKjEAiPzGARhtOf2PSCvyHfpfb7aW3WWWccLIX1fdPpnPCkJPx4GUxG6J_w5D0K-ew3An04u9cyE_6PrxdX4dbP-Nqm3SlwkT0-bUzg7UzRXUCIRJz9MKlUVz-m1RIU3Ez7R3psLNCgGVXf5hhC6HAwi4g9d8yfc_Km_sdX9gnZcscVEQQL8mCtanC7GM8ZnKC6rB73rRWgNJTtG8EsHmNqcj6fCUR-1inCwSDdyW_WClZmAmmJikZQsKJ8ByOdJne-lhK1DeVba_5Hv5v-WgcHWpBuX55zq4741VWc21KLPRYktLaYWRHqTJzSWpSmml4TmXOF3H0jw1X-R6KTJH7MEZj1vSm1WM_091V1TW8MwdhxeUvmcw_2_N4w3K_v7XR3RRdcWJ9lix6ilntOG3ZMIJpII5ZqZji0zo1C5gH3mJv5wY4oGxpV-QU3UpvnbYp8c6m4UBj1Jyh1smCFBN1xuWSWJDrOirqB30LX9itzZ-WkUxG7ZxuvjbOHsfsO1pcvrUfDglBZFFacOPIKYDgax3yzt4OV9wYHmZf14GaC7Y-cRpOSamCzRQI4E1FKn48cOoM4L5FUzC3T0hM5)

Friend,

I promise I won't take up much of your time.

In my film _2000 Mules_ , I exposed one of the greatest scandals in American history - the hijacking of the 2020 presidential election.

Today, I'm proud to join forces with Stand in the Gap, a non-profit organization dedicated to supporting the patriots who exercised their First Amendment rights in protest of the _outcome_ of that election.

**I want to reach as many people as I can with this request...**

I told their founder, Shane Jenkins, that I would help him raise $20,000 before the end of the month to help Stand in the Gap provide help, hope, and healing to the January 6th patriots.

Even a donation of $10 can give a January 6th patriot the support they need.

[If that is all you need to hear, then please contribute $10 or any amount you can generously afford using the button below:](http://links.makingamericathegreatest.com/u/click?_t=79fa4a3daf024a0a886c5b498ff32e32&_m=c6ed9091f2544e8b9b39406b51ff9dd2&_e=lbcUnkG2TdsYvX6V2CFHiEKOw0j_WR549NpjML-FRXB_-JKjEAiPzGARhtOf2PSCvyHfpfb7aW3WWWccLIX1fdPpnPCkJPx4GUxG6J_w5D0K-ew3An04u9cyE_6PrxdX4dbP-Nqm3SlwkT0-bUzg7UzRXUCIRJz9MKlUVz-m1RJ-0oZCUKpSUURQE097wNiYSy-XC3rZfaIFwOMpu0jLmZD8r_tEl26XuZSOp30b6PY6IIUxLT_1qfOBmibUIOpzBirqJczMA3Pq8EDwpKomKTFUcB_s1dAMwXu2czm9A7yHQS0Vq1RcmFxL2trcNyvkApVNP5D9dumGE6Rhl5DLSNib2E8a2az4O5-4-7RbtSCjt2Y3ahcmGEOJsyrHfmGnN-kC84ciPh6oC7UmfN92dml2oJ_foVTuOxR5_6jHV-I2eED2mlXqP54bGca8OfN5ne0k8PLeTYMnoUIHKrCWVYg3rGmuh3DjyWQValoYLyA5bakfudYXVvv89zq3_5FlwVvnYwZrAAIaIOFGI-XK9iImuMrl_9q0F6TXU_orJKImJoDyyRQ9dArAWyRrRtwF6uGeMp4Uy5921GEMcytl5TZR6QhE6harNzpZdZkTGP1CheVVD8cA_3q_7elANaizMwNLyts1GjeK6AmqGd1ehA%3D%3D)

[Donate Now](http://links.makingamericathegreatest.com/u/click?_t=79fa4a3daf024a0a886c5b498ff32e32&_m=c6ed9091f2544e8b9b39406b51ff9dd2&_e=lbcUnkG2TdsYvX6V2CFHiEKOw0j_WR549NpjML-FRXB_-JKjEAiPzGARhtOf2PSCvyHfpfb7aW3WWWccLIX1fdPpnPCkJPx4GUxG6J_w5D0K-ew3An04u9cyE_6PrxdX4dbP-Nqm3SlwkT0-bUzg7UzRXUCIRJz9MKlUVz-m1RItMPc0OAS4DReonQTjLec43c77bZX_Dlywm_iqUTM0ENR77dsjFaTvaCfbJqpxCzrloRyyKdRcHm4nY93txOSpTezkZR6tMkENf8Wrf97Fp3NBh0FCeYdYAZAJJzGmgkIRKyCjnXCZgWRuPhkFZ4eqHgaGHTuyswbHMGzVHtqg2HmsGL6tPypuxqyu8heUPhQIn1AA8g4pSW0NX1P7_vl8a3LeixMVc_UQBrauwXgoKs4Ou49iO1nCw1sQZZ5zCWi628nVznRr1_q0uwOVBUMz4mCMsE72xw1YaqvgNw5-wHQxNW9uTxQ7Vxha-QFLjwzhZ6nxoCdAYvJdxkhL3CKUDFjC6bVh_bCu5zIpAMYKWdDUTgvG6utT52-k_r8KBmrtplGG-xHECyPVmy8urGksl8srVsctJ1So88PC5Ek3RkzUnF6NDIhBgkZyTPPniF3U5SN0uDvPqZiiTJ6xP4p7XfDQiMJCkEiaZM8vWh760uFAXto7m0uDPnWJ3zcwipY%3D)

**Otherwise, let me explain why I 'm asking you to donate at least $10:**

$10 because the _" crime"_ these patriots committed was fighting for their country.

$10 because even though they've been pardoned, many of them are struggling to get back on their feet.

$10 because Stand in the Gap is providing them with the resources they need to successfully reintegrate into their communities, find work, reconnect with family, and restore their rights.

[$10 because no one should have to face these hardships alone.](http://links.makingamericathegreatest.com/u/click?_t=79fa4a3daf024a0a886c5b498ff32e32&_m=c6ed9091f2544e8b9b39406b51ff9dd2&_e=lbcUnkG2TdsYvX6V2CFHiEKOw0j_WR549NpjML-FRXB_-JKjEAiPzGARhtOf2PSCvyHfpfb7aW3WWWccLIX1fdPpnPCkJPx4GUxG6J_w5D0K-ew3An04u9cyE_6PrxdX4dbP-Nqm3SlwkT0-bUzg7UzRXUCIRJz9MKlUVz-m1RKdI0ZfSzI0Xqrzu9q4OsFktmFWzo0gCcXMpR-3PgfryZvHSRjJaJI9XLGeSpAi1y3PVm7BCMYXgyn7STjFc9XjrpBoVmSC0QoSdodRenAl-udOw3ptCiY3DGBB3X0oUbLdtLhFdrs7_VALixTiVY_4HXd9wnjWqbPRysQhT0X-nfNML51HxNCHE-9AiWLHW-cIuMc4DnW5m2oBVR5EUVR_Bak24s-TkB4OO5P2TLs17gMacoU_PWQuMd3xW-R4iQyOxDJ2waN5TDv6mYjkt9C9lZ_vE-uvPUKrRLg071aV3EV-3xY1PX7guHkgQU2-i3xBmZU2bkPoPG2ZK-NlfX1swGK4vEUWoiOU3g4MD7_PivWOA1sq2c6yXRVfY4zMtQG7U2mlpQjZXOe6ezDbhpX1I6ShgzVuYjigWyn2wtwHUa_Kf7hY1aGxLn8cZ_I_GYTwqbGJO9vGsNq17wNUzXXQg8VhrtLvGyelsKeUPui2lA%3D%3D)

Not only are these men and women patriots, but they come from all walks of life -- law enforcement, veterans, white-collar professionals, blue-collar workers, and all races and religions.

_And they were hunted down in a political persecution that denied them their constitutional rights._

**Stand in the Gap exists to provide real, practical help, like rent money, job training, transportation, legal referrals, trauma counseling, and health insurance, to help these persecuted patriots move on with their lives.**

Your gift today can help one of these patriots find the help, hope, and healing they need to succeed in their second chance.

**Friend, can I count on you to contribute $10 or whatever you can afford to Stand in the Gap? Click any button below to give today.**

[Donate $10](http://links.makingamericathegreatest.com/u/click?_t=79fa4a3daf024a0a886c5b498ff32e32&_m=c6ed9091f2544e8b9b39406b51ff9dd2&_e=lbcUnkG2TdsYvX6V2CFHiEKOw0j_WR549NpjML-FRXB_-JKjEAiPzGARhtOf2PSCvyHfpfb7aW3WWWccLIX1fdPpnPCkJPx4GUxG6J_w5D0K-ew3An04u9cyE_6PrxdX4dbP-Nqm3SlwkT0-bUzg7UzRXUCIRJz9MKlUVz-m1RKW4RGrJ3rDgoTD9sRNqkDsK3-EIB2Cr99-JxUWL7YQq0zR6KtFNjOABSFCftLivmL7JzOP2ZKonpgbmL9MnFZjR946V3ElDwhSHZbC7CK7i4W66W7jT-wlu9DZYWkxMowU3vdj9FsQibVZhtIummCt6hGZtcLNKA_7gWI0K1YFxbv8rFzAB1xmT0ZHhG01BJubUDGO4syJ5bzbAE_3ejXQQWcV666Lb47Kpi_IEXSWrAUOnQ5KX9Y9YYQ4rmzj-_nKCytHRaxsBWWYzEUNaWQVi0LoVY_UTAv41pmY-KwhQJ_NlIFqjyVWBdleTETSUXuFEroOrK_AeDwhFFGaQv7tJMuJWXj7A4dXuuako4JWmmcEiIA0xcVOTM2r0mi2gLhY4Q1_N779OgzoVRPw8toZITLLtmD6j7PeyPxpHf1yPn5axIYZzNIhE1-WZVLzqLr8cOLzcxQ-JfPTXSYsHMyJBPq3ISAjcCCLdUeVtnjqUHjXJTWEmfL3leT0V89zfYM%3D)

clean_body: Friend, I promise I won't take up much of your time. In my film 2000 Mules , I exposed one of the greatest scandals in American history - the hijacking of the 2020 presidential election. Today, I'm proud to join forces with Stand in the Gap, a non-profit organization dedicated to supporting the patriots who exercised their First Amendment rights in protest of the outcome of that election. I want to reach as many people as I can with this request... I told their founder, Shane Jenkins, that I would help him raise $20,000 before the end of the month to help Stand in the Gap provide help, hope, and healing to the January 6th patriots. Even a donation of $10 can give a January 6th patriot the support they need. Otherwise, let me explain why I 'm asking you to donate at least $10: $10 because the " crime" these patriots committed was fighting for their country. $10 because even though they've been pardoned, many of them are struggling to get back on their feet. $10 because Stand in the Gap is providing them with the resources they need to successfully reintegrate into their communities, find work, reconnect with family, and restore their rights. Not only are these men and women patriots, but they come from all walks of life -- law enforcement, veterans, white-collar professionals, blue-collar workers, and all races and religions. And they were hunted down in a political persecution that denied them their constitutional rights. Stand in the Gap exists to provide real, practical help, like rent money, job training, transportation, legal referrals, trauma counseling, and health insurance, to help these persecuted patriots move on with their lives. Your gift today can help one of these patriots find the help, hope, and healing they need to succeed in their second chance. Friend, can I count on you to contribute $10 or whatever you can afford to Stand in the Gap? Click any button below to give today. - Thank you, Dinesh D'Souza P.S. If you're still reading this email and I haven't convinced you to donate $10 or more, please consider what January 6th patriots still face... Harassment on social media and in their personal lives Difficulties in finding a job Homelessness Loss of rights, like the right to vote or own a firearm * Mental health challenges that their families can never understand All they did was stand up for their beliefs. They do not deserve this sort of treatment. But for just $10, you can help Stand in the Gap give pardoned January 6th patriots the support they need to succeed at their second chance. Stand In The Gap is registered as a 501(c)(3) non-profit organization. All contributions are tax-deductible to the extent permitted by law. Stand In The Gap's tax identification number is 93-1417599. 5473 Blair Rd, Suite 100 PMB 917150 Dallas, TX 75231 | This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com

name: Team Blue Dogs
subject: Happy Mother’s Day!
body:
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/BDPUS-ALL-Email-May2026-FR-May?&refcode=E29559-20260510-MothersDay-Image-Holiday&amount=25 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/BDPUS-ALL-Email-May2026-FR-May?&refcode=E29559-20260510-MothersDay-Image-Holiday&amount=25]

Peter,

Happy Mother’s Day to all the moms out there.

We see the long hours you put in, the love you give to our families, and the hard work you do every day to ensure your kids have a better life.

Being a mom is a constant commitment. We’re proud to have one of those incredible moms, Marie Gluesenkamp Perez , leading our Blue Dog Coalition in Congress. She brings a mother’s perspective to Congress every day and strives to bring a sense of normalcy, kindness, and stability back to our politics.

At the end of the day, this election isn’t just about us. It’s about the world we want to pass down to future generations. We are doing this for our kids and the generations to follow, ensuring they inherit a country that is stable, secure, and full of opportunity.

— Team Blue Dogs

The Blue Dogs prove that Democrats can win anywhere — including rural and working-class districts that the establishment often writes off.

Last election, our candidates outperformed the top of the ticket by 4%. Our brand of pragmatic, local leadership works, but we need the resources to stay on the air and on the ground.

Donate now to support the candidates who know how to win in the toughest districts! So our campaign is trying something new and a little bit different. We’re lowering the amount we’re asking you to give to our campaign to defeat Lauren Boebert to just $1. Yes, just a single dollar. = One dollar isn’t a lot. I know that. But it’s not just about your $1. It’s about the power of all of us coming together. When your dollar is combined with thousands of other people also pitching in to defeat Lauren Boebert, the impact is enormous. $1 because Lauren Boebert only defeated Adam Frisch by 546 votes. $1 because I am the retired U.S. Navy Rear Admiral and Democrat running to defeat her this November. $1 because the Republican Super PACs are going to spend millions of dollars attacking us on TV across the entire district. And $1 because we can finally put an end to Lauren Boebert’s embarrassing political career – but we can only do it together. name: Ashley Floyd
subject: Just a reminder on Mother’s Day —
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Emerge America
body:
https://emergeamerica.org/ [https://emergeamerica.org/]
This Mother’s Day, we’re thinking about the women doing it all — raising families, holding communities together, and still stepping up to lead.
But while moms make up the backbone of this country, they remain dramatically underrepresented in elected office. Just 7% of members of Congress are mothers with minor children. At the state level, only 8% of legislators are moms raising kids under 18.
That matters. Because mothers understand firsthand the challenges families face — from childcare and healthcare to economic security and education.
At Emerge, we’re working to change that by recruiting and training women and mothers to run for office. When moms lead, they bring resilience, empathy, and real-world problem-solving to the table — exactly what our democracy needs right now.
This Mother’s Day, honor the mothers in your life by helping elect more women who understand what families are facing every day.
Will you make a donation today to help us recruit and train the next generation of women leaders?
CONTRIBUTE HERE! [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/emerge-2026-email?refcode=5-10]
When women lead, families and communities are stronger.
Thank you,
Ashley Floyd

name: Mallory McMorrow
subject: $45 million for one seat?!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Blue Amp Action
body:
| Michigan is the most important Senate race on the map.
---
_You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. We need your support to continue fighting for our democracy. We love having you in our network, but if you only want our most important email updates,[click here.](https://act.blueampaction.com/go/108?t=2&akid=2230%2E259176%2ENvmwNz) If you'd like to unsubscribe, [click here.](https://act.blueampaction.com/go/109?t=3&akid=2230%2E259176%2ENvmwNz)_

[](https://act.blueampaction.com/go/10995?source=LOC_EM_FR_2026.05.10_McMorrow-45-Million_B2_F1_S1_C2_90AC-365DON_RS-T1&t=4&akid=2230%2E259176%2ENvmwNz) Michigan is the single most important Senate race on the map this year, Peter. And the Republicans confirmed it. **Senate Leadership Fund, the largest GOP super PAC, just announced they’re dropping _$45 million_ into Michigan to try and buy this open seat.** To put that in perspective, that’s more than they’re spending in Georgia, Maine, Alaska, Iowa, _and_ New Hampshire. Because they know — if they can buy Michigan’s open U.S. Senate seat, they block the Democrats from having _any_ chance at flipping control of the U.S. Senate to serve as a real check on Trump. It’s a massive amount of money aimed directly at defeating **us**. _They think they can buy this seat._ [**We need the resources to fight back right now. Can you split a $10 contribution between my campaign and Blue Amp Action to help us respond?**](https://act.blueampaction.com/go/10995?source=LOC_EM_FR_2026.05.10_McMorrow-45-Million_B2_F1_S1_C2_90AC-365DON_RS-T1&t=5&akid=2230%2E259176%2ENvmwNz) _If you've saved payment information with ActBlue Express, your split donation to Mallory McMorrow and Blue Amp Action will go through immediately:_ | [DONATE $10](https://act.blueampaction.com/go/10996?source=LOC_EM_FR_2026.05.10_McMorrow-45-Million_B2_F1_S1_C2_90AC-365DON_RS-T1&t=6&akid=2230%2E259176%2ENvmwNz)
---
[DONATE $25](https://act.blueampaction.com/go/10997?source=LOC_EM_FR_2026.05.10_McMorrow-45-Million_B2_F1_S1_C2_90AC-365DON_RS-T1&t=7&akid=2230%2E259176%2ENvmwNz)
---
[DONATE MORE](https://act.blueampaction.com/go/10998?source=LOC_EM_FR_2026.05.10_McMorrow-45-Million_B2_F1_S1_C2_90AC-365DON_RS-T1&t=8&akid=2230%2E259176%2ENvmwNz)
---
I know there are a lot of exciting races across the country where Democrats have a chance to flip a Republican-held seat. And donors are pouring money into those races.
Michigan’s US Senate seat is currently held by a Democrat. But holding the seat is not anywhere near guaranteed, not in a battleground state like this one, and not with the _tens of millions_ they’re pouring in to flip it.
Look, I know I’ve been in your inbox a lot talking about what we’re up against, but this kind of money is something we can’t ignore. It means the GOP will stop at nothing to flip this seat.
The nonstop attacks from these groups will keep coming, Peter. We can continue building on our momentum, but only IF we have the resources to respond to the tens of millions of dollars in attack ads coming our way.
I don’t take corporate PAC money. It’s us against the MAGA billionaires, and I’m betting on us — every time.
[**If you’ve been waiting for the right time to make a donation to keep Michigan blue, this is it. Will you split a contribution today between our campaign and Blue Amp Action to help us win in Michigan?**](https://act.blueampaction.com/go/10995?source=LOC_EM_FR_2026.05.10_McMorrow-45-Million_B2_F1_S1_C2_90AC-365DON_RS-T1&t=9&akid=2230%2E259176%2ENvmwNz)
_If you've saved payment information with ActBlue Express, your split donation to Mallory McMorrow and Blue Amp Action will go through immediately:_
[DONATE $10](https://act.blueampaction.com/go/10996?source=LOC_EM_FR_2026.05.10_McMorrow-45-Million_B2_F1_S1_C2_90AC-365DON_RS-T1&t=10&akid=2230%2E259176%2ENvmwNz)
---
[DONATE $25](https://act.blueampaction.com/go/10997?source=LOC_EM_FR_2026.05.10_McMorrow-45-Million_B2_F1_S1_C2_90AC-365DON_RS-T1&t=11&akid=2230%2E259176%2ENvmwNz)
---
[DONATE MORE](https://act.blueampaction.com/go/10998?source=LOC_EM_FR_2026.05.10_McMorrow-45-Million_B2_F1_S1_C2_90AC-365DON_RS-T1&t=12&akid=2230%2E259176%2ENvmwNz)
---
I know what it takes to win these tough fights, and I know you never win them alone.
Thanks for being on this team.
\- Mallory
| [ ](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/loc_baa_temp_2026?source=LOC_EM_FR_2026.XX.XX_footer_XX_XX_XX_XX_XX_XX&amount=5,25,50,100,250,500,1000&t=13&refcode2=2230_259176_NvmwNz&akid=2230%2E259176%2ENvmwNz)

We’re facing a critical moment in American history, which means what we do right now will define the future of our nation and our world.

Here at Blue Amp, we’re dedicated to uplifting the movers and shakers who will defend our shared democratic values and beat back against right-wing authoritarianism. We’re amplifying good candidates who are passionate about protecting civil rights, making life affordable, and leaving a better world for future generations.

The midterms are coming up, and we can’t do this work without you. With your support, we'll work to halt the right-wing agenda and support strong Democrats who will fight for us across the country.

**[Chip in to Blue Amp Action today to support our mission and help us continue boosting Democratic champions and holding extremists accountable. Every contribution – $10, $25, or even $100 – allows us to keep amplifying real leaders who will fight for our democracy.](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/loc_baa_temp_2026?source=LOC_EM_FR_2026.XX.XX_footer_XX_XX_XX_XX_XX_XX&amount=10&t=14&refcode2=2230_259176_NvmwNz&akid=2230%2E259176%2ENvmwNz)**

# [Nicole Locklin Is Taking on Epstein-Linked Billionaires--and Exposing How They Operate](https://substack.com/app-link/post?publication_id=3722532&post_id=196420724&utm_source=post-email-title&utm_campaign=email-post-title&isFreemail=true&r=1hvr60&token=eyJ1c2VyX2lkIjo5MDUwMTE5MiwicG9zdF9pZCI6MTk2NDIwNzI0LCJpYXQiOjE3Nzg0MjU2NjEsImV4cCI6MTc4MTAxNzY2MSwiaXNzIjoicHViLTM3MjI1MzIiLCJzdWIiOiJwb3N0LXJlYWN0aW9uIn0.9UPo8_8XiD5pXHl5C04Zk7WO2xMUMm8FAcENlxZKDDU)
### What she's uncovering raises uncomfortable questions--and why it matters goes far beyond one campaign.
| | [Cliff Schecter](https://substack.com/@cliffsedge), [Blue Amp Media](https://substack.com/@blueamp), and [Nicole Locklin for US Congress](https://substack.com/@locklin2026)
---
