| [](https://substack.com/redirect/8ad99150-96a6-474f-8ae9-2c103dc33f85?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
#### A Campaign To Crush Corrupt Power
There's a reason most people don't go anywhere near this fight. It's not just the money or the power--it's the network behind it, the quiet understanding that some doors are never supposed to be opened. And yet, Nicole Locklin is doing exactly that.
Not with vague slogans or performative outrage, but by stepping directly into a space where influence has long operated without scrutiny--and asking questions that make very powerful people uncomfortable. The real story isn't just who she's taking on. It's what starts to come into focus once you look closely at how their world actually works.
In other words, "I want the rest of you cowboys to know something--there's a new sheriff in town. And his name is Reggie Hammond." Sorry, folks, I'm an '80s kid. I still love Eddie Murphy in _48 Hours_. **But the bit about the new sheriff? That could not be more apropos here.**
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/8ad99150-96a6-474f-8ae9-2c103dc33f85?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
Hopefully the new sheriff--or sheriffs I should say--are in time to save our malfunctioning monopoly known as the United States of America. You see, a new crop of Democrats has broken free from prison. No it has not been behind bars. But in their heads. That Panopticon pulsating with self-doubt, discretion-over-aggression, and the ongoing act of balancing a stack of plates on your head while Republicans launch Tomahawk Missiles at you.
And that's where Nicole comes in. I got the chance to interview her this week. Nicole is...how shall I say it...everything the Democratic Party needs. The kinda candidate we could use in every race. Let 1000 Nicoles bloom. Now let me explain why.
_[Disclosure: I worked with Nicole Locklin for Congress on their launch. Additional disclosure: I 've worked with others, yet this is the first one I've written about. Because she's that good]_
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/8ad99150-96a6-474f-8ae9-2c103dc33f85?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
Nicole is the kind of brilliant, hard-charging, charismatic rock star that goes straight after Republicans and billionaires--the conjoined twins of American corruption. She talks constantly about how their venality's led to illicit wars. Illegal trade wars. And cuts to healthcare, childcare, and any program not benefitting those who--no matter how hard they look--just can't seem to find that perfect third yacht.
She is pointing directly at the billionaire predators, "The Epstein Class" as she/we call this addled herd, blaming them directly for preying on us. Our wages. Our jobs. Our right to vote. Our housing. Our privacy. Our girls. Nicole is right over the bullseye.
No mealy-mouthed half-messages or platitudes. No back flips to avoid offending a donor or corporate-media asshole who'll never give a Democrat a fair shake anyhow. No bowing to cretinous blobs who've turned our Oval Office into their gold rush. She tells voters exactly what's happened to us. Who's responsible and must be held accountable. And how she'll fix it. We call these stories. It's how normal people who don't poll-test vacation locations communicate.
Let's come back to Nicole in a second. I wanna tell you a quick story of my own. It's about _why I 've screamed for two decades about how Democrats must be more aggressive_, in policy and message. Use advantages. Show no mercy for GOP fasc-bots. Go for the jugular.
For a quarter century the default expectation has been Republicans fight til the death, Democrats file (strongly-worded!) letters til dinnertime. C'mon, they wouldn't want to be disrespectful! So a Republican shares blood libel with a deranged fairy tale of "post-birth abortion" (it's not a thing, that's called _murder_). A Democrat responds with a hearty laugh and a "that's so ridiculous" like they're Ricky Ricardo.
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/8ad99150-96a6-474f-8ae9-2c103dc33f85?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
Instead of delivering the verbal beatdown any MAGA chud deserves for sharing this sick, conspiratorial lie--which has led to actual mass murder. For example, those murdered by a delusional zealot who attacked a Colorado Springs Planned Parenthood.
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/8ad99150-96a6-474f-8ae9-2c103dc33f85?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
_Look, folks, I know this game personally. I lived it._ I was invited on all the shows in the early 2000s. But nobody told me I was supposed to be a patsy because I was a Democrat. And if they had, I would've told them where they could shove that little slice of un-wisdom.
So here's a story you won't hear elsewhere.
One time, in 2004-5, I went on _Hannity & Colmes_. As in Sean Hannity. World renowned liar and low-rent prick. Sean kept attacking Democrats personally, so I started in on Republicans, _and then on him_. Sean never went to college. Which makes no difference to me--two of my smartest friends never went to college. _But I knew it bothered Sean_.
By the time the show was ending, we were trading barbs during the closing credits. He called me an "asshole" and banned me from the show. Forever. Poor Sean-y boy.
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/8ad99150-96a6-474f-8ae9-2c103dc33f85?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
**🚨 CLIFF'S NOTE**
I'm about to break down **how the system works behind the scenes to stifle liberal dissent** --patterns, corporate-media bias, how I experienced it personally.
**You won 't hear this on cable news.**
👉 **Become a paid subscriber to continue getting a peak behind the corporate curtain with our independent journalism.**
[ Upgrade to paid](https://substack.com/redirect/2/eyJlIjoiaHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuYmx1ZWFtcC5jby9zdWJzY3JpYmU_.11bzXkVUc395XpB6XJLOK7pwTxx62WYyDWuO5gXQwXI?&utm_medium=email&utm_source=subscribe-widget&utm_content=196420724)
* * *
I would go on these shows to assert Democratic messaging and respond to GOP lies, taking on those who'd continue to haunt our politics; a future top Trump election-denying lawyer, and Trump's current craptastic pollster). When they lied, I mocked them. Insulted them. Used an onslaught of facts to make them look stupid. And had fun doing it!
[](https://substack.com/redirect/31e6fa96-d448-4bf8-90f8-c4a01a67ece6?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
But these busy little bees--wussified MAGAs-in-waiting--they didn't respond to being humiliated on live tv by telling the truth. Instead, they rigged the system--by running to the stations and whining about _how mean I was_. In particular, _MSNBC_ , at the time [featuring shows hosted by Tucker Carlson](https://substack.com/redirect/ca7b3507-1be3-4edc-a768-d64da7681785?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg), Alan Keyes, and Michael Horowitz, among the overall lineup of gentlemen and scholars. Because, as always, the corporate-owned media outlet had no idea what it wanted to be.
Now as you know, Republicans are never _mean_ except for _every moment of every day when they 're mean_. And I didn't play my (apparently) expected role of "Democrat who giggles as Republican lies and assassinates character." _So I was banned from MSNBC_. I know this because a primetime host at the time--no, it wasn't David Shuster--shared that I was on "the list" they gave hosts. The list was those who were not to be booked (lest a Republican cry?). And I was on it for a a number of years.
I didn't care all that much. If the dictate was be a purposeful loser. Embrace humiliation as kink (see JD Vance). Act like every cringe Republican now lying prone before Trump because he's sooooo sca-wy! Yeah, I wasn't doing that. I'll never do that. I don't play for The Washington Generals.
I tell you this because things are changing. Increasingly, many Democrats loudly offer clear policy alternatives. Use emotional language. Show aggressiveness in taking on Republicans. Keep their narrative simple. It's been an evolving process, sped up by carrot-colored Caligula regaining his crown of cockspur--or should I say bone spur--thorns. I've done all I can to fast-forward the process on Blue Amp Media's YouTube and Substack. So have many others.
It mostly started in 2016-ish with a few Democrats who grew tired of getting their teeth kicked in. And a growing coalition of creators, columnists, activists, pundits and others not holding political office. We all got that politics isn't a damn white paper. It's a story.
Stories don't work if the villain's some vague "systemic challenge" floating in the ether. Voters don't rally against a PowerPoint. They rally against corrupt power. To put it simply: a bad guy. So instead of mumbling about "concerns" and "process." Instead of saying "shame on you" to those who feel no shame [when reading from a Manchurian Candidate script](https://substack.com/redirect/5217be05-d0ba-4b9a-aa3d-87293c102beb?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)--_Donald Trump is the kindest, bravest, warmest, most wonderful human being I've ever known_ --about a man who makes sponges seem complex, do as we've have done around campfires for thousands of years. Tell stories.
Many in Democratic leadership still aren't there. Whether it's due to internal weakness, fear of donors, addiction to a past that no longer exists...it doesn't really matter: What matters is Democratic fighters have decided they're just gonna go ahead and take care of it themselves. Fighters like Jon Ossoff, James Talarico, Chris Murphy, Ted Lieu, Jasmine Crockett, Jamie Raskin, Tammy Duckworth, Chris Van Hollen, Gavin Newsom, J.B. Pritzker, and more. Many more. And growing.
From leftists like Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez to center-left liberals like Dan Goldman, they're doing something revolutionary: telling the truth plainly. Naming who's screwing people over and calling for them to be held accountable. And explaining exactly how they're going to do that, while enacting real change.
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/8ad99150-96a6-474f-8ae9-2c103dc33f85?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
And this is where Nicole Locklin comes in. Running for Congress in Florida's 26th District against longtime district dingbat, Mario Diaz-Balart. He's been credibly accused of committing mortgage fraud. His favorite posture when "what Trump said" comes up is to offer nothing. Alligator Alcatraz (in the district)? He's got nothing to say. Healthcare? Zip. But he did vote to kill Obamacare. The Epstein Files Transparency Act? Not a bother in the world, for Mario (and he voted against it).
Meanwhile, Nicole gets that Balart is part of this awful system, there is a bigger context, and message, here. It's about taking on MAGA and billionaire corruption creating an affordability crisis. This isn't optional, it's 101 level politics. Republicans have understood this forever, even when peddling well-done Trump Steaks with ketchup. As Democrats spent years submitting grant proposals to committee--the voters--who didn't get why the cochleae of their inner ears were processing some dreary lecture they never signed up for.
Humans are wired for narrative. Beginning, middle, end. Hero, villain, conflict, resolution.
So with candidates like Nicole you're seeing messaging sharpen into something voters can feel in their bones: _Republicans and their billionaire backers are bad actors_ --taking our rights, rigging our economy, protecting corruption--_and Democrats are the ones fighting back_. Anti-corruption framing, which even Democratic leadership's finally using, is breaking through. Because it gives people something tangible to latch onto. Not vibes. Not jargon. A fight.
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/8ad99150-96a6-474f-8ae9-2c103dc33f85?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
And it turns out showing passion, _that you care_ , isn't just rhetorical flair. It's authentic. It's natural. It's human. Who knew??
Nicole's is leaning directly into affordability. She's calling out Epstein Class mooks making life unaffordable for those living in neighborhoods across her district. That's the key. She doesn't just say "costs are too high." She says who is raising them. She doesn't just say "healthcare is broken." She says exactly who broke it. And then _she tells voters exactly what she 's gonna do about it_.
It's not complicated. It's just been weirdly absent from too many of our campaigns. It no longer is. Thanks to incumbents and candidates like Nicole Locklin. And when you do it right, you don't sound angry for the sake of being angry--you sound like someone who gets the problem and has the guts to fix it.
[Look, Republicans cheat. We know this](https://substack.com/redirect/5217be05-d0ba-4b9a-aa3d-87293c102beb?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg). It's all they know because the public hates their policies, and rightfully think their President acts like an asshole. If Democrats stay aggressive on both offense and defense--and ignore leadership if they boo-hoo about it--the GOP's cheating may net them nothing. The lines may crumble as they did in Hungary. With the kind of election we should have if Democrats do this, even a few stolen seats won't make a difference. In fact, the blatant cheating's only served to remind Americans why they hate Trump and his puppets running Congress.
Gerrymandering can tilt the playing field, it can't save you from a political wipeout.
Look, Trump is in the Epstein files more than Jesus is in the bible. He gives no bid contracts to his billionaire, predator pals, and cuts SNAP, Medicare, Medicaid and more to fund his corruption. [He's the most corrupt President ever--it's not clos](https://substack.com/redirect/5c833271-9f70-4c33-a81f-98a57dff57fc?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)e. He started and lost a war in Iran. He's wrecked farms, ranches, and small businesses with dumbass tariffs and by deporting workers. Gas prices are insane.
Name an issue, he's on the wrong side. Abortion, gun safety, gay rights, global warming, minimum wage, [taxing billionaires](https://substack.com/redirect/94341e09-8ab5-4118-93c0-a284a6500a0a?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg), workers' wages, universal healthcare, family & medical leave, drug policy, NATO membership. And sending out images of himself as Jesus. Wow, did that ever land like a lead zeppelin, Trump, you schmuck.
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/8ad99150-96a6-474f-8ae9-2c103dc33f85?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
[We've seen it in Hungary](https://substack.com/redirect/4676dde5-fbec-479f-af9a-cb956f07963f?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)--and we've seen it in recent U.S. off-year races. Republicans thought structural advantages would help them float safely above fair elections. When the results poured in they came crashing to Earth like they were guided by Trump's FAA. _When voters clearly understand who 's hurting them and who's fighting for them,_ _they show up. Big_. And when they show up, math changes fast.
Democrats don't need to reinvent politics--they just need to stop talking like academics or consultants and start speaking like Nicole Locklin. Human beings in a fight for liberal democracy. The rule of law. Not being Putin puppets. If that happens, there will be no lines gerrymandered enough for Republicans to save their broken arses in November. The warranty's run out.
* * *
**If you 've made it this far, you get it.**
This is about understanding how power operates--and why it's so often unchecked. That's what we do here. Every day.
No corporate filters. No access journalism. No pretending both sides are the same.

She talks constantly about how their venality's led to illicit wars. Illegal trade wars. And cuts to healthcare, childcare, and any program not benefitting those who--no matter how hard they look--just can't seem to find that perfect third yacht. She is pointing directly at the billionaire predators, "The Epstein Class" as she/we call this addled herd, blaming them directly for preying on us. Our wages. Our jobs. Our right to vote. Our housing. Our privacy. Our girls. Nicole is right over the bullseye. No mealy-mouthed half-messages or platitudes. No back flips to avoid offending a donor or corporate-media asshole who'll never give a Democrat a fair shake anyhow. No bowing to cretinous blobs who've turned our Oval Office into their gold rush. She tells voters exactly what's happened to us. Who's responsible and must be held accountable. And how she'll fix it. We call these stories. It's how normal people who don't poll-test vacation locations communicate. Let's come back to Nicole in a second. I wanna tell you a quick story of my own. It's about why I 've screamed for two decades about how Democrats must be more aggressive, in policy and message. Use advantages. Show no mercy for GOP fasc-bots. Go for the jugular. For a quarter century the default expectation has been Republicans fight til the death, Democrats file (strongly-worded!) letters til dinnertime. C'mon, they wouldn't want to be disrespectful! So a Republican shares blood libel with a deranged fairy tale of "post-birth abortion" (it's not a thing, that's called murder). A Democrat responds with a hearty laugh and a "that's so ridiculous" like they're Ricky Ricardo. | | ---|---|--- Instead of delivering the verbal beatdown any MAGA chud deserves for sharing this sick, conspiratorial lie--which has led to actual mass murder. For example, those murdered by a delusional zealot who attacked a Colorado Springs Planned Parenthood. | | ---|---|--- Look, folks, I know this game personally. I lived it. I was invited on all the shows in the early 2000s. But nobody told me I was supposed to be a patsy because I was a Democrat. And if they had, I would've told them where they could shove that little slice of un-wisdom. So here's a story you won't hear elsewhere. One time, in 2004-5, I went on Hannity & Colmes. As in Sean Hannity. World renowned liar and low-rent prick. Sean kept attacking Democrats personally, so I started in on Republicans, and then on him. Sean never went to college. Which makes no difference to me--two of my smartest friends never went to college. But I knew it bothered Sean. By the time the show was ending, we were trading barbs during the closing credits. He called me an "asshole" and banned me from the show. Forever. Poor Sean-y boy. | | ---|---|--- 🚨 CLIFF'S NOTE I'm about to break down how the system works behind the scenes to stifle liberal dissent --patterns, corporate-media bias, how I experienced it personally. You won 't hear this on cable news. 👉 Become a paid subscriber to continue getting a peak behind the corporate curtain with our independent journalism. I would go on these shows to assert Democratic messaging and respond to GOP lies, taking on those who'd continue to haunt our politics; a future top Trump election-denying lawyer, and Trump's current craptastic pollster). When they lied, I mocked them. Insulted them. Used an onslaught of facts to make them look stupid. And had fun doing it! But these busy little bees--wussified MAGAs-in-waiting--they didn't respond to being humiliated on live tv by telling the truth. Instead, they rigged the system--by running to the stations and whining about how mean I was. In particular, MSNBC , at the time , Alan Keyes, and Michael Horowitz, among the overall lineup of gentlemen and scholars. Because, as always, the corporate-owned media outlet had no idea what it wanted to be. Now as you know, Republicans are never mean except for every moment of every day when they 're mean. And I didn't play my (apparently) expected role of "Democrat who giggles as Republican lies and assassinates character." So I was banned from MSNBC. I know this because a primetime host at the time--no, it wasn't David Shuster--shared that I was on "the list" they gave hosts. The list was those who were not to be booked (lest a Republican cry?). And I was on it for a a number of years. I didn't care all that much. If the dictate was be a purposeful loser. Embrace humiliation as kink (see JD Vance). Act like every cringe Republican now lying prone before Trump because he's sooooo sca-wy! Yeah, I wasn't doing that. I'll never do that. I don't play for The Washington Generals. I tell you this because things are changing. Increasingly, many Democrats loudly offer clear policy alternatives. Use emotional language. Show aggressiveness in taking on Republicans. Keep their narrative simple. It's been an evolving process, sped up by carrot-colored Caligula regaining his crown of cockspur--or should I say bone spur--thorns. I've done all I can to fast-forward the process on Blue Amp Media's YouTube and Substack. So have many others. It mostly started in 2016-ish with a few Democrats who grew tired of getting their teeth kicked in. And a growing coalition of creators, columnists, activists, pundits and others not holding political office. We all got that politics isn't a damn white paper. It's a story. Stories don't work if the villain's some vague "systemic challenge" floating in the ether. Voters don't rally against a PowerPoint. They rally against corrupt power. To put it simply: a bad guy. So instead of mumbling about "concerns" and "process." Instead of saying "shame on you" to those who feel no shame Trump is the kindest, bravest, warmest, most wonderful human being I've ever known --about a man who makes sponges seem complex, do as we've have done around campfires for thousands of years. Tell stories. Many in Democratic leadership still aren't there. Whether it's due to internal weakness, fear of donors, addiction to a past that no longer exists...it doesn't really matter: What matters is Democratic fighters have decided they're just gonna go ahead and take care of it themselves. Fighters like Jon Ossoff, James Talarico, Chris Murphy, Ted Lieu, Jasmine Crockett, Jamie Raskin, Tammy Duckworth, Chris Van Hollen, Gavin Newsom, J.B. Pritzker, and more. Many more. And growing. From leftists like Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez to center-left liberals like Dan Goldman, they're doing something revolutionary: telling the truth plainly. Naming who's screwing people over and calling for them to be held accountable. And explaining exactly how they're going to do that, while enacting real change. | | ---|---|--- And this is where Nicole Locklin comes in. Running for Congress in Florida's 26th District against longtime district dingbat, Mario Diaz-Balart. He's been credibly accused of committing mortgage fraud. His favorite posture when "what Trump said" comes up is to offer nothing. Alligator Alcatraz (in the district)? He's got nothing to say. Healthcare? Zip. But he did vote to kill Obamacare. The Epstein Files Transparency Act? Not a bother in the world, for Mario (and he voted against it). Meanwhile, Nicole gets that Balart is part of this awful system, there is a bigger context, and message, here. It's about taking on MAGA and billionaire corruption creating an affordability crisis. This isn't optional, it's 101 level politics. Republicans have understood this forever, even when peddling well-done Trump Steaks with ketchup. As Democrats spent years submitting grant proposals to committee--the voters--who didn't get why the cochleae of their inner ears were processing some dreary lecture they never signed up for. Humans are wired for narrative. Beginning, middle, end. Hero, villain, conflict, resolution. So with candidates like Nicole you're seeing messaging sharpen into something voters can feel in their bones: Republicans and their billionaire backers are bad actors --taking our rights, rigging our economy, protecting corruption--and Democrats are the ones fighting back. Anti-corruption framing, which even Democratic leadership's finally using, is breaking through. Because it gives people something tangible to latch onto. Not vibes. Not jargon. A fight. | | ---|---|--- And it turns out showing passion, that you care , isn't just rhetorical flair. It's authentic. It's natural. It's human. Who knew?? Nicole's is leaning directly into affordability. She's calling out Epstein Class mooks making life unaffordable for those living in neighborhoods across her district. That's the key. She doesn't just say "costs are too high." She says who is raising them. She doesn't just say "healthcare is broken." She says exactly who broke it. And then she tells voters exactly what she 's gonna do about it. It's not complicated. It's just been weirdly absent from too many of our campaigns. It no longer is. Thanks to incumbents and candidates like Nicole Locklin. And when you do it right, you don't sound angry for the sake of being angry--you sound like someone who gets the problem and has the guts to fix it. . It's all they know because the public hates their policies, and rightfully think their President acts like an asshole. If Democrats stay aggressive on both offense and defense--and ignore leadership if they boo-hoo about it--the GOP's cheating may net them nothing. The lines may crumble as they did in Hungary. With the kind of election we should have if Democrats do this, even a few stolen seats won't make a difference. In fact, the blatant cheating's only served to remind Americans why they hate Trump and his puppets running Congress. Gerrymandering can tilt the playing field, it can't save you from a political wipeout. Look, Trump is in the Epstein files more than Jesus is in the bible. He gives no bid contracts to his billionaire, predator pals, and cuts SNAP, Medicare, Medicaid and more to fund his corruption. . He started and lost a war in Iran. He's wrecked farms, ranches, and small businesses with dumbass tariffs and by deporting workers. Gas prices are insane. Name an issue, he's on the wrong side. Abortion, gun safety, gay rights, global warming, minimum wage, , workers' wages, universal healthcare, family & medical leave, drug policy, NATO membership. And sending out images of himself as Jesus. Wow, did that ever land like a lead zeppelin, Trump, you schmuck. | | ---|---|--- we've seen it in recent U.S. off-year races. Republicans thought structural advantages would help them float safely above fair elections. When the results poured in they came crashing to Earth like they were guided by Trump's FAA. When voters clearly understand who 's hurting them and who's fighting for them, they show up. Big. And when they show up, math changes fast. Democrats don't need to reinvent politics--they just need to stop talking like academics or consultants and start speaking like Nicole Locklin. Human beings in a fight for liberal democracy. The rule of law. Not being Putin puppets. If that happens, there will be no lines gerrymandered enough for Republicans to save their broken arses in November. The warranty's run out. If you 've made it this far, you get it. This is about understanding how power operates--and why it's so often unchecked. That's what we do here. Every day. No corporate filters. No access journalism. No pretending both sides are the same. 👉 If you want more reporting like this --and you want to help keep it going--become a paid subscriber today. Because the only way this kind of work continues is if we build it together * Thank you , , , , , and many others for tuning into my live video with and ! Join me for my next live video in the app. | Get more from Cliff Schecter in the Substack app ---|--- Available for iOS and Android | A guest post by| for US Congress #FL26 | Fighting for Florida's working families. Lower costs. Justice. End corruption. Tax billionaires. No Corporate PAC $. All power to The People. Locklinforcongress.com You're currently a free subscriber to . For the full experience, | | | | | | | (C) 2026 Cliff Schecter PO Box 8384, Cincinnati, OH 45208 ? ?

name: Demand Justice PAC
subject: SCOTUS stripped away voting protections:
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Demand Justice PAC
body:
[ https://act.demandjustice.org/go/54940?refcode=em20260510-61433&t=1001&akid=61433%2E1407376%2EleYo5R ]Demand Justice PAC[ https://act.demandjustice.org/go/54940?refcode=em20260510-61433&t=1002&akid=61433%2E1407376%2EleYo5R ]Demand Justice PAC

The Supreme Court recently handed down its ruling in Louisiana v. Callais.
Make no mistake — this is a gut punch to democracy.

By gutting Section 2 of the Voting Rights Act, the Court has stripped away
one of the last protections against gerrymandering and racially
discriminatory maps.

Communities of color who fought for decades to secure fair representation
are now at risk of being silenced, with up to 10 majority-Black seats
across the South potentially being redrawn out of existence and flipped
from blue to red.

Those who fought for a seat at the table could lose it entirely.

[ https://act.demandjustice.org/go/55459?c0=dj-em-20260510.Gvpt0W&refcode=em20260510-61433&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&amount=5&t=1003&akid=61433%2E1407376%2EleYo5R ]If
you’re as outraged as we are, chip in $5 to Demand Justice
today to fight back.

[ https://act.demandjustice.org/go/55459?c0=dj-em-20260510.Gvpt0W&amount=5&refcode=em20260510-61433&t=1004&akid=61433%2E1407376%2EleYo5R ]Donate $5 ››

This ruling doesn’t just impact Louisiana. Across the country, politicians
now have the green light to redraw districts to protect themselves,
entrench power, and block competition.

Elections will be engineered to favor incumbents even more. Voters won’t
choose their representatives — representatives will choose their voters.

And let’s be clear: the timing isn’t coincidental. This Court is handing
Trump and his allies a powerful tool to manipulate elections, cement
control, and rig the system in their favor.

By diluting minority representation, they’re paving the way for Trump to
shape the political landscape, protect his own power, and prioritize his
self-interest before a single vote is cast in the 2026 midterms.

Demand Justice PAC is fighting back — but we can’t do it alone. Every
dollar you give helps us challenge this radical Court, push for judicial
reform, and root out the corruption that lets Trump and his cronies
weaponize the courts against the American people.

[ https://act.demandjustice.org/go/55459?c0=dj-em-20260510.Gvpt0W&refcode=em20260510-61433&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&amount=5&t=1005&akid=61433%2E1407376%2EleYo5R ]Will you chip in $5 to Demand Justice PAC today? If we
don’t act now, this ruling will reshape Congress, silence communities of
color, and strip away the basic promise of democracy for a generation.

[ https://act.demandjustice.org/go/55459?c0=dj-em-20260510.Gvpt0W&amount=5&refcode=em20260510-61433&t=1024&akid=61433%2E1407376%2EleYo5R ]Donate $5 ››

In solidarity,

Demand Justice PAC

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is a critical way we communicate with supporters like you. However, if you would like to change your subscription preferences, here are some options:

Email us: feedback@demandjustice.org

name: Amy Acton
subject: I’m proud to be your nominee for governor of Ohio:
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Maggie for NH
body:
We’re ready to take back this state.

[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/131136148/620055643/76101138?amount=10&refcode=LOC_EM_FR_2026.05.10_Amy-Acton-Split_B1_F1_S1_C1_90OP-NC_RS-T0&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODg1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmYTE1ZDllNi04MTRjLWYxMTEtOGVmMi0wMDBkM2ExNGI2NDAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=vC8Kol5hpfAyk1t_EVKMef4cX_soAHFeqNmBWTZFdwA=) The race has been called.

**I’m proud to be your nominee for governor of Ohio.**

One thing is clear: We’re ready to take back this state.

Ohioans made their voices heard loud and clear: that we are ready for change. That our message of hope and strength is resonating in every corner of our state.

I’m grateful to the hundreds of thousands of voters who cast their ballots — and to each and every one of you who is a part of this movement.

[**_We have a tough fight ahead, but I’ve never been more confident that we can flip Ohio blue – for the first time in decades. The General Election starts _right now_ , and we can’t waste a second. Will you split a donation between me and Maggie Hassan to become a General Election donor?_**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/131136149/620055644/76101138?amount=10&refcode=LOC_EM_FR_2026.05.10_Amy-Acton-Split_B1_F1_S1_C1_90OP-NC_RS-T0&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODg1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmYTE1ZDllNi04MTRjLWYxMTEtOGVmMi0wMDBkM2ExNGI2NDAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=vC8Kol5hpfAyk1t_EVKMef4cX_soAHFeqNmBWTZFdwA=) | | [ CHIP IN NOW >> ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/131136150/620055645/76101138?amount=10&refcode=LOC_EM_FR_2026.05.10_Amy-Acton-Split_B1_F1_S1_C1_90OP-NC_RS-T0&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODg1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmYTE1ZDllNi04MTRjLWYxMTEtOGVmMi0wMDBkM2ExNGI2NDAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=vC8Kol5hpfAyk1t_EVKMef4cX_soAHFeqNmBWTZFdwA=)
---
The real race begins right now, and it won’t be easy. But that’s nothing new for us.

I’m a proud Ohioan, born and raised in Youngstown. I grew up under tough circumstances, often going to bed hungry or without a stable roof over my head.

Neighbors, community, and public schools helped save my life.

**I’ve spent my life focused on giving back and building a state where everyone has a chance — and no one is left behind. That’s exactly what this campaign has been about.**

In the past year, we’ve built an incredible, unprecedented movement. So many Ohioans have come together to fight for a stronger, fairer future.

_Now we have the chance to make that a reality. The chance to finally flip our state blue and give Ohioans the committed leadership we deserve._

**This will be one of the closest and most expensive races in the entire country. We’re now officially up against an out-of-touch billionaire opponent who is already spending millions of dollars to try to buy Ohio. Polls show this race is neck and neck, and things are only going to get tougher from here.**

clean_body: We’re ready to take back this state. = The race has been called. I’m proud to be your nominee for governor of Ohio. One thing is clear: We’re ready to take back this state. Ohioans made their voices heard loud and clear: that we are ready for change. That our message of hope and strength is resonating in every corner of our state. I’m grateful to the hundreds of thousands of voters who cast their ballots — and to each and every one of you who is a part of this movement. = | | = The real race begins right now, and it won’t be easy. But that’s nothing new for us. I’m a proud Ohioan, born and raised in Youngstown. I grew up under tough circumstances, often going to bed hungry or without a stable roof over my head. Neighbors, community, and public schools helped save my life. I’ve spent my life focused on giving back and building a state where everyone has a chance — and no one is left behind. That’s exactly what this campaign has been about. In the past year, we’ve built an incredible, unprecedented movement. So many Ohioans have come together to fight for a stronger, fairer future. Now we have the chance to make that a reality. The chance to finally flip our state blue and give Ohioans the committed leadership we deserve. This will be one of the closest and most expensive races in the entire country. We’re now officially up against an out-of-touch billionaire opponent who is already spending millions of dollars to try to buy Ohio. Polls show this race is neck and neck, and things are only going to get tougher from here. = If you've saved payment information with ActBlue Express, your split donation to Amy Acton and Maggie Hassan will go through immediately: | = | = | = | = | = | = You're the reason we have made it this far – and the reason why we'll do it again in November. name: Elizabeth Warren
subject: Despite how obsessed Donald Trump, JD Vance, and the Republican party seem to be about birth rates, they’re not doing anything to actually support mothers.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Warren for Senate
body:
Warren for Senate: https://act.elizabethwarren.com/go/370?source=em-header&t=1001&akid=2894%2E4032634%2EYtxBmQ

This Mother's Day, I'm thinking about my
mother — how she dug deep to take care of our family after my daddy had a
heart attack.

I’m thinking about every mama out there fighting to care for her family
right now.

And I’m thinking about how our government stacks the deck against mothers.

Despite how obsessed Donald Trump, JD Vance, and the Republican party seem
to be about birth rates and being the party of “family values,” they’re
not doing anything to actually support mothers and families. In fact,
they’re doing the opposite.

* They cut Medicaid, which covers more than 4 in 10 births in this
country. Medicaid covers nearly two-thirds of births for Black
mothers.
* Despite the average family paying about 20% of their income on child
care alone in 2025, they’re doing nothing to make this essential
lifeline more affordable. Trump himself said “We can't take care of
daycare. We're a big country. We're fighting wars. It's not possible
for us to take care of daycare.” Without quality child care, mothers
are being shoved out of the workforce.
* Their Big, Beautiful Bill cut funding for SNAP benefits — almost 40%
of recipients of this food support in 2023 were children.
* Notably, they’re hellbent on taking away abortion rights nationwide.
Most women who get abortions are already mothers. Many are working
multiple jobs that don’t pay enough to support their children.
Abortion bans make it even harder for those families to make ends
meet. And take away a woman’s freedom to decide when and if she raises
a family.
* They’ve fought to defund and close Planned Parenthood clinics — which
provide patients with services like cancer screenings, STD and HIV
testing, and general wellness checks in addition to abortion services.
* They're cutting the maternal health programs that keep mothers alive —
eliminating Title X, the only federal program designed to give
low-income women access to family planning services. They’re defunding
the programs that prevent maternal deaths, even as the United States
already has the highest maternal mortality rate of any high-income
country.
* The federal minimum wage hasn't budged in 15 years. A full-time
minimum wage mother can't afford a two-bedroom apartment in any state
in the country right now.
* And to top it off, they're making it harder to afford housing,
groceries, and healthcare in general. By rolling back federal rules,
abandoning enforcement actions, eliminating key tax credits, and
slashing programs across the government — Trump’s decisions are
costing Americans more than $86 billion each year.

What are they saying they’re doing to support mothers?

They're promising thousand-dollar "baby bonuses.” They’ve committed to
making IVF treatments cheaper — calling Trump "the fertilization
president." And they’ve floated the idea of a "National Medal of
Motherhood" for women with six or more children.

A $1,000 baby bonus wouldn't even cover one month's rent for most
families.

The Trump administration is working to remove IVF protections for workers
— meaning women could be fired for missing work for fertility treatments.

And mothers don’t need a medal — they need structural support.

I'm sure Republican politicians will be waxing poetic today about how much
they love mothers. But I don't want to see any tributes from them unless
they're going to actually do something — anything — to improve the lives
of mothers.

My mother worked hard, stretched every dollar, and fought for her family
every single day. That's what mothers do. They deserve a government that
fights just as hard for them.

Today, and every day, I’m going to honor my mother and mothers everywhere
by fighting for our government to actually pass policies that help mothers
and families, not just dangle around shallow incentives.

Thanks for being part of this,

Elizabeth

name: Jessica Mackler, EMILYs List
subject: When women lead, everyone benefits
body:
What I'm thinking about this Mother’s Day |
---
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/131136291/620056107/-1282862128?refcode=WUEFEQ21_20260510_MothersDay_PL_v1s2&sourceid=1058671&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNRUwvMS84NzA2OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjYzRkNzRmZi04MTRjLWYxMTEtOGVmMi0wMDBkM2ExNGI2NDAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=5ltE-RbMZniz-GW-am1ZtOVsiE6IHLdClaIr2ZNzmx8=) Hi Peter,

Happy Mother's Day from all of us at EMILYs List!

**This Mother's Day, I'm thinking about the kind of world I want to leave my kids** — a world where everyone has the freedom to make their own choices and every mother has access to the care, opportunity, and support she needs.

I'm also thinking about all the mothers who, like me, are watching helplessly as Republican extremists try to rip away our rights. Mothers who are watching the recklessness and chaos out of Washington make their families' lives harder.

We owe it to the future generation to meet this moment — _and that's the driving force behind my work here at EMILYs List._

**Every day, we work to help elect Democratic pro-choice women who will stand up, speak out, and take back power so we can lead the way toward a future where all of our children can thrive.**

Because we know that when women lead, everyone benefits — and when mothers have a seat at the table, families across the country are stronger for it.

clean_body: What I'm thinking about this Mother’s Day | = Hi Peter, Happy Mother's Day from all of us at EMILYs List! This Mother's Day, I'm thinking about the kind of world I want to leave my kids — a world where everyone has the freedom to make their own choices and every mother has access to the care, opportunity, and support she needs. I'm also thinking about all the mothers who, like me, are watching helplessly as Republican extremists try to rip away our rights. Mothers who are watching the recklessness and chaos out of Washington make their families' lives harder. We owe it to the future generation to meet this moment — and that's the driving force behind my work here at EMILYs List. Every day, we work to help elect Democratic pro-choice women who will stand up, speak out, and take back power so we can lead the way toward a future where all of our children can thrive. Because we know that when women lead, everyone benefits — and when mothers have a seat at the table, families across the country are stronger for it. **=** If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue, your donation will go through immediately: | = | = ---|--- = | = = | = Thank you, Jessica Mackler (she/her/hers) President, EMILYs List | = | | | | | ---|---|---|---|--- Thank you for being a supporter of EMILYs List. subject: James Talarico is breaking through the noise

body:
Please let us explain what makes James Talarico one of the top candidates to watch in 2026 — and why we’re supporting his campaign for U.S. Senate
#
James Talarico is officially the Democratic nominee for U.S. Senate in Texas — and his message could be what finally takes the seat back for working people this year, Peter.
**[In a moment, we’re going to ask you to split a donation of any amount you can between his grassroots campaign and our people-powered movement.](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/103629?refcode=em20260510-10403&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1&akid=10403%2E614464%2Ezz0ohU) But first, will you please let us explain what makes James Talarico one of the top candidates to watch?**
**[SUPPORT JAMES TALARICO: SPLIT A DONATION](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/103629?refcode=em20260510-10403&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=2&akid=10403%2E614464%2Ezz0ohU)**
Texas hasn't sent a Democrat to the U.S. Senate in over thirty years. But something is different this year... and it starts with how James Talarico is running.
He’s not pitting left versus right. He’s telling the truth: This moment in our country is about top versus bottom.
**That message is cutting through in a way that hasn't happened in Texas in a generation.**
And now the numbers are backing it up. Recent polling shows James Talarico leading BOTH of his potential GOP opponents. Polls just a couple months ago showed the same thing. Talarico leads among Independents, and both his potential opponents are underwater in favorability.
**While John Cornyn and Ken Paxton tear each other apart in a bitter runoff election happening later this month, James Talarico is building a broad coalition of working people who are ready to take back this seat.**
**But here’s the bad news, Peter: The moment the GOP settles on a nominee, the money will pour in. We need to make sure James has the resources to compete.**
**[Will you split a donation of any amount today to invest in James Talarico's campaign and our movement to fundamentally change who has power in our country? clean_body: Please let us explain what makes James Talarico one of the top candidates to watch in 2026 — and why we’re supporting his campaign for U.S. Senate James Talarico is officially the Democratic nominee for U.S. Senate in Texas — and his message could be what finally takes the seat back for working people this year, Peter. But first, will you please let us explain what makes James Talarico one of the top candidates to watch? Texas hasn't sent a Democrat to the U.S. Senate in over thirty years. But something is different this year... and it starts with how James Talarico is running. He’s not pitting left versus right. He’s telling the truth: This moment in our country is about top versus bottom. That message is cutting through in a way that hasn't happened in Texas in a generation. And now the numbers are backing it up. Recent polling shows James Talarico leading BOTH of his potential GOP opponents. Polls just a couple months ago showed the same thing. Talarico leads among Independents, and both his potential opponents are underwater in favorability. While John Cornyn and Ken Paxton tear each other apart in a bitter runoff election happening later this month, James Talarico is building a broad coalition of working people who are ready to take back this seat. But here’s the bad news, Peter: The moment the GOP settles on a nominee, the money will pour in. We need to make sure James has the resources to compete. | | | Hi friend, it's Mark Kelly.

Traveling further than any other humans in history, the Artemis II crew proved that **when a group of people all work together toward a common goal, nothing is impossible.**

Now, we've got our own mission to prepare for - the 2026 midterm elections. Our objective is clear: We **_must_** flip the Senate and take power away from Trump and the GOP.

[**I'll be blunt - We don't yet have all of the resources we need to succeed. So I'm asking, will you rush $7 to join me on this mission to take back the Senate? >>**](https://go.dscc.org/go/23030?amount=7&t=5&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=Pennsylvania&zip=18326&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&ask=7&amounts=7%2C14%2C28%2C70&code=DPE-FD-20260510-MarkKelly-KellyArtemisIIFR-Pros-sl1&refcode=DPE-FD-20260510-MarkKelly-KellyArtemisIIFR-Pros-sl1&akid=23712%2E9716520%2EUl0UZE)

body:

---
| | **Exclusive poll for you:
100 responses needed before MIDNIGHT TONIGHT! **
---
Friend: Trump's approval rating just sank to an all-time low here in New Mexico! Now, we need to know where YOU stand:
---
**Do you think Donald Trump is fighting for people like you?**

---
| | | [YES](https://act.debhaaland.com/go/8368?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=&code=jtk690-su-nd&t=2&akid=9488%2E400544%2Eu5SUQG)
---

---
Here's what we know, friend: The majority of voters in New Mexico **DISAPPROVE** of Trump — and we can't say we're surprised. Trump has broken every single promise he made, from lowering costs and cutting healthcare to ensuring no new wars.

Donald Trump is making New Mexicans _hungrier, sicker, and poorer._

While this administration attacks our communities and hands out tax breaks to billionaires, Deb _is_ fighting for higher wages, lower costs, safer neighborhoods, and strong education for your children.
She knows how to push back when Trump wants to drag his dangerous, extremist ideas to New Mexico — and with this new polling, she needs to know where you stand. Please, tell us:

**Do you think Donald Trump is fighting for people like you?**

| | | [YES](https://act.debhaaland.com/go/8368?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=&code=jtk690-su-nd&t=4&akid=9488%2E400544%2Eu5SUQG)

Thank you,
Deb Haaland HQ

name: Ray and Noa
subject: We have a card for you to sign
disclaimer_text: Paid for by McMorrow for Michigan
body:
Hey there
This is Mallory’s husband, Ray. And for those of you who haven’t met her yet, this our five-year-old daughter, Noa. You may know Mallory as the brilliant, badass, Senator McMorrow. Noa just knows her as “mama.”
[](https://act.mcmorrowformichigan.com/signup/MAM-202605-mothersday?refcode=AU_MAM_EG_GEN_PET_AC_20260510_AM1_V1_S1&t=1&akid=4676%2E898137%2E4guw5A)
Noa LOVES to draw and share her art. She’s given everyone working on Mallory’s campaign a drawing. Lately it’s been from the show Octonauts! She also remembers the card we made last year, signed by hundreds of you. Well, she’s a year older, and she has even bigger expectations.
Can we deliver a bigger card, with more signers than last year, to Mallory?
[**While Noa gets to work on her drawing, will you sign the card?**_](https://act.mcmorrowformichigan.com/signup/MAM-202605-mothersday?refcode=AU_MAM_EG_GEN_PET_AC_20260510_AM1_V1_S1&t=2&akid=4676%2E898137%2E4guw5A)
[](https://act.mcmorrowformichigan.com/signup/MAM-202605-mothersday?refcode=AU_MAM_EG_GEN_PET_AC_20260510_AM1_V1_S1&t=3&akid=4676%2E898137%2E4guw5A)
I’m going to print out every name and tuck it inside the card she gives to Mallory later today — and then we’ll send you a photo of it.
Thanks for helping me make this happen (and protecting me from a meltdown).
– Ray

* * *
[ ](sms:60594?&body=JOIN)

Thanks for helping me make this happen (and protecting me from a meltdown). – Ray sms:60594?&body=JOIN By providing your cell phone number you consent to receive campaign updates and fundraising messaging from McMorrow for Michigan, including by automated text message. clean_body: Help me defend this seat | | | = BREAKING NEWS, Derek. The Supreme Court of Virginia just struck down the new Congressional maps that Virginians voted to pass. They have invalidated the will of the voters of Virginia. Everything just changed. I’m now officially back to running in my current district, VA-07 — one of the most competitive seats in the entire country, and a top target for Republicans. Republicans are emboldened and will do anything and everything to stop me from holding this seat. They’re going to flood this race with outside money to try to flip this seat and pummel me with attacks, because they know control of the House could come down to what happens right here. And because they know Donald Trump desperately wants me out of Congress. I’m not backing down, Derek. But I can’t fight this alone. I urgently need your support today. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will be automatically split between Eugene Vindman and Mark Warner: = = = = = = Thank you for standing with me during this moment. \- Eugene Vindman ****=#** | | Friends of Mark Warner 1490-5A Quarterpath Road #213 Williamsburg, VA 23185 United States | Click here to . | Paid for by Friends of Mark Warner

name: Wesley Bell
subject: To my mom…
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY BELL FOR MISSOURI
body:
This is my mom, Peter. [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/131138982/620062773/114933129?refcode=em26_260510_Mother_fnd_gq_act___WB_ettx&utm_campaign=em26_260510_Mother_fnd_gq_act___WB_ettx&utm_medium=email&refcode2=6553fb60-854c-f111-8ef2-000d3a14b640&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTkvMS8xMDYzODkiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiNjU1M2ZiNjAtODU0Yy1mMTExLThlZjItMDAwZDNhMTRiNjQwIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=YBAttPmVh3LDyRl-MKxCZm3VjV0eFqmAExkWqGf4nmc=) I hope that this doesn’t offend anyone... **but I have _the_ best mom.**

Growing up, I thought there was genuinely nothing that she couldn’t do. She was a dedicated public servant who somehow still managed to hold our family together. _She made sure we were taken care of, kept us grounded, and somehow always knew exactly when I was about to do or say something stupid._

Looking back now, I can admit she gave me a whole lot more grace than I probably deserved.

It was like watching Superwoman in action right before my eyes. The older I get, the more I realize just how many Superwoman moms are out there today.

A lot of them are doing all of that while the cost of living keeps climbing, childcare gets more expensive, public schools are under attack, and basic stability feels harder and harder to hold onto. **And yet, they still show up to save the day.**

Today, I’m thinking about my mom and every mother doing everything she can to help her family thrive. To all of you out there, I'm working in Congress to make your life a little easier and give you the breathing room you more than deserve. Even under the Trump administration, know you have an ally in D.C.

Happy Mother’s Day to the women who keep families, communities, and this country moving forward every single day.

— Wesley Bell | [DONATE](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/131138983/620062774/114933129?refcode=em26_260510_Mother_fnd_gq_act___WB_ettx&utm_campaign=em26_260510_Mother_fnd_gq_act___WB_ettx&utm_medium=email&refcode2=6553fb60-854c-f111-8ef2-000d3a14b640&noskip=true&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTkvMS8xMDYzODkiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiNjU1M2ZiNjAtODU0Yy1mMTExLThlZjItMDAwZDNhMTRiNjQwIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=YBAttPmVh3LDyRl-MKxCZm3VjV0eFqmAExkWqGf4nmc=)
---

name: Supervisor David Canepa
subject: Stand With Us Before the Critical May 16th Deadline
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Canepa for Assessor-County Clerk-Recorder 2026 committee, ID #1486383**
body:

---
| | | Dear Friend,

I’m running for San Mateo County Assessor-County Clerk-Recorder & Chief Elections Officer to bring trusted leadership, accountability, and responsive public service to one of the county’s most important offices.

[](https://us.list-manage.com/lSA1KQLqdgd?e=c0babbc643&c2id=bfcaacdd1ef4033edfed3d4b1d472a02)

This office impacts residents every single day, from ensuring fair property assessments and maintaining vital public records to protecting secure, accessible, and transparent elections. I’m committed to modernizing operations, restoring public trust, and delivering the professionalism and service San Mateo County residents deserve.

[DONATE NOW](https://us.list-manage.com/zCjUqm58VmP?e=c0babbc643&c2id=bfcaacdd1ef4033edfed3d4b1d472a02)

As a former Mayor and current member of the Board of Supervisors, I oversee a $5.5 billion organization with 5,800 employees and strong financial reserves. I understand the importance of transparency, sound management, and delivering reliable services that people can count on.
Now, with our critical May 16 fundraising deadline quickly approaching, I’m asking for your support.

Every contribution helps us expand voter outreach, share our message across San Mateo County, and build the grassroots campaign needed to win this important race. We cannot afford to slow down at this critical moment.

Please make a contribution today and help us keep our momentum strong:

[DONATE NOW](https://us.list-manage.com/PeysVDILgwZ?e=c0babbc643&c2id=bfcaacdd1ef4033edfed3d4b1d472a02)

Thank you for your support, your encouragement, and your belief in leadership that puts San Mateo County residents first.

With gratitude,

David Canepa
San Mateo County Supervisor

P.S. The May 16th deadline is one of the most important moments of our campaign so far. Every donation made before midnight helps us reach more voters and build the momentum needed to win.

On Friday, the Supreme Court of Virginia overturned our Commonwealth's redistricting referendum.

_Right now, I’m asking you to take action._

The road to a majority in Congress runs through Virginia, and our Congressional candidates will need all the resources they can get to run and win their races this November.

name: Ryan
subject: Jocelyn’s #1 Supporter
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY JOCELYN BENSON FOR GOVERNOR]
body:
Good morning!

It’s Ryan, Jocelyn’s husband (and her #1 supporter).

I just wanted to take a minute today to say Happy Mother’s Day to Jocelyn,
and to all the Michigan moms.

Watching Jocelyn be a mom to our son Aiden is one of the great joys of my
life. From his first moments jumping into Lake Superior to his first bike
rides on the Riverwalk in Detroit, from the best days to the hardest days,
she is always there for him.

[ https://act.jocelynbenson.com/go/4505?t=1001&akid=1633%2E181023%2E5Ew4Qb ][IMG]

And it’s why she does this work. To make our state everything it needs to
be for our youngest in Michigan and for our families. From protecting
people’s rights to building opportunities that let our young people grow
and build their families in this extraordinary place.

This campaign at its core is about a fight for that future.

So thank you for being with us. My hope is that you might help Aiden and I
surprise her today with a surge of grassroots support!

[ https://act.jocelynbenson.com/go/4505?t=1002&akid=1633%2E181023%2E5Ew4Qb ]If you're able, will you join us in celebrating Mother's Day by
supporting Jocelyn's campaign and the work she's doing to build the future
for Michigan families?

If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your
donation will go through immediately:

[ https://act.jocelynbenson.com/go/4506?t=1003&akid=1633%2E181023%2E5Ew4Qb ]Donate $5 →

clean_body: Good morning! It’s Ryan, Jocelyn’s husband (and her #1 supporter). I just wanted to take a minute today to say Happy Mother’s Day to Jocelyn, and to all the Michigan moms. Watching Jocelyn be a mom to our son Aiden is one of the great joys of my life. From his first moments jumping into Lake Superior to his first bike rides on the Riverwalk in Detroit, from the best days to the hardest days, she is always there for him. [ ][IMG] And it’s why she does this work. To make our state everything it needs to be for our youngest in Michigan and for our families. From protecting people’s rights to building opportunities that let our young people grow and build their families in this extraordinary place. This campaign at its core is about a fight for that future. So thank you for being with us. My hope is that you might help Aiden and I surprise her today with a surge of grassroots support! [ ]If you're able, will you join us in celebrating Mother's Day by supporting Jocelyn's campaign and the work she's doing to build the future for Michigan families? If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: [ ]Donate $5 → [ ]Donate $25 → [ ]Donate $50 → [ ]Donate $100 → [ ]Donate $250 → [ ]Other → Happy Mother’s Day! Ryan

subject: There are pundits watching this race who think we can't win

body:

Peter,

There are pundits watching this race who think we can't win.

We’re talking about the ones responsible for getting us in this mess in
the first place: Corporate PACs, AIPAC, and the establishment politicians
who've allowed the status quo to continue for too long.

They're betting that a 100% people-powered campaign will eventually run
out of steam — but they're wrong. We’ve built a movement of fighters like
you who don’t back down, no matter what they try to throw at us.

When they say we can't get money out of politics, we don't back down.

When they say we can't pass Medicare for All, we don't back down.

When they say we can't stop funding endless wars, we don't back down.

When they say we can't build an economy that works for everyone, we don't
back down.

Peter, our path
to victory is real, but it only stays that way if we have the resources to
keep pushing.

name: Jeremy
subject: Happy Mother's Day!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Jeremy Moss for Congress
body:
Happy Mother’s Day to all the moms, moms-to-be, and mother figures out there! 🫶

| [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/131139943/620065363/680287355?refcode=BLU_EM_MOSS_2026-05-10_1&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNjIvMS8xMTc5OTIiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiY2I1NDk3MzAtODg0Yy1mMTExLThlZjItMDAwZDNhMTRiNjQwIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=jYG07EVEnQOq6_Lhzb-npekhJhhwFNFYICFmyu7ArrU=)
---
| Hi Peter,

Happy Mother’s Day to all the moms, moms-to-be, and mother figures out there! **🫶**

Especially to my mom, who has been by my side along the campaign trail. She taught me at an early age about standing on principle, advocating for what you think is right, and making the change you want to see in your community.

She was an elementary school teacher right here in metro Detroit. She was also the Michigan Education Association (MEA) representative in her building, ensuring that her colleagues had the resources needed in the classroom to be successful and shape young minds into future leaders.

As a graduate from public high school here in Oakland County myself, I carry her passion to ensure that every child has access to a quality public education.

**That’s why I’m especially honored to have earned the important endorsement from my mom’s union, the MEA. It feels like a full-circle moment for me and this campaign, and I’m grateful for their support.**

I’m running for Congress because I want to be an advocate for working Michiganders in Washington. From our teachers to our truck drivers to our auto workers, I promise I’ll always stand side-by-side with the working families who make Michigan run.

[_**If you want to help send a son of an MEA teacher who’s going to stand up for our workers to Congress, will you chip in $10 or more to my campaign?**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/131139944/620065364/680287355?refcode=BLU_EM_MOSS_2026-05-10_1&amount=10&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNjIvMS8xMTc5OTIiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiY2I1NDk3MzAtODg0Yy1mMTExLThlZjItMDAwZDNhMTRiNjQwIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=jYG07EVEnQOq6_Lhzb-npekhJhhwFNFYICFmyu7ArrU=)

| | There's something happening in our elections right now that should concern every American. **Billionaires are pouring unprecedented amounts of money into our political system to shape outcomes in their favor.** [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/131140840/620068392/-2122444374?refcode=2026-05-10-elections&recurring=&amount=10&amounts=10,30,50,100,200&refcode2=ceee474e-894c-f111-8ef2-000d3a14b640&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDEvMS84OTMyNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjZWVlNDc0ZS04OTRjLWYxMTEtOGVmMi0wMDBkM2ExNGI2NDAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=rU2riFBErROUvaRxGlI_QkRxRi6jZMFcar2kJI7MbCc=) We're not talking about small donations given by ordinary Americans. We're talking about a handful of ultra-wealthy individuals spending tens — even hundreds — of millions of dollars to influence who wins an election, which impacts what policies get passed in an administration and whose voices are heard by high-level officials. When billionaires dominate campaign funding, policies start to reflect their priorities — tax breaks for the wealthy, fewer protections for workers, and less investment in things families rely on like healthcare, education, and housing. It also erodes trust in our system when campaign spending gives influence and access, undermining confidence that government is working for the people. I've been fighting to push back against this imbalance — by working to shine a light on dark money in our elections, pushing for stronger disclosure and transparency rules, and introducing legislation to crack down on corruption and conflicts of interest so public officials can't use their positions for personal financial gain. This is about protecting the foundation of our democracy, and it's a fight we can't afford to lose. body:
|
# [ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/131140880/620068442/-1343999874?refcode=em-header&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNjIvMS8xMTc1MjUiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiZjc4MjNkNzEtODk0Yy1mMTExLThlZjItMDAwZDNhMTRiNjQwIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=KnxXHI2giRsQQXx2FYJVCLY06YzfwK5XfwEpqjX5PVk=)
Peter,

I’m reaching out to ask you to [_**contribute $3**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/131140881/620068443/701031031?refcode=em-5.10.26-all-b&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNjIvMS8xMTc1MjUiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiZjc4MjNkNzEtODk0Yy1mMTExLThlZjItMDAwZDNhMTRiNjQwIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=KnxXHI2giRsQQXx2FYJVCLY06YzfwK5XfwEpqjX5PVk=) to my campaign for Congress. The landscape in my race has changed dramatically in the past week, so I hope you will let me explain why this request is so important.
* On Monday, the Democratic Congressional Campaign Committee announced they are supporting my corporate and Israel lobby backed primary opponent.

* Shortly after, we got word that another outside group backing our opponent launched a $500,000 ad campaign against me.

* Then Thursday, news broke that, for the first time in this race, a pro-Israel super PAC affiliated with AIPAC is placing nearly _half a million dollars_ in ads against me.

**That’s $1 million in outside spending against us in just one week.** Peter, this is what it looks like when the establishment is scared of you. But we've seen this happen before — from Maine to California, grassroots campaigns have beaten the establishment when working people decide they've had enough. CA-22 is where we get to choose what the future of Congress looks like. Corporate Democrats who side with the ultra-wealthy and special interests — or leaders willing to actually fight for working families like our lives depend on it. **[That choice is being made right now. clean_body: | = Peter, I’m reaching out to ask you to = to my campaign for Congress. The landscape in my race has changed dramatically in the past week, so I hope you will let me explain why this request is so important. On Monday, the Democratic Congressional Campaign Committee announced they are supporting my corporate and Israel lobby backed primary opponent. Shortly after, we got word that another outside group backing our opponent launched a $500,000 ad campaign against me. Then Thursday, news broke that, for the first time in this race, a pro-Israel super PAC affiliated with AIPAC is placing nearly half a million dollars in ads against me. That’s $1 million in outside spending against us in just one week. Peter, this is what it looks like when the establishment is scared of you. But we've seen this happen before — from Maine to California, grassroots campaigns have beaten the establishment when working people decide they've had enough. CA-22 is where we get to choose what the future of Congress looks like. Corporate Democrats who side with the ultra-wealthy and special interests — or leaders willing to actually fight for working families like our lives depend on it. =** If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | | = | = | | = | = | | = | = Randy | With deep ties to our community and a lifelong commitment to justice and equity, Randy is running for Congress in California’s 22nd District to bring bold, compassionate leadership to Washington. Like so many, my grandparents were my heroes. My grandmother was a public school teacher, and my grandfather was a union painter – together, they instilled in me the importance of hard work from a young age.
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/131141002/620068656/-1967985835?refcode=em-5.10.26-all-b&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MjQwNyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkNGVlNDc0ZS04OTRjLWYxMTEtOGVmMi0wMDBkM2ExNGI2NDAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=2RU71OOM0k2JkpY_9JFuAUXfR_Lao1hASUEj_KqQ7s4=)
_That’s me on the left!_
And like so many, my grandparents' story isn't exactly unique. Through their good-paying jobs, they built their own version of the American Dream. But today, decades later, that same dream is farther and farther out of reach for millions of working people.

**I firmly believe that we can only thrive when our middle class is strong. Right now, this Administration isn't prioritizing them – instead, they're focused on groveling to the billionaire class.**

I've spent my career championing working families – from passing the $15 minimum wage to protecting local jobs. I ran for Congress to do the same, and while I'm proud of the results and progress I've brought back to our communities there's much more we can get done with Democrats in the majority.

**[It starts with holding the line in IL-13. Will you chip in $3 to help me get it done?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/131141004/620068659/-1967985835?refcode=em-5.10.26-all-b&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MjQwNyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkNGVlNDc0ZS04OTRjLWYxMTEtOGVmMi0wMDBkM2ExNGI2NDAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=2RU71OOM0k2JkpY_9JFuAUXfR_Lao1hASUEj_KqQ7s4=)**

$12. That’s what my parents had in their pockets when they came to America. Just $12 to build a life for themselves and for my family. My father worked construction. My mother worked clerical jobs. It wasn’t easy. But they worked hard and saved every penny they could to provide a better life for their children. And over time, that $12 they started off with helped them achieve the California Dream. That should be the case today for any hardworking family in California. Everyone should have the opportunity to achieve the California Dream. But the reality is, it’s become out of reach. I’m running to be California’s next governor to restore that opportunity that my parents were given and fight like hell to make life more affordable for working people. But I can’t get there alone. So I’m asking: [**Will you chip in $12 today?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/131142782/620075690/686976916?refcode=em260510-1-f&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDcvMS8xMDYyNjIiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiMGM4NDU5MWYtOGI0Yy1mMTExLThlZjItMDAwZDNhMTRiNjQwIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=jvpV5XZEamESxntyMzAX_pjw4rgcXAEwldO5XckfpZI=) $12 to help restore the California Dream my parents were able to achieve. $12 to send a proven fighter with the experience to get to work on Day One to the Governor’s mansion. $12 to build on our surging momentum and reach more voters across California. $12 to fight back against the attacks my billionaire opponent is pummeling us with. $12 to make sure we have the resources we need to go head to head with my billionaire and dark-money backed opponents. [**Please. Use this link or the button below to give $12 to my campaign for California Governor today.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/131142783/620075691/686976916?amount=12&refcode=em260510-1-f&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDcvMS8xMDYyNjIiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiMGM4NDU5MWYtOGI0Yy1mMTExLThlZjItMDAwZDNhMTRiNjQwIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=jvpV5XZEamESxntyMzAX_pjw4rgcXAEwldO5XckfpZI=) | | [DONATE $12](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/131142784/620075692/686976916?amount=12&refcode=em260510-1-f&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDcvMS8xMDYyNjIiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiMGM4NDU5MWYtOGI0Yy1mMTExLThlZjItMDAwZDNhMTRiNjQwIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=jvpV5XZEamESxntyMzAX_pjw4rgcXAEwldO5XckfpZI=)

Or are you reacting to emails and subject lines designed to scare you?
Most fundraising emails are built on emotional spikes:
_“Deadline tonight.”_ _“Democracy ends tomorrow.”_ _“700% match activated.”_
Donors are pushed to give first — and ask questions later.
But elections aren’t won by emotional giving.
Elections are won by **measurable turnout operations.**
**[Turning Point PAC is scaling the LARGEST ballot-chasing operation in America built on REAL outcomes. Will you help keep our mission moving?](https://link.email.america1stwarroom.com/click/e7769634/VaHR0cHM6Ly9zZWN1cmUuYW5lZG90LmNvbS90cHBhYy90cHBhY19kb25fc2Jfc2ZtY19heS1kb25fYnJfMjAyNjA0MDEv/SZW1haWxfYW1lcmljYU9ORXN0d2Fycm9vbV9jb20yNjA1MTA/LbmNsUW9MU1c5NA/qP3V0bV9tZWRpdW09YnImdXRtX2NvbnRlbnQ9MDMyMGVtNiZ1dG1fdGVybT0yMjc0NF93cjM/gagCxBg/sfv4dd94471)**

When you give to Turning Point PAC, you’re not donating blind.
You’re DIRECTLY funding:
* Door-to-door voter engagement

* Precinct-level turnout

**[No gift is too small. Every ballot chaser commits to banking 10 votes-a-day during early voting. Sponsoring even 1 more ballot-chaser means putting several hundred more votes on the scoreboard!](https://link.email.america1stwarroom.com/click/e7769634/VaHR0cHM6Ly9zZWN1cmUuYW5lZG90LmNvbS90cHBhYy90cHBhY19kb25fc2Jfc2ZtY19heS1kb25fYnJfMjAyNjA0MDEv/SZW1haWxfYW1lcmljYU9ORXN0d2Fycm9vbV9jb20yNjA1MTA/LbmNsUW9MU1c5NA/qP3V0bV9tZWRpdW09YnImdXRtX2NvbnRlbnQ9MDMyMGVtNiZ1dG1fdGVybT0yMjc0NF93cjM/gagCxBg/sfv4dd94471)**

Non-Contribution Account (For TPPAC, Inc.’s Expenditures Other Than Direct Contributions to Federal Committees)

As permitted by law, TPPAC, Inc. maintains a non-contribution account for the purpose of influencing federal, state, and local elections. Federal law requires us to use our best efforts to collect and report the name, address, occupation, and employer of individuals whose contribution exceeds $200 in an election cycle. For contributions from federal committees, corporations, and labor unions - regardless of contribution amount - federal law requires us to use our best efforts to collect and report the committee’s name and address. State and local law may require us to collect and report additional information.

Contributions to this account may be used to influence federal elections by making independent expenditures in support of or in opposition to federal candidates. Additionally, in state and local jurisdictions that permit non-individual type (e.g., corporate) contributions directly to candidates and/or committees, contributions to this account may be used for both independent expenditures and direct contributions to candidates and/or committees, as permitted by state and local law.

Individuals, federal committees, corporations, and labor unions may contribute to TPPAC, Inc.’s non-contribution account without limit. Contributions by national banks, foreign nationals (without lawful permanent resident status), and other foreign entities (e.g., foreign corporations) are prohibited. Contributions to TPPAC, Inc.’s non-contribution account are not tax-deductible for federal income tax purposes.

Paid for by Turning Point PAC, Inc. (www.tppac.com) and not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee.

clean_body: Your last political donation did nothing. | | | | | | Patriot, Be honest: When you give to political causes... Do you actually know what your money accomplishes? Or are you reacting to emails and subject lines designed to scare you? Most fundraising emails are built on emotional spikes: “Deadline tonight.” “Democracy ends tomorrow.” “700% match activated.” Donors are pushed to give first — and ask questions later. But elections aren’t won by emotional giving. Elections are won by measurable turnout operations. We’re funding an additional 700 full-time ballot-chasers in the near term. These chasers will join teams already in key battleground districts since last year. Your support is the difference between winning and losing control of Congress. Trump and Republicans are working on policies to spend billions more. | | | [](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.X6XUC7u8ppFLNtMO_55SZlNseb7gEYIOhm_EWnhzEOZKmTtnV3k2h4V2x_O3H7rdW2az5rgktBwzxQ8Ml9Wgkmv85qW-UsBonL4KRa0bcNqdICU6T3NBDdNIZG7w7wEWRR-3RrjDM7P1mEbF-PcSoJE96AX1pl3HYoBukQVLN6O4E_ew8ub9Kb26wKimtYjivksF4EAGj_cecAXcNY9Qs6yEkYj63UUwISS8s_IHcmJYAMhxWhjHcKfiwJyL9alpI5JWpFvKrobfn4cp4wMWZwGaRHNxoINZ0ti5UOY4FjSpWR85Qywo0LfW-iAUyR3fXJYadgD3Wkor9A_cQiu-VbHGx88cW3oc3G_HGnx4a67JTy9cxFdkyHnniLRVTH6EalNF4jl8e5f9h3DayvWVvFc_MVkgHqo1ij5vM5Ih3i962ovMkgLlYyfHqFotTF6uomraNPu8DptPifo6s0-SW0MQlsm1e6jVeK4lbiWfhxU/4qi/fSUZ6GvqTaSFBU_24IUEOg/h0/h001.Rs3M1m6FXN4GKaYyAuBNROPdOovqFb466_CcjpVgpb0)
