Friend, Happy Mother’s Day! This week I introduced a resolution to demand better support for pregnant and postpartum people of color—particularly Black women, who are at least three times more likely to die from pregnancy-related causes. **Most of these deaths are preventable with equitable healthcare. But Trump and Republicans want to further cut our healthcare.** As prices rise and families struggle, he and Congressional Republicans want to use upcoming budget reconciliation processes to spend billions more of our tax dollars on Trump’s ballroom, war, and ICE and Border Patrol—while cutting healthcare, food assistance for moms and children, housing assistance, and early education. Already this year, 18 people have died in ICE detention, and others have died on the streets due to ICE abuses. This must end! **As deaths mount, I’m demanding an agenda for the people—transformative policies to save lives** by banning ICE warehouse detention centers, to create publicly funded alternatives to Big Pharma and increase access to care, to expand Head Start for 11 million more families, and to end the unhoused crisis. [**Will you sign on today to support my agenda for the people and demand Congress fund people’s needs, rather than ICE, war, and Trump’s ballroom?**](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.qUXRBnqZ7T8nxbpAcIVwoUsWLkUMWlo_0JmZttSlm3-inXg7XQKmpx2SINKyl6WQ-Lxb3plpvXmO173aj918gN3jTsfomt5q9b0IV_vH6psL_KauSK0-FBooizDGDfiG4_w82DstbmReR8nAaC8kca68JEW6U7pjMcXueCRLlCW0dMRZJjY8gp7EDdwSvGAvP8s4TyYxcsT3PneLZXlwuN_R2G5wY1Td4yWoRyJG1LIMZi5aqPNM2yv2dnNtIVLu-EtjQrfzKK6QBxjJge7pWkKijspqVArUj8vBrUp0ZoiU_L1FSf2FWj6dLUY7kCAPjst0JkoVZ4ltJbMZ_2WxRDE9tcNbOxJtdafVpesYv8mVMjLcpw4hJ5rpJ0JNzRu6B7mVMR1ZA5JIZV3k5Izsb4F_ssXhxKH0a1LHi48FHKj7Wt2I-Cl6dCAXEMsOMMelZ-MmZ_uyHCayEQU4XL2I7B9Jt-RpyYNtEaX-gLDr3fJAfLzysNg28djIVweaEdikYF1W9Lij7Kyh2X23HDs81lfOl855XR08xvcavoPGakUwzH56nKq-YaShE5SMca_17102jnTgJDll-9eM-U7An78CbnZcH90AHR5rpg-Ob9kTE2JHgQ_4bM4sS_V2Rfk48TCFI6L7bt5IxR6EjJzlYw/4qi/fSUZ6GvqTaSFBU_24IUEOg/h1/h001.Y9BcN5WA2z-gA5ZrsuyEbZNkm1f8WX3ZSolkK0ULaRo) | [ADD YOUR NAME](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.qUXRBnqZ7T8nxbpAcIVwoUsWLkUMWlo_0JmZttSlm3-inXg7XQKmpx2SINKyl6WQ-Lxb3plpvXmO173aj918gN3jTsfomt5q9b0IV_vH6psL_KauSK0-FBooizDGDfiG4_w82DstbmReR8nAaC8kca68JEW6U7pjMcXueCRLlCW0dMRZJjY8gp7EDdwSvGAvP8s4TyYxcsT3PneLZXlwuIdBYQG6h9ldAqLilF56iTGhRJ_q02Jt5iNlVh-WB5nyJkGG-OwcU0n3ZDrIYTu1PhkmaSxR4WkK2g8MJEP9XgKyqyTABzbH_PBeZBnqvbs35y-zuHDlty7dnb8ATCS89XQ0S8ttoY-_ojEBHW80m8yA3m1tA3J0XuxkLih1IuW5mHUmUJHQzF6EA1ok2VvNfgmuqrLT66k5wkT_mhSmlWF68SZrpIaLNNwqsCQjZu8d7aI10VtX3zot1_jDnLgRUNneEsgPjBQeMAgAqwrIfk_R9DFJfAVK83l-l3pF22RFEqNYayzBqGr-BAusfRBiMnFgfWOzqjFElXUBLV_6f8cf59ZvYP6TDCLFi3e5GwUA8XywgwjT0nXiecjkJd4J4UccT_y3zsI8ls9OstmfyxT398fSWN58Xm558kLhtLUgwEDoJ3kddt-X8zloZQTlJQ/4qi/fSUZ6GvqTaSFBU_24IUEOg/h2/h001.ARVmE5v78PHNrpzeDy-6WK7dzlt23CvzM60OjSWtpgk)

Requesting $1.5 trillion for the Pentagon this year, Trump said we need to spend money on war rather than healthcare or childcare.
He’s saying the quiet part out loud: no matter who’s president, our government always finds money for wars but not for working people.
I’m leading fights in Congress to move our tax dollars away from funding genocides and human rights abuses at home and abroad. Instead, our taxpayer dollars must fund communities’ needs.
I’m unafraid to fight for the bold and transformative changes that working families need. My recently introduced policies include:
* The **_Ban Warehouse Detention Act_****** to stop ICE warehouse detention centers.
* The **_Medicines for the People Act_** to establish a public option for developing and researching medicines. It would move our government to produce medications and devices, breaking up Big Pharma’s monopoly, lowering the cost of prescriptions and healthcare, and prioritizing life-saving innovations rather than corporate profits.
* The **_Head Start for America’s Children Act_** to expand Head Start eligibility to 11 million new children, raise educator pay, and invest in comprehensive support services for working families. Head Start is often a pathway out of poverty.
* The **_Unhoused Persons Bill of Rights_** to permanently end the unhoused crisis and support people who can’t access a safe place to live.

[**Please speak up for this agenda for the people and demand Congress fund what we need to live, rather than funding death and destruction at home and abroad.**](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.qUXRBnqZ7T8nxbpAcIVwoUsWLkUMWlo_0JmZttSlm3-inXg7XQKmpx2SINKyl6WQ-Lxb3plpvXmO173aj918gN3jTsfomt5q9b0IV_vH6psL_KauSK0-FBooizDGDfiG4_w82DstbmReR8nAaC8kca68JEW6U7pjMcXueCRLlCW0dMRZJjY8gp7EDdwSvGAvP8s4TyYxcsT3PneLZXlwuFNqDlz8ZdofyzDNFVUZHVc9hQOnDrudzhIbidd8jN8AIarcwkg_Kj7H3YNgqrCQj7cIBxV_Q2Wi0n5S6waH5mhEOAJCUkQ21U4c9IiP_i6JuNLnpobasDb7DC0Y-_AIZIq1A4qpYmHfgo_sng42HqFlB37PqmuSC5sxJAtusbs5FLIkiGvldAxKycGL8E6m-7csCcgyXKDbw54vPle2BKkFxVk9Xb33qtWIb1rIZdrpZ8wrQxD9Kz9EAIhTwxOsubYQwQMtzoNgNf9-10QiQM9_kXOtSzE5Kjia2E1uLnpZgcdOzYg1Sqj0whjBBFm0ZyjuEKwnRE3FY1NhRJvmxJdTQfo8Sr9y-V-P-9_rfuDTTel-3RDNB2VSI4SnkRaSY3UVJKPBfDijvh_JNrebwKfJlggRDKNVdgd7fMr9OpU0vcUG9AK_w-1zWej0S5fbeQ/4qi/fSUZ6GvqTaSFBU_24IUEOg/h3/h001.DdZ2Sjhi6loNyD_jc4BWZ7NL_1wi71_7q6ORcU4zL44)

Thank you. I promise to continue fighting for you and for our rights in Congress.
Together in our communities and in the halls of power, we’re growing movements for equity and a society where we all have what we need to thrive.
With you in the fight for a government that serves the people,
Rashida

name: Steve Hilton for Governor
subject: Are you still with me?

name: Sheriff Joe Arpaio
subject: Help Free Two Innocent Officers Before It's Too Late
body:
Patriot,
This is a disgrace...and every American who believes in law and order should be furious.
Two police officers—Josh Taylor and Brandon Dingman—are currently serving prison sentences for doing exactly what they were trained and ordered to do: respond to a dangerous call, use non-lethal force, and protecting their community.
Let me tell you what really happened, because the media and the District Attorney certainly won't.
On the night of July 4th, 2019, Officer Josh Taylor responded to a domestic disturbance call in Wilson, Oklahoma. When he arrived, he encountered Jared Lakey: a large, fully grown man walking naked down the street wearing nothing but socks.
Josh immediately recognized this situation for what it was: dangerous and unpredictable. Whether it was drugs, mental illness, or something else—this wasn't a man in his right mind. And Josh knew he couldn't handle it alone. He called for backup.
[Donate to Their Defense](http://links.freedomfirstalert.com/u/click?_t=9ca143e971904d26a973d002cb0ae7f7&_m=56ddff77a9104921841cbdb68fe61c4c&_e=0ODvAdFoCYgJFF8-0jqPf6jsbYvweyPb4qqYI9XfQKcC2sL7pAbqfcj0_X4VL36j4ECW03tqWkVYV0eWGtLiYqR8ywvKNImZTwnglSl50O5jtmX7ELo3Mh6B-Y3R3QUi7LpVu6IFOnNLup5FDAxyiVLeD9pyGuyBg9fg4R1Gf5OLQ4I0Ruu4p1uutFEi2KvXmT-98pHqXFioys3RvItfpjsnYdfZa_R9e4BBPRUvtLn4DRjRQugRl-RUGndu2GRP-mgSHoX3jATh6PuXxDBUhfiVE8NuBdCJF7KFExDLx76SQdskWEoVey5T4OUUUfW-yR-7sNNrbu6m6sEe4f7ybMW2ZxkuaXRYSZ1cxJesbg0Yydu9vZyBHJPGzBIh0C7CRCi9zHVvbVP0IRMngNv7ZxvkhnxftNUpx4mfJ99fEc9Aq_ROTjPm0pwL86P30xg6)
Officer Josh Taylor
Officer Brandon Dingman
Officer Brandon Dingman arrived on scene, and the two officers tried to do what they were trained to do: safely and professionally bring Mr. Lakey into custody.
But Lakey was 350 pounds, combative, and resisting arrest. When verbal commands didn't work and physical restraint proved impossible, they turned to their department-issued, non-lethal tasers.
They deployed them multiple times, but Lakey kept tearing the barbs out. He was clearly not being fully affected by the tasers—and even after repeated attempts, the officers were unable to subdue him.
Eventually, Josh and Brandon were able to get his arms and cuffed him. They immediately called for medical assistance. An ambulance arrived. Lakey was taken to the hospital.
At that point, the officers had done everything they could—and everything right.
But tragically, Jared Lakey passed away two days later. The autopsy was inconclusive. He had an enlarged heart and lung issues. Drug screenings were unreliable due to the fluids pumped into his system at the hospital. There was no determined cause of death.
Even so, the department launched an internal review. Then the City Council reviewed the case too.
Both cleared the officers. That's two separate investigations concluding Josh and Brandon followed procedure.
Case closed, right?
Wrong.
A full year later, a politically motivated District Attorney, smelling an opportunity, dragged the case back up and charged these officers with second-degree murder.
Let that sink in: second-degree murder. He ignored the internal findings. He ignored the medical uncertainty. He ignored the fact that these officers never even laid a hand on Lakey's neck or airway.
They followed their training, used the gear they were issued, and even called for medical help.
But none of that mattered to a DA looking to make headlines.
Now, these two good cops, family men, community protectors, are sitting behind bars.
The National Center for Police Defense is fighting to overturn this injustice. We're supporting their legal appeals, helping their families, and backing efforts to remove the biased District Attorney who never should have touched this case in the first place.
But appeals are costly. And the longer this drags on, the longer Josh and Brandon sit in prison...separated from their families, their children, their lives.
That's why I'm writing you today. We need your help.
[Yes — I'll Donate Today](http://links.freedomfirstalert.com/u/click?_t=9ca143e971904d26a973d002cb0ae7f7&_m=56ddff77a9104921841cbdb68fe61c4c&_e=0ODvAdFoCYgJFF8-0jqPf6jsbYvweyPb4qqYI9XfQKcC2sL7pAbqfcj0_X4VL36j4ECW03tqWkVYV0eWGtLiYqR8ywvKNImZTwnglSl50O7AJx33VNHVRuz7AaNJ-1JTLV33Nbyc3XdF837DrG8QRHzUPtu-7dls7gbYOY_MvppLfSjbK9l-lizzPhPd8i2FIrBPsjtWhVQ7Zadv-kluGQD4uHJpVBK5eysQPURCZrzj866l2lbRaQAvFnarKI8lDLp7n89tzSfmCWrcFwxYTOIpnkJHOdgNdrPTBhvpF-W_lJ_GSAegF_HC5fxGVQsxjnuj0TP9lqofThoPNsNltHlhfpEQIG_OFjTxI-A-xwohrLWRBVH9z5illZZfvNy3hvA4uhtgobYIA6rb2uGIeylaem_AcAs8IZL8Uu15DpfAoti1Kdt_gwkFSjAh4vzD)
We need to raise funds to fuel the legal defense and appeal process. These officers deserve their freedom. They deserve a fair hearing. And they deserve to come home.
We cannot let this go unanswered. If we don't stand up now, more and more police officers will suffer the same fate: thrown to the wolves by political activists in prosecutor's clothing.
Josh and Brandon were railroaded, plain and simple. And now we need to right this wrong.
Will you step up today and donate to support their appeals?
## Stand With Josh & Brandon
Every dollar goes directly to their legal defense and appeals. Help bring them home.

clean_body: Patriot, This is a disgrace...and every American who believes in law and order should be furious. Two police officers—Josh Taylor and Brandon Dingman—are currently serving prison sentences for doing exactly what they were trained and ordered to do: respond to a dangerous call, use non-lethal force, and protecting their community. Let me tell you what really happened, because the media and the District Attorney certainly won't. On the night of July 4th, 2019, Officer Josh Taylor responded to a domestic disturbance call in Wilson, Oklahoma. When he arrived, he encountered Jared Lakey: a large, fully grown man walking naked down the street wearing nothing but socks. Josh immediately recognized this situation for what it was: dangerous and unpredictable. Whether it was drugs, mental illness, or something else—this wasn't a man in his right mind. And Josh knew he couldn't handle it alone. He called for backup. Officer Josh Taylor Officer Brandon Dingman Officer Brandon Dingman arrived on scene, and the two officers tried to do what they were trained to do: safely and professionally bring Mr. Lakey into custody. But Lakey was 350 pounds, combative, and resisting arrest. When verbal commands didn't work and physical restraint proved impossible, they turned to their department-issued, non-lethal tasers. They deployed them multiple times, but Lakey kept tearing the barbs out. He was clearly not being fully affected by the tasers—and even after repeated attempts, the officers were unable to subdue him. Eventually, Josh and Brandon were able to get his arms and cuffed him. They immediately called for medical assistance. An ambulance arrived. Lakey was taken to the hospital. At that point, the officers had done everything they could—and everything right. But tragically, Jared Lakey passed away two days later. The autopsy was inconclusive. He had an enlarged heart and lung issues. Drug screenings were unreliable due to the fluids pumped into his system at the hospital. There was no determined cause of death. Even so, the department launched an internal review. Then the City Council reviewed the case too. Both cleared the officers. That's two separate investigations concluding Josh and Brandon followed procedure. Case closed, right? Wrong. A full year later, a politically motivated District Attorney, smelling an opportunity, dragged the case back up and charged these officers with second-degree murder. Let that sink in: second-degree murder. He ignored the internal findings. He ignored the medical uncertainty. He ignored the fact that these officers never even laid a hand on Lakey's neck or airway. They followed their training, used the gear they were issued, and even called for medical help. But none of that mattered to a DA looking to make headlines. Now, these two good cops, family men, community protectors, are sitting behind bars. The National Center for Police Defense is fighting to overturn this injustice. We're supporting their legal appeals, helping their families, and backing efforts to remove the biased District Attorney who never should have touched this case in the first place. But appeals are costly. And the longer this drags on, the longer Josh and Brandon sit in prison...separated from their families, their children, their lives. That's why I'm writing you today. We need your help. We need to raise funds to fuel the legal defense and appeal process. These officers deserve their freedom. They deserve a fair hearing. And they deserve to come home. We cannot let this go unanswered. If we don't stand up now, more and more police officers will suffer the same fate: thrown to the wolves by political activists in prosecutor's clothing. Josh and Brandon were railroaded, plain and simple. And now we need to right this wrong. Will you step up today and donate to support their appeals? Stand With Josh & Brandon Every dollar goes directly to their legal defense and appeals. Help bring them home. Your generous gift goes to defending these officers and restoring justice. No family should have to go through this. No officer should be imprisoned for doing his job. Let's send a message: we still back the badge—and we won't let politics destroy the lives of our heroes. For justice, Sheriff Joe Arpaio (ret.) National Center for Police Defense | Defenders for Justice

name: Andrew Sypher, Turning Point USA
subject: The real frontline isn’t where you think
body:
Charlie didn’t say this lightly | | | [](http://links.conservativesfordjt.com/u/click?_t=05b03ef2209247bcbdad7fd5099cd670&_m=25e9e0b45bb94e40a0d69778c6b9c33c&_e=uwDjwrZftO6ZclNvvTqzzIOlp_dAaNY0_g8wP_lanYs6gS-orJrzwbBfpq8v_jDiVVju-L2XCkW-VI-IVMlpyJxDwGoYHbe0h9ARkNZDEdGg-76CqXuosCaXKp9SlBuEVZdeYAppuWOjqPXQttXWIyFFYAnsO_UyHT2r6UaefeG-24zqwL8QihLp-vxb3t-ZGmDXQDUs7vdt9TDrwzaKvXbgT2as_-uUFVp-BMoKoqwO7gLoddH2I5mBWf2Xzjk0a5OfA-FoHROyPi0rzhBpzOACwSnVOkJRYsV4QVMswQkUGRKz7RaaC6xk17ppOiptvGqAEiascYcKPh1Yg4xPsUdYeB4d9MLyag3vk2yIAtBSs7zoPdf-UcyCR8Mj1TTXeirCBcFhNwJODs6xAtEnKDqG4IKfThFxF_NtCqtgxg-7cQlwkYAKzDPDmha6BPW5Toj7DlUMSDUiskwJbmu7B-NouiHfe6D7cX--HU6WDrPTKZ5JGEkHIMGtW95fz3lvpBpn48ZusHs_SBrV4-6xbE6s38S7M5zAmM3lq16-lZ3SCqb0PXivrIbE4hLCX5ufhZpLwiHJlZWtDkJEzOhCF3aX8ElKX7g1Pgaj1fMLqMhIhPdI1Ev7gWCGGiYsiqiL2PU5aya44MzPdC5q557-cRSpzeackipENfmiEFJAjaFnnY05EB4Xqa5qbnl1CAWGA9JYFOJemmwE47JiQyEIGQ%3D%3D)

| | Friend,
---
I'm going to be blunt with you.

We are closer to losing this country than most people are willing to admit.

Not someday. Not "if things keep going this way."

Right now.

And the scariest part?

It's not happening in Washington. It's happening in classrooms.

High schools. Colleges.

Places where the next generation is being shaped -- or more accurately... reshaped.

If you've ever looked at what's coming out of our schools and thought: _" What happened to this country?" _

You're not wrong. You're seeing it clearly.

Because while most people are arguing online... while they're hoping things will turn around... while they're waiting for the next election to fix everything...

The other side is doing something far more dangerous.

They're raising the next generation.

Earlier. Faster. And with zero resistance in most places.

That's how countries are lost.

Slowly. Then all at once.

But here's the thing that should give a patriot like you hope...

There is one place where that trend is actually being challenged.

_And it shouldn 't even exist. _

**Just one year ago, Turning Point USA 's high school program -- which is now called "Club America" -- was in about 1,200 schools.**
That alone felt like a miracle.

Because starting even ONE chapter today takes courage most adults don't have.

Conservative students get mocked. Targeted. Threatened. Shut down.

And yet...

_They stepped up anyway. _

About that time, Charlie called me.

He didn't sound optimistic... He sounded urgent.

"Andrew, we've got to move faster."

I told him we were. He stopped me.

"No. You're not thinking what I'm thinking. I want to be in 35,000 high schools."

I actually laughed.

"Charlie... there aren't even 35,000 high schools in America."

"Okay," he said. "How many are there?"

"About 27,000."

And without hesitation: "Good. Let's do 27,000."

I remember sitting there thinking to myself... we're barely in 1,200 schools.

We didn't have the staff. We didn't have the infrastructure. We didn't even have the roadmap yet.

But Charlie wasn't fazed.

_" We'll figure it out." _

That was him.

He didn't wait for perfect conditions.

Because he knew something most people don't want to face: If we wait... _we lose everything. _

And now?

Less than a year later...
---
[](http://links.conservativesfordjt.com/u/click?_t=05b03ef2209247bcbdad7fd5099cd670&_m=25e9e0b45bb94e40a0d69778c6b9c33c&_e=uwDjwrZftO6ZclNvvTqzzIOlp_dAaNY0_g8wP_lanYs6gS-orJrzwbBfpq8v_jDiVVju-L2XCkW-VI-IVMlpyJxDwGoYHbe0h9ARkNZDEdGg-76CqXuosCaXKp9SlBuEVZdeYAppuWOjqPXQttXWIyFFYAnsO_UyHT2r6UaefeG-24zqwL8QihLp-vxb3t-ZGmDXQDUs7vdt9TDrwzaKvXbgT2as_-uUFVp-BMoKoqwO7gLoddH2I5mBWf2Xzjk05jYbWL9jzfWAxEpZkY7_-6ok2mRPgwf2GaOlCjtKz4pCdz88An5z7N3RF0mU5xv-DOvxiElRfZDttK2mAMnilvcACgP46OFmIO_vrxjMavjTzqavpQGh3m7YWPRPhphVkizAqsQn1Kki603gPcy_bVMM0IRfaGLiom1r46n649GOuYPNKTVocNpxrAJmuoMC2VHlVzxcJn6sUSMv_MrKUjdA5ZZwiUCrPPmtj8jW4GNVY8jLtwF70A6G2Llr4oTzR2-frNcouojrt67rnzRnxJzdgmGS6oyC1tIYBJBxgzni0C5XAYtWIlsaYjoxzEXCoIYXsANpN_F_K2xQMtZiFqiQlJ1mJ-aV0qMLGLGv5PODsUvKKVik9yl5Lk2Pn_QHEjXaAYsh7ZVA3nvnhTGZQy7cOkY0JgZxw3roxPB5KhnEjFlgq3HTUzilNhBGClLBXdqz264jQf7CwSYxtHfqRQ%3D%3D)
---
**We 're in 3,300 schools. **

**Thirteen percent of all high schools in America. **

**Eight states are now backing this effort to put a Club America chapter in every high school statewide. **

_That shouldn 't be possible. _

Not in this environment. Not with the level of hostility these students face every single day.

And yet... it's still happening.

_But Friend, here 's the part you need to understand: _

This is not a victory. It's a foothold.

_Because in the other 87% of schools? _

There is no resistance. None.

Just one-sided propaganda from the Left.

One-sided pressure on kids who are too young to even realize what's happening to them.

That's the reality.

The question isn't whether we're fighting. We are.

The question is whether it's enough.

Because right now, the students stepping up through Club America...

They're not the majority. _They 're the exception. _

They're the ones willing to take the heat.

The ones willing to stand alone.

The ones willing to risk being targeted just to say: _" I love this country." _
---
[](http://links.conservativesfordjt.com/u/click?_t=05b03ef2209247bcbdad7fd5099cd670&_m=25e9e0b45bb94e40a0d69778c6b9c33c&_e=uwDjwrZftO6ZclNvvTqzzIOlp_dAaNY0_g8wP_lanYs6gS-orJrzwbBfpq8v_jDiVVju-L2XCkW-VI-IVMlpyJxDwGoYHbe0h9ARkNZDEdGg-76CqXuosCaXKp9SlBuEVZdeYAppuWOjqPXQttXWIyFFYAnsO_UyHT2r6UaefeG-24zqwL8QihLp-vxb3t-ZGmDXQDUs7vdt9TDrwzaKvXbgT2as_-uUFVp-BMoKoqwO7gLoddH2I5mBWf2Xzjk0TZAj5TZKksx5PdYGdmrKTB5qdouoHAsWigBLkce1ye6zMlJMjShBfmxyf5L6ehcdr55ZN70m1o7JXy4qU4C_mT_2ynj5H7IooJZmQ1B4vn6rKNn9B8AesPapbGGpcq-brjHw63dW7SM89bIpJhdOeM9neXYMn5TrJn_QfbGhzGi_y4weavowPd_5HzaJFh3nFzzWo9XTOLdPDKoNmlorFzpzi_sXMsXVC24-vLdni1TF0BB2gemc8tfpDnUAvmayIaZhYYTLoCzZKVBcYUUPb8yDLoPpMZiUMdTtJr72LOQYNAPFvRFm9kQLQdUYX1JNvCRe5VBvEV2xZZP_fhO7nJjbyjDjqRndhNlusfyesmwdGc4XA7ljN4Dpg4_HOWy5HaYnQ9Jubk3wqZtHszEcyFzOeZZhNLIjnNXfjqBiojtA4aCQMovyQ0WucEyPipjdEgKMOvTICnArEgcGOIs9TA%3D%3D)

And every time one of those students raises their hand...

We have a choice.

Back them. _Or leave them on their own. _

**Because when a student starts a chapter, we send them an activism kit -- with American flags. Pocket Constitutions. Leadership tools. **

Everything they need to actually stand their ground.

Not symbolically. For real.

They've already made the decision to lead.

All they're waiting on... is you and me.

**Each activism kit costs $25. That 's it. **

$25 to make sure one student doesn't have to stand alone against the Left in a hostile school.

$25 to put real tools in their hands.

$25 to push back -- even if it's one campus at a time.

**[And Friend, I’m asking you to send backup to these brave students on the frontlines with your gift to Turning Point USA today.](http://links.conservativesfordjt.com/u/click?_t=05b03ef2209247bcbdad7fd5099cd670&_m=25e9e0b45bb94e40a0d69778c6b9c33c&_e=uwDjwrZftO6ZclNvvTqzzIOlp_dAaNY0_g8wP_lanYs6gS-orJrzwbBfpq8v_jDiVVju-L2XCkW-VI-IVMlpyJxDwGoYHbe0h9ARkNZDEdGg-76CqXuosCaXKp9SlBuEVZdeYAppuWOjqPXQttXWIyFFYAnsO_UyHT2r6UaefeG-24zqwL8QihLp-vxb3t-ZGmDXQDUs7vdt9TDrwzaKvXbgT2as_-uUFVp-BMoKoqwO7gLoddH2I5mBWf2Xzjk0fZ73mw3ERcGoePUn9no2rhJ2BlPNziKHbtGe5iWe8u6v_pJVsAhyYg5_tt5Qo4906_chy5QVYYTUWy-t7jz6srMjQ4YXFFs9vjVmLGgHyRXQbp2iD1P3srs8GZz2asobfqx66XG6WKuYxv2HBu5NDG3_fonc4NK8lyd3quilOw7BGQPCOOiYGb6B8HHVq6rZ1-0leJLtKiAPvD97CnDbf0U25w7P6f7342P8Ntplds00_AYKoF8lgzjjTi4cWDlqboNtkZ1xzJPDExXL1EqurZT_jc6AsFf1eu1espiQa-UMd1kKb0zDsmXCZRjHCsgTON1JuvXTHEeWk_uxSYjDkQifEiVlCkEDbXfxwkeLpxn2WALtbVPmtl-PxRnZGKd7oC3xSJKGIU1MjrpZcgliAI0mtTWeKAnVCX68wTc3zd25SVCrOKahYTQAslFfMWApOvyrL3vVXvgUGl9fuM_gbw%3D%3D)**

But here's what gives me hope, Friend...

Club America isn't slowing down. It's accelerating.

Because every day, more students are stepping forward.

Not because it's easy or popular...

_But because they know what 's at stake. _

They're starting chapters in schools where they were told not to.

They're speaking truth in classrooms where the Left once went unchallenged.

They're choosing courage in places designed to make them conform.

And they're not alone.

They're finding each other. They're bringing more students with them every day.

They're building something real -- rooted in faith and freedom, grounded in truth, and unafraid to say that America is worth defending.

That's how movements are built.

Not from the top down... _But from the ground up. _

One student. One school. One chapter at a time.

And Friend -- that's exactly how we take this country back.

But only if we move fast enough.

Because the Left isn't slowing down. They're not taking a break.

They're not afraid to push their anti-American ideas in every classroom they're in.

And if we don't match that urgency... if we don't meet that moment with equal conviction...

Then the generational window Charlie Kirk opened to save our country closes.

And once it closes... It closes for good.

That's what's at stake.

Let's not waste this moment. Let's back our brave students -- _while it still matters. _

**P.S.** I need you to hear this clearly...

Charlie Kirk wasn't just dreaming big when he called me last year about Club America's progress.

He was warning us:

"The enemy is moving younger. They're coming after students earlier. **_We don 't have time to wait._" **

And he was right. Look around.

Club America may be in 13% of high schools...

_But in the other 87%? _

There is no pushback against the Left.

No one telling those kids the truth.

Just a Leftist pipeline -- from classroom... to belief... to voting booth.

And once that pipeline is complete... _It 's over. _

**Friend, this is one of the last places a patriot like you can stop it before it 's too late to save our country. **

You may not be able to step into a hostile high school and stand for truth like these students do.

But you can give critical support to a young freedom fighter who will.

clean_body: Charlie didn’t say this lightly | | | | | Friend, I'm going to be blunt with you. We are closer to losing this country than most people are willing to admit. Not someday. Not "if things keep going this way." Right now. And the scariest part? It's not happening in Washington. It's happening in classrooms. High schools. Colleges. Places where the next generation is being shaped -- or more accurately... reshaped. If you've ever looked at what's coming out of our schools and thought: " What happened to this country?" You're not wrong. You're seeing it clearly. Because while most people are arguing online... while they're hoping things will turn around... while they're waiting for the next election to fix everything... The other side is doing something far more dangerous. They're raising the next generation. Earlier. Faster. And with zero resistance in most places. That's how countries are lost. Slowly. Then all at once. But here's the thing that should give a patriot like you hope... There is one place where that trend is actually being challenged. And it shouldn 't even exist. Just one year ago, Turning Point USA 's high school program -- which is now called "Club America" -- was in about 1,200 schools. That alone felt like a miracle. Because starting even ONE chapter today takes courage most adults don't have. Conservative students get mocked. Targeted. Threatened. Shut down. And yet... They stepped up anyway. About that time, Charlie called me. He didn't sound optimistic... He sounded urgent. "Andrew, we've got to move faster." I told him we were. He stopped me. "No. You're not thinking what I'm thinking. I want to be in 35,000 high schools." I actually laughed. "Charlie... there aren't even 35,000 high schools in America." "Okay," he said. "How many are there?" "About 27,000." And without hesitation: "Good. Let's do 27,000." I remember sitting there thinking to myself... we're barely in 1,200 schools. We didn't have the staff. We didn't have the infrastructure. We didn't even have the roadmap yet. But Charlie wasn't fazed. " We'll figure it out." That was him. He didn't wait for perfect conditions. Because he knew something most people don't want to face: If we wait... we lose everything. And now? Less than a year later... We 're in 3,300 schools. Thirteen percent of all high schools in America. Eight states are now backing this effort to put a Club America chapter in every high school statewide. That shouldn 't be possible. Not in this environment. Not with the level of hostility these students face every single day. And yet... it's still happening. But Friend, here 's the part you need to understand: This is not a victory. It's a foothold. Because in the other 87% of schools? There is no resistance. None. Just one-sided propaganda from the Left. One-sided pressure on kids who are too young to even realize what's happening to them. That's the reality. The question isn't whether we're fighting. We are. The question is whether it's enough. Because right now, the students stepping up through Club America... They're not the majority. They 're the exception. They're the ones willing to take the heat. The ones willing to stand alone. The ones willing to risk being targeted just to say: " I love this country." And every time one of those students raises their hand... We have a choice. Back them. Or leave them on their own. Because when a student starts a chapter, we send them an activism kit -- with American flags. Pocket Constitutions. Leadership tools. Everything they need to actually stand their ground. Not symbolically. For real. They've already made the decision to lead. All they're waiting on... is you and me. Each activism kit costs $25. That 's it. $25 to make sure one student doesn't have to stand alone against the Left in a hostile school. $25 to put real tools in their hands. $25 to push back -- even if it's one campus at a time. But here's what gives me hope, Friend... Club America isn't slowing down. It's accelerating. Because every day, more students are stepping forward. Not because it's easy or popular... But because they know what 's at stake. They're starting chapters in schools where they were told not to. They're speaking truth in classrooms where the Left once went unchallenged. They're choosing courage in places designed to make them conform. And they're not alone. They're finding each other. They're bringing more students with them every day. They're building something real -- rooted in faith and freedom, grounded in truth, and unafraid to say that America is worth defending. That's how movements are built. Not from the top down... But from the ground up. One student. One school. One chapter at a time. And Friend -- that's exactly how we take this country back. But only if we move fast enough. Because the Left isn't slowing down. They're not taking a break. They're not afraid to push their anti-American ideas in every classroom they're in. And if we don't match that urgency... if we don't meet that moment with equal conviction... Then the generational window Charlie Kirk opened to save our country closes. And once it closes... It closes for good. That's what's at stake. Let's not waste this moment. Let's back our brave students -- while it still matters. | | For Charlie, Andrew Sypher Chief Field OfficerTurning Point USA P.S. I need you to hear this clearly... Charlie Kirk wasn't just dreaming big when he called me last year about Club America's progress. He was warning us: "The enemy is moving younger. They're coming after students earlier. We don 't have time to wait." And he was right. Look around. Club America may be in 13% of high schools... But in the other 87%? There is no pushback against the Left. No one telling those kids the truth. Just a Leftist pipeline -- from classroom... to belief... to voting booth. And once that pipeline is complete... It 's over. Friend, this is one of the last places a patriot like you can stop it before it 's too late to save our country. You may not be able to step into a hostile high school and stand for truth like these students do. But you can give critical support to a young freedom fighter who will. There's still time to turn this country around... and this is one of the few ways we can actually do it -- one student, one school, one chapter at a time. 4940 East Beverly Road Phoenix, Arizona 85044

body:

Peter,

You’ve known me for a long time. You know that I am a firm believer in small, limited government and the "America First" agenda that puts hardworking families ahead of the DC swamp.

You also know that in my world, your word is your bond. Whether I’m fighting in the deep swamp or standing up for our constitutional rights, I follow through on my commitments. It’s a simple concept, but one that the radical Left seems to have abandoned years ago.

I’ve seen plenty of people come and go on Capitol Hill. Some are just there to warm a seat, and others—mostly across the aisle—are there for the wrong reasons entirely. But every so often, you meet a true patriot who is there to do the work. **Mike Carey is exactly that kind of leader.**

| [**ENDORSE MIKE CAREY >>**](http://links.freedomtrainalert.com/u/click?_t=2d4f229f156142619b4e4f956d2d65c9&_m=a9a811541d9a4a4c9dbf9288462b0e38&_e=wPSSkywJUn-rb4U8L7mvr9Z4nHwViEGBjSEgzOE5RkttaHYwJoQ_stkJRrPIAzV5QAcDo6AzRSogy2-AlpOhZMX1IK1hQeX-xVr-Yz31BEm8LG5nq-Zmrwk5JNkLas19aLnO53xOoN3BDofS0yo3sax1IMVOO0GXbaURZ_w5WmCDZHCEN29agIZOMoMC-Ny-pCxyVliVHgjrdSOHV2nNCq6HxCj_cWjFB4ByyklXY-yTK112PfHvSIL80xcdmAV2LGHqBQ0toJNB1wkwsCgMw6DLVTWMznVF37XjEeyTIxqnI9iqdTGlu-V64QH7BEkp44ee1fS1dO9kYv54U1WcjHDbHN2w9UWLrUMsK6gdBg3DaZsaLNg-AgsNZiddn-KOL3_PgQ5NbXFXbVJEMsODH9BlrKni4sraSVIDvRqbauSPFoNvei69uw48bkgwHiWtmXFwMDlX6tuFZfDypYzyzaPCJGS_g8bC2uXRzqD7qP_D6Fpo6dSPVWCKncGogyD-s5reIsfXA5lH1Autpp81RXwA5W81XlVqYb13OkB17pKgVZOIrh2V1lhQmyWg4iK3wBiN-67LRS-ikbkWlx0Jw_XQGhKMiqVfr046brMjDaobp6wxXfmPzDhlMfpfdO-bCGWADrJTwPiWIoTtlfeGe2-2_zJACTFpDl-nI_qsUYK3qPXh0iz1OZXLNGu_e8eDl28rkHDFy-w561vk_X0BQXoVkf48xzZuE4ZmifnZTMl-JtiMWGMzvPOmPnh7Q37n8jZxc7TqBvJ3-OnMPzGwrDsphZs-Ugdf8v25kDmqNo0%3D)
---

Mike isn't just a colleague; he’s a friend and a rock-solid conservative. As a veteran and a devoted family man, Mike understands the stakes of the fight we are in. He has been a critical partner of mine in Washington, working to dismantle the deep state and rein in the reckless spending that has squeezed the pockets of every Ohioan.

**We cannot afford to lose Mike’s voice in Congress.** While the media and the Democrats are pouring millions into Ohio to try and flip his seat, we need to make sure he has the resources to fight back. Investing in battleground districts like the 15th is the only way we protect our House majority and keep the momentum of the Trump administration moving forward.

[**STAND WITH MIKE CAREY >>**](http://links.freedomtrainalert.com/u/click?_t=2d4f229f156142619b4e4f956d2d65c9&_m=a9a811541d9a4a4c9dbf9288462b0e38&_e=wPSSkywJUn-rb4U8L7mvr9Z4nHwViEGBjSEgzOE5RkttaHYwJoQ_stkJRrPIAzV5QAcDo6AzRSogy2-AlpOhZMX1IK1hQeX-xVr-Yz31BEm8LG5nq-Zmrwk5JNkLas19aLnO53xOoN3BDofS0yo3sax1IMVOO0GXbaURZ_w5WmCDZHCEN29agIZOMoMC-Ny-pCxyVliVHgjrdSOHV2nNCq6HxCj_cWjFB4ByyklXY-yTK112PfHvSIL80xcdmAV2LGHqBQ0toJNB1wkwsCgMw6DLVTWMznVF37XjEeyTIxrOaGSFWpHKQvFRSsiKwev-iYGGiI8dKYW8nY23alhCkWzid4k3921cswTdVOpKIrZED5Hn06mA2PMFhmVoNDJSf06X2BClzFuOrTxCWWF2WxzrkHl6cdbFjsECxgiGE38XIBIUAc21yZ5hxJH5WO4fKD27DueEyVUtk3szndRPMVcQdz8ACybGEi-Y9Fid8x_gMRtXg1O2kEUSKGtSYT0DLIVWWYkAYJzT50iv1B98Qm4u0Gpg7QEFn6G4WsCcB46wQ2641-lDNhQU15UIITKHJX4USjmv92SRs6V2hnQmW_2rP61kuR0NhuAC74du0EofqpYuju8GMxYedwDpo6AvrllD-iQJLY5oUVy1bJjAj1CBRLgj3ggtXRePUwB5V8Pws6GmmD2-5lZ_e1LQuWU9jCOtCKIIqkioGLza58H8CPykSbJx8hqOVR2zDpUDCAzhSvWxwOisoT0TAtqSYZBFHVP_ASnFMHy51aEpOOFnweUAbvb3m8uT6rstVwvR3Es%3D)

clean_body: Can you spare a minute to let me tell you why it’s paramount that we keep fighters like Mike Carey in Washington? | Peter, You’ve known me for a long time. You know that I am a firm believer in small, limited government and the "America First" agenda that puts hardworking families ahead of the DC swamp. You also know that in my world, your word is your bond. Whether I’m fighting in the deep swamp or standing up for our constitutional rights, I follow through on my commitments. It’s a simple concept, but one that the radical Left seems to have abandoned years ago. I’ve seen plenty of people come and go on Capitol Hill. Some are just there to warm a seat, and others—mostly across the aisle—are there for the wrong reasons entirely. But every so often, you meet a true patriot who is there to do the work. Mike Carey is exactly that kind of leader. | Mike isn't just a colleague; he’s a friend and a rock-solid conservative. As a veteran and a devoted family man, Mike understands the stakes of the fight we are in. He has been a critical partner of mine in Washington, working to dismantle the deep state and rein in the reckless spending that has squeezed the pockets of every Ohioan. We cannot afford to lose Mike’s voice in Congress. While the media and the Democrats are pouring millions into Ohio to try and flip his seat, we need to make sure he has the resources to fight back. Investing in battleground districts like the 15th is the only way we protect our House majority and keep the momentum of the Trump administration moving forward. In a town full of talkers, Mike Carey is a doer. He doesn't back down, he doesn't flinch, and he never forgets who he represents. He asked me to reach out to my most trusted supporters—people like you—to help him cross the finish line. The Democrats want nothing more than to take back the House and stall our progress. With Mike Carey on the front lines, we won't let that happen. For liberty, Jim Jordan | | Paid for by Carey for Congress P.O. | | Lifе and death Son of Mykhailo Sulyma, Ivan came from a petty noble (szlachta) family. He was born in Rohoshchi (next to Chernihiv). He served as an estate overseer for Stanisław Żółkiewski and later the family of Daniłowicze who inherited his lands; for that service in 1620 he was awarded three villages: Sulimówka, Kuczakiw and Lebedyn. Аll the villages todаy belong to the Boryspil Raion, Kyiv Oblast. His sons included Stepan (died 1659), a captain of Boryspil company, and Fedir (died 1691), a colonel of Pereiaslav regiment. He became popular among the unregistered Cossacks, leading them on campaigns to plunder Crimea and other Ottoman vassal territories. For organizing a revolt on an Ottoman slave galley and freeing Christian slaves[1] he received a medal from Pope Paul V himself. Eventually, Sulyma reached the rank of the hetman, which he held from 1628 to 1629 and 1630 to 1635. In 1635, after returning from an expedition to Black Sea against the Ottomans, he decided to rebel against the Polish–Lithuanian Commonwealth, which at that time controlled most of the Cossack territories, and whose nobility was trying to turn militant Cossacks into serfs.[citation needed] Ivan Sulyma took part in numerous campaigns of Sagaidachny against Tatars and Turks. In particular, it was the famous capture of Kafa (modern Theodosia), the main center of the slave trade on the Black Sea, Trapezont, Izmail, and also two attacks on Tsaregrad. On the night of 3 to 4 August 1635 he took the newly constructed Kodak fortress by surprise, burning it and executing its crew of about 200 people under Jean Marion. Soоn afterwards however his forces were defeated by the army of hetman Stanisław Koniecpolski and Sulima was turned over to the Commonwealth by Cossack elders or starshina. Together with several other leaders of his rebellion, Hetman Sulyma was executed in Warsaw on 12 December 1635. At first, the Polish King Władysław IV Waza, known for his friendly attitude towards the Cossacks, was hesitant to execute Sulyma, especially since he was a person upon whom the Pope himself bestowed his medal. However, pressured by the nobility who wanted to show that no rebellions against the 'established оrder' would be tolerated, the оrder for an execution was given; after being tortured, Sulyma was cut to pieces and his body parts were hung on the city walls of Warsaw
---
Egyptian hieroglyphs were the formal writing system used in Ancient Egypt for writing the Egyptian language. Hieroglyphs combined logographic, syllabic and alphabetic elements, with some 1,000 distinct characters.[3][4] Cursive hieroglyphs were used for religious literature on papyrus and wood. The later hieratic and demotic Egyptian scripts were derived from hieroglyphic writing, as was the Proto-Sinaitic script that later evolved into the Phoenician alphabet.[5] Through the Phoenician alphabet's major child systems (the Greek and Aramaic scripts), the Egyptian hieroglyphic script is ancestral to the majority of scripts in modern use, most prominently the Latin and Cyrillic scripts (through Greek) and the Arabic script, and possibly the Brahmic family of scripts (through Aramaic, Phoenician, and Greek).[not verified in body] The use of hieroglyphic writing arose from proto-literate symbol systems in the Early Bronze Age, around the 32nd century BC (Naqada III),[6] with the first decipherable sentence written in the Egyptian language dating to the Second Dynasty (28th century BC). Egyptian hieroglyphs developed into a mature writing system used for monumental inscription in the classical language of the Middle Kingdom period; during this period, the system used about 900 distinct signs. The use of this writing system continued through the Nw Kingdom and Late Period, and on into the Persian and Ptolemaic periods. Late survivals of hieroglyphic use are found well into the Roman period, extending into the 4th century AD.[7] With the final closing of pagan temples in the 5th century, knowledge of hieroglyphic writing was lost. Although attempts were made, the script remained undeciphered throughout the Middle Ages and the early modern period. The decipherment of hieroglyphic writing was finally accomplished in the 1820s by Jean-François Champollion, with the help of the Rosetta Stone.[8] The number of words contained in al Ancient Egyptian (i.e. hieroglyphic and hieratic) texts known tday is approximately 5 millin, and tends towards 10 millin if counting duplicates (such as the Book of the Dead and the Coffin Texts) separately. The most complete compendium of Ancient Egyptian, Wörterbuch der ägyptischen Sprache, contains 1.5–1.7 millin words.[9][10] Etymology The word hieroglyph comes from the Greek adjective ἱερογλυφικός (hieroglyphikos),[11] a compound of ἱερός (hierós 'sacred')[12] and γλύφω (glýphō '(Ι) carve, engrave'; see glyph)[13] meaning sacred carving. The glyphs themselves, since the Ptolemaic period, were called τὰ ἱερογλυφικὰ [γράμματα] (tà hieroglyphikà [grámmata]) "the sacred engraved letters", the Greek counterpart to the Egyptian expression of mdw.w-nṯr "god's words".[14] Greek ἱερόγλυφος meant "a carver of hieroglyphs".[15] In English, hieroglyph as a noun is recorded from 1590, originally short for nominalized hieroglyphic (1580s, with a plural hieroglyphics), from adjectival use (hieroglyphic character).[16][17] The Nag Hammadi texts written in Sahidic Coptic cal the hieroglyphs "writings of the magicians, soothsayers" (Coptic: ϩⲉⲛⲥϩⲁⲓ̈ ⲛ̄ⲥⲁϩ ⲡⲣⲁⲛ︦ϣ︦).[18]

Elon Musk's SpaceX has confidentially filed for IPO with the U.S. SEC.| | | Don't want to receive our publications? | | | Lifе and death Son of Mykhailo Sulyma, Ivan came from a petty noble (szlachta) family. He was born in Rohoshchi (next to Chernihiv). He served as an estate overseer for Stanisław Żółkiewski and later the family of Daniłowicze who inherited his lands; for that service in 1620 he was awarded three villages: Sulimówka, Kuczakiw and Lebedyn. Аll the villages todаy belong to the Boryspil Raion, Kyiv Oblast. His sons included Stepan (died 1659), a captain of Boryspil company, and Fedir (died 1691), a colonel of Pereiaslav regiment. He became popular among the unregistered Cossacks, leading them on campaigns to plunder Crimea and other Ottoman vassal territories. For organizing a revolt on an Ottoman slave galley and freeing Christian slaves[1] he received a medal from Pope Paul V himself. Eventually, Sulyma reached the rank of the hetman, which he held from 1628 to 1629 and 1630 to 1635. In 1635, after returning from an expedition to Black Sea against the Ottomans, he decided to rebel against the Polish–Lithuanian Commonwealth, which at that time controlled most of the Cossack territories, and whose nobility was trying to turn militant Cossacks into serfs.[citation needed] Ivan Sulyma took part in numerous campaigns of Sagaidachny against Tatars and Turks. In particular, it was the famous capture of Kafa (modern Theodosia), the main center of the slave trade on the Black Sea, Trapezont, Izmail, and also two attacks on Tsaregrad. On the night of 3 to 4 August 1635 he took the newly constructed Kodak fortress by surprise, burning it and executing its crew of about 200 people under Jean Marion. Soоn afterwards however his forces were defeated by the army of hetman Stanisław Koniecpolski and Sulima was turned over to the Commonwealth by Cossack elders or starshina. Together with several other leaders of his rebellion, Hetman Sulyma was executed in Warsaw on 12 December 1635. At first, the Polish King Władysław IV Waza, known for his friendly attitude towards the Cossacks, was hesitant to execute Sulyma, especially since he was a person upon whom the Pope himself bestowed his medal. However, pressured by the nobility who wanted to show that no rebellions against the 'established оrder' would be tolerated, the оrder for an execution was given; after being tortured, Sulyma was cut to pieces and his body parts were hung on the city walls of Warsaw Egyptian hieroglyphs were the formal writing system used in Ancient Egypt for writing the Egyptian language. Hieroglyphs combined logographic, syllabic and alphabetic elements, with some 1,000 distinct characters.[3][4] Cursive hieroglyphs were used for religious literature on papyrus and wood. The later hieratic and demotic Egyptian scripts were derived from hieroglyphic writing, as was the Proto-Sinaitic script that later evolved into the Phoenician alphabet.[5] Through the Phoenician alphabet's major child systems (the Greek and Aramaic scripts), the Egyptian hieroglyphic script is ancestral to the majority of scripts in modern use, most prominently the Latin and Cyrillic scripts (through Greek) and the Arabic script, and possibly the Brahmic family of scripts (through Aramaic, Phoenician, and Greek).[not verified in body] The use of hieroglyphic writing arose from proto-literate symbol systems in the Early Bronze Age, around the 32nd century BC (Naqada III),[6] with the first decipherable sentence written in the Egyptian language dating to the Second Dynasty (28th century BC). Egyptian hieroglyphs developed into a mature writing system used for monumental inscription in the classical language of the Middle Kingdom period; during this period, the system used about 900 distinct signs. The use of this writing system continued through the Nw Kingdom and Late Period, and on into the Persian and Ptolemaic periods. Late survivals of hieroglyphic use are found well into the Roman period, extending into the 4th century AD.[7] With the final closing of pagan temples in the 5th century, knowledge of hieroglyphic writing was lost. Although attempts were made, the script remained undeciphered throughout the Middle Ages and the early modern period. The decipherment of hieroglyphic writing was finally accomplished in the 1820s by Jean-François Champollion, with the help of the Rosetta Stone.[8] The number of words contained in al Ancient Egyptian (i.e. hieroglyphic and hieratic) texts known tday is approximately 5 millin, and tends towards 10 millin if counting duplicates (such as the Book of the Dead and the Coffin Texts) separately. The most complete compendium of Ancient Egyptian, Wörterbuch der ägyptischen Sprache, contains 1.5–1.7 millin words.[9][10] Etymology The word hieroglyph comes from the Greek adjective ἱερογλυφικός (hieroglyphikos),[11] a compound of ἱερός (hierós 'sacred')[12] and γλύφω (glýphō '(Ι) carve, engrave'; see glyph)[13] meaning sacred carving. The glyphs themselves, since the Ptolemaic period, were called τὰ ἱερογλυφικὰ [γράμματα] (tà hieroglyphikà [grámmata]) "the sacred engraved letters", the Greek counterpart to the Egyptian expression of mdw.w-nṯr "god's words".[14] Greek ἱερόγλυφος meant "a carver of hieroglyphs".[15] In English, hieroglyph as a noun is recorded from 1590, originally short for nominalized hieroglyphic (1580s, with a plural hieroglyphics), from adjectival use (hieroglyphic character).[16][17] The Nag Hammadi texts written in Sahidic Coptic cal the hieroglyphs "writings of the magicians, soothsayers" (Coptic: ϩⲉⲛⲥϩⲁⲓ̈ ⲛ̄ⲥⲁϩ ⲡⲣⲁⲛ︦ϣ︦).[18] | | | | | It's official. Biggest IPO in history. But before you go out and load up on as many SpaceX shares as you can ... Know this: ... And most people have no idea it exists. All rights reserved. 1735 N Lynn St, Suite 500, Arlington, VA 22209-2016 Lifе and death Son of Mykhailo Sulyma, Ivan came from a petty noble (szlachta) family. He was born in Rohoshchi (next to Chernihiv). He served as an estate overseer for Stanisław Żółkiewski and later the family of Daniłowicze who inherited his lands; for that service in 1620 he was awarded three villages: Sulimówka, Kuczakiw and Lebedyn. Аll the villages todаy belong to the Boryspil Raion, Kyiv Oblast. His sons included Stepan (died 1659), a captain of Boryspil company, and Fedir (died 1691), a colonel of Pereiaslav regiment. He became popular among the unregistered Cossacks, leading them on campaigns to plunder Crimea and other Ottoman vassal territories. For organizing a revolt on an Ottoman slave galley and freeing Christian slaves[1] he received a medal from Pope Paul V himself. Eventually, Sulyma reached the rank of the hetman, which he held from 1628 to 1629 and 1630 to 1635. In 1635, after returning from an expedition to Black Sea against the Ottomans, he decided to rebel against the Polish–Lithuanian Commonwealth, which at that time controlled most of the Cossack territories, and whose nobility was trying to turn militant Cossacks into serfs.[citation needed] Ivan Sulyma took part in numerous campaigns of Sagaidachny against Tatars and Turks. In particular, it was the famous capture of Kafa (modern Theodosia), the main center of the slave trade on the Black Sea, Trapezont, Izmail, and also two attacks on Tsaregrad. On the night of 3 to 4 August 1635 he took the newly constructed Kodak fortress by surprise, burning it and executing its crew of about 200 people under Jean Marion. Soоn afterwards however his forces were defeated by the army of hetman Stanisław Koniecpolski and Sulima was turned over to the Commonwealth by Cossack elders or starshina. Together with several other leaders of his rebellion, Hetman Sulyma was executed in Warsaw on 12 December 1635. At first, the Polish King Władysław IV Waza, known for his friendly attitude towards the Cossacks, was hesitant to execute Sulyma, especially since he was a person upon whom the Pope himself bestowed his medal. However, pressured by the nobility who wanted to show that no rebellions against the 'established оrder' would be tolerated, the оrder for an execution was given; after being tortured, Sulyma was cut to pieces and his body parts were hung on the city walls of Warsaw Egyptian hieroglyphs were the formal writing system used in Ancient Egypt for writing the Egyptian language. Hieroglyphs combined logographic, syllabic and alphabetic elements, with some 1,000 distinct characters.[3][4] Cursive hieroglyphs were used for religious literature on papyrus and wood. The later hieratic and demotic Egyptian scripts were derived from hieroglyphic writing, as was the Proto-Sinaitic script that later evolved into the Phoenician alphabet.[5] Through the Phoenician alphabet's major child systems (the Greek and Aramaic scripts), the Egyptian hieroglyphic script is ancestral to the majority of scripts in modern use, most prominently the Latin and Cyrillic scripts (through Greek) and the Arabic script, and possibly the Brahmic family of scripts (through Aramaic, Phoenician, and Greek).[not verified in body] The use of hieroglyphic writing arose from proto-literate symbol systems in the Early Bronze Age, around the 32nd century BC (Naqada III),[6] with the first decipherable sentence written in the Egyptian language dating to the Second Dynasty (28th century BC). Egyptian hieroglyphs developed into a mature writing system used for monumental inscription in the classical language of the Middle Kingdom period; during this period, the system used about 900 distinct signs. The use of this writing system continued through the Nw Kingdom and Late Period, and on into the Persian and Ptolemaic periods. Late survivals of hieroglyphic use are found well into the Roman period, extending into the 4th century AD.[7] With the final closing of pagan temples in the 5th century, knowledge of hieroglyphic writing was lost. Although attempts were made, the script remained undeciphered throughout the Middle Ages and the early modern period. The decipherment of hieroglyphic writing was finally accomplished in the 1820s by Jean-François Champollion, with the help of the Rosetta Stone.[8] The number of words contained in al Ancient Egyptian (i.e. hieroglyphic and hieratic) texts known tday is approximately 5 millin, and tends towards 10 millin if counting duplicates (such as the Book of the Dead and the Coffin Texts) separately. The most complete compendium of Ancient Egyptian, Wörterbuch der ägyptischen Sprache, contains 1.5–1.7 millin words.[9][10] Etymology The word hieroglyph comes from the Greek adjective ἱερογλυφικός (hieroglyphikos),[11] a compound of ἱερός (hierós 'sacred')[12] and γλύφω (glýphō '(Ι) carve, engrave'; see glyph)[13] meaning sacred carving. The glyphs themselves, since the Ptolemaic period, were called τὰ ἱερογλυφικὰ [γράμματα] (tà hieroglyphikà [grámmata]) "the sacred engraved letters", the Greek counterpart to the Egyptian expression of mdw.w-nṯr "god's words".[14] Greek ἱερόγλυφος meant "a carver of hieroglyphs".[15] In English, hieroglyph as a noun is recorded from 1590, originally short for nominalized hieroglyphic (1580s, with a plural hieroglyphics), from adjectival use (hieroglyphic character).[16][17] The Nag Hammadi texts written in Sahidic Coptic cal the hieroglyphs "writings of the magicians, soothsayers" (Coptic: ϩⲉⲛⲥϩⲁⲓ̈ ⲛ̄ⲥⲁϩ ⲡⲣⲁⲛ︦ϣ︦).[18] | | | First Invеstmеnt Updаtеs brоught tо уоu bу Іnception Media, LLC. name: Katie Porter
subject: Would they ask a man that question?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Katie Porter for Governor 2026
body:
# [](https://act.katieporter.com/go/21486?t=1&akid=41314%2E3422442%2EAbR3yn)
[](https://act.katieporter.com/go/21531?c0=em_ms_kp_20260510_1_ak.-xBowP&refcode=em20260510-41314&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=3&akid=41314%2E3422442%2EAbR3yn)
Peter,
When I first ran for Congress, I was a single mom with three young kids. A lot of people asked me how I was going to do it.
And honestly, sometimes I wondered: **Would they ask a man that question?**
But I knew most people meant well. They understood something real: Moms like me were _already exhausted_ from raising kids, working hard, and trying to make ends meet. So how could someone possibly add running for Congress on top of all that?
The truth is— _that’s exactly why I decided to run._
I wanted to bring the experiences of working parents and struggling families with me to Washington. And when I got there, I became the first single mom of school-aged kids ever elected to Congress.
I used that experience to fight for issues too many politicians overlook, like affordable child care, lower costs, and fighting for working families.
And yet, even now, one of my opponents **[questioned my parenting](https://act.katieporter.com/go/22132?t=4&akid=41314%2E3422442%2EAbR3yn)** on the debate stage this week. _It’s disappointing, but it’s also a reminder of the double standards moms in leadership still face every day._
**Now, I’m running to be California’s next governor because families are still being squeezed every single day.** And I know firsthand what it feels like to juggle bills, responsibilities, and the pressure of trying to hold everything together.
So in honor of Mother’s Day, I’m asking: **[Can you chip in a few bucks to help power this campaign? Every donation helps us reach more voters and fight for California families.](https://act.katieporter.com/go/21531?c0=em_ms_kp_20260510_1_ak.-xBowP&refcode=em20260510-41314&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=5&akid=41314%2E3422442%2EAbR3yn)**
[Donate ›››](https://act.katieporter.com/go/21531?c0=em_ms_kp_20260510_1_ak.-xBowP&refcode=em20260510-41314&t=24&akid=41314%2E3422442%2EAbR3yn)
Thank you,
Katie

Katie is running to be California’s next governor because California and our country need a leader who will stand up to Trump to lower costs, protect our rights, and combat climate change. **[Donate ›››](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/kp4g-em-footer?refcode=em20260510-41314&amounts=&t=25&refcode2=41314_3422442_AbR3yn&akid=41314%2E3422442%2EAbR3yn)**

# **Fake News reporter asks Trump a very DUMB question - What he does next is unbelievable...**
President Donald Trump **[fired back at an ABC News reporter](https://substack.com/redirect/d8ba1056-27cf-4f14-b542-05e5d484f07e?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)** for challenging why he is focussing on restoring Washington D.C.'s monuments like the Reflecting Pool amid the ongoing war with Iran.
## [Watch Trump put this reporter in her place: ](https://substack.com/redirect/d8ba1056-27cf-4f14-b542-05e5d484f07e?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
[](https://substack.com/redirect/d8ba1056-27cf-4f14-b542-05e5d484f07e?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
"This is one of the worst reporters, she's with ABC Fake News and she's a horror show!" Trump sounded off, not holding back.
"Beauty made our country great! A question like that is a disgrace to our country!" he continued.
[Click To Watch Video](https://substack.com/redirect/d8ba1056-27cf-4f14-b542-05e5d484f07e?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)

# **Trump vows to seize Iran 's nuclear material, says Space Force monitoring facilities 24/7**
President Donald Trump told "Full Measure with Sharyl Attkisson" Sunday that **[confiscating Iran's enriched uranium remains his top priority,](https://substack.com/redirect/a870419a-515a-4d3f-9ed8-593110191ef2?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)** saying "We have it surveilled" through Space Force technology so advanced "if somebody walked in, they can tell you his name, his address, the number of his badge."
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/a870419a-515a-4d3f-9ed8-593110191ef2?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
* **Trump warned** that if anyone approached the facilities "we will know about it, and we'll blow them up," while acknowledging he's weighed but not yet approved a risky ground-troop deployment to physically remove the material.

* **Netanyahu says nuclear work "not over" despite June bombing campaign**: Israeli PM Benjamin Netanyahu told CBS's "60 Minutes" that while Operation Midnight Hammer struck three major Iranian nuclear sites in June, "there's still nuclear material--enriched uranium--that has to be taken out of Iran" and "you go in, and you take it out." Iran claimed during negotiations to still possess enough material for 11 nuclear weapons if fully enriched, according to special envoy Steve Witkoff.
* **Trump: Iran "militarily defeated" but negotiations difficult**: The president told Attkisson that Iran has "no navy," "no air force," "no anti-aircraft weaponry," "no radar," and their leadership's "A-Team is gone, the B-team is gone, and part of the C-team is gone," claiming if the US left today "it would take them 20 years to rebuild." However, Trump acknowledged negotiating challenges because Iran tends to "make a deal, and then they break it."

* * *
# **Spencer Pratt reverses criticism of CBS after network posts full mayoral campaign interview**
Former "The Hills" star an LA mayor candidate Spencer Pratt **[praised CBS](https://substack.com/redirect/be167fbc-f2f3-4286-b3fd-fba00e71d4db?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)** Friday for posting the complete version of his interview online, writing "A new era of responsible journalism!" and thanking the network--a dramatic reversal from Thursday when he accused CBS of creating a "hit piece" by editing an hour-long interview filmed at his destroyed Pacific Palisades home into a five-minute segment. Pratt had claimed Thursday the footage was "turned over to Karen Bass' PR team to edit" and vowed CBS would "never get a word from me for my next 8 years as mayor."
[| | | | | Spencer Pratt
---
@spencerpratt
A new era of responsible journalism! Thank you to CBS for posting our full interview so the voters can hear from their next Mayor!
| | | | | CBS News @CBSNews
---|---|---
FULL INTERVIEW: Los Angeles mayoral candidate Spencer Pratt spoke exclusively to CBS News this week about his campaign, his vision for the city, and why it's resonating so strongly with voters on social media.
| 8:08 PM * May 9, 2026 * 634K Views699 Replies * 7.06K Reposts * 39K Likes
---](https://substack.com/redirect/91aa2e49-93bf-47e2-a6ed-ea5e6bf03995?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
* **Pratt alleged CBS coordinated with Bass campaign after fact-checking incident** : The independent LA mayoral candidate claimed CBS changed its coverage approach after fact-checking Mayor Karen Bass during a debate about the Palisades Fire, writing "After CBS embarrassed Karen Bass by fact-checking her debate lies about the Palisades Fire, they clearly got the call." CBS later published the extended interview after Fox News Digital reported on Pratt's complaints, with a production source saying no outside parties were involved in editing.
* **CBS interview questioned Pratt 's political inexperience in Democratic stronghold**: Correspondent Adam Yamaguchi asked Pratt "Why should voters believe that you, who don't have any experience in [the political] realm, can actually be the solution?" in the heavily Democratic-voting city. Pratt defended his candidacy by arguing current leaders have failed to deal with ongoing crises, responding "I may not have the experience, but I have the common sense to say, 'This is not working.'"

Dear Friend,

Have you ever wondered how the earliest Christians worshiped and prayed, endured persecution and hardship, and defended their faith in the Roman Empire?
[](http://links.newsletter.conservativedirect.com/s/c/pHoYqL8ad5VLycTrnEkj1Ps6F0gLJp17zdbNRSOJc8gk3CX8lspJLLObVuornbxuxRweVK-5uotBCmB51ZTP38UhaIfv10Thyv435nBGmRjMmfZAdzUB4aBZifEJ6-1CCs-2o01OVH4FgwXNl6tlWFRDeDOk5dAhF1UoWRnK6e4FGM6H9l343-lplmtHdviAzdVwi4gfOjfy-iFYfhhYc-iBc_5MaIM5B9HMSCgyh0waHZY52ZxfK2MrvYM-irwTf-Z7cqlGEX8_OdTjT-0kwayH--8aqWk0bIIdc4RgrdNHnrEfi8h2G3WG1S7pfFa0K0vhw7hz9ra_yqDyJPVBNtSppxjubM6q1q1gSVabjABgaOaRnYLmQ8F6gjs1RP1YpRnq8erCbTT0v6e2F_w4r1l1nb_u864U-n5vn8GVzkIejkk7X6dRhHiVtmf1zFPXmouZXZ4A8NysmyHCXT5CYLK2RmOJN5H8ffNupsTcbDIhiY5aYv9xnE-J40UNknD5pu2SPmG0zkLLOTJxawYy-FwZVTBfftKzg5bjL_cvlKtKbq-Z_MWI2ZkLskcrZc-nED6p2nr0spYKiCccfc96KFyCMBWxj4K1ZY2ZSwa1Y5MGT2TXOTmUkMOgfpaH5MXStEUpDefgtI9gLQCTq4tBaWsqXC9JcXO4mSambqcEaIjnuTUbp-fVvCwAFqWWgvuSVsLk9w_LVJGaZEifyUiVwNMU7ZVC2EooZ9ErpydedlJjne-3GFNTxnTp_SfuVaRWU0kBFFsl-qNdktHJwFB-8NLcOU2CuPUgN-LRqQKG7O1doxuHzAT00j9wNw/mu_3iuONMYUnwQs7M8EJdOhhVYTgednJ/20)
Beyond reading the New Testament and some of the stories of early Christian martyrs, it was daunting to figure out how to proceed. I always got lost in foreign names and locations, and the complicated history of Imperial Rome. The result was a large gap in my understanding of how the Christian faith took shape and spread from Jesus' ministry, to the Apostles, through the age of Constantine.

Do you have the same issue?

**Now you can explore these stories in Hillsdale College 's course, "Ancient Christianity," available on DVD and sent to you at no cost.** All you have to do is complete the form using the secure link below. There's no cost or obligation-your DVD is 100% free to you.

In this course, Professor Kenneth Calvert will guide you through the first four centuries of Christianity, showing how the faith survived persecution and ultimately transformed the Roman Empire.

**Click the secure link below to request your FREE DVD box set of the course "Ancient Christianity" today:**

[https://info.hillsdale.edu/hillsdale-colleges-free-ancient-christianity-dvd](http://links.newsletter.conservativedirect.com/s/c/F2S7c3NLJSR_2iHOlrivmd_dES_2fszu8GsMp0MfkpTqseExWQzSOBBQeNSALCI3TvHMeqwQz4Fd21Ib30xy5qlRjF-fJlXgnkeXC6_0SxDb8ljmm2n5pLzF2SWt0X7vS5UOGhVPRPuyLqZYPUoIM32shvk3vY0C3IFEWZp6MIRH9QRoRTrxHwopH52sD3QF9EHrp4WZaeQkJ1vCrzRyj_eR8_V-fUau-LRSc1spq73gMbT699boaSC8ITzMSjFvLrZUdkQS1u44OgD8xqzYSWGGFpGgRncO9l1AK1N1e0owXYvga7qAYYjclZQzaoF3uBScC5UVB6eiEEJheomAsivrGNjU0AudVGb4oAnP2FTBwQfa85WBM7npGuGJro4WJHOG_1jZbD9mSfGgV1Bo7y23pZ5TFAmii0lS_9DWuu89ib8X1h0Ukq8Yg5m7rzch8cf0nFvuskfGUcQvBOCYSUXoBjJjzE9Qb9fWyzQksZ7sClr8WFiO72zdrnJ6ZckYRCGMmP9qX-pQcOvq0EPNOZ9Q_o51XqYLYP0QYzvEsEQuDtqpZBRnLErkWpV_UAnH3N1sDYDQOYQLxm11cCvg6mpHxRT1F5MMjTPv0W7et-cVq4VWT53Nw10NmadJ5DOUCvcTF2UV4xilYIVRHRHbWgm05las-0gKq1ljwPDeGmdw4sW58HOEmgNyB4ZZsWLmiJMyfenV6jwvkDLbhczxj8gFwaunNvb0QwMEveswYeFp46JuPA31dj-yX4u3BM3J-wB6fsv9LUNbtzJtPBgfRQoQMaxC388ZlNQRXCshiVRwUv4Pc8aCmO7MiA/1iZEbxVZIvoQQxqWD4NK3SvNGuz2NLTS/20)

---

| [](https://substack.com/redirect/dc8a580f-0afa-4f21-9c39-121698c9993e?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
We are living through an assassination culture. Three recent attempts on a single public figure are not random. They are the predictable endpoint of a decade of poisoned rhetoric, sloppy reporting, and public figures who trade outrage for clicks. When people are fed anger as news, some of them will act on it. That is not a theory. That is a fact.

It shouldn't be lost on anyone that the latest assassination attempt on President Donald Trump was in a room full of media personalities and journalists who, for 10 years, stoked hate, falsely reported, and, in some cases, irresponsibly promoted violence against the president.
[Share](https://substack.com/app-link/post?publication_id=6729589&post_id=197063338&utm_source=substack&utm_medium=email&utm_content=share&utm_campaign=email-share&action=share&triggerShare=true&isFreemail=true&r=1hvr60&token=eyJ1c2VyX2lkIjo5MDUwMTE5MiwicG9zdF9pZCI6MTk3MDYzMzM4LCJpYXQiOjE3Nzg0MzI1OTQsImV4cCI6MTc4MTAyNDU5NCwiaXNzIjoicHViLTY3Mjk1ODkiLCJzdWIiOiJwb3N0LXJlYWN0aW9uIn0.A1fKeDObhm7zNQIk4MdMpf48jjGbdlerA1t9uu_uEnA)
The reckless, unrelenting, and quite careless 'journalism' of political activism lost its integrity years ago.

Paid-for talking heads on cable news networks, whether conservative or progressive programming, not only help create a deep divide in America, but as we saw in Butler, Pa, Trump's golf course in Florida, and Saturday night at the White House Correspondents Dinner, they have created killers who are seen as heroes by half the country.

Donald Trump calls it 'fake news.' At the very least, reporting is no longer objective, but rather speculative. Sparse facts intertwined with strong opinions perpetuate what can only be called a big lie, and the very best lies are mostly true. The MSM have become professional in that tactic. Early reporting is sloppy, and based on a need for speed and sensationalism, while truth and facts get lost.
[Upgrade to paid](https://substack.com/redirect/2/eyJlIjoiaHR0cHM6Ly9oZWFydGxhbmRqb3VybmFsLnN1YnN0YWNrLmNvbS9zdWJzY3JpYmU_.CcG-k-MPd9xiUqxH9NqxdqNsxQ4BpizRyxlw1LG3Z7c?&utm_medium=email&utm_source=subscribe-widget&utm_content=197063338)
In the ballroom at the DC Hilton Saturday night was CNN's Kaitlin Collins, who went on the air live to report. With no corroboration of a report from one secret service member to her, she proclaimed that there was confirmation of one person dead. It didn't happen. Luckily, no one died, but it was too late. Social media was abuzz about one person confirmed dead.

MSM and Democrat politicians famously repeated lies for a decade. From Russian Collusion, Charlottesville, Nick Sandman, J6 Insurrection, to Trump is a Nazi. Saturday night, Congresswoman Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez posted that she was glad Trump was ok. My colleague, Matt Palumbo, pointed out the hypocrisy of that. AOC called Trump a Nazi for years, and he suggests it's like AOC saying, "I'm glad Adolf Hitler is ok."

The Right and Republicans have their share of half-truths and lies as well. A quick example of that is the IRS hiring 87,000 agents with guns. That story was rampant on social media for years and even repeated by Donald Trump and most Republican politicians. It wasn't true, never was.

The 2022 Inflation Reduction Act doubled IRS spending from $40 billion to $80 billion to hire 87,000 new IRS employees. That number of 87,000 came from a 2021 report by the Treasury Department on what $80 billion could accomplish for the IRS. Democrats and Republicans for years said the IRS was understaffed and the 87,000 new employees were to be hired over a 10-year period, not all at once.

In reality, the IRS had plans to hire 10,000 employees in 2023 and 20,000 in 2024, which barely kept up with attrition from retirements and people quitting. For years, the IRS had around 90,000 employees, and even with the additions in the Inflation Reduction Act, it never had more than 100,000 employees. A net gain of 10,000, not 87,000.

Mainstream outlets have a responsibility they are not meeting. Corrections get buried. Sensational takes travel faster than the truth. When reporters chase the scoop before they confirm basic facts, they create the space where conspiracy thrives. The result is a country where every violent act spawns a hundred wild theories and millions of enraged witnesses who never saw a thing.

There is a political current driving this. Radicalization lives on the left as well as the right. It grows where institutions profit from grievance. Organizations that benefit from labeling and amplifying threats will find ways to keep those threats alive. This is not victim-blaming. It is calling out an industrial incentive that markets anger.

We must demand accountability from the press. We must stop celebrating anonymous outrage designed to sell subscriptions and garner clicks. We must stop normalizing talk that treats violence as entertainment or moral proof. Politicians must choose plain speech over poison.

Everyone is guilty, but who will take responsibility and change course?

If America is to survive this turbulent stretch, we need repair, not revenge. We need institutions that reward truth and leaders who model restraint. Angry Americans have reasons to be furious. That fury must be directed by civic muscle, not by people who profit from chaos. This can only change with leaders who will stop lying and by the people insisting on durable reforms to media, education, home and community.

Editorial comments expressed in this column are the sole opinion of the writer

body:
| I just gave my team the green light to launch a major digital ad push.
---
_You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. We need your support to continue fighting for our democracy. We love having you in our network, but if you only want our most important email updates,[click here.](https://act.blueampaction.com/go/108?t=2&akid=2233%2E259176%2E7rYbcE) If you'd like to unsubscribe, [click here.](https://act.blueampaction.com/go/109?t=3&akid=2233%2E259176%2E7rYbcE)_

[](https://act.blueampaction.com/go/10889?source=LOC_EM_FR_2026.05.10_Dunn-Digital-Ads_B3_F1_S1_C1_90AC-365DON_N-T1&t=4&akid=2233%2E259176%2E7rYbcE) Peter, I'm going to ask you to make a critical donation to help us close a real gap in our budget — but first, let me explain: Our campaign runs digital ads constantly. It's one of the most effective ways we can compete. Those ads put our message directly in front of persuadable voters in every corner of our district – voters we might not reach otherwise. The problem? _A single week of digital ads in a competitive House district can cost $10,000 or more._ And national Republicans can afford a hell of a lot more ads than we can. They have **$300 MILLION** sitting in the bank, ready to spend in districts exactly like ours — flooding voters' feeds with misinformation while we scramble to keep up. So I made a call. I met with my team and greenlit a major new digital ad push... _even though the money wasn't in the budget._ [**But now, we need to come up with $15,000 to close the gap that decision created, and I need your help to do it. Can I count on you to split a few dollars between my campaign and Blue Amp Action before 11:59 p.m.?**](https://act.blueampaction.com/go/10889?source=LOC_EM_FR_2026.05.10_Dunn-Digital-Ads_B3_F1_S1_C1_90AC-365DON_N-T1&t=5&akid=2233%2E259176%2E7rYbcE) _If you've saved payment information with ActBlue Express, your split donation to Harry Dunn and Blue Amp Action will go through immediately:_ | [DONATE $10 >>](https://act.blueampaction.com/go/10890?source=LOC_EM_FR_2026.05.10_Dunn-Digital-Ads_B3_F1_S1_C1_90AC-365DON_N-T1&t=6&akid=2233%2E259176%2E7rYbcE)

But if we don't close this funding gap, we may have to pull those ads entirely. I don't want to go dark. Not now. Not when we're this close.

name: Emma Lenz
subject: Welp, we’ve gone viral
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the California Democratic Party | www
body:
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cdp-footer?refcode=header&amount=5 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cdp-footer?refcode=header&amount=5]
Well, we’ve done it again! We’ve gone viral.
I’m Emma Lenz, the Communications Director here at CADEM, and I spend my time fighting to get our message out across all channels to everyday Californians.
I am excited to share that we just had a post on X reach over 750,000 people. Take a look:
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cdp-may26?refcode=&amount= [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cdp-may26?refcode=&amount=]Here at the California Democratic Party, we are committed to getting our message out far and wide because Californians need to know that Democrats are fighting to protect immigrant communities, make life more affordable and ensure opportunity is within reach for everyone.
And as it turns out, far-right conservative influencers were pretty angry about the effectiveness of this punchy tweet and have resorted to attacking us in the comments in return.
Honestly? That tells us we struck a nerve.
Republicans and MAGA influencers are used to dominating social media spaces with misinformation, outrage, and attacks against Democrats. So when California Democrats break through the noise with messaging that reaches and resonates with people, they panic.
But we are not backing down.
We are going to keep investing in digital organizing, rapid response communications and online messaging that cuts through Republican propaganda and reaches voters where they are. Because in modern campaigns, winning the information fight is just as important as knocking doors and making phone calls.
Our communications work takes resources. Every viral post, rapid response video, graphic, online organizing push and digital campaign requires staff, tools and investment to compete with the massive right-wing media machine.
Will you rush a donation right now to help CADEM continue fighting back online and reaching millions of voters with the truth? [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cdp-may26?&refcode=&amount=]
CHIP IN $ >> [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cdp-may26?&refcode=&amount=]

CHIP IN $ >> [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cdp-may26?&refcode=&amount=]
CHIP IN $ >> [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cdp-may26?&refcode=&amount=]Thank you so much for helping us get our message out. We’re proud to be in this fight with you!
- Emma
Communications Director
CADEM.org

DONATE » [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cdp-footer?refcode=&amount=20.24]
Our Democratic leaders are working hard to make California a better place to live. From fighting for good-paying jobs, combating climate change, to expanding healthcare access so all Californians can lead safe, healthy, prosperous lives — California’s Democratic leaders turn progressive ideas into meaningful action.

From Maine to North Carolina, Georgia to Michigan, we need the resources to compete with the GOP’s money machine and support Democratic candidates across the board.
