name: Andrew Sypher, Turning Point USA
subject: If you’ve been losing hope, read this
body:
But I want to tell you something that might just change how you feel about the future of this country...

| | | [](https://email.updates.conservativeinnovation.com/c/eJyUkUGOnTAMhk8TdjwlMYTHgkXVJ6QuZrZdIpM4YBUSShKq3r5iOheYnWV__iT7__k2vSFvHJZ33GmwF09nmtj_jeWimShsMXFY1njQSegmLbWpZVsreXOqcoN1BnRFg-q6ZwNGya5aB-l9a5VxPXQE0iLMDpzUpJ7UIyFUPNwm2SqpnlI1-jHPoD2Y3juSRlorGlkOh5nSw8aQ6Lww80UcQryrGB427tU2rDkfScA3oUehx0S2nPTAQC7mmxB6zOUMHJb6iBxyXRIKPXZ96-e2o7qnHuqGHNY9EdTon963pMgQChhTLKelyUZHAl7ff7wrCbpVQpuS92knx2UX8KIdefts_l8R8FrxdJh-TWh_f44s7gfyEgS88lESTmgzX5z2j69W5-COP7xtnEwnGrnc0o8j89djuQb9LwAA__9Y_p1G)
---
| | Friend,
---
If you ever doubted we could win America's youth back from the Left...

If you ever wondered whether we'd lost the next generation for good...

If you ever sat up at night -- watching the news, seeing what's happening in our schools, our culture, our country -- and thought, _" Is it already too late?" _

You're not alone.

A lot of good people have been asking the same question.

**But I want to tell you something that might just change how you feel about the future of this country... **

Just one year ago, Turning Point USA's high school program -- which is now called "Club America" -- was in about 1,200 schools.

That was no small feat.

Starting a single chapter today takes serious courage. Students get mocked. Threatened. Investigated. Sometimes even physically attacked.

So reaching 1,200 chapters already felt like a miracle.

_Then Charlie called me... _

He said: "Andrew, I love what we're doing with our high school program -- but we've got to move faster."

I told him, "We are."

Charlie replied, "No you're not thinking what I'm thinking... I want to be in 35,000 high schools."

I laughed. I told him, "Charlie, there aren't even 35,000 high schools in America."

"Okay," he said, "How many are there?"

"About 27,000."

Without skipping a beat, Charlie said, "Okay, great. Let's do 27,000!"
I'll be honest -- I froze.

We didn't have the numbers. We didn't have the staff. We didn't have the roadmap yet.

But he wasn't fazed.

He said, "Don't worry. We'll figure it out. We'll do it together."

That was Charlie.

He didn't think small. He didn't move slow. He didn't settle for "maybe someday."

He believed in going now.

And he believed that if the mission was right, the path would reveal itself.

He chased what others only dreamed about... and turned what others thought impossible into reality.

That's why he built Turning Point USA in the first place.

That's why tens of thousands of students were inspired by Charlie to start chapters of their own -- _many in schools where they were explicitly told not to. _

**And that 's why today -- less than a year later -- we're not in 1,200 schools anymore: **
---

He wasn't just dreaming big -- he was issuing a warning.

When he told me we needed to move faster, he added: "The enemy is moving younger. They're coming after students earlier. _**We don 't have time to wait.**_**" **

And he was right.

The Left has deeply embedded themselves in our schools -- rewriting history, poisoning young minds, and raising their next generation of radical foot soldiers.

We may be in 13% of our schools now...

_But in the other 87%? _

The Left has free rein. Zero resistance. No voice to challenge them.

And if we don't flood those schools with truth -- fast -- we'll have a generation that thinks loving America is "fascist," that faith is "hateful," and that freedom and free speech is "dangerous."

You know it. I know it. Charlie knew it.

He knew the fight for America's future would be won or lost in high school classrooms and on college campuses.

And that fight has never been more urgent than it is right now.

**Friend, if you 've ever wondered whether one small act could change the direction of our country -- _this is it._ **

You may not be able to step into a hostile high school and stand for truth like these students do.

But you can send them the tools to do it.

These students are ready. They've raised their hands. They chose courage and decided to lead.

All they're waiting on... is us.

And you'll be saving our country -- one future freedom fighter at a time.

Just one year ago, Turning Point USA's high school program -- which is now called "Club America" -- was in about 1,200 schools. That was no small feat. Starting a single chapter today takes serious courage. Students get mocked. Threatened. Investigated. Sometimes even physically attacked. So reaching 1,200 chapters already felt like a miracle. Then Charlie called me... He said: "Andrew, I love what we're doing with our high school program -- but we've got to move faster." I told him, "We are." Charlie replied, "No you're not thinking what I'm thinking... I want to be in 35,000 high schools." I laughed. I told him, "Charlie, there aren't even 35,000 high schools in America." "Okay," he said, "How many are there?" "About 27,000." Without skipping a beat, Charlie said, "Okay, great. Let's do 27,000!" I'll be honest -- I froze. We didn't have the numbers. We didn't have the staff. We didn't have the roadmap yet. But he wasn't fazed. He said, "Don't worry. We'll figure it out. We'll do it together." That was Charlie. He didn't think small. He didn't move slow. He didn't settle for "maybe someday." He believed in going now. And he believed that if the mission was right, the path would reveal itself. Happy Mother's Day, Peter!

This Mother's Day, we're celebrating all the incredible moms out there—including our very own Dr. Kim Schrier.

Motherhood looks different for everyone, but at its core, it's about showing up day after day, caring for others, and handling so much that often goes unseen. It's the kind of work that keeps families and communities going, even when it goes unrecognized.

Kim brings that same care to everything she does, as your Congresswoman, as a mom, and as a pediatrician.

She's seen firsthand how much families are juggling, and she fights every day to make things a little easier for everyone—from lowering costs to protecting access to care and building a better future clean_body: Happy Mother's Day, Peter! This Mother's Day, we're celebrating all the incredible moms out there—including our very own Dr. Kim Schrier. Motherhood looks different for everyone, but at its core, it's about showing up day after day, caring for others, and handling so much that often goes unseen. It's the kind of work that keeps families and communities going, even when it goes unrecognized. Kim brings that same care to everything she does, as your Congresswoman, as a mom, and as a pediatrician. She's seen firsthand how much families are juggling, and she fights every day to make things a little easier for everyone—from lowering costs to protecting access to care and building a better future for the next generation. | Thank you, Team Schrier Rep. Kim Schrier is a doctor, scientist, and mom, fighting for Washington's 8th District in Congress. This is one of the most competitive districts in the country, so we need your help to keep Kim in Congress. Chip in now to help protect Kim's seat. = Paid for by Dr. Kim Schrier for Congress Contributions or gifts to Dr. Kim Schrier for Congress are not tax deductible. Dr. Kim Schrier for Congress PO Box 2728 Issaquah, WA 98027 United States

name: Seth Moulton
subject: Time to put egos aside.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Seth for Massachusetts Checks may also be mailed to:
body:
This is how you get things done.

| |
---
Team, Here's something nobody in Washington talks about: **the American people overwhelmingly support both campaign finance reform and term limits.** Both – not either or. Democrats support campaign finance reform but won't touch term limits. Republicans support term limits but won't go near campaign finance reform. So nothing happens. Both sides protect their own turf, and the American public gets screwed. [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/131147492/620091295/2090747700?refcode=260510_sm_reform_img&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjUvMS83NDc1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1MDAwMzEwZC05YjRjLWYxMTEtOGVmMi0wMDBkM2ExNGI2NDAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=9i-MkBJpOEjgOJIi51EG38x5WMuX0d2wIq8OEJyfTO8=) Here's my idea: pair them together. A grand bargain. Each side eats a little crow, and the country gets something it's been asking for for decades. Campaign finance reform and term limits in one package, taken care of by one vote. Would it be uncomfortable for a lot of people in Congress? Absolutely. That's kind of the point. The government works for the people, not the other way around. And it might be the first time in decades that Congress actually does something to raise its own esteem with the public. This is the kind of thing I will fight for in the Senate. Not the same partisan back-and-forth that keeps both sides comfortable and the country stuck. subject: How would you rate the performance of Pam Bondi as Attorney General?

body:
Voter Action Project [https://voteractionproject.org/]
You are invited to join our one-click issue response poll.
For data integrity purposes, please do not complete this survey if your email address is not dpwillis67@gmail.com .
Team: Former Attorney General Pam Bondi was fired by Trump after about a year in office, and we want to know how voters feel about her job performance now that she's gone.
Bondi was described by the Associated Press as a " loyalist who upended the Justice Department’s culture of independence from the White House, oversaw large-scale firings of career employees and moved aggressively to investigate the Republican president’s perceived enemies ." Trump named Deputy Attorney General Todd Blanche, one of his former personal lawyers, as the new acting attorney general.
We're looking to see how our supporters feel about her job performance. Please take our quick survey:
Team: Do you approve of the job Pam Bondi did as AG?
By clicking a response below your answer will be automatically recorded:

Integrity First Voter Action Project is dedicated to expanding ballot access and increasing voter participation across the country.
Since the Supreme Court gutted key provisions in the Voting Rights Act, extreme politicians have taken advantage to pass harsh laws that restrict access to the ballot box. These restrictions particularly affect disadvantaged communities and people of color. It’s our goal to bring awareness to these laws wherever they may crop up and organize voters to take action to ensure the right to vote is available to everyone in their states and communities.
Your support is crucial to our efforts. Will you donate today to help us protect voting rights? [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/integrity-first-voter-action-project-1?refcode=051026_1&amount=20]

name: Marie Gluesenkamp Perez (personal)
subject: Mother's Day
body:
| | Peter, Mother’s Day is a sweet day I look forward to, but it’s also deeply complicated for many of _us_.

For me, motherhood has been full of beautiful moments and difficult decisions. Like deciding to bring our infant son to the shop because we couldn't afford daycare, and making sure he had health insurance when we couldn't afford it for ourselves.

_And that’s exactly the point._

Pregnancy, childbirth, parenting, medical complications for moms or kids, childcare bills, rent, groceries, work schedules - all of it is deeply personal. No politician in D.C. can understand every family’s situation from a committee room.

That’s why I keep fighting to protect our families right to privacy and freedom by standing in the way of reckless overreach like national abortion bans. It’s why I’m working to make childcare easier to find and afford - especially in rural communities like ours. It’s why I’m pushing for better maternal health care and real support for parents, especially moms, and newborns.

**Families don’t need more judgment from politicians. They need room to make their own choices, and they need a government that actually helps. That’s why I ran for Congress and it’s why I keep fighting every day.**

**This Mother’s Day, I’m reaching out to ask from one mom to another:[Will you help me keep fighting for moms and families across the nation?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/131147851/620092503/-20305907?amount=10&refcode=MGP_EM_FR_260510_1_1&refcode2=1fce4b91-9c4c-f111-8ef2-000d3a14b640&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzMvMS85NTkyOCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxZmNlNGI5MS05YzRjLWYxMTEtOGVmMi0wMDBkM2ExNGI2NDAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Okuds-MeNggcwKtrx0BKyuP4gGnICVI4EONpEELeWAU=)**

The attacks on our rights, our privacy and reproductive freedom are coming faster and faster. I’m going to stand in their way but we need an army to stop them. [**Are you with me?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/131147859/620092520/-20305907?amount=10&refcode=MGP_EM_FR_260510_1_1&refcode2=1fce4b91-9c4c-f111-8ef2-000d3a14b640&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzMvMS85NTkyOCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxZmNlNGI5MS05YzRjLWYxMTEtOGVmMi0wMDBkM2ExNGI2NDAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Okuds-MeNggcwKtrx0BKyuP4gGnICVI4EONpEELeWAU=)

clean_body: | | Peter, Mother’s Day is a sweet day I look forward to, but it’s also deeply complicated for many of us. For me, motherhood has been full of beautiful moments and difficult decisions. Like deciding to bring our infant son to the shop because we couldn't afford daycare, and making sure he had health insurance when we couldn't afford it for ourselves. And that’s exactly the point. Pregnancy, childbirth, parenting, medical complications for moms or kids, childcare bills, rent, groceries, work schedules - all of it is deeply personal. No politician in D.C. can understand every family’s situation from a committee room. That’s why I keep fighting to protect our families right to privacy and freedom by standing in the way of reckless overreach like national abortion bans. It’s why I’m working to make childcare easier to find and afford - especially in rural communities like ours. It’s why I’m pushing for better maternal health care and real support for parents, especially moms, and newborns. Families don’t need more judgment from politicians. They need room to make their own choices, and they need a government that actually helps. That’s why I ran for Congress and it’s why I keep fighting every day. This Mother’s Day, I’m reaching out to ask from one mom to another:= The attacks on our rights, our privacy and reproductive freedom are coming faster and faster. I’m going to stand in their way but we need an army to stop them. = = If you’ve stored your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will process immediately. | | = | = | = | = | = | = Thanks and Happy Mother’s Day. Marie | | | = | Marie Gluesenkamp Perez is a fifth-generation Washingtonian, a small business owner and a pro-choice mother. As the representative for Washington’s third Congressional District, she's working to bring the voices of working people back to DC. Marie works for Washington! = Email is an important way to stay in contact but if you feel like you’re receiving too much, to only receive the most important messages. ** Paid for by MGP Victory Fund, a joint fundraising committee authorized by Marie for Congress, Washington State Democratic Central Committee, and Timber PAC. Peter, I typed and re-typed this message 5 or 6 times before hitting send... There’s so much to say, and it’s difficult to find all the words. I put everything into my last message - _**but it fell flat. **_ In a way, I feel like this is the text God called me to send. So I’m trusting that these words will inspire you. Peter, this is Rep. Brandon Gill and at 29 years old, I decided to run for Congress where I became the youngest House Republican. **[I never imagined that just a few years later, I’d be sending a final message like this one pleading for your help.](http://links.conservativeum.com/s/c/E_UMdDwQD7lJg6Mu56ZDNmwLVvPqa1bCWmtti0R0emI9LjrT7NjQTlO4J6OhOtOY1H33Ef2JePoZ8AEIEZ-YvcuKqWWfN2oFNM2an6nRxJPYLo4QWcz8EeRTgoGl7RXqxYgEL10IBlIFu2H5BtGShI3bs6BbeKq5gZxY50FzQmB-XcIxUdwmvutdjvCKNxpgrDKjgSRnbdSFG-HiCnbTclzaE2xxu5pJoxnlK3fBCKyJALt6lq_JzxxYoXTCGlEx7mQ1ksThbRS32rZEj-LJ4_WgU94CsBFX12_mv1LQOs6XB9Z5t-srAreDY31SxjfVvr1WjZBSGWarPkGQi_dbxbPN0qCB2Zos5Rm_abwUF8T21gpU50pk2qJhBHyC5PHsChxuJyoX0Rzd8OFUNCBNBYBb4Rt9OCoH8kBtSiYWV-7dQ9wJPsqeg0nGomJeUOI51eHkYFlSil9wzghMXqLzcX3fWIyrppN3-83BmH1GUn9ev-Jypg8NwbAiZxHoD-l53-ed2R3t9jD77USfyRr5NAMLxG13Vxe0yAHMHm_Z-47_66h0lXoBYu6Zg19nQS-R3BCy0l9uf5DYoYLsy0U6ZwYJmxxDMOLi1oCR1njQqbk5nlr-gOsxXWXL6MyVdOK8JuV5WZYlGnQ9DyzfVC23Ju7gxDCLaayLQQOW69GUJvgmNgQOL9PIMYrUQA_q3PoWZDHKj7nEMyqMGVnCXcEo8TJgGI8ZKQyj6UHefV_MpF8UW0pNZTVnGqM0v42ElPEIBNPWNPPdkAX1SqVC48lvA_RSn671MwTc2DUsmZeDIuPisb1OpA/cc3nKzbWHDxxfiwx2ucFUB9wsfU_PP5g/20)** You could say I prefer the simple things in life. I grew up on a cattle ranch and television isn’t my pastime. Being a husband and a father are the two most important things in my life. Sometimes, when I'm holding my kids I feel like I'm holding the whole world in my arms. **They are the wind in my sails when it comes to the mission I’ve committed my life & career to. ** And at the end of my life, I want to sit before the Father almighty and declare that I did all I could to leave this great country better off than it was when I grew up. _**[Nothing – I repeat – nothing is more important to me than fighting off the vicious leftist attacks against the soul of our country.](http://links.conservativeum.com/s/c/nUjwGvyJaeT8voXGL6o5REDpCR9mbdqoKd7nc2XlT8ffXOViDB9_OZ9m5I1vFiDR28R-Fa5K6M4yxMGMXElijE3BRuw5cgoCf5ez2uskMNokVwVp1M7DoIXvCDmI4H131aW09zw_sUeSpRdooSkWxqppFH6q7C8ptFnQOmP9WhSbXS7LqUWYNhO0gOjymRIL3LW3HgbD2ovChfTZfhlufdz-oGNrVOhLN_1Gvksgl3jhMPDUrIhPU0Kvvwk2zBQw9ZiGvroaHaqYFDnt1gGbPuKQuOQnkcs0BRNtFWX_dSx_A9gS7jrYU9q6xOvpJfXfrL5OW5hssdRtm9xOESSF3hdQn-4E0xKuwVifSQpmQ9LmxhSEM8d-bHmpeimsF5Nb4HP8nEJ3X6WHd2BN-vnbIyIuPqUJfMGIklv3Uo1UCZ9lFivDJj3jtivhmrffYP8OvvhUXLcSEStgFJsLdXAbeCcIdm7LtRn7v6A9EUrIODeab24OVCWRIhGr3aaDlL0cfwQ2-pjn-N5tDCo8mxjnr2pcxBS76GBWuFOr5tXynuUaXrk-OaZ1rFO1vatRPwmsIGFlqmqFaAZcLsWiC2oJxseYVdGZEQPVB8eZFYbFo83AzlS_zNq2e9gyR_S3rUbngKEKjxwOi3LeJ2wxigFARGqv--XQU0CP_kePx4G4UU8EfAvtfYPZiScyFaaWMto19MalP5Luth9jdavO7De6tw3WS59zPqh6IAArXIrBtUcDb3sKFlgX3XRMsJmYZtBLQGUNlrziEtvmCF_f5_DljMxdHQA1UqipXf3lWpd-PjYlVAFn8A/677twfm1JU4lwWlzmLvraOyXGoCBio0C/20)**_ The left hates you, they hate your vote, and they hate MAGA for putting America First. name: Andrew Sypher, Turning Point USA
subject: If you care about America, read this first
body:
I debated sending this... until now| | | [](http://links.americanlibertyalert.com/u/click?_t=3c9a9e018cb54768aae32f693c7987c9&_m=861becafe45e44c9b9561507424b8736&_e=8Clm_STOjOZgo4mCakSAIa2RL5p40G4l5b41sELG6Ryk603hjvpMCnSii3cu3WlhsiNpqR3aHn0COV9U0WsgOt57UDP2U5hdOsXgm6aIuFLR9pN4NlD0E1PnvXgu4pdcuTVCJeWq6kVJ27D6HaDVOL6A5mug9R6axLEOerxqD5A4sjCkCorkDs0FGa1k5LFc1HHdnS_4KKD_JUU_fmkS0hFNdHquV0Ly2wlhEohWC7R28jtdZmouDg0s5Y9jFXQh-AVPPavHfZtpuRuIPv___H_d-J53awOCNc83oYSEf9CUAvSFaTU1Xu8cKhVdZiB80EDsscMIip5BpKt6GhFJoK6ob0xccgOMLF3hHVK3w26M9xttS8VjjkU0WClu3XsWDleRq3y6gV46G1fxVctDGtFrAxSHdPfJIpdqJCNVSRrv1m3vpAOJev7gJqX81wxsPau_HCT1uemR2R7vNDexPP5RJoC4Ajaoglvl9wx8tWqMxXf6SGh9TUUWTsaYhGiGjpSt1jLH3qFYNpd9xLuzCA82yZUYMb1IhoEj1gEWy1gmag2mpRfqNg1nvSclacj8pARxQfUMl8GX6lEZxQNM8C0gWPI0A0Faimu5ztVb1Z673FB512ADOySO7zGj4nP2GHW2Ajltfebfxk97-F0tJSdScW3hV8CrWjTx5dgPPrSJGtp3_5imwTPGySBounh4u1dam9z4UXTX_GBtcfkO0w%3D%3D)
---
| | Patriot,
---
I'm going to be blunt with you.

We are closer to losing this country than most people are willing to admit.

Not someday. Not "if things keep going this way."

Right now.

And the scariest part?

It's not happening in Washington. It's happening in classrooms.

High schools. Colleges.

Places where the next generation is being shaped -- or more accurately... reshaped.

If you've ever looked at what's coming out of our schools and thought: _" What happened to this country?" _

You're not wrong. You're seeing it clearly.

Because while most people are arguing online... while they're hoping things will turn around... while they're waiting for the next election to fix everything...

The other side is doing something far more dangerous.

They're raising the next generation.

Earlier. Faster. And with zero resistance in most places.

That's how countries are lost.

Slowly. Then all at once.

But here's the thing that should give a patriot like you hope...

There is one place where that trend is actually being challenged.

_And it shouldn 't even exist. _

**Just one year ago, Turning Point USA 's high school program -- which is now called "Club America" -- was in about 1,200 schools.**
That alone felt like a miracle.

Because starting even ONE chapter today takes courage most adults don't have.

Conservative students get mocked. Targeted. Threatened. Shut down.

And yet...

_They stepped up anyway. _

About that time, Charlie called me.

He didn't sound optimistic... He sounded urgent.

"Andrew, we've got to move faster."

I told him we were. He stopped me.

"No. You're not thinking what I'm thinking. I want to be in 35,000 high schools."

I actually laughed.

"Charlie... there aren't even 35,000 high schools in America."

"Okay," he said. "How many are there?"

"About 27,000."

And without hesitation: "Good. Let's do 27,000."

I remember sitting there thinking to myself... we're barely in 1,200 schools.

We didn't have the staff. We didn't have the infrastructure. We didn't even have the roadmap yet.

But Charlie wasn't fazed.

_" We'll figure it out." _

That was him.

He didn't wait for perfect conditions.

Because he knew something most people don't want to face: If we wait... _we lose everything. _

And now?

Less than a year later...
---
[](http://links.americanlibertyalert.com/u/click?_t=3c9a9e018cb54768aae32f693c7987c9&_m=861becafe45e44c9b9561507424b8736&_e=8Clm_STOjOZgo4mCakSAIa2RL5p40G4l5b41sELG6Ryk603hjvpMCnSii3cu3WlhsiNpqR3aHn0COV9U0WsgOt57UDP2U5hdOsXgm6aIuFLR9pN4NlD0E1PnvXgu4pdcuTVCJeWq6kVJ27D6HaDVOL6A5mug9R6axLEOerxqD5A4sjCkCorkDs0FGa1k5LFc1HHdnS_4KKD_JUU_fmkS0hFNdHquV0Ly2wlhEohWC7R28jtdZmouDg0s5Y9jFXQhGWL3qyQcxWhyW3q_AQ7J7edMyhfeZp9y1H0ucYWN7XlzTqedefXB3cUNRHhrm2QWLrfNDeCuhfLlKRhXFrT8aKsxjei72zT7Ul0FT8XcFRrzydgdIEX-pHUZ5V7kJdz7_8ShlAzzO2AyeUSrrOpvtoO1r2EgzLZJdiPH7Qq73emA7XREGD30xNNLNclaz2Ztypbz2aZ4H1WuUAeesc2PUTvIsMx0XFQxFZN7ECi3A4mzHOBP7p0wLsfEA-R-ffw7SJMmjOnbwz4st1XZlNECGvQzISw5WsIau-1GFMBYS884Q3PXddk3aeUiO-jFuMCDMeAdRMMQxncrLSng56Z_iq5OZpZLnUmMSSkA1AZZMWhLe44sxlOLitIAtsnyDpJLUNMUCS2nJUHWubWSswax7MxNgv2jamVyovnElqH7rNf5ffei1uU_dssGvCDIVcEMNxS3eHhLa-tlO0juKJAWpA%3D%3D)
---
**We 're in 3,300 schools. **

**Thirteen percent of all high schools in America. **

**Eight states are now backing this effort to put a Club America chapter in every high school statewide. **

_That shouldn 't be possible. _

Not in this environment. Not with the level of hostility these students face every single day.

And yet... it's still happening.

_But Patriot, here 's the part you need to understand: _

This is not a victory. It's a foothold.

_Because in the other 87% of schools? _

There is no resistance. None.

Just one-sided propaganda from the Left.

One-sided pressure on kids who are too young to even realize what's happening to them.

That's the reality.

The question isn't whether we're fighting. We are.

The question is whether it's enough.

Because right now, the students stepping up through Club America...

They're not the majority. _They 're the exception. _

They're the ones willing to take the heat.

The ones willing to stand alone.

The ones willing to risk being targeted just to say: _" I love this country." _
---
[](http://links.americanlibertyalert.com/u/click?_t=3c9a9e018cb54768aae32f693c7987c9&_m=861becafe45e44c9b9561507424b8736&_e=8Clm_STOjOZgo4mCakSAIa2RL5p40G4l5b41sELG6Ryk603hjvpMCnSii3cu3WlhsiNpqR3aHn0COV9U0WsgOt57UDP2U5hdOsXgm6aIuFLR9pN4NlD0E1PnvXgu4pdcuTVCJeWq6kVJ27D6HaDVOL6A5mug9R6axLEOerxqD5A4sjCkCorkDs0FGa1k5LFc1HHdnS_4KKD_JUU_fmkS0hFNdHquV0Ly2wlhEohWC7R28jtdZmouDg0s5Y9jFXQhLsjMqzFG2XfSzW_e2pBiqyOX-d5b0xwSB8UkhZzzJVLKWLE8lCXKzDdTAUwh1ceWreKPgRQtk1EzrlZqjW2L85rtWrnqgJRzmtCaWXsXxIgF9D2PRx0OD3dYVWwsfuCvT3zLWlCmAvlgR9rubKnl4fXyRgumtVwPHxxU-W2GxkczUVLi76f2YgdY3luI-Lc4C8ylH1PQSzCdhPqALmh3jvY9_rTazlO4BZMhx2zpqJcPchKXXByJdcwOa-5410qyALbKGmpUds_VTLPpKqk4F1Z6CvpImWdyyio6Wdbb2b41uJIy_2X8ldt0XXJ5-vNplQhpKpcNMF-LSAbTvQy30bPd_u21HebPXTduIAfTmgIq8zevndAaFtHbaQKUgCEaftOZgFjdYep-_FKJTl025R6N3oGkFdir9-Y8QvAkeiVcVUEFWBHAX-QJlPG3x2ZWgRwvcUJpiL7aBDYj7eThYA%3D%3D)
---
And every time one of those students raises their hand...

We have a choice.

Back them. _Or leave them on their own. _

**Because when a student starts a chapter, we send them an activism kit -- with American flags. Pocket Constitutions. Leadership tools. **

Everything they need to actually stand their ground.

Not symbolically. For real.

They've already made the decision to lead.

All they're waiting on... is you and me.

**Each activism kit costs $25. That 's it. **

$25 to make sure one student doesn't have to stand alone against the Left in a hostile school.

$25 to put real tools in their hands.

$25 to push back -- even if it's one campus at a time.

**[And Patriot, I’m asking you to send backup to these brave students on the frontlines with your gift to Turning Point USA today.](http://links.americanlibertyalert.com/u/click?_t=3c9a9e018cb54768aae32f693c7987c9&_m=861becafe45e44c9b9561507424b8736&_e=8Clm_STOjOZgo4mCakSAIa2RL5p40G4l5b41sELG6Ryk603hjvpMCnSii3cu3WlhsiNpqR3aHn0COV9U0WsgOt57UDP2U5hdOsXgm6aIuFLR9pN4NlD0E1PnvXgu4pdcuTVCJeWq6kVJ27D6HaDVOL6A5mug9R6axLEOerxqD5A4sjCkCorkDs0FGa1k5LFc1HHdnS_4KKD_JUU_fmkS0hFNdHquV0Ly2wlhEohWC7R28jtdZmouDg0s5Y9jFXQhgvVpk70aPHcX_EsLdFoPJrJpZbFBYarApXWAiR0q2Y4ij2asr8YPZEo3m1WM1QZoSKxInGb5vVOnW8MAFwpCXEOikfCz-fqFAYdjTkNRsOG7CDlPTgcaSWSQ5LKJ8FNkoFyRiPKzGQsj4IVGT_yy2LeN57Gcf6nQ5ABA_Yetv8MeKXrazPI0s_sY1ZXmtFBPrODc0c_3Li9A9MY3DQXtD9X8PEfGuEcXNrkDzykFTzRAnI4JXyOMyJbx_2SUOvR0nSJW0ff_1qzP3AtiRHF5mRrRCdbeprJm-H-cpb9-qPzej8fh1E6PxMaAa3CmB70pPCNpmfS3qZP1-raepPJS5-c5Rb-u9Gp9guZPh3mYK_pomdXGmJrXA58VH4ND8bCGwidyum70NWzn6lfvCRzpmQV22Y1PPHpEGkhBHnSFV-Gi2-3Dp9K6zbxQUBsez0UD1Z3ZGRDbOby42E8N8xP_cg%3D%3D)**

Charlie Kirk wasn't just dreaming big when he called me last year about Club America's progress.

No one telling those kids the truth.

Just a Leftist pipeline -- from classroom... to belief... to voting booth.

And once that pipeline is complete... _It 's over. _

**Patriot, this is one of the last places a patriot like you can stop it before it 's too late to save our country. **

clean_body: I debated sending this... until now| | | | | Patriot, I'm going to be blunt with you. We are closer to losing this country than most people are willing to admit. Not someday. Not "if things keep going this way." Right now. And the scariest part? It's not happening in Washington. It's happening in classrooms. High schools. Colleges. Places where the next generation is being shaped -- or more accurately... reshaped. If you've ever looked at what's coming out of our schools and thought: " What happened to this country?" You're not wrong. You're seeing it clearly. Because while most people are arguing online... while they're hoping things will turn around... while they're waiting for the next election to fix everything... The other side is doing something far more dangerous. They're raising the next generation. Earlier. Faster. And with zero resistance in most places. That's how countries are lost. Slowly. Then all at once. But here's the thing that should give a patriot like you hope... There is one place where that trend is actually being challenged. And it shouldn 't even exist. Just one year ago, Turning Point USA 's high school program -- which is now called "Club America" -- was in about 1,200 schools. That alone felt like a miracle. Because starting even ONE chapter today takes courage most adults don't have. Conservative students get mocked. Targeted. Threatened. Shut down. And yet... They stepped up anyway. About that time, Charlie called me. He didn't sound optimistic... He sounded urgent. "Andrew, we've got to move faster." I told him we were. He stopped me. "No. You're not thinking what I'm thinking. I want to be in 35,000 high schools." I actually laughed. "Charlie... there aren't even 35,000 high schools in America." "Okay," he said. "How many are there?" "About 27,000." And without hesitation: "Good. Let's do 27,000." I remember sitting there thinking to myself... we're barely in 1,200 schools. We didn't have the staff. We didn't have the infrastructure. We didn't even have the roadmap yet. But Charlie wasn't fazed. " We'll figure it out." That was him. He didn't wait for perfect conditions. Because he knew something most people don't want to face: If we wait... we lose everything. And now? Less than a year later... We 're in 3,300 schools. Thirteen percent of all high schools in America. Eight states are now backing this effort to put a Club America chapter in every high school statewide. That shouldn 't be possible. Not in this environment. Not with the level of hostility these students face every single day. And yet... it's still happening. But Patriot, here 's the part you need to understand: This is not a victory. It's a foothold. Because in the other 87% of schools? There is no resistance. None. Just one-sided propaganda from the Left. One-sided pressure on kids who are too young to even realize what's happening to them. That's the reality. The question isn't whether we're fighting. We are. The question is whether it's enough. Because right now, the students stepping up through Club America... They're not the majority. They 're the exception. They're the ones willing to take the heat. The ones willing to stand alone. The ones willing to risk being targeted just to say: " I love this country." And every time one of those students raises their hand... We have a choice. Back them. Or leave them on their own. Because when a student starts a chapter, we send them an activism kit -- with American flags. Pocket Constitutions. Leadership tools. Everything they need to actually stand their ground. Not symbolically. For real. They've already made the decision to lead. All they're waiting on... is you and me. Each activism kit costs $25. That 's it. $25 to make sure one student doesn't have to stand alone against the Left in a hostile school. $25 to put real tools in their hands. $25 to push back -- even if it's one campus at a time. But here's what gives me hope, Patriot... Club America isn't slowing down. It's accelerating. Because every day, more students are stepping forward. Not because it's easy or popular... But because they know what 's at stake. They're starting chapters in schools where they were told not to. They're speaking truth in classrooms where the Left once went unchallenged. They're choosing courage in places designed to make them conform. And they're not alone. They're finding each other. They're bringing more students with them every day. They're building something real -- rooted in faith and freedom, grounded in truth, and unafraid to say that America is worth defending. That's how movements are built. Not from the top down... But from the ground up. One student. One school. One chapter at a time. And Patriot -- that's exactly how we take this country back. But only if we move fast enough. Because the Left isn't slowing down. They're not taking a break. They're not afraid to push their anti-American ideas in every classroom they're in. And if we don't match that urgency... if we don't meet that moment with equal conviction... Then the generational window Charlie Kirk opened to save our country closes. And once it closes... It closes for good. That's what's at stake. Let's not waste this moment. Let's back our brave students -- while it still matters. | | For Charlie, Andrew Sypher Chief Field OfficerTurning Point USA P.S. I need you to hear this clearly... Charlie Kirk wasn't just dreaming big when he called me last year about Club America's progress. He was warning us: "The enemy is moving younger. They're coming after students earlier. We don 't have time to wait." And he was right. Look around. Club America may be in 13% of high schools... But in the other 87%? There is no pushback against the Left. No one telling those kids the truth. Just a Leftist pipeline -- from classroom... to belief... to voting booth. And once that pipeline is complete... It 's over. Patriot, this is one of the last places a patriot like you can stop it before it 's too late to save our country. You may not be able to step into a hostile high school and stand for truth like these students do. But you can give critical support to a young freedom fighter who will. There's still time to turn this country around... and this is one of the few ways we can actually do it -- one student, one school, one chapter at a time. 4940 East Beverly Road Phoenix, Arizona 85044

We won’t sugarcoat it:

That’s not politics as usual — that’s a power grab.

Please, can we count on you to be part of this effort before midnight? >> [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/hmp-email-match-2026?amount=15]

name: Pramila Jayapal
subject: Another day, another Trumpian power grab
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Pramila for Congress
body:
Trump just replaced Glacier National Park on our national parks pass with a picture of himself.
# [](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/go/892?refcode=em20260510-6227-footer&t=1&akid=6227%2E420207%2ESE4o47)
Peter,
The pattern continues: bypassing Congress for a vanity project.
**Trump replaced the photo of Glacier National Park on the America the Beautiful National Parks Pass with a portrait of _himself._**
This pass is how your family’s eyes light up when they see their first geyser. How a road tripper watches the sun rise over the rim of the Grand Canyon. It’s how we get a chance to celebrate the beauty of our landscapes, paid and cared for by the American people.
And Trump just stamped his face on it.
**To be clear: Trump’s actions here are illegal.** Congress passed legislation establishing these passes and requiring them to feature winners of an annual photo competition.
The 2026 winner was a stunning picture of Glacier National Park. Trump replaced it anyway — because he thinks he’s above the law.
**I joined with Rep. Jared Huffman in taking action to fight back. Our national parks should never be a backdrop for anyone’s ego.**
_This is what authoritarians do, Peter._ They put their faces on everything — buildings, money, and now our national parks — to remind you of who’s in charge.
And make no mistake: this administration’s politicization of our national parks system is part of a broader, deliberate attack on our public lands and planet.
This is the same administration that is actively dismantling the environmental protections that keep our air clean and our water safe. They are tearing apart the early warning systems that alert communities to extreme weather. They are holding disaster relief hostage for political gain, leaving communities that have lost everything to beg for help that never should’ve been conditional in the first place.
**I refuse to let that stand. Our national parks and our planet belong to all of us — and so does the fight to protect them.**
[**If you’re able, can you pitch in $3 today to help me keep fighting back against this administration’s attacks on our public lands?**](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/go/47393?c0=pj-em-20260510.uJ7wSL&refcode=em20260510-6227&amount=3&t=2&akid=6227%2E420207%2ESE4o47)
**[Contribute $3](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/go/47393?c0=pj-em-20260510.uJ7wSL&amount=3&refcode=em20260510-6227&t=21&akid=6227%2E420207%2ESE4o47)**
With gratitude,
Pramila Jayapal
**[Contribute](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/pj-email-footer?refcode=em20260510-6227-footer&t=22&refcode2=6227_420207_SE4o47&akid=6227%2E420207%2ESE4o47)**

| Peter,

Our Campaign Reporting Deadline is in TWO DAYS.

We’re still working to hit our **$30,000 goal** , and I need your help to get there.

I really don’t like having to ask like this, but the reality is serious. A Super PAC is supporting my opponent, and they have already reported **over** **$100,000 raised**. That kind of money can shape this race if we don’t respond.

We need the resources to match it and show that we can withstand the outside influence and be in a position to win this. It’s our chance with this report to prove the strength of our campaign and the momentum we have going into this final stretch. name: Jena Griswold
subject: Thinking of my mom today
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Jena for Colorado
body:
https://www.jenaforcolorado.com/ [https://www.jenaforcolorado.com/]
Happy Mother's Day, Peter.
This is my second Mother’s Day as a mom, and it means even more to me now.
I’m thinking about my own mom today. She often worked two jobs to support our family, and there were times we relied on food stamps to get by. Today, she’s a nurse, and I couldn’t be more grateful for her strength and determination.
https://www.jenaforcolorado.com/ [https://www.jenaforcolorado.com/]
To all the amazing moms across Colorado, thank you. For everything you do, every single day.
Happy Mother’s Day.
— Jena

clean_body: [] Happy Mother's Day, Peter. This is my second Mother’s Day as a mom, and it means even more to me now. I’m thinking about my own mom today. She often worked two jobs to support our family, and there were times we relied on food stamps to get by. Today, she’s a nurse, and I couldn’t be more grateful for her strength and determination. [] To all the amazing moms across Colorado, thank you. For everything you do, every single day. Happy Mother’s Day. — Jena Follow Jena Online: [] [] [] [] [] Paid for by Jena for Colorado. name: Chris Pappas
subject: Wishing you a happy Mother’s Day
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Chris Pappas for Senate
body:
Today I hope you’ll take a moment to celebrate the mothers, grandmothers, stepmothers, and caregivers who helped shape your life.
#
Team,
Today on Mother’s Day I’m thinking about how grateful I am for my mother, Dawn.
My sister and I have always been lucky to have her love and support. Whether she was cheering me on during debates, making thousands of homemade campaign buttons, or reminding me to stay grounded and focused on what matters most, she’s always been there for me.
And I know so many people across New Hampshire feel the same way about the moms and caregivers in their own lives.
Mothers do so much for their families and communities every single day. They’re balancing jobs, caregiving, school pickups, household responsibilities, and so much more – _often without the support they deserve._
That’s why I’ve worked to cut taxes for working families, help close the gender pay gap, and support policies like paid leave and affordable child care that make a real difference for parents here in New Hampshire.
**Because supporting moms and families shouldn’t just happen one day a year.**
We owe it to them to keep building an economy and a country where families can get ahead and where parents have the support they need to thrive.
Today I hope you’ll take a moment to celebrate the mothers, grandmothers, stepmothers, and caregivers who helped shape your life.
From my family to yours, Happy Mother’s Day!
Chris

name: Alex Kelloff
subject: Happy Mother’s Day
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Alex Kelloff for Colorado
body:
https://alexkelloff.com/ [https://alexkelloff.com/]
Friend,
I wanted to take a moment today to wish everyone a happy Mother’s Day—and to share a little about mine.
My mom went to high school in Grand Junction and went to Mesa College, now Colorado Mesa University. She packed peaches in Palisade, cleaned houses in Aspen, and worked summers at the “Big Whale” laundromat—doing whatever it took to get by and build something better.
My parents got married at St. Mary’s in Aspen nearly sixty years ago, when the roads were mostly dirt, and riches were measured in family and friendship. And for those of us who live and work here, we know that’s still true—and it’s worth fighting for.
https://alexkelloff.com/ [https://alexkelloff.com/]
That’s how I was raised. With a deep respect for hard work, for community, and for treating people the right way. And everything I’m doing in this campaign comes back to those values.
To all the moms out there—thank you for everything you do.
Happy Mother’s Day,
Alex Kelloff

👉 Thousands of documents tied to Jeffrey Epstein have been released.
👉 Donald Trump’s name appears throughout those files — along with records of his past relationship with Epstein.
_**👉 And yet the Trump administration has spent months trying to slow-walk transparency and avoid real accountability.**_
That’s not how oversight works. Congress has the authority — and the responsibility — to investigate misconduct, demand documents, and require testimony under oath when serious questions arise.
No one should be above that process. Not billionaires. Not presidents. And certainly not Donald Trump.

I serve on the House Oversight Committee, and I believe the American people deserve the truth — wherever it leads and whoever it implicates.
**[Please, sign your name to demand accountability>>](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/131149801/620098909/12538990?refcode=260510_RG_trumptestify-pet-rs&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTcxOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwYTMxZGRjYS1hNzRjLWYxMTEtOGVmMi0wMDBkM2ExNGI2NDAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=PVcPMt3u2s03NCHU9BM_xPpgcfQOSyKqh9Rb9LnfFGA=&emci=ed809cb5-a74c-f111-8ef2-000d3a14b640&emdi=0a31ddca-a74c-f111-8ef2-000d3a14b640&ceid=16877361)**

Robert Garcia

North Carolina. Texas. Ohio. Alaska.

The good news: Democrats are tied or ahead in every single one of these races.

As the Democrat leading the charge to flip the Senate, I need grassroots supporters like you to help us keep building on this momentum. We MUST continue giving our candidates the resources they need to close the deal in November.

If we hit our $18,000 goal before midnight, it sends a clear message: Democrats are organized, funded, and ready to fight for every single seat. If we fall short, Republicans will continue to flood these races with even more dark money and lies.

So please, will you chip in $4 before midnight tonight to help us hit our daily goal and take back the Senate majority? I need you in this fight with me! >> [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/loc_q22026_flip-senate-ask?amount=4]

**What if I told you that this could be a once-in-a-generation opportunity for Democrats?** It’s been _nearly three decades_ since Georgia elected a Democratic governor, and there’s never been a better moment to change that. But if we fall short, Democrats could be locked out of power for _another_ 30 years.

**Or what if I reminded you of what’s at stake?** If we lose this election, a MAGA Republican like Burt Jones will become Georgia’s next governor -- and he’ll hand Donald Trump the pen and paper to redraw our maps and rig our elections for years to come.

**What if I said that our campaign is gaining real momentum?** When we launched our campaign last fall, Republicans were favored to win. But now, national experts have upgraded our race to a “toss-up,” calling it the best Democratic pickup opportunity in the country.

**_[Would it make a difference if I told you any amount you can give -- even if it’s only $5 or $15 -- would make a real difference?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/131149954/620099530/985402107?firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&addr1=&city=Cresco&state=PA&zip=18326&phone=&employer=&occupation=&amount=25&refcode=EM_RTI_GD_20260510_FR_5G_T1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNjIvMS8xMjA3MDUiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiZDMzMjQyYjctYTk0Yy1mMTExLThlZjItMDAwZDNhMTRiNjQwIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=vJ1i6t3AT-fYCnqCsn4SHvdOGNl32tFJQOCJzEi88nU=)_** This is a grassroots campaign, powered by thousands of people like you from all 50 states. name: Paige Cognetti
subject: I want to hear from you: What keeps you up at night?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Paige for PA
body:
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cognetti-slingshot-email-q2 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cognetti-slingshot-email-q2]
Hi Peter, it's Mayor Paige Cognetti.

Too many serving politicians put their own concerns above those of the people they’re supposed to represent. If you ask me, that’s part of the reason there’s so little trust in government right now.

That’s why I want to hear from you directly. I wish that could be over a beer, but my team's priority survey is the next best thing.

Your voice is powerful, Peter, so will you take a few minutes to share your top priorities and concerns?

TAKE OUR SURVEY >> https://secure.ngpvan.com/VEc_jMl5o02kTvT6z6Q9rw2

I got my start in public service because I couldn’t stand by watching government fail people. I saw a school board betray the trust of families and students. I saw corruption in Scranton that sent our mayor to prison. I saw politicians use public office to enrich themselves instead of serving their constituents.

That's why I ran for Mayor as an Independent against my own party's machine. We fought corruption, cut costs, and proved government can work for people.

Tell us how you think Washington could work as hard as the people it represents. Take our quick survey today → [https://secure.ngpvan.com/JdzLimtJok--Du67EBdDFg2]

Thank you for everything.
— Mayor Paige Cognetti
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cognetti-slingshot-email-q2 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cognetti-slingshot-email-q2]I'm Paige Cognetti. I ran for Mayor of Scranton as an independent to reform a corrupt City Hall. Over the past six years I've lowered costs, cut red tape, invested in public safety, brought in hundreds of new businesses, and created jobs. I'm running for Congress in PA-8 to take on a corrupt Washington, because government should work as hard as the people it serves.
If you're with me, join us by chipping in today. [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cognetti-slingshot-email-q2]

name: Ashley Floyd, Emerge
subject: Fwd: 8/13 EMERGEncy #LeadersMatter: Fighting Southern Redistricting
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Emerge
body:
Hi Peter,
Reminder that our discussion on the Republican-lead redistricting efforts in the South will be held this upcoming Wednesday, May 13 . We are honored to welcome TN State Sen. London Lamar, GA State Rep. Saira Draper, SC State Sen. Tameika Isaac Devine , and AL State Sen. Merika Coleman for an insightful panel from these leaders who have been working hard to uphold voters’ rights in these uncertain times.
-Ashley
emergeamerica.org [emergeamerica.org]
Friends,
With the recent decision from the Supreme Court, Louisiana v. Callais , sending a tidal wave throughout the South, state legislatures are calling their members back into special sessions where they are attempting to redraw maps to be more favorable to Republicans - even in states where primaries for these seats are only weeks away.
Join us next Wednesday, May 13th, at 3pm PT/6pm ET for a conversation with Tennessee State Sen. London Lamar, Georgia State Rep. Saira Draper, South Carolina State Sen. Tameika Isaac Devine , and Alabama State Sen. Merika Coleman . These leaders are fighting on the front lines to push back against these unjust threats to the rights of Black voters and minority communities, who are being particularly targeted.
RSVP [https://secure.ngpvan.com/16LjrXmZ50mbTWXff6wkfA2]
https://secure.ngpvan.com/16LjrXmZ50mbTWXff6wkfA2 [https://secure.ngpvan.com/16LjrXmZ50mbTWXff6wkfA2]
In solidarity,
Team Emerge
RSVP [https://secure.ngpvan.com/16LjrXmZ50mbTWXff6wkfA2]

**Friend, you’ve been summoned by the 47th POTUS (me)!**
**There’s been talk. Negative talk.**
People have told me that the Democrats will seize our Congressional majority this November if we don’t do something fast. That’s when an awful heaviness hit the pit of my stomach.
I made it my #1 priority to reach out to **_YOU_**. I need you to take my MAGA Priority Survey immediately.

name: Higher stakes
subject: This just became the most important election in America
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY DEFEND OUR COURTS, NOT AUTHORIZED BY ANY CANDIDATE
body:
And it’s in only 12 days
| | | | | [](https://yfq78zhbb.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001P2nxe2J77kM7ENA2XNmz9OuulAHWxT3Uv-MDuDNwMKUP-7KKldMEZZb3-1NxIye64syC4Wib07RNH3cSFpW0_huo5teYe2N3-JDjiY48eNpvemvzXu3un2adM0AN-i0sd9z4UPsMOp_OPYA2Ho5kfWNJXC9J3xyoUvU0XutfFACJKsvQB5qExsq8o5t4iUaQQE_SP7wzLsPxEunYmqHHkbTf_aQgyP8021GD8fbkUqj6k5DHWArA7Q==&c=iV6bu66shGtxZFv0b94Ava0Fvib-gDzAcWdlXOro7pEAUWQH9KBVUw==&ch=X_6CSUmGSMECBpu87aP7qVee-hTJfl67ys2eD1GWNBiMizGFWHwV-g==)
---
|
Peter,
The Supreme Court's decision gutting the Voting Rights Act just upended democracy as we know it. And nowhere are the stakes higher than the Georgia Supreme Court election on May 19:
---
| [](https://yfq78zhbb.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001P2nxe2J77kM7ENA2XNmz9OuulAHWxT3Uv-MDuDNwMKUP-7KKldMEZZb3-1NxIye64syC4Wib07RNH3cSFpW0_huo5teYe2N3-JDjiY48eNpvemvzXu3un2adM0AN-i0sd9z4UPsMOp_OPYA2Ho5kfWNJXC9J3xyoUvU0XutfFACJKsvQB5qExsq8o5t4iUaQQE_SP7wzLsPxEunYmqHHkbTf_aQgyP80KV78VplG3Wr3Q3HeIOWNjw==&c=iV6bu66shGtxZFv0b94Ava0Fvib-gDzAcWdlXOro7pEAUWQH9KBVUw==&ch=X_6CSUmGSMECBpu87aP7qVee-hTJfl67ys2eD1GWNBiMizGFWHwV-g==)
---
The Supreme Court just opened a Pandora's box of election lawsuits in Georgia. Who sits on that court when those cases are decided will determine whether Black voters have any protection left. This is the last line of defense.
MAGA Governor Brian Kemp has already announced the state will pursue an aggressive gerrymander to strip Black voters of representation and hand Republicans additional congressional seats before the 2028 election.
When Democrats challenge those rigged maps, those cases land in one place: the Georgia Supreme Court. And right now, MAGA holds the majority.
Two seats on the Georgia Supreme Court are on the ballot in just 9 days. Win both and Democrats have a path to flip the entire court months before the 2028 presidential election in this must-win swing state. Lose both and MAGA locks in their majority, guaranteeing they rule in their favor on every election case Kemp's gerrymander generates.
Defend Our Courts has been working around the clock to close a critical funding gap in these final days. We won in Pennsylvania. We won in Wisconsin. Georgia is next. But we need your help one more time to get there.
[9 days. Two seats. Can we count on you to rush a donation of $50, $25, or whatever you can spare right now to help us flip the Georgia Supreme Court?](https://yfq78zhbb.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001P2nxe2J77kM7ENA2XNmz9OuulAHWxT3Uv-MDuDNwMKUP-7KKldMEZZb3-1NxIye6HUWVpPVJ1UrCXYdfK526hp4np8EIbioqozyqeK0RdPlRfQOnyx6MgC0w4R39XyPhZNKuVlgsxjeGVOlrf7zYPCz17gdYNP90BsQtBGYGvAe_qZG-h-NWtdJD2UkVtkSW0iStX2yoMFwDsmo0CIgjKUBM4C0ETVl1LKsWAKEKPH9ZK6b0C2cGEP8_1FUtahIv&c=iV6bu66shGtxZFv0b94Ava0Fvib-gDzAcWdlXOro7pEAUWQH9KBVUw==&ch=X_6CSUmGSMECBpu87aP7qVee-hTJfl67ys2eD1GWNBiMizGFWHwV-g==)

clean_body: And it’s in only 12 days | | | | | == | Peter, The Supreme Court's decision gutting the Voting Rights Act just upended democracy as we know it. And nowhere are the stakes higher than the Georgia Supreme Court election on May 19: | == The Supreme Court just opened a Pandora's box of election lawsuits in Georgia. Who sits on that court when those cases are decided will determine whether Black voters have any protection left. This is the last line of defense. MAGA Governor Brian Kemp has already announced the state will pursue an aggressive gerrymander to strip Black voters of representation and hand Republicans additional congressional seats before the 2028 election. When Democrats challenge those rigged maps, those cases land in one place: the Georgia Supreme Court. And right now, MAGA holds the majority. Two seats on the Georgia Supreme Court are on the ballot in just 9 days. Win both and Democrats have a path to flip the entire court months before the 2028 presidential election in this must-win swing state. Lose both and MAGA locks in their majority, guaranteeing they rule in their favor on every election case Kemp's gerrymander generates. Defend Our Courts has been working around the clock to close a critical funding gap in these final days. We won in Pennsylvania. We won in Wisconsin. Georgia is next. But we need your help one more time to get there. == | | | == | == | == | | | == | == | == | | | | == | This just became the most important election in America. And right now, Democrats are poised to come up short. We need to rally right now. -- Team Defend Our Courts | | | | | | | | | | == | | | | | == | | | | Mail checks to: | | | | Defend Our CourtsP.O. [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/131150505/620101758/1231236074?refcode=RS_EM_EN_2024.05.10_MDay&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDIvMS82NzI5OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwNjY2NTEzNS1hZDRjLWYxMTEtOGVmMi0wMDBkM2ExNGI2NDAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=zDTbTw9Vh1zwI0q9ygMJphUPnth7cptqmMBV_r2WmMg=&emci=39ab4caa-8d4c-f111-8ef2-000d3a14b640&emdi=06665135-ad4c-f111-8ef2-000d3a14b640&ceid=23483442) | It’s Mother’s Day and I want to talk to you about my mom, Peter. **Through life’s hardest moments, through joys and milestones, I’ve always been able to count on my mom.** [ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/131150506/620101759/-1890593799?refcode=RS_EM_EN_2024.05.10_MDay&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDIvMS82NzI5OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwNjY2NTEzNS1hZDRjLWYxMTEtOGVmMi0wMDBkM2ExNGI2NDAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=zDTbTw9Vh1zwI0q9ygMJphUPnth7cptqmMBV_r2WmMg=&emci=39ab4caa-8d4c-f111-8ef2-000d3a14b640&emdi=06665135-ad4c-f111-8ef2-000d3a14b640&ceid=23483442) That’s Cynthia. That’s my mom: a friend, a caregiver, a healthcare advocate, an educator. She’s a woman who makes carrot soup for a sick friend, who got a matching tattoo with me when I came out, who joined the board of Holly Ridge to help families like ours, who goes to almost every protest at Bethel & Lund. I’ve always looked up to my mom. She weathered every storm that came her way and worked hard to make sure my brother, sister, and I had what we needed to make it through. **She is selfless, and she is brave.** Throughout her life, she has and continues to put others first. In that way, everything she taught me by example is central to my activism and eventual career in politics. She has always led by example, and I count myself so lucky to be her daughter. **_[Will you join me in signing a card and wishing her a happy Mothers’ day? It would mean a lot to her.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/131150507/620101760/-1890593799?refcode=RS_EM_EN_2024.05.10_MDay&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDIvMS82NzI5OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwNjY2NTEzNS1hZDRjLWYxMTEtOGVmMi0wMDBkM2ExNGI2NDAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=zDTbTw9Vh1zwI0q9ygMJphUPnth7cptqmMBV_r2WmMg=&emci=39ab4caa-8d4c-f111-8ef2-000d3a14b640&emdi=06665135-ad4c-f111-8ef2-000d3a14b640&ceid=23483442) _ ** [SIGN THE CARD](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/131150508/620101761/-1890593799?refcode=RS_EM_EN_2024.05.10_MDay&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDIvMS82NzI5OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwNjY2NTEzNS1hZDRjLWYxMTEtOGVmMi0wMDBkM2ExNGI2NDAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=zDTbTw9Vh1zwI0q9ygMJphUPnth7cptqmMBV_r2WmMg=&emci=39ab4caa-8d4c-f111-8ef2-000d3a14b640&emdi=06665135-ad4c-f111-8ef2-000d3a14b640&ceid=23483442) The fight I fight every day with you at my side is one I can handle because of the woman my mom raised me to be. Thank you for helping me make her Mothers’ day extra special this year. – Emily | | Emily Randall is proud to represent Washington’s 6th District in Congress. She grew up in a working-class Union household in Port Orchard and was the first in her family to attend college. After serving in the State Senate and passing nearly 200 bills, Emily made history in 2024 as the first queer Latina elected to Congress. Now, Emily is fighting for WA working families in D.C. and organizing to take back the House. _**Can you chip in $6 or any amount and join our team?**_ [DONATE NOW](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/131150509/620101762/1129794561?refcode2=footer&amount=6&refcode=RS_EM_EN_2024.05.10_MDay&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDIvMS82NzI5OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwNjY2NTEzNS1hZDRjLWYxMTEtOGVmMi0wMDBkM2ExNGI2NDAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=zDTbTw9Vh1zwI0q9ygMJphUPnth7cptqmMBV_r2WmMg=)

clean_body: | It’s Mother’s Day and I want to talk to you about my mom, Peter. Through life’s hardest moments, through joys and milestones, I’ve always been able to count on my mom. That’s Cynthia. That’s my mom: a friend, a caregiver, a healthcare advocate, an educator. She’s a woman who makes carrot soup for a sick friend, who got a matching tattoo with me when I came out, who joined the board of Holly Ridge to help families like ours, who goes to almost every protest at Bethel & Lund. I’ve always looked up to my mom. She weathered every storm that came her way and worked hard to make sure my brother, sister, and I had what we needed to make it through. She is selfless, and she is brave. Throughout her life, she has and continues to put others first. In that way, everything she taught me by example is central to my activism and eventual career in politics. She has always led by example, and I count myself so lucky to be her daughter. The fight I fight every day with you at my side is one I can handle because of the woman my mom raised me to be. Thank you for helping me make her Mothers’ day extra special this year. – Emily | | Emily Randall is proud to represent Washington’s 6th District in Congress. She grew up in a working-class Union household in Port Orchard and was the first in her family to attend college. After serving in the State Senate and passing nearly 200 bills, Emily made history in 2024 as the first queer Latina elected to Congress. Now, Emily is fighting for WA working families in D.C. and organizing to take back the House. Can you chip in $6 or any amount and join our team? = Want to maximize your impact?Become a monthly donor to help us flip the House from red to blue! = Follow on: | | | | | | Paid for by Emily Randall for Congress Emily Randall for Congress P.O. Charlie. Trump. It doesn't stop there.
It isn't a "both sides" problem when only one side is doing the shooting.

| | | | [](http://links.standingstrongamerica.com/u/click?_t=29c3b6e742c849fabbcc130432510e66&_m=3a338ab4f3674d9b8046a00deb4125cb&_e=ekwP98VyM8-5ZrL4AUKs14YIpUJ245vCARL-t2kGE-sr_W3I6icKs_9kwjzws9hTmZOwA7IT82vXPxT8tWEaNxnfgEwkK8LO5TT3nQqHc6U1_wr8QXwyBVYQvJMbrwewqhDrYUcQcnKZ7kbTTiKYEmqrx-lQNEvLoM4wLPYmJ2w_9xdv4yMlp2mUvd-rYviDActDEShSuezLXcDl5amfBq93Xuw4mQg9U2k9iZ0e9yqPqmVGwTh489wM9oQFgKLJbNKH4rUD4dS1whMiLkDgqL356JYtfoP3i9gkfOaWTaU--VNPF8SMvKSHm-9Yoj5H2Eju7Udeu1wMqoXu3JWYZm8J4VZBfYj7bBjxjVmeRe3ndCobqsCZuy9-r904T9K9Qjn3mSykitkjRiZz26FhtjYTpkzVzQU-w1wc3G29fdkkTMcHZRGhGo39-X1qoIQ3msCy_a78FlgjP7GUOBK7UXhrN3e1OG1KBTfFWHnPPcIwW4UMnK7ORq7zE-4B9ODwg3Gw8lmihUn6J60M96sjac6DLSU8VJ9aWN0LPnbbkbeSxUOJ_YMDjfpRjsTN5st-cL_VFZWAyFj-hvDcKEy0kv9SUXa4gsM97RY14gXdWzvxSi6qsP644Q9czeN8LmCYiH6XSsIONU5fPsjSC5Kce475YMrpxAWkWMlYPI-iepdWkwNOUB71zfHXLg3JDy49)
---
Peter,
---
This isn't a "both sides" problem.

The violent Left murdered Charlie. They openly celebrated his death.

They've tried 3 times to kill President Trump. Their only disappointment was that the attempts weren't successful.

They funneled $3+ million dollars from the Left-wing Southern Poverty Law Center to the KKK and other actual extremist groups -- all to smear President Trump and patriots like you and me.

The SPLC put Charlie and Turning Point on their so-called "Hate Map" -- and we all know why.

The violent Left calls you "racist."

They call you "bigot."

They call you "fascist."

They call you "Nazi."

**And it 's all to encourage their most radical and deranged followers to pull the trigger and justify their violence. **

They want you gone.

They want you silenced.

And for far too many on the Left, _they want you dead. _
---
[](http://links.standingstrongamerica.com/u/click?_t=29c3b6e742c849fabbcc130432510e66&_m=3a338ab4f3674d9b8046a00deb4125cb&_e=ekwP98VyM8-5ZrL4AUKs14YIpUJ245vCARL-t2kGE-sr_W3I6icKs_9kwjzws9hTmZOwA7IT82vXPxT8tWEaNxnfgEwkK8LO5TT3nQqHc6U1_wr8QXwyBVYQvJMbrwewqhDrYUcQcnKZ7kbTTiKYEmqrx-lQNEvLoM4wLPYmJ2w_9xdv4yMlp2mUvd-rYviDActDEShSuezLXcDl5amfBq93Xuw4mQg9U2k9iZ0e9yo31TMz91XVhHvIfPCvGAIxquaOMkB_B7Wgb2YwN7HR2QVGR2Yd3Fc1eO8MdXztUd9je3AH0WCoHCzPT0VLdQsapJ0smEdZbP_LJjeEIrjJ8UiUmqjgiuBmfUiprE7GGMFXS-3WCnd3AXx7c_RFJaHO_sksOPxFCeckFSwv-zLikL7fZsk7WycONpZA37z5Ma-7icqOARWQan7Yjn2sz7DhcNfxOF8TZLiSlZJ9Zbg8UMFZU1KcdfpP61flvJF3JMuol2SkZV8lh4ILj0Zq698U_Ngzl_LUv52vBnVpCypqL1One7Fzv733S7LiOrZAVtaqEJ51424wV6lu8TDcjyqkH9zxg9W295-hNVQyZGARP2U7uTP_ESke4GnYUqjW-Pnc-TpxVBhBnT3zEUR0wceAqr-Nc_9THQE0pIG41RE3_HplPZzfKdoZ1VAfzMfWVOgtqBB9Hf68-amS2a7bT_2E)
---
The violent Left cares about one thing, and one thing only: _Power. _

And increasingly, more of the Left's rank and file believes violence is an acceptable means to achieve their political ends.

**Peter, I need you to listen to this closely... **

You may or may not be happy with President Trump or our majority right now...

But if you call yourself a patriot... if you call yourself a conservative... or if you're just a non-crazy person...

_You can 't sit this one out. _

**Winning in 2026 is existential. Winning in 2028 is existential. **

Because if we lose?

The violent Left will absolutely come for us --_ in every which way that they can. _

They will destroy America, and the very ideas and values that built it.

That leaves only one thing for you and me to do:

_Beat them at the ballot box. _

It's a simple formula...

Knock more doors. Chase more ballots. Put more paper in the box. Win Elections.

We did it in 2024.

We're in the states that will decide 2026 and 2028.

I know you’ve heard from me a lot over the last few days and weeks, but I wanted to personally reach out to say **_thank you_**. I am running to represent Georgia’s 13th District in the U.S. House of Representatives because I believe it’s time we had a scientific voice in Congress. I will never stop fighting for this district, and for Georgia, and I couldn’t do it without grassroots champions like you on my team. Thanks for your support, Dr. Jasmine ClarkDemocratic Candidate for Georgia's 13th District

name: Justice Democrats
subject: The courage to take on power
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Justice Democrats
body:
The primary is on May 19. We have less than two weeks to reach voters and make sure Chris wins his primary election.
#
Last weekend, Congresswoman Summer Lee was knocking doors in Philadelphia with Chris Rabb.
[](https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/140221?c0=jd-em-20260510-cr.kf2kU8&refcode=em20260510-37763&amounts=10%2C27%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&amount=5&t=2&akid=37763%2E1203867%2EMxlhFM)
📸 @donsidbo
Summer knows what it’s like to take on powerful interests, establishment pressure, and millions of dollars in outside spending — and win anyway in PA.
Now, Chris Rabb is running to bring that same people-powered courage to Congress representing Pennsylvania’s 3rd.
Chris is a trailblazing, anti-establishment progressive who has spent the last 8 years representing a majority-Black, mixed-income district of nearly 70,000 people across 4 neighborhoods in Philadelphia.
Rep. Rabb served in the State House alongside Summer where they worked closely together to fight for economic justice and criminal legal reform for Pennsylvanians across the state.
Now, Summer needs our help getting Chris Rabb to Congress so she can have a colleague and friend to fight alongside for PA in Washington.
**[The primary is on May 19. We have less than two weeks to reach voters and make sure Chris wins his primary election. Will you split a $5 contribution between Chris Rabb and Justice Democrats today?](https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/140221?c0=jd-em-20260510-cr.kf2kU8&refcode=em20260510-37763&amounts=10%2C27%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&amount=5&t=3&akid=37763%2E1203867%2EMxlhFM)**
**[Contribute $5](https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/140221?c0=jd-em-20260510-cr.kf2kU8&refcode=em20260510-37763&amounts=10%2C27%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&amount=5&t=22&akid=37763%2E1203867%2EMxlhFM)**
In solidarity,
Justice Democrats

name: Aaron Ford for Governor
subject: Is there anything we can say?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the Committee to Elect Aaron Ford
body:
# [](https://act.fordfornevada.com/go/12?t=1&akid=96%2E127862%2EOtslN3)
Is there _anything_ we can say to earn your support today?
**What if we told you that the Cook Political Report has rated this race a _Toss-Up?_**
This is one of the best opportunities Democrats have to flip a governor's seat anywhere in the country in 2026.
**What if we told you that Aaron has won _85%_ of his lawsuits against the Trump administration — and he's nowhere near done fighting for Nevadans?**
While MAGA Gov. Joe Lombardo stands shoulder-to-shoulder with Trump, Aaron is in court, fighting back, and delivering for Nevadans.
**Finally, what if we told you that _even $5_ makes a difference in a race this competitive?**
Polling shows Aaron is statistically tied with Lombardo, but there are still plenty of voters left undecided. Chipping in $5 gives our campaign the resources to reach those Nevadans and make sure they know what’s at stake this November.
**[Can we count on your support today? Donate $5 or any amount now:](https://act.fordfornevada.com/go/1?c0=em_ms_af_20260510_1_ak.47zBT2&amount=5&refcode=em20260510-87&t=2&akid=96%2E127862%2EOtslN3)**

Team Ford

name: Kellyanne Conway
subject: What keeps me up at night
disclaimer_text: Paid for by TEAM SCALISE, a joint fundraising committee authorized by and to benefit SCALISE FOR CONGRESS and EYE OF THE TIGER PAC
body:
I have my ear to the ground, and it has me worried sick.
| I have my ear to the ground, and it has me worried sick.
It's Kellyanne Conway. I've been with MAGA since the beginning as President Trump's campaign manager. I'm a pollster by trade, and what I'm seeing on the maps has me worried about the future of the MAGA movement.
[Here are the 3 MAJOR updates in the last couple of weeks:](http://links.maga-conservatives.com/u/click?_t=da215d85003f407c964bf56cae76557f&_m=44bdaf83c4904387b2f84eef88717eaa&_e=uz3VuG4Qi4_t__pzzvfyPHAuXySEyLMNZf7KZcTDSTO13d98srzfYJw-jKWjAjdKbo_l4DGf45pGxs-kRTKCx8NX8QwwQQEtOCDL5XIzuGisNIg1dWzhOwEA8fqG3OQ9VsxqaMlKIonDPrk4lLceBZ_FounX29fTuPzh68_Q4ugT89vjeUQCX2Af97-9XEl84SzDxTLCAGEHa0MQj5Ty0lQ7oskI5vMHG70IULgTxQlKEV_wKbPKH1-ZhxpzIiSx7CiI2F-lBpNx3k67D0gwU2nMs5rVuoHtH35F_5GUkr6Dutp_lUgvCqVThn26xJc8lHARw8BqlpI-ZbKn1Mc1OE8A-wrN-hO7-SBlFQfyx8XQ9B0-QM9EtuB-GQQU11Hn-M6_Y1MzTj1Gk4kHGIEWKp-Eq6V8Lgl6wgi2DMsM-5dnMJ8ssCpts-owYRaF3elWyhVl7VQujethRQ_z5vjhgz-XIQz2c9yToNOfUJQf6xK6WIPOWQ6rJUD4M-3Lb7bNVgb9GiMBxM2teI5F0_XGjWzqsLPik0c_R-ht0YcPZcuVBtVCr4ea4TkS1NqfJb7Rzid-3Aws_y3d1yRVCP3Qkq4f_tONmoIA_u-a7Un5AcDoL7bfd33PXPFlRGL9ejEt42jfsYw3yQBalrBXXYc_UNWq3DiW2WpVwe0CQZXAgnxOd-3xcYerw_kyY0UuTz7FNc-ty7Ve8_Ex3-Joqr62WRaguJ0CyJgN31ztx1fXglvv4FY93X5oQupbDQTl4sDI)
1. A Democrat Super PAC just dumped nearly $300 MILLION into attack ads against Conservatives across the country.
2. National Democrats named 35 GOP seats on their target list - even deep in MAGA territory.
3. Democrats in California and Virginia redrew their maps to cut out 9 Conservative seats. The race for the House Majority has gotten even tighter.
I didn't spend a decade helping President Trump win just to see us fail as we approach the apex of the MAGA Movement. If we lose the House Majority this year, Democrats will certainly impeach our President and his entire Cabinet.
We fought so hard to send President Trump back to the White House, and I'll admit, it was no easy task. We were up against Kamala Harris' nearly billion-dollar war chest, the Liberal media smearing President Trump left and right, and wealthy Liberal megadonors bankrolling her campaign.
Yet no matter how much money the radical Left threw at us, no matter how many Fake News hitpieces were written, and no matter how many times Biden's DOJ tried to jail our President, it was Patriots like you who helped carry us to success.
So now I'm asking one more time for your help: The fate of our pro-Trump House Majority lies entirely in MAGA Patriots like you to save President Trump from impeachment.
We beat the odds in 2024, and I'm sure that if enough Conservatives step up now, we'll do it again 2026, prove the DC Establishment wrong, and help President Trump make the MAGA agenda the law of the land.
[So what do you say? Can I count on you in this time of need?](http://links.maga-conservatives.com/u/click?_t=da215d85003f407c964bf56cae76557f&_m=44bdaf83c4904387b2f84eef88717eaa&_e=uz3VuG4Qi4_t__pzzvfyPHAuXySEyLMNZf7KZcTDSTO13d98srzfYJw-jKWjAjdKbo_l4DGf45pGxs-kRTKCx8NX8QwwQQEtOCDL5XIzuGisNIg1dWzhOwEA8fqG3OQ9VsxqaMlKIonDPrk4lLceBZ_FounX29fTuPzh68_Q4ugT89vjeUQCX2Af97-9XEl84SzDxTLCAGEHa0MQj5Ty0lQ7oskI5vMHG70IULgTxQlKEV_wKbPKH1-ZhxpzIiSx7CiI2F-lBpNx3k67D0gwU-j4qBPCvWwZa_GUG1aNw4xhS1LyusOO0YJIn8Sk7wSdoJJy6dbhTEu9PV2qUhSt2iVcZuIM0R3-79BMzbOLNoR-qbCioIwMCkr26C4EJNy7WJk7B3DAuIUrSgiFmRK1Lw96zkkLmnM-KzxwTMkk3XDRz8UHonpkPbwpK7-pXLz3ovoWvQt0P9Pxv99SwlaAMQx5txMNTbCiD3rXZHw7uf8GOUiOuvUhYEuAN4dmRoteagrYDQ3oaYvgtRRBWe6psPFKKLVy4bykQpWgCg3bUeoEta_5aBYiEvL92odp6wCPnb57f8_ljekGSYaV963BoXmxvKjgraYO3SolCC9gjWq-oYnPDxnjuqdO8Gz7wCm_vzErtDHMMyaLi7xlH5N9ST2L5uA78DQLhQSkU3z_dnEZ0akHYyPp2o_sLFgJ-VO2o2PSnBJIds7S0VISBm8NYk2h4PQaaH-V-9PbK3upL-48MU5f4I32eal1ieZ0h36q)

I'm counting on you today.
Onward,
Kellyanne Conway

clean_body: I have my ear to the ground, and it has me worried sick. | I have my ear to the ground, and it has me worried sick. It's Kellyanne Conway. I've been with MAGA since the beginning as President Trump's campaign manager. I'm a pollster by trade, and what I'm seeing on the maps has me worried about the future of the MAGA movement. 1. A Democrat Super PAC just dumped nearly $300 MILLION into attack ads against Conservatives across the country. 2. National Democrats named 35 GOP seats on their target list - even deep in MAGA territory. 3. Democrats in California and Virginia redrew their maps to cut out 9 Conservative seats. The race for the House Majority has gotten even tighter. I didn't spend a decade helping President Trump win just to see us fail as we approach the apex of the MAGA Movement. If we lose the House Majority this year, Democrats will certainly impeach our President and his entire Cabinet. We fought so hard to send President Trump back to the White House, and I'll admit, it was no easy task. We were up against Kamala Harris' nearly billion-dollar war chest, the Liberal media smearing President Trump left and right, and wealthy Liberal megadonors bankrolling her campaign. Yet no matter how much money the radical Left threw at us, no matter how many Fake News hitpieces were written, and no matter how many times Biden's DOJ tried to jail our President, it was Patriots like you who helped carry us to success. So now I'm asking one more time for your help: The fate of our pro-Trump House Majority lies entirely in MAGA Patriots like you to save President Trump from impeachment. We beat the odds in 2024, and I'm sure that if enough Conservatives step up now, we'll do it again 2026, prove the DC Establishment wrong, and help President Trump make the MAGA agenda the law of the land. | I'll never forget how the radical Left treated our President during the 2024 campaign... so imagine how they'll treat him if Democrats win the House this year. We cannot let that happen at any cost. I'm counting on you today. Onward, Kellyanne Conway | 19+ top Conservative leaders at the heart of our MAGA Movement have reached out with GRAVE WARNINGS on the state of the Midterms like NEVER BEFORE... A Democrat controlled House would be the worst-case scenario for the MAGA Movement. We're pleading with you to take this seriously. | | | Paid for by TEAM SCALISE, a joint fundraising committee authorized by and to benefit SCALISE FOR CONGRESS and EYE OF THE TIGER PAC. Team Scalise is committed to restoring a Conservative House majority and electing Conservatives across the country. Thank you for being a part of our movement. This message was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com because you are a member of the Team Scalise Conservative grassroots network. Contributions to TEAM SCALISE, or any participating committee, are not deductible as charitable contributions for federal income tax purposes. Contributions from corporations, national banks, labor unions, foreign nationals without "green cards," and federal government contractors are prohibited. Federal law requires us to use our best efforts to collect and report the name, mailing address, occupation, and employer of each individual who contributes over $200 in a calendar year. name: Dan Goldman
subject: Dan wants to see your name on our list, Peter
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Dan Goldman for New York**
body:
Since day one, Trump and House Republicans have unfairly targeted the SPLC because it exposes the very extremists they enable. |
---
We wanted to make sure you saw the news, Peter: **Three former New York City Council Speakers — Adrienne Adams, Christine Quinn, and Gifford Miller — have publicly endorsed Dan Goldman for re‐election.** These are leaders who know this city and worked alongside Dan’s opponent — and they are backing Dan because they know who will deliver for our city and country. Dan has a record of getting results for New Yorkers: he forced transparency and oversight of ICE detention facilities and helped free 32 immigrants from ICE custody; he’s brought hundreds of millions of dollars to his district and helped nearly 7,000 constituents; and he passed an expansion of federal subsidies for affordable housing, restarted a critical offshore wind project, and guaranteed healthcare for 9/11 survivors and first responders. As Democrats’ lead counsel during the first impeachment, he has also stared down Donald Trump and won. He has spent his career standing up to corruption and fighting to protect our institutions — and he’s bringing that same energy back to the district every day. Dan is running for re‐election to keep fighting for working families, get justice for our most vulnerable neighbors, and defend our democracy. **But momentum only works if people show up.** The endorsements Dan is receiving from local leaders speak volumes, but there’s a name we’re still missing: _yours_. **[Will you make your support visible? Join Dan in defending our democracy and delivering for New Yorkers by adding your name to endorse his re-election campaign.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/131151331/620104852/1420172249?refcode=AU_DSG_EG_GEN_PET_AC_20260510_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85NDA4NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1NWY5MWI3Zi1iMzRjLWYxMTEtOGVmMi0wMDBkM2ExNGI2NDAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=mRwZ7TTNURPCI_GdZI2QKpVHfeZGpeHX1jCbG84LIjc=&emci=3ba00c79-b34c-f111-8ef2-000d3a14b640&emdi=55f91b7f-b34c-f111-8ef2-000d3a14b640&ceid=13556823)** | [ADD YOUR NAME](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/131151332/620104853/1420172249?refcode=AU_DSG_EG_GEN_PET_AC_20260510_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85NDA4NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1NWY5MWI3Zi1iMzRjLWYxMTEtOGVmMi0wMDBkM2ExNGI2NDAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=mRwZ7TTNURPCI_GdZI2QKpVHfeZGpeHX1jCbG84LIjc=&emci=3ba00c79-b34c-f111-8ef2-000d3a14b640&emdi=55f91b7f-b34c-f111-8ef2-000d3a14b640&ceid=13556823)

body:
Re: No Kings protests
| | **THIS IS AN AUTOMATED MESSAGE FOR YOU.**
