name: Voter Action Project
subject: State legislatures passing the SAVE Act
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Integrity First Voter Action Project, www
body:
Voter Action Project[https://voteractionproject.org/]
Democracy Docket:As SAVE America Act stalls, GOP states are quietly enacting their own proof of citizenship laws [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-power?refcode=051026_2&amount=35]
When the House rammed the SAVE America Act (the new version of the SAVE Act) to passage earlier this year, we turned to the Senate to stop it. So far that effort has been successful, but that doesn't mean the threat is over.
State by state, opponents of voting rights in state legislatures around the country are pushing their own version of this suppressive legislation ahead of the midterm elections , folks.
Ten states have laws -- four of which passed during this second Trump administration -- that require proof of citizenship when registering to vote. Florida, Mississippi, South Dakota and Utah all enacted proof of citizenship voting bills in the past two weeks . In as many as 12 other states, bills are moving through state legislatures. If they all pass, that would mean nearly half the states in our country have passed mini versions of the SAVE America Act .
Defenders of voting rights know that non-citizen voting is already illegal, extremely rare, and that these bills are written in ways that could disenfranchise millions of eligible women across the country. That hasn't stopped anti-voting groups from pressuring states to pass these new restrictive voting laws, because the suppression is their goal.
Please, Team, we need to stop this dangerous legislation wherever we can. Pitch in with $35 or whatever you can and ensure millions of women's voices continue to be heard in our elections >> [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-power?refcode=051026_2&amount=35]
If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:
GIVE $15 NOW ➜ [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-power?express_lane=true&refcode=051026_2&amount=15] GIVE $25 NOW ➜ [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-power?express_lane=true&refcode=051026_2&amount=25] GIVE $50 NOW ➜ [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-power?express_lane=true&refcode=051026_2&amount=50]
GIVE $100 NOW ➜ [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-power?express_lane=true&refcode=051026_2&amount=100] GIVE $250 NOW ➜ [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-power?express_lane=true&refcode=051026_2&amount=250] OTHER AMOUNT [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-power?refcode=051026_2&amount=35]
Opponents of voting rights in Congress, state legislatures, governor's mansions, and in the White House favor bills like the SAVE America Act because they know it could suppress millions of eligible voters, changing the composition of the electorate and potentially empowering them and their party for years to come.
These bills are all being fast-tracked by vote suppressors to be in place before November, folks. This movement is a stunning assault on our fundamental right to vote, and we can not afford to let this kind of anti-democratic legislation become law.
Catherine Engelbrecht, the founder of suppressive organization True the Vote, described the right-wing conspiracy theory group’s focus during a recent livestream: “ If the SAVE America Act isn’t going to pass then I’m going to use every tool at my disposal to try and get states to react to something ,” Engelbrecht said.
These dark-money suppression groups are willing to go state-by-state to enact their agenda and we have no choice but to match them with our grassroots power.
The consequences of these bills could be catastrophic for our democracy. Chip in with $35 or whatever you can today to stop more of these voter suppression bills from becoming law >> [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-power?refcode=051026_2&amount=35]
Voter Action Project[https://voteractionproject.org/]
https://www.facebook.com/voteraction [https://www.facebook.com/voteraction] https://bsky.app/profile/voteractionproject.org [https://bsky.app/profile/voteractionproject.org] https://www.instagram.com/voteractionproj/ [https://www.instagram.com/voteractionproj/] https://www.linkedin.com/company/voter-action-project/ [https://www.linkedin.com/company/voter-action-project/]
Integrity First Voter Action Project is dedicated to expanding ballot access and increasing voter participation across the country.
Since the Supreme Court gutted key provisions in the Voting Rights Act, extreme politicians have taken advantage to pass harsh laws that restrict access to the ballot box. These restrictions particularly affect disadvantaged communities and people of color. It’s our goal to bring awareness to these laws wherever they may crop up and organize voters to take action to ensure the right to vote is available to everyone in their states and communities.
Your support is crucial to our efforts. Will you donate today to help us protect voting rights? [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/integrity-first-voter-action-project-1?refcode=051026_2&amount=20]
Donate Now [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/integrity-first-voter-action-project-1?refcode=051026_2&amount=20]
Contributions or gifts to Integrity First Voter Action Project are not tax deductible as charitable contributions or as business expenses under IRC Section 162(3). Integrity First Voter Action Project is organized and operates under section 501(c)(4) of the Internal Revenue Code.
A copy of Integrity First Voter Action Project's latest financial report may be obtained by mail at Integrity First Voter Action Project, c/o Mele Brengarth & Assoc, PO Box 15845, Washington, DC 20003.
Paid for by Integrity First Voter Action Project, www.voteractionproject.org, and not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee.
Integrity First Voter Action Project
P.O. Box 19294
Portland, OR 97280
United States
This email was sent to: dpwillis67@gmail.com. Emails are a crucial way to keep supporters up to date on the latest attacks on voting rights and our efforts to expand ballot access for all Americans. If you believe you received this message in error or wish to no longer receive email from us, please unsubscribe: https://secure.everyaction.com/p/FQb7Rbo110qLPmSvMAn63Q2?unsubscribedata=Q%2Fjqp2OUtClXqTHpE%2FzZtBMjGySlO5Mc6aurXybyHnLyEQ0aDfJgT5HwshvSkZuTAizfxc4hWvQVBgERY3aUZRnNylY%2BJB8eATco3ZRG3NrzYYV%2BK6h7kashE4e4JCSEF0ePLz0kbLNxDov95r8CdjENTdtXVolPJPlHxM67ViLwFeVxH5k05w%2B63eQppgVsLRBwo6iNKRc5D7oQV7Yly1wHnL64fDBqz%2BsVllkl%2FxPT31RSelFTvepErwO70F31iufKywxSaGHj3ISooFtVoh0n4EDZEFo6XZVQIzjp6E7q%2FEm7OTdJv1aAhHRlSRzhcfzmQ%2BCCXEuDkNk1sQa5iow6xqrKgl%2F%2BITG51aK5VxuCm31NAYZF71WMiatsg6BhvbJtKHlYms2oDGonnQNC3pdaDeJAu6PLr1WqAGUislg%3D .

name: Lawsuit Update via The Democratic National Committee
subject: quick but urgent update for Derek
body:

Our lawyers are hard at work, but they can't do it alone. We have a narrow window to win and protect voting rights so we can defeat Trump this November. name: Katie Porter
subject: Two paths:
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Katie Porter for Governor 2026
body:
# [](https://act.katieporter.com/go/21486?t=1&akid=41288%2E3422442%2ERPE0Mj)
Dear Peter,
Running for governor in California is expensive. There are two paths candidates can take to deal with this.
One is to sell out your values to the special interests who got California into this mess. That’s the path some of my opponents are choosing.
There’s Xavier Becerra, who has taken _tens of thousands of dollars from Big Oil_ to fuel his campaign.
Then there’s Tom Steyer, a literal billionaire who made his fortune investing in big polluters and private prisons. _Now, he’s pouring $158 million into his campaign_ —enough to make your eyes pop.
**The other path is the one I’m choosing: grassroots support powered by my commitment to fight for working Californians.**
I’ve never taken corporate PAC money, and I never will. Instead, I’m building a movement of more than 100,000 people who’ve chipped in what they can, when they can, to power our campaign.
**Make no mistake: the corporate money my opponents are taking is helping their campaigns. In the final weeks of this race, I’m counting on Porter Supporters more than ever to fund our ads and keep us competitive.**
**[Peter, can you help us pull ahead in the polls by chipping in $5 or more to our campaign today?](https://act.katieporter.com/go/21531?c0=em_ms_kp_20260510_2_ak.GMIcqc&refcode=em20260510-41288&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=3&akid=41288%2E3422442%2ERPE0Mj)**
[Donate ›››](https://act.katieporter.com/go/21531?c0=em_ms_kp_20260510_2_ak.GMIcqc&refcode=em20260510-41288&t=22&akid=41288%2E3422442%2ERPE0Mj)
Thank you,
Katie Porter

Katie is running to be California’s next governor because California and our country need a leader who will stand up to Trump to lower costs, protect our rights, and combat climate change. **[Donate ›››](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/kp4g-em-footer?refcode=em20260510-41288&amounts=&t=23&refcode2=41288_3422442_RPE0Mj&akid=41288%2E3422442%2ERPE0Mj)**
---

* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://act.katieporter.com/signup/receive-fewer-kp4g-emails?source=41288&t=24&akid=41288%2E3422442%2ERPE0Mj)

Katie Porter for Governor 2026

name: Sign Your Name | Left Action
subject: No Pardon for Ghislaine Maxwell. Ever.
body:
Do not let them normalize freeing a child sex-trafficker. Take action!
| | | | |
---
| | |
# [Tell Trump: "No Pardon for Ghislaine Maxwell. Ever."](https://default.salsalabs.org/T30b409c1-a13e-4bc5-92fd-831b9a34a360/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
| | [](https://default.salsalabs.org/T78254a62-2005-49dc-a9d1-6afd29eb85e8/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
| | | _(Already took this action?[Click here for others](https://default.salsalabs.org/T96792748-3be4-45c9-a256-cc2852e7cdb1/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9). Want to unsubscribe? See link below)_ Ghislaine Maxwell is a convicted child sex trafficker who helped Jeffrey Epstein prey on underage girls. Now there are growing fears that Donald Trump could try to pardon her. **[That must never happen](https://default.salsalabs.org/T11aa5fba-b346-4b72-96d1-ef73c8aa6dbb/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9).** **A presidential pardon for Maxwell would be an insult to victims, a grotesque abuse of power, and a moral stain on the country.**

Congressional Republicans must publicly oppose any effort to let Maxwell walk free, and Trump must clearly rule out granting her clemency.

**[Add your name now: Demand Trump publicly commit to NO pardon for Ghislaine Maxwell.](https://default.salsalabs.org/T1bb09c4c-27cb-436d-80e3-0742786ce8dc/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)**
---

clean_body: Do not let them normalize freeing a child sex-trafficker. Take action! | | | | | | | | | | | | | (Already took this action?. Want to unsubscribe? See link below) Ghislaine Maxwell is a convicted child sex trafficker who helped Jeffrey Epstein prey on underage girls. Now there are growing fears that Donald Trump could try to pardon her. . A presidential pardon for Maxwell would be an insult to victims, a grotesque abuse of power, and a moral stain on the country. Congressional Republicans must publicly oppose any effort to let Maxwell walk free, and Trump must clearly rule out granting her clemency. | | | | | | | Thank you, and remember to SHARE THIS to help keep up the pressure! name: Gina Hinojosa
subject: I refuse to back down
body:
As governor, I will fight for Texas families the same way I fought for my own.
# [](https://ginafortexas.com/?refcode=em_ms_gh_header)[](https://ginafortexas.com/?refcode=em_ms_gh_header)
Happy Mother’s Day, Peter.
Today I’m thinking about my grandmother, and one lesson she drilled into me since I was a little girl.
**_“No te dejes.”_** Don’t let them push you around. **Fight back.**
That’s why I’m in this fight, Peter. Because I refuse to let everyday Texans continue to struggle under Greg Abbott’s leadership.
Politics was never the plan for me. But when they tried to close my son’s neighborhood public school, I couldn’t sit on the sidelines and hope someone else would fix it. So I did what so many moms do when something threatens their child’s future. I stepped in, and I took action.
[](https://act.ginafortexas.com/go/625?c0=em_ms_gh_20260510_2_mothersday.pVBc2R&refcode=em20260510-1090&%3Bamount=5&t=1&akid=1090%2E299639%2EfqBsiW)
I ran for the Austin School Board to keep my son's neighborhood school open. **And we won.**
That first race taught me something I’ve never forgotten. When Texans decide something matters and refuse to back down, we can beat the odds. We can protect what our communities and children depend on, and we can change the outcome.
That’s the same energy I’m bringing to this campaign for governor.
Because mothers across Texas are fighting a thousand battles at once. Working, caring for their family, stretching budgets, worrying about schools, healthcare, and the basics. And too often, the people in power make it harder, not easier.
**As governor, I will fight for Texas families the same way I fight for my own.** With everything I’ve got. I won’t back down. And I won’t let Texas get pushed around by corruption or politicians who’ve clearly forgotten who they work for.
**[If you’re with me, will you chip in $5 today to support this grassroots campaign?](https://act.ginafortexas.com/go/625?c0=em_ms_gh_20260510_2_mothersday.pVBc2R&refcode=em20260510-1090&amount=5&t=2&akid=1090%2E299639%2EfqBsiW)**
[Donate $5 »](https://act.ginafortexas.com/go/625?c0=em_ms_gh_20260510_2_mothersday.pVBc2R&amount=5&refcode=em20260510-1090&t=21&akid=1090%2E299639%2EfqBsiW)
I hope you have a happy Mother’s Day,
Gina Hinojosa

[ Donate » ](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em_ms_gh_footer?refcode=em20260510-2&t=22&refcode2=1090_299639_fqBsiW&akid=1090%2E299639%2EfqBsiW)
[ Donate Monthly » ](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em_ms_gh_footer?refcode=em20260510-2&recurring=1&t=23&refcode2=1090_299639_fqBsiW&akid=1090%2E299639%2EfqBsiW)

body:
It’s all lies.

| | | |
---
| | Peter,

I didn't think Democrats would stoop any lower than what they did to me last election...

-> _They vandalized my office. _

-> _They lied about my record of helping veterans even though I 'm a veteran, I'm married to a veteran, and I come from a family of veterans._

**However, they have reached new, disgusting lows:**

-> _Chuck Schumer admitted to flying in paid protestors into swing districts like mine, who don 't know anything about our communities. _

-> _A liberal Super PAC was caught lying and fear-mongering so excessively that they had to take down their ads._
---
| | [ **COMBAT THE LIBERAL LIES >>** ](https://trk.emails.dailygopnews.)
---
| | _**This is who I am - no BS, lies, whoppers, or spin: **_
---
| |
* I'm a former Navy Helicopter Pilot
* I'm married to a Ret. Navy pilot, and we have four kids
* I used my GI bill to become a nurse practitioner
* I've spent my life in service to others, and I carry that spirit with me in Congress

---
| | **[Please- I'm in genuine need here - chip in to help me get my story and the TRUTH out so that I can fight these lies and attacks!](https://trk.emails.dailygopnews.-u-9qBtc5oRmIPPBWC9A) The liberal Super PAC lying about me will have no shortage of massive checks to cash, but I rely on folks like you to make ends meet...**

---

This is going to be a long, tough race - probably my toughest yet. That's why I need you in my corner to make sure I have the resources to stay in the fight.

---
| | Jen Kiggans

---
I would not be where I am today without the help of my incredible and faithful supporters like you. Because of your support, I can keep fighting to make our country stronger.

Together we will get our country back on the right track and secure America's success!

[](https://link.email.freethinkerdaily.com/click/e134288/VaHR0cHM6Ly9zZWN1cmUud2lucmVkLmNvbS90cnVtcC1uYXRpb25hbC1jb21taXR0ZWUtamZjL2xwLXByc3AtZW1haWwtNDd0aC1wcmVzLWZvdW5kZXJzLWNsdWItdjQtczEtc2Iv/SZW1haWxfZnJlZXRoaW5rZXJkYWlseV9jb20yNjA1MTA/LbmNsZ2t3dW9CNg/qP3V0bV9tZWRpdW09YnImdXRtX3Rlcm09MjI5NDBfZnRkMQ/gagD-Eg/s2h88f3fc4a)
[Accept invitation here:](https://link.email.freethinkerdaily.com/click/e134288/VaHR0cHM6Ly9zZWN1cmUud2lucmVkLmNvbS90cnVtcC1uYXRpb25hbC1jb21taXR0ZWUtamZjL2xwLXByc3AtZW1haWwtNDd0aC1wcmVzLWZvdW5kZXJzLWNsdWItdjQtczEtc2Iv/SZW1haWxfZnJlZXRoaW5rZXJkYWlseV9jb20yNjA1MTA/LbmNsZ2t3dW9CNg/qP3V0bV9tZWRpdW09YnImdXRtX3Rlcm09MjI5NDBfZnRkMQ/gagD-Eg/s2h88f3fc4a)
I personally created the **47th President Founders Club** for one reason only:
To permanently honor the patriots who founded and carried the entire MAGA movement from Day One! The ones who never wavered, never surrendered, and refused to let them destroy our country twice.
I had my team pull the very best files, millions of patriot names, and I went through them myself.

**Your name rose straight to the top.** ****

**[](https://link.email.freethinkerdaily.com/click/e134288/VaHR0cHM6Ly9zZWN1cmUud2lucmVkLmNvbS90cnVtcC1uYXRpb25hbC1jb21taXR0ZWUtamZjL2xwLXByc3AtZW1haWwtNDd0aC1wcmVzLWZvdW5kZXJzLWNsdWItdjQtczEtc2Iv/SZW1haWxfZnJlZXRoaW5rZXJkYWlseV9jb20yNjA1MTA/LbmNsZ2t3dW9CNg/qP3V0bV9tZWRpdW09YnImdXRtX3Rlcm09MjI5NDBfZnRkMQ/gagD-Eg/s2h88f3fc4a)** That’s why I’m personally inviting you to become a Charter Member of **my 47th President Founders Club**. **[](https://link.email.freethinkerdaily.com/click/e134288/VaHR0cHM6Ly9zZWN1cmUud2lucmVkLmNvbS90cnVtcC1uYXRpb25hbC1jb21taXR0ZWUtamZjL2xwLXByc3AtZW1haWwtNDd0aC1wcmVzLWZvdW5kZXJzLWNsdWItdjQtczEtc2Iv/SZW1haWxfZnJlZXRoaW5rZXJkYWlseV9jb20yNjA1MTA/LbmNsZ2t3dW9CNg/qP3V0bV9tZWRpdW09YnImdXRtX3Rlcm09MjI5NDBfZnRkMQ/gagD-Eg/s2h88f3fc4a)**
[CONGRATULATIONS!](https://link.email.freethinkerdaily.com/click/e134288/VaHR0cHM6Ly9zZWN1cmUud2lucmVkLmNvbS90cnVtcC1uYXRpb25hbC1jb21taXR0ZWUtamZjL2xwLXByc3AtZW1haWwtNDd0aC1wcmVzLWZvdW5kZXJzLWNsdWItdjQtczEtc2Iv/SZW1haWxfZnJlZXRoaW5rZXJkYWlseV9jb20yNjA1MTA/LbmNsZ2t3dW9CNg/qP3V0bV9tZWRpdW09YnImdXRtX3Rlcm09MjI5NDBfZnRkMQ/gagD-Eg/s2h88f3fc4a)
Only a few spots exist in the entire country. I’m holding one for you!
**_[But only for the next 24 hours you can claim your spot: ACT FAST>](https://link.email.freethinkerdaily.com/click/e134288/VaHR0cHM6Ly9zZWN1cmUud2lucmVkLmNvbS90cnVtcC1uYXRpb25hbC1jb21taXR0ZWUtamZjL2xwLXByc3AtZW1haWwtNDd0aC1wcmVzLWZvdW5kZXJzLWNsdWItdjQtczEtc2Iv/SZW1haWxfZnJlZXRoaW5rZXJkYWlseV9jb20yNjA1MTA/LbmNsZ2t3dW9CNg/qP3V0bV9tZWRpdW09YnImdXRtX3Rlcm09MjI5NDBfZnRkMQ/gagD-Eg/s2h88f3fc4a)_**
Don’t miss your shot to stand with the patriots who made the greatest comeback in American history.
Your name could be one of them.
I am counting on you especially at this very moment in time. MAGA is going to need all of the support it can get to hold its Congressional majority during the midterm elections this November.
\- Don’t let me down.

clean_body: Is this Friend? | | | | EXCLUSIVE OFFER FROM THE DESK OF DONALD J. TRUMP Dear Friend, President Trump requests your presence in the 47th President Founders Club. You’re not asleep! But yes, most people would dream of receiving an email like this one. I personally created the 47th President Founders Club for one reason only: To permanently honor the patriots who founded and carried the entire MAGA movement from Day One! The ones who never wavered, never surrendered, and refused to let them destroy our country twice. I had my team pull the very best files, millions of patriot names, and I went through them myself. Your name rose straight to the top. ** That’s why I’m personally inviting you to become a Charter Member of my 47th President Founders Club. Only a few spots exist in the entire country. I’m holding one for you! Don’t miss your shot to stand with the patriots who made the greatest comeback in American history. Your name could be one of them. I am counting on you especially at this very moment in time. MAGA is going to need all of the support it can get to hold its Congressional majority during the midterm elections this November. \- Don’t let me down. Thank you and God bless you, President Trump | | | | | | | | | | | | Contributions to Trump National Committee JFC Inc. are not deductible for federal income tax purposes. $5. That's what I'm asking you to chip in today to help me win this race for Governor of Georgia. Just $5. $5 because political analysts have rated this race a toss-up. $5 because Republicans and their Super PAC allies are already gearing up to spend millions to defeat us. $5 because I'm running to protect voting rights, lower costs for working families, and build a Georgia that works for everyone -- not just the wealthy and well-connected. And $5 because I don't have billionaire donors funding this campaign. I'm relying on grassroots supporters like you. I know $5 might not feel like much. But when thousands of people step up together, it adds up fast -- and it's how we win tough races like this. We've set a goal to raise $10,000 before our next fundraising deadline, but we're still falling short. Patriot,
---
It's Gary Sinise here. You may know me from my roles in movies like Apollo 13 _ _ and The Green Mile or the CBS television series CSI: NY - but it was in 1994 playing the role of Lt. Dan in Forrest Gump that changed my life and inspired my enduring connection to our defenders, veterans, and first responders. I've served as an Honorary Grand Marshal for the National Memorial Day Parade in Washington, D.C. nearly every year since American Veterans Center revived it in 2005. **But I've never been more excited to serve as an Honorary Grand Marshall than I am this year - the year of America's 250****th**** birthday.**
---
[](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=69e13b26c2ed48f18ddcad31b11c75bd&_e=lRRmuZVuspCSjFDQsderx2BGIfLmzx6S4YAjdkuaJTfWUf8Uzf7IbZcNGNmmfCpu-Rvx5CqTs8MlofHipyM36oQKMWkA97tq9EMoTC0UpcUbnHRrt5ZNbc-tPs5kn-xJg9wZSBn0U866dyANZ9mba-SDsRivFOZYWHilf5OgbbLNUdj_xkiAJKIoVOvy6ZtJEmdOMHa7S_CQV1y4_hRs7zFW7uaLlEe10qwe4nYsuxreKHUc8UNjjIErUPRIBH-EfOOEIjlCi59beiowv8i6wIR-9FTwdq9zQbL-V4Fz2Z-q0672NdBbCYDI85_c0QVJMM0KquSha8obGt0HFqsYzZSpbEoZSNhWNcKl51H_QFGMtNna-bhzSNWuIATmyYBY8StLu3viRUXpJhbq-GRluB27sUWJINnfhT1z3haG_qE9MPrW2YRYPtZZTAGmkOEGkf6lJ5u_KiVpjpdom8lhy5wm-LpcQR4GGgLDMlSClZMzU_KQ1Ds-p9z6hIs7CCyIHPivMpzHtPl9aesq_NADJ_sojV4kKzztFmA1qpCH3B5sfTcBYiyipfQUQAiSLinG9VZfU1O_tSDn1ztQk4wJtZFTcMuIxJP3reXoq0dlncJzWYlYzOt__ENEibuqc8aLt9fBCwq3bVqhZOyFUoG9uq4KsuriED6ul2OVAj4N8hbmylyNb4jy58rl6Hn7xZ_w)

Patriot, this Memorial Day marks the first major national act of remembrance of the veterans who made the ultimate sacrifice to defend America from its enemies and ensure it has remained the Land of the Free for the last 250 years. And this year's National Memorial Day Parade will be a special edition - the biggest parade yet - where national memory meets living history as veterans from every military generation celebrate America and honor the service and sacrifice of their fallen brethren. **Patriot, the National Memorial Day Parade is ENIRELY FUNDED by private contributions, including from generous patriots like you.** **[In light of America’s 250th birthday and the special opportunity we have to honor veterans this year, will you chip in today to help support the parade with a gift of $25, $50, $75, $150, or more?](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=69e13b26c2ed48f18ddcad31b11c75bd&_e=lRRmuZVuspCSjFDQsderx2BGIfLmzx6S4YAjdkuaJTfWUf8Uzf7IbZcNGNmmfCpu-Rvx5CqTs8MlofHipyM36oQKMWkA97tq9EMoTC0UpcUbnHRrt5ZNbc-tPs5kn-xJg9wZSBn0U866dyANZ9mba-SDsRivFOZYWHilf5OgbbLNUdj_xkiAJKIoVOvy6ZtJEmdOMHa7S_CQV1y4_hRs7zFW7uaLlEe10qwe4nYsuxreKHUc8UNjjIErUPRIBH-EjjhwWl06aX7eHjLAclYUgzOaWbMiFPTjFfM8ulqy6Q5zJG_9OJId5V5jXB1M_Q0doPSKYBdzLBfnj9wdFly-hIzE_D4jozrAE0hq-yXLlDkxp-GPXVGeTnQhS_RjMvrLfnznYnfwzWFTG9py73iBgzcZBOtK8PjLOw_nPjyY-Adl1sXsMiRDe2owbKO8KFToLJQk4tUMP1hauuVctvGdDRdfCUli4C_uwRulkRBIQY8LNpEGCu0JiShxBFY0hQB0zgXRwP9nDt4Qxq5yWaFHlxrQv2VSsXGVS_bbDh06kPqVE93EoC8oyvVO1QNbADkBoVAeTWQI5TEqlC9oyZXfOhOsTmDe1EDka0lD3BlQ4xI642uSzBFBWVoNVAtm1URONAwX4qpvTAI6SbFIHZgN0huIYVeIMj-gU8zSUi2z7ePv-KgcQi7M-Lysk8pbG6ty)**

On Memorial Day - not just this momentous year of military milestones, but every year - please join me in honoring those who made the ultimate sacrifice for our freedoms. Come to the National Memorial Day Parade in Washington, D.C. Visit a local veterans' cemetery. Send a note to a family of the fallen. Or simply take a quiet moment to think about the men and women who gave their lives to defend OUR country. I believe that while we can never do enough to express our gratitude to our defenders, veterans, and first responders, we can always do a little more. **Patriot, thank you for your support of America 's heroes. ** [**And please, if you’re able, make a gift to fund the National Memorial Day parade right now during America’s 250****th****birthday.**](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=69e13b26c2ed48f18ddcad31b11c75bd&_e=lRRmuZVuspCSjFDQsderx2BGIfLmzx6S4YAjdkuaJTfWUf8Uzf7IbZcNGNmmfCpu-Rvx5CqTs8MlofHipyM36oQKMWkA97tq9EMoTC0UpcUbnHRrt5ZNbc-tPs5kn-xJg9wZSBn0U866dyANZ9mba-SDsRivFOZYWHilf5OgbbLNUdj_xkiAJKIoVOvy6ZtJEmdOMHa7S_CQV1y4_hRs7zFW7uaLlEe10qwe4nYsuxreKHUc8UNjjIErUPRIBH-E1QasM3QS8jjcpjqUT0ZehE_zGphfGa86bnSkhi9P-U_cYVK1ToGN8TPuCvset_uGvymbZqFrpiMQb7UpFi4cVaLK_-SZ3ZClhSRH0vhFHxAuxizCJt9EscuhZDb2RjRhYTXsuJT-OOBPetRzR5Wck8SWhNPMKtmriEJo_pepaZCSm8URLPvM7tIM4czTt1h-Fnif_ZlfV1LyXPV2Alu2dt008-UYhBzN2snGt94A-JP0q0d3DmlWAwwg9LrXMvL_adlmFgMjLuoiAaG0Gx-UBq6pzNOLwijyE2lnbDuslrObMaQJBVi_px-CdXDasz6aJzxSF100McR3y1Oxp4Vw3z02tiNsFhaYlQY60kuxhepNPixozkSSK9LmUkSQlBVGTPVPN1h1VMgDGtZ5dm4QQskhFJfZhwUX-rRkTF2vXrqUZVA9P8nQphK_lvRyWvQ717Mlva8f_vP_t3_axCbriQ%3D%3D)

clean_body: | | | | Patriot, It's Gary Sinise here. You may know me from my roles in movies like Apollo 13 and The Green Mile or the CBS television series CSI: NY - but it was in 1994 playing the role of Lt. Dan in Forrest Gump that changed my life and inspired my enduring connection to our defenders, veterans, and first responders. I've served as an Honorary Grand Marshal for the National Memorial Day Parade in Washington, D.C. nearly every year since American Veterans Center revived it in 2005. But I've never been more excited to serve as an Honorary Grand Marshall than I am this year - the year of America's 250th birthday. Patriot, this Memorial Day marks the first major national act of remembrance of the veterans who made the ultimate sacrifice to defend America from its enemies and ensure it has remained the Land of the Free for the last 250 years. And this year's National Memorial Day Parade will be a special edition - the biggest parade yet - where national memory meets living history as veterans from every military generation celebrate America and honor the service and sacrifice of their fallen brethren. Patriot, the National Memorial Day Parade is ENIRELY FUNDED by private contributions, including from generous patriots like you. WWII veterans were a key part of the first parade when it was revived in 2005, as they have been every year since for the last 20 years. But this may be the last year we have the opportunity to have these brave men and women with us for the parade. | | | | | | | | This year is a rare moment when living witnesses to World War II and America 's 250th birthday overlap. And no matter how much you can give to this important cause, I want to ask something additional of you. On Memorial Day - not just this momentous year of military milestones, but every year - please join me in honoring those who made the ultimate sacrifice for our freedoms. Come to the National Memorial Day Parade in Washington, D.C. Visit a local veterans' cemetery. Send a note to a family of the fallen. Or simply take a quiet moment to think about the men and women who gave their lives to defend OUR country. I believe that while we can never do enough to express our gratitude to our defenders, veterans, and first responders, we can always do a little more. Patriot, thank you for your support of America 's heroes. Sincerely, Tim Holbert President American Veterans Center | | | The mission of the American Veterans Center and the World War II Veterans Committee is to preserve and promote the legacy and experiences of America's veterans and active duty service personnel from World War II through today. A non-profit educational organization, the AVC and WWIIVC are funded solely through generous contributions from people like you. All contributions are tax-deductible. (C) American Veterans Center 1100 N. Glebe Road Suite 910, Arlington, VA 22201

| [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/131151963/620106858/-148599213?refcode=20260509&amount=25&utm_campaign=0509&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNjIvMS8xMTk4NDUiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiNTJjMGQ4OTAtYmI0Yy1mMTExLThlZjItMDAwZDNhMTRiNjQwIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=6ax_PdJLRsDnaqYlrAzA7uASsUsMqaPdj2i2pn4fsHo=) [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/131151964/620106859/-148599213?refcode=20260509&amount=25&utm_campaign=0509&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNjIvMS8xMTk4NDUiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiNTJjMGQ4OTAtYmI0Yy1mMTExLThlZjItMDAwZDNhMTRiNjQwIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=6ax_PdJLRsDnaqYlrAzA7uASsUsMqaPdj2i2pn4fsHo=)

| Dear Peter, The more voters I meet and hear from, the more I realize that the issues and concerns we face in this country are universal. We all suffer from the rising costs of basic necessities, healthcare and housing. We all long to have our dignity, humanity, and Constitutional rights protected. And we all understand how imperative it is to keep this administration in check before it’s too late. As a U.S. Representative, I will tackle the housing supply crisis by modernizing outdated tax codes, eliminating corporate ownership of homes, building more affordable housing on publicly owned land and providing federal financing for new rental home developments. I will overhaul our healthcare system by shifting to more proactive, value-based models that demand transparency, utilizing technology to optimize treatment and eliminating price gauging. I will fight to protect our human and Constitutional rights by opposing authoritarian abuses of power and holding government officials accountable. I took an oath as a lawyer to uphold the Constitution and act with the highest ethical standards. I have a demonstrated track record of doing both while standing up to power structures and systems that seek to oppress the most vulnerable in our communities. Please help me take back our government so that it will truly represent and serve the people like never before. **I need your support!**[Every dollar we raise right now](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/131151965/620106860/-148599213?refcode=20260509&amount=25&utm_campaign=0509&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNjIvMS8xMTk4NDUiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiNTJjMGQ4OTAtYmI0Yy1mMTExLThlZjItMDAwZDNhMTRiNjQwIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=6ax_PdJLRsDnaqYlrAzA7uASsUsMqaPdj2i2pn4fsHo=) is going to reach voters in the district who will deliver this victory for us all. Please join the fight and follow me on [Facebook](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/131151966/620106861/2119237959?utm_campaign=0509&refcode=20260509&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNjIvMS8xMTk4NDUiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiNTJjMGQ4OTAtYmI0Yy1mMTExLThlZjItMDAwZDNhMTRiNjQwIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=6ax_PdJLRsDnaqYlrAzA7uASsUsMqaPdj2i2pn4fsHo=&emci=08f4456f-ba4c-f111-8ef2-000d3a14b640&emdi=52c0d890-bb4c-f111-8ef2-000d3a14b640&ceid=18611292), [Instagram](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/131151967/620106862/1527795600?utm_campaign=0509&refcode=20260509&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNjIvMS8xMTk4NDUiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiNTJjMGQ4OTAtYmI0Yy1mMTExLThlZjItMDAwZDNhMTRiNjQwIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=6ax_PdJLRsDnaqYlrAzA7uASsUsMqaPdj2i2pn4fsHo=&emci=08f4456f-ba4c-f111-8ef2-000d3a14b640&emdi=52c0d890-bb4c-f111-8ef2-000d3a14b640&ceid=18611292), [Bluesky](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/131151968/620106863/-1926114553?utm_campaign=0509&refcode=20260509&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNjIvMS8xMTk4NDUiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiNTJjMGQ4OTAtYmI0Yy1mMTExLThlZjItMDAwZDNhMTRiNjQwIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=6ax_PdJLRsDnaqYlrAzA7uASsUsMqaPdj2i2pn4fsHo=&emci=08f4456f-ba4c-f111-8ef2-000d3a14b640&emdi=52c0d890-bb4c-f111-8ef2-000d3a14b640&ceid=18611292) and [TikTok](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/131151969/620106864/2069898425?utm_campaign=0509&refcode=20260509&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNjIvMS8xMTk4NDUiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiNTJjMGQ4OTAtYmI0Yy1mMTExLThlZjItMDAwZDNhMTRiNjQwIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=6ax_PdJLRsDnaqYlrAzA7uASsUsMqaPdj2i2pn4fsHo=&emci=08f4456f-ba4c-f111-8ef2-000d3a14b640&emdi=52c0d890-bb4c-f111-8ef2-000d3a14b640&ceid=18611292). name: Andrew Sypher, Turning Point USA
subject: Charlie warned us about this...
body:
| | | [](http://links.stoppingsocialistdems.com/u/click?_t=4dcc2aab65fd4d0da6a107b0eef86d43&_m=6d93c3625dbf4bfd90c9d0883a317f2e&_e=Pvoah26cIOW9lCtEPkx9qTs0xUCr0h6Ux6mC28_h84qxOXVnmApRfldYc786tYI6ImewvYY9N4LtYEWnl4qf87Bg4PxNf84kq8gyYo3ulBzw0vnoHKy-f100SgAnGuYWpphilfMILX8gP1YqjIQB3R-5Hc-KEDSyIotaCk4tCxsiAE4Ab3mlL1GcMfxFweJmfydJlCve3rOJeaMd6eRKkRK63k1vnve3Uh0iAGmH1MCmgzC6yhqySxO-QmFbW7fdr5Ypz7Z7sQnxNxuNpbCaKKUMI4lszYGbRtZ7jKjpNMcBFm6GFZAgy35NqygCNF6iA-Z6VOBRfo6ZCfaxUwkvl6IDQY4hZkKRNqOP8TLZ93Yo7OT086bXmU352PsdCZDExkmoIdH-1o3WrX15FzLsmmsqOUSUr0pGJb1o-iFu6Gxua-MdcpjkKIoDtWVYDpydok7RQ37HXJ15peh_sBmozqrZAR9ZYybQyNXMy6Q0tVoa3IvCFG4KZ_WUF8ar-qIumJ1HrO3tVbcjivI8B-5godV8cMgtQL7mT-VQ-Gj5t_XUrIE1_j-s8H1nqnPGH61KZf2BP9bnLM_2_gOwXX7PrSenhdscN0tBoVAOYr_XpEyeQwpU4NiX-mvJgdqiQex6hyGMXSqS1M20nrHlwBtDLdHvwz2V8Uws3o9l0sSuLBu36YTFH_dti00TusCzkmNag60KQ6I2qwb1uUe42SSW1g%3D%3D)
---
| | Peter,
---
I'm going to be blunt with you.

We are closer to losing this country than most people are willing to admit.

Not someday. Not "if things keep going this way."

Right now.

And the scariest part?

It's not happening in Washington. It's happening in classrooms.

High schools. Colleges.

Places where the next generation is being shaped -- or more accurately... reshaped.

If you've ever looked at what's coming out of our schools and thought: _" What happened to this country?" _

You're not wrong. You're seeing it clearly.

Because while most people are arguing online... while they're hoping things will turn around... while they're waiting for the next election to fix everything...

The other side is doing something far more dangerous.

They're raising the next generation.

Earlier. Faster. And with zero resistance in most places.

That's how countries are lost.

Slowly. Then all at once.

But here's the thing that should give a patriot like you hope...

There is one place where that trend is actually being challenged.

_And it shouldn 't even exist. _

**Just one year ago, Turning Point USA 's high school program -- which is now called "Club America" -- was in about 1,200 schools.**
That alone felt like a miracle.

Because starting even ONE chapter today takes courage most adults don't have.

Conservative students get mocked. Targeted. Threatened. Shut down.

And yet...

_They stepped up anyway. _

About that time, Charlie called me.

He didn't sound optimistic... He sounded urgent.

"Andrew, we've got to move faster."

I told him we were. He stopped me.

"No. You're not thinking what I'm thinking. I want to be in 35,000 high schools."

I actually laughed.

"Charlie... there aren't even 35,000 high schools in America."

"Okay," he said. "How many are there?"

"About 27,000."

And without hesitation: "Good. Let's do 27,000."

I remember sitting there thinking to myself... we're barely in 1,200 schools.

We didn't have the staff. We didn't have the infrastructure. We didn't even have the roadmap yet.

But Charlie wasn't fazed.

_" We'll figure it out." _

That was him.

He didn't wait for perfect conditions.

Because he knew something most people don't want to face: If we wait... _we lose everything. _

And now?

Less than a year later...
---

**We 're in 3,300 schools. **

**Thirteen percent of all high schools in America. **

**Eight states are now backing this effort to put a Club America chapter in every high school statewide. **

_That shouldn 't be possible. _

Not in this environment. Not with the level of hostility these students face every single day.

And yet... it's still happening.

_But Peter, here 's the part you need to understand: _

This is not a victory. It's a foothold.

_Because in the other 87% of schools? _

There is no resistance. None.

Just one-sided propaganda from the Left.

One-sided pressure on kids who are too young to even realize what's happening to them.

That's the reality.

The question isn't whether we're fighting. We are.

The question is whether it's enough.

Because right now, the students stepping up through Club America...

They're not the majority. _They 're the exception. _

They're the ones willing to take the heat.

The ones willing to stand alone.

The ones willing to risk being targeted just to say: _" I love this country." _

Charlie Kirk wasn't just dreaming big when he called me last year about Club America's progress.

clean_body: | | | | | Peter, I'm going to be blunt with you. We are closer to losing this country than most people are willing to admit. Not someday. Not "if things keep going this way." Right now. And the scariest part? It's not happening in Washington. It's happening in classrooms. High schools. Colleges. Places where the next generation is being shaped -- or more accurately... reshaped. If you've ever looked at what's coming out of our schools and thought: " What happened to this country?" You're not wrong. You're seeing it clearly. Because while most people are arguing online... while they're hoping things will turn around... while they're waiting for the next election to fix everything... The other side is doing something far more dangerous. They're raising the next generation. Earlier. Faster. And with zero resistance in most places. That's how countries are lost. Slowly. Then all at once. But here's the thing that should give a patriot like you hope... There is one place where that trend is actually being challenged. And it shouldn 't even exist. Just one year ago, Turning Point USA 's high school program -- which is now called "Club America" -- was in about 1,200 schools. That alone felt like a miracle. Because starting even ONE chapter today takes courage most adults don't have. Conservative students get mocked. Targeted. Threatened. Shut down. And yet... They stepped up anyway. About that time, Charlie called me. He didn't sound optimistic... He sounded urgent. "Andrew, we've got to move faster." I told him we were. He stopped me. "No. You're not thinking what I'm thinking. I want to be in 35,000 high schools." I actually laughed. "Charlie... there aren't even 35,000 high schools in America." "Okay," he said. "How many are there?" "About 27,000." And without hesitation: "Good. Let's do 27,000." I remember sitting there thinking to myself... we're barely in 1,200 schools. We didn't have the staff. We didn't have the infrastructure. We didn't even have the roadmap yet. But Charlie wasn't fazed. " We'll figure it out." That was him. He didn't wait for perfect conditions. Because he knew something most people don't want to face: If we wait... we lose everything. And now? Less than a year later... We 're in 3,300 schools. Thirteen percent of all high schools in America. Eight states are now backing this effort to put a Club America chapter in every high school statewide. That shouldn 't be possible. Not in this environment. Not with the level of hostility these students face every single day. And yet... it's still happening. But Peter, here 's the part you need to understand: This is not a victory. It's a foothold. Because in the other 87% of schools? There is no resistance. None. Just one-sided propaganda from the Left. One-sided pressure on kids who are too young to even realize what's happening to them. That's the reality. The question isn't whether we're fighting. We are. The question is whether it's enough. Because right now, the students stepping up through Club America... They're not the majority. They 're the exception. They're the ones willing to take the heat. The ones willing to stand alone. The ones willing to risk being targeted just to say: " I love this country." And every time one of those students raises their hand... We have a choice. Back them. Or leave them on their own. Because when a student starts a chapter, we send them an activism kit -- with American flags. Pocket Constitutions. Leadership tools. Everything they need to actually stand their ground. Not symbolically. For real. They've already made the decision to lead. All they're waiting on... is you and me. Each activism kit costs $25. That 's it. $25 to make sure one student doesn't have to stand alone against the Left in a hostile school. $25 to put real tools in their hands. $25 to push back -- even if it's one campus at a time. But here's what gives me hope, Peter... Club America isn't slowing down. It's accelerating. Because every day, more students are stepping forward. Not because it's easy or popular... But because they know what 's at stake. They're starting chapters in schools where they were told not to. They're speaking truth in classrooms where the Left once went unchallenged. They're choosing courage in places designed to make them conform. And they're not alone. They're finding each other. They're bringing more students with them every day. They're building something real -- rooted in faith and freedom, grounded in truth, and unafraid to say that America is worth defending. That's how movements are built. Not from the top down... But from the ground up. One student. One school. One chapter at a time. And Peter -- that's exactly how we take this country back. But only if we move fast enough. Because the Left isn't slowing down. They're not taking a break. They're not afraid to push their anti-American ideas in every classroom they're in. And if we don't match that urgency... if we don't meet that moment with equal conviction... Then the generational window Charlie Kirk opened to save our country closes. And once it closes... It closes for good. That's what's at stake. Let's not waste this moment. Let's back our brave students -- while it still matters. | | For Charlie, Andrew Sypher Chief Field OfficerTurning Point USA P.S. I need you to hear this clearly... Charlie Kirk wasn't just dreaming big when he called me last year about Club America's progress. He was warning us: "The enemy is moving younger. They're coming after students earlier. We don 't have time to wait." And he was right. Look around. Club America may be in 13% of high schools... But in the other 87%? There is no pushback against the Left. No one telling those kids the truth. Just a Leftist pipeline -- from classroom... to belief... to voting booth. And once that pipeline is complete... It 's over. Peter, this is one of the last places a patriot like you can stop it before it 's too late to save our country. You may not be able to step into a hostile high school and stand for truth like these students do. But you can give critical support to a young freedom fighter who will. There's still time to turn this country around... and this is one of the few ways we can actually do it -- one student, one school, one chapter at a time. 4940 East Beverly Road Phoenix, Arizona 85044

name: Fair Fight Action
subject: FWD: How we move forward now that the Roberts Court has gutted what’s left of the Voting Rights Act
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY FAIR FIGHT ACTION
body:
The actions we take in the coming hours, days, and weeks will shape the future of our democracy |
---
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/131152309/620108275/1793776944?refcode=emm_ffa_20260510_T1_SYACallaisLiftNote_v1s1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDMvMS84ODQ1MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1MjlhMzY5My1iYzRjLWYxMTEtOGVmMi0wMDBkM2ExNGI2NDAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=EIy489sj4N3V-T1q5i-5usNj2niEmwYWdieHY12ZD4s=&emci=4d9a3693-bc4c-f111-8ef2-000d3a14b640&emdi=529a3693-bc4c-f111-8ef2-000d3a14b640&ceid=1037277)

| | Take it from Stacey Abrams: even though the Supreme Court has now gutted what’s left of the Voting Rights Act, _we still have a path forward._ We can still prevent voters of color from having their voices silenced by rigged maps. We can still defend fair elections with fair representation. But MAGA is moving fast to seize unearned power. The actions we take in the coming hours, days, and weeks will shape the future of our democracy. [**Keep scrolling to read Stacey’s note on the work that lies ahead, and make a donation to fuel the fight.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/131152310/620108276/-982160988?refcode=emm_ffa_20260510_T1_SYACallaisLiftNote_v1s1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDMvMS84ODQ1MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1MjlhMzY5My1iYzRjLWYxMTEtOGVmMi0wMDBkM2ExNGI2NDAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=EIy489sj4N3V-T1q5i-5usNj2niEmwYWdieHY12ZD4s=) In solidarity, The Fair Fight Action Team | [DONATE](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/131152311/620108277/1914067121?refcode=emm_ffa_20260510_T1_SYACallaisLiftNote_v1s1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDMvMS84ODQ1MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1MjlhMzY5My1iYzRjLWYxMTEtOGVmMi0wMDBkM2ExNGI2NDAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=EIy489sj4N3V-T1q5i-5usNj2niEmwYWdieHY12ZD4s=)

\-----------Forwarded Message-----------
**From** : Stacey Abrams
**Subject** : How we move forward now that the Roberts Court has gutted what’s left of the Voting Rights Act
The Voting Rights Act ended Jim Crow. But now the Supreme Court — Chief Justice John Roberts’ Court — has effectively ended much of what’s left of the Voting Rights Act — setting the stage for voters of color to be silenced.
**Now it’s up to us to defend the freedom to participate in our democracy. The actions we take now will help determine whose voice gets heard and which communities get locked out of political power. **
This morning, I spoke before the Tennessee State Legislature — the body that is being asked to dismantle the protections that helped bury Jim Crow. The fallout from the Court’s misguided ruling in _Louisiana v. Callais_ has been immediate. Florida has already redrawn its congressional districts, and Mississippi is moving fast behind them. And in Tennessee, Republicans seek to do the same — by shattering the political voice of Memphis, one of the great majority-Black cities in America. I had to speak up. [**So I need to ask: In the face of this Roberts Court decision, will you make a donation to Fair Fight Action as they defend the right to fair representation and an equal vote in elections?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/131152312/620108278/-982160988?refcode=emm_ffa_20260510_T1_SYACallaisLiftNote_v1s1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDMvMS84ODQ1MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1MjlhMzY5My1iYzRjLWYxMTEtOGVmMi0wMDBkM2ExNGI2NDAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=EIy489sj4N3V-T1q5i-5usNj2niEmwYWdieHY12ZD4s=)

---|---
The Court’s cruel ruling in _Louisiana v. Callais_ is a direct hit to the heart of the Voting Rights Act and the fragile promise that every American’s vote should carry equal weight.
Until the Voting Rights Act, the 15th Amendment — which barred the federal government and the states from denying the right to vote based on race, color, and servitude — was routinely ignored by Southern states using the legal mechanism of Jim Crow.
Poll taxes, literacy tests, and language restrictions were the most visible tools of voter suppression.
But hostile political regimes also drew the boundaries of voting lines and districts to make it impossible for Black and brown voters to elect anyone who represented their interests.
Enter the Voting Rights Act.
Section 2 of that act made it illegal to design districts to dilute or block racial communities from finding common cause. It also required a corrective action.
But now the _Callais_ decision has dramatically narrowed that core protection against racially discriminatory redistricting.
**The consequences of this disastrous ruling are already reverberating across our country.**
Majority-Black districts could be dismantled or diluted. Latino districts in fast-growing areas could lose political muscle. Representatives championing the minority communities they represent will likely lose their seats. Congressional maps in closely divided states could be tilted further away from competitiveness.
**But the Roberts Court is not the only actor in this story. Alongside groups like Fair Fight Action, we can continue the fight for multiracial democracy. We can continue calling for reforms that ensure equal representation in the halls of power.**
Congress retains the authority to strengthen voting rights protections. State legislatures can adopt independent redistricting commissions or refuse to vote for racially discriminatory maps. Voters can reach out to elected officials at every level of government and demand that they publicly take a stand for voting rights. Civic organizations can mobilize communities to solve for voter suppression tactics even when the rules shift.
**Fair Fight Action will continue pushing this vital work forward.**
As the Roberts Court considered Callais, Fair Fight Action laid bare the stakes of the case by identifying how gutting Section 2 could secure enough safe Republican seats to lock in one-party rule for a generation.
**Now the team is mobilizing advocates across the country. Just this past weekend, Fair Fight Action directly contacted our communities in Tennessee, Louisiana, and Alabama. And collectively, we are rallying a movement behind fair elections with fair maps, pressing forward for proactive voting rights protections at the state and national level, working to mitigate the effects of voter suppression attempts, and fighting to reverse the authoritarian playbook.**
**[But they need our help to counter racially discriminatory gerrymandering and defend our democracy. Can you make a donation of](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/131152319/620108285/-982160988?refcode=emm_ffa_20260510_T1_SYACallaisLiftNote_v1s1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDMvMS84ODQ1MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1MjlhMzY5My1iYzRjLWYxMTEtOGVmMi0wMDBkM2ExNGI2NDAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=EIy489sj4N3V-T1q5i-5usNj2niEmwYWdieHY12ZD4s=)**[**$30 or any amount today to help Fair Fight Action keep up its urgent mission?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/131152320/620108286/-982160988?refcode=emm_ffa_20260510_T1_SYACallaisLiftNote_v1s1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDMvMS84ODQ1MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1MjlhMzY5My1iYzRjLWYxMTEtOGVmMi0wMDBkM2ExNGI2NDAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=EIy489sj4N3V-T1q5i-5usNj2niEmwYWdieHY12ZD4s=)
Thank you,
Stacey Abrams

name: Freedom 250
subject: Join Us May 17th for Rededicate 250 on the National Mall!
body:
A once-in-a-generation gathering of prayer, praise & thanksgiving celebrating 250 years of God's blessings on America.
Join us on May 17 on the National Mall for Rededicate 250 — a once-in-a-generation gathering of prayer, praise & thanksgiving celebrating 250 years of God’s blessings on America.
|
---
A HISTORIC INVITATION
# Join Us for an Historic Moment
of Prayer & Thanksgiving
|
---
You are invited to join us for **Rededicate 250: A National Jubilee of Prayer, Praise & Thanksgiving** on Sunday, May 17 as Americans from across the country come together for a once-in-a-generation gathering on the National Mall in Washington, D.C.
This historic gathering will celebrate **250 years of God’s providence and blessings on the United States** through worship, prayer, music, scripture, testimonies, and a national rededication of our country as one nation under God. The event will feature faith leaders from across the country coming together in gratitude, prayer, and celebration of our great nation as part of our **250th anniversary** and is **FREE to the public**. | | | DATE | Sunday, May 17, 2026
---|---
TIME | 9:00 AM – 6:00 PM ET
---|---
LOCATION | National Mall, Washington, D.C.
---|---
[LEARN MORE & RSVP](https://link.win.donaldjtrump.)
---
|
---
FEATURED VOICES
## Join Us and Hear From
SPEAKERS
---
★ | Speaker Mike Johnson 56th Speaker of the U.S. House of Representatives
---|---
★ | Secretary Marco Rubio 72nd United States Secretary of State
★ | Secretary Pete Hegseth 29th United States Secretary of War
★ | Franklin Graham President and CEO of Samaritan’s Purse and the Billy Graham Evangelistic Association
★ | Bishop Robert Barron Bishop of the Diocese of Winona–Rochester and Founder of Word on Fire Catholic Ministries
★ | Cardinal Timothy Dolan Archbishop Emeritus of the Archdiocese of New York and Former President of the United States Conference of Catholic Bishops
★ | Pastor Jonathan Falwell Chancellor of Liberty University and Senior Pastor of Thomas Road Baptist Church
★ | Jonathan Roumie Renowned Actor, _The Chosen_ and the 2023 film _Jesus Revolution_
★ | Eric Metaxas New York Times Best-Selling Author and Host of _The Eric Metaxas Show_
★ | Sadie Robertson Huff Founder of LO Worship and Host of _WHOA That’s Good_ Podcast
PERFORMERS
---
★ | Chris Tomlin Grammy-winning American contemporary Christian artist and worship leader
---|---
★ | Liberty Worship Collective and Liberty University Praise

name: Ruben Gallego
subject: Here's the truth, Peter
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Gallego for Arizona
body:
#

Peter, it’s Ruben.
I know your inbox is full of emails from candidates and campaigns asking for your support.
I know that because my inbox is full of them, too.
For that reason, I try not to reach out to you unless I need to. And when I do, I’m not going to try to scare you into donating. The world is not going to end if you don’t chip in to this email, and one donation of $5 is not going to end Trump’s presidency.
But the truth is, those donations are the largest source of funding we have.
They help support my team — the people I depend on to communicate with millions of people around the country. They help me cover the cost of my travel to and from battleground states. I get asked to come out and help folks quite a bit, and that does cost money. But most of all, it shows the strength of our team.
We built something special in 2024, in my campaign for Senate. And to keep that going, to reach more people, to fight back against Trump, to help win majorities in Congress this November, I do have to ask for donations sometimes.
And when I do, I hope you don’t see it as an annoyance, but as a sign of how important you are to everything I do.
[**Can’t do this without you, Peter. And if you’re willing, I’m humbly asking you to make a donation to my campaign to help power this work.**](https://act.gallegoforarizona.com/go/1000?c0=ruben-em-may26.lHeo-J&refcode=em260510-1-160&t=1&akid=4129%2E734936%2EKu1nY1)

Hi, friend, it's Deb with an urgent question:
** _
[Is there ANYTHING I can say to convince you to donate ANY amount — before my weekly fundraising deadline — to help me win the New Mexico governor's race?](https://act.debhaaland.com/go/8180?refcode=jtk683-fr-nd&t=2&akid=9455%2E400544%2EW5Fa-w)_**

What if I told you we’re entering a critical phase of this race, and our campaign is operating with fewer resources than we need to compete in one of the largest states in the country?
What if I told you that there are now three Republicans running to flip New Mexico and several of them are using their own wealth to try to buy this race and bring an extreme agenda into our state, making it clear that we'll need a surge of grassroots support to stay ahead? **And now,** my self-funding opponent is doubling down on attack ads against me.
What if I told you that, now more than ever, Democratic governors are essential to serve as a backstop when the federal government abuses its resources and undermines civil liberties?
**Friend, I know we've got what it takes to win — but I can only get there if committed grassroots supporters like you help me reach every single goal from now through Election Day, including this one.**
**With time running out, I have to ask:_[Will you step up with a donation of $5, or anything at all, to help me reach my $15,000 weekly goal, win in New Mexico, and keep our state blue?](https://act.debhaaland.com/go/8180?refcode=jtk683-fr-nd&t=5&akid=9455%2E400544%2EW5Fa-w)_**

And if your legs feel heavy, tight, or swollen... ...you've been paying for their mistake every single day. See, most doctors still believe edema is just water retention in your blood vessels. That's why they hand out water pills like candies. But the truth is... The fluid building up in your legs is NOT in your bloodstream. Instead, it's stuck in a hidden that no one's talking about. You see, a little-known clinical study uncovered the REAL culprit behind those puffy ankles, tight skin, and that miserable "tree trunk" feeling... Shockingly, it has nothing to do with salt, blood pressure, or your kidneys. The real problem is buried deep inside your body... It's a forgotten network most doctors ignore. We call it your And when it gets backed up? ❌ It turns your legs into a toxic sponge... ❌ It swells your ankles like balloons... ❌ It even chokes your circulation, leaving your skin tight, red, and painfully tender. Now, here's the good news... A 32-year veteran holistic doctor has developed a breakthrough that could help... Flush toxic fluid out of your legs... Reduce painful swelling, and restore your freedom to move again. All without water pills, compression socks, or elevating your legs for hours a day. It's fast. It's natural. It's 100% safe. name: Ro Khanna
subject: Trump attacked just me for going on Fox News
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Ro for Congress
body:
https://rokhanna.com [https://rokhanna.com]
Peter,

Donald Trump just posted on Truth Social, attacking me and saying I shouldn’t be allowed to go on Fox News.
Why? Because he’s terrified.
He’s scared of a movement willing to go everywhere, speak to everyone, and build coalitions big enough to take on the corruption of both parties.
Before I explain more, will you rush a contribution right now so I can keep putting pressure on Trump and the political establishment? [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em-fund?refcode=05102026_TruthSocialAttack]
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em-fund?refcode=05102026_TruthSocialAttack [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em-fund?refcode=05102026_TruthSocialAttack]
I’ll go on Fox News. I’ll go into rural communities. I’ll debate anyone. Because if we want to rebuild this country, Democrats cannot afford to only talk to people who already agree with us.
And frankly, the man building a ballroom with foreign steel probably shouldn’t call himself the champion of American steel.
But as you learned from the Epstein files fight, I’m willing to work across the aisle when it helps the American people.
So here’s my message to Trump: If you really care about American workers, sign my bill to rebuild the American steel industry.
That’s the difference between us. I’m focused on rebuilding American manufacturing, lowering costs, and delivering for working people.
Trump is focused on division, distractions, and attacking anyone building an independent movement he can’t control.
And make no mistake: this movement is growing.
When people as different as Bernie Sanders and Marjorie Taylor Greene can agree that we have to stop endless wars, corruption, and corporate outsourcing, the political establishment starts to panic.
That’s why Trump is lashing out.

The weapon is the same. Only the target shifts.

The Kash Foundation exists to fight it — wherever it appears, whoever it's aimed at.

These patriots answered the call. _The Kash Foundation will not abandon them_.

Andrew Ollis

On Sunday evening, August 15, 1971, Richard Nixon interrupted regular television programming. | | | [-](https://links.research.firstinvestmentupdates.com/u/click?_t=6c5e8d0087884bb7b7cd2e3abb0e6b5f&_m=f4a2e27a9b6a408ba751b77c13a38789&_e=YBzsi0c6U8QfWM2SIVVVaDKPimzuret3QyoNjWBykMAS5NKqzN36379V2r-NtQhXmetRN5-Oz0cMn9Qs7mYXefvVsvEzStzDG9uaxbdG4q4z5N3e2P7U5H1jilYDc2FJjokI6JO6_2TmmXwCzXFcpZDDQRIHVLpoh7O-roD50voV1V8Ly0-uHt0NPu4GJ0YHvR01kJUGerzmF_tRRsfAqy2HMvw7x4dMry6brgC7eC4o_chGcAUGZwzOyPxvXc0isg3Os-OFtMo_YSl6e4IJ2zFAylsxr35JsQ2EPpIFp-dJkfBVm64btkh2JScgsjzjnay8lVq0j_qccTfwa2q82mwLngmEXVuaVZ29Fo_wfZZGyTXpkvcwzD_3aMpdhmkw)

| | Lifе and death Son of Mykhailo Sulyma, Ivan came from a petty noble (szlachta) family. He was born in Rohoshchi (next to Chernihiv). He served as an estate overseer for Stanisław Żółkiewski and later the family of Daniłowicze who inherited his lands; for that service in 1620 he was awarded three villages: Sulimówka, Kuczakiw and Lebedyn. Аll the villages todаy belong to the Boryspil Raion, Kyiv Oblast. His sons included Stepan (died 1659), a captain of Boryspil company, and Fedir (died 1691), a colonel of Pereiaslav regiment. He became popular among the unregistered Cossacks, leading them on campaigns to plunder Crimea and other Ottoman vassal territories. For organizing a revolt on an Ottoman slave galley and freeing Christian slaves[1] he received a medal from Pope Paul V himself. Eventually, Sulyma reached the rank of the hetman, which he held from 1628 to 1629 and 1630 to 1635. In 1635, after returning from an expedition to Black Sea against the Ottomans, he decided to rebel against the Polish–Lithuanian Commonwealth, which at that time controlled most of the Cossack territories, and whose nobility was trying to turn militant Cossacks into serfs.[citation needed] Ivan Sulyma took part in numerous campaigns of Sagaidachny against Tatars and Turks. In particular, it was the famous capture of Kafa (modern Theodosia), the main center of the slave trade on the Black Sea, Trapezont, Izmail, and also two attacks on Tsaregrad. On the night of 3 to 4 August 1635 he took the newly constructed Kodak fortress by surprise, burning it and executing its crew of about 200 people under Jean Marion. Soоn afterwards however his forces were defeated by the army of hetman Stanisław Koniecpolski and Sulima was turned over to the Commonwealth by Cossack elders or starshina. Together with several other leaders of his rebellion, Hetman Sulyma was executed in Warsaw on 12 December 1635. At first, the Polish King Władysław IV Waza, known for his friendly attitude towards the Cossacks, was hesitant to execute Sulyma, especially since he was a person upon whom the Pope himself bestowed his medal. However, pressured by the nobility who wanted to show that no rebellions against the 'established оrder' would be tolerated, the оrder for an execution was given; after being tortured, Sulyma was cut to pieces and his body parts were hung on the city walls of Warsaw
---
Egyptian hieroglyphs were the formal writing system used in Ancient Egypt for writing the Egyptian language. Hieroglyphs combined logographic, syllabic and alphabetic elements, with some 1,000 distinct characters.[3][4] Cursive hieroglyphs were used for religious literature on papyrus and wood. The later hieratic and demotic Egyptian scripts were derived from hieroglyphic writing, as was the Proto-Sinaitic script that later evolved into the Phoenician alphabet.[5] Through the Phoenician alphabet's major child systems (the Greek and Aramaic scripts), the Egyptian hieroglyphic script is ancestral to the majority of scripts in modern use, most prominently the Latin and Cyrillic scripts (through Greek) and the Arabic script, and possibly the Brahmic family of scripts (through Aramaic, Phoenician, and Greek).[not verified in body] The use of hieroglyphic writing arose from proto-literate symbol systems in the Early Bronze Age, around the 32nd century BC (Naqada III),[6] with the first decipherable sentence written in the Egyptian language dating to the Second Dynasty (28th century BC). Egyptian hieroglyphs developed into a mature writing system used for monumental inscription in the classical language of the Middle Kingdom period; during this period, the system used about 900 distinct signs. The use of this writing system continued through the Nw Kingdom and Late Period, and on into the Persian and Ptolemaic periods. Late survivals of hieroglyphic use are found well into the Roman period, extending into the 4th century AD.[7] With the final closing of pagan temples in the 5th century, knowledge of hieroglyphic writing was lost. Although attempts were made, the script remained undeciphered throughout the Middle Ages and the early modern period. The decipherment of hieroglyphic writing was finally accomplished in the 1820s by Jean-François Champollion, with the help of the Rosetta Stone.[8] The number of words contained in al Ancient Egyptian (i.e. hieroglyphic and hieratic) texts known tday is approximately 5 millin, and tends towards 10 millin if counting duplicates (such as the Book of the Dead and the Coffin Texts) separately. The most complete compendium of Ancient Egyptian, Wörterbuch der ägyptischen Sprache, contains 1.5–1.7 millin words.[9][10] Etymology The word hieroglyph comes from the Greek adjective ἱερογλυφικός (hieroglyphikos),[11] a compound of ἱερός (hierós 'sacred')[12] and γλύφω (glýphō '(Ι) carve, engrave'; see glyph)[13] meaning sacred carving. The glyphs themselves, since the Ptolemaic period, were called τὰ ἱερογλυφικὰ [γράμματα] (tà hieroglyphikà [grámmata]) "the sacred engraved letters", the Greek counterpart to the Egyptian expression of mdw.w-nṯr "god's words".[14] Greek ἱερόγλυφος meant "a carver of hieroglyphs".[15] In English, hieroglyph as a noun is recorded from 1590, originally short for nominalized hieroglyphic (1580s, with a plural hieroglyphics), from adjectival use (hieroglyphic character).[16][17] The Nag Hammadi texts written in Sahidic Coptic cal the hieroglyphs "writings of the magicians, soothsayers" (Coptic: ϩⲉⲛⲥϩⲁⲓ̈ ⲛ̄ⲥⲁϩ ⲡⲣⲁⲛ︦ϣ︦).[18]

| | | | On Sunday evening, August 15, 1971, **Richard Nixon interrupted regular television programming.**

**He spoke for 15 minutes.**

By the time he finished, **the gold standard was over.** The dollar was no longer backed by anything except the government's word. And every dollar in every American's savings account had quietly changed — **not in number, but in what it actually meant.**

Nixon didn't ask Congress. He didn't hold a debate. **He used a single executive authority** and by Monday morning the monetary world had shifted.

The people who saw it coming had already moved. **Gold tripled in three years.** Over the next decade it went up twenty times.

The people who didn't understand what was happening watched their savings quietly lose value for a decade. **They never recovered it.**

**Here's what the financial press isn't saying clearly:**

**Trump has that same executive authority today.** And his own advisors are now openly saying the reversal of what Nixon did is on the table.

**If he acts, it moves fast.** There are two ways this plays out. **Both of them move gold in the same direction.**

We put together a free briefing on exactly what Nixon did, why Trump is the first president positioned to reverse it, and **the one move Americans can make right now** to be on the right side of what comes next.

clean_body: On Sunday evening, August 15, 1971, Richard Nixon interrupted regular television programming. | | | Don't want to receive our publications? | | | Lifе and death Son of Mykhailo Sulyma, Ivan came from a petty noble (szlachta) family. He was born in Rohoshchi (next to Chernihiv). He served as an estate overseer for Stanisław Żółkiewski and later the family of Daniłowicze who inherited his lands; for that service in 1620 he was awarded three villages: Sulimówka, Kuczakiw and Lebedyn. Аll the villages todаy belong to the Boryspil Raion, Kyiv Oblast. His sons included Stepan (died 1659), a captain of Boryspil company, and Fedir (died 1691), a colonel of Pereiaslav regiment. He became popular among the unregistered Cossacks, leading them on campaigns to plunder Crimea and other Ottoman vassal territories. For organizing a revolt on an Ottoman slave galley and freeing Christian slaves[1] he received a medal from Pope Paul V himself. Eventually, Sulyma reached the rank of the hetman, which he held from 1628 to 1629 and 1630 to 1635. In 1635, after returning from an expedition to Black Sea against the Ottomans, he decided to rebel against the Polish–Lithuanian Commonwealth, which at that time controlled most of the Cossack territories, and whose nobility was trying to turn militant Cossacks into serfs.[citation needed] Ivan Sulyma took part in numerous campaigns of Sagaidachny against Tatars and Turks. In particular, it was the famous capture of Kafa (modern Theodosia), the main center of the slave trade on the Black Sea, Trapezont, Izmail, and also two attacks on Tsaregrad. On the night of 3 to 4 August 1635 he took the newly constructed Kodak fortress by surprise, burning it and executing its crew of about 200 people under Jean Marion. Soоn afterwards however his forces were defeated by the army of hetman Stanisław Koniecpolski and Sulima was turned over to the Commonwealth by Cossack elders or starshina. Together with several other leaders of his rebellion, Hetman Sulyma was executed in Warsaw on 12 December 1635. At first, the Polish King Władysław IV Waza, known for his friendly attitude towards the Cossacks, was hesitant to execute Sulyma, especially since he was a person upon whom the Pope himself bestowed his medal. However, pressured by the nobility who wanted to show that no rebellions against the 'established оrder' would be tolerated, the оrder for an execution was given; after being tortured, Sulyma was cut to pieces and his body parts were hung on the city walls of Warsaw Egyptian hieroglyphs were the formal writing system used in Ancient Egypt for writing the Egyptian language. Hieroglyphs combined logographic, syllabic and alphabetic elements, with some 1,000 distinct characters.[3][4] Cursive hieroglyphs were used for religious literature on papyrus and wood. The later hieratic and demotic Egyptian scripts were derived from hieroglyphic writing, as was the Proto-Sinaitic script that later evolved into the Phoenician alphabet.[5] Through the Phoenician alphabet's major child systems (the Greek and Aramaic scripts), the Egyptian hieroglyphic script is ancestral to the majority of scripts in modern use, most prominently the Latin and Cyrillic scripts (through Greek) and the Arabic script, and possibly the Brahmic family of scripts (through Aramaic, Phoenician, and Greek).[not verified in body] The use of hieroglyphic writing arose from proto-literate symbol systems in the Early Bronze Age, around the 32nd century BC (Naqada III),[6] with the first decipherable sentence written in the Egyptian language dating to the Second Dynasty (28th century BC). Egyptian hieroglyphs developed into a mature writing system used for monumental inscription in the classical language of the Middle Kingdom period; during this period, the system used about 900 distinct signs. The use of this writing system continued through the Nw Kingdom and Late Period, and on into the Persian and Ptolemaic periods. Late survivals of hieroglyphic use are found well into the Roman period, extending into the 4th century AD.[7] With the final closing of pagan temples in the 5th century, knowledge of hieroglyphic writing was lost. Although attempts were made, the script remained undeciphered throughout the Middle Ages and the early modern period. The decipherment of hieroglyphic writing was finally accomplished in the 1820s by Jean-François Champollion, with the help of the Rosetta Stone.[8] The number of words contained in al Ancient Egyptian (i.e. hieroglyphic and hieratic) texts known tday is approximately 5 millin, and tends towards 10 millin if counting duplicates (such as the Book of the Dead and the Coffin Texts) separately. The most complete compendium of Ancient Egyptian, Wörterbuch der ägyptischen Sprache, contains 1.5–1.7 millin words.[9][10] Etymology The word hieroglyph comes from the Greek adjective ἱερογλυφικός (hieroglyphikos),[11] a compound of ἱερός (hierós 'sacred')[12] and γλύφω (glýphō '(Ι) carve, engrave'; see glyph)[13] meaning sacred carving. The glyphs themselves, since the Ptolemaic period, were called τὰ ἱερογλυφικὰ [γράμματα] (tà hieroglyphikà [grámmata]) "the sacred engraved letters", the Greek counterpart to the Egyptian expression of mdw.w-nṯr "god's words".[14] Greek ἱερόγλυφος meant "a carver of hieroglyphs".[15] In English, hieroglyph as a noun is recorded from 1590, originally short for nominalized hieroglyphic (1580s, with a plural hieroglyphics), from adjectival use (hieroglyphic character).[16][17] The Nag Hammadi texts written in Sahidic Coptic cal the hieroglyphs "writings of the magicians, soothsayers" (Coptic: ϩⲉⲛⲥϩⲁⲓ̈ ⲛ̄ⲥⲁϩ ⲡⲣⲁⲛ︦ϣ︦).[18] | | | | | On Sunday evening, August 15, 1971, Richard Nixon interrupted regular television programming. He spoke for 15 minutes. By the time he finished, the gold standard was over. The dollar was no longer backed by anything except the government's word. And every dollar in every American's savings account had quietly changed — not in number, but in what it actually meant. Nixon didn't ask Congress. He didn't hold a debate. He used a single executive authority and by Monday morning the monetary world had shifted. The people who saw it coming had already moved. Gold tripled in three years. Over the next decade it went up twenty times. The people who didn't understand what was happening watched their savings quietly lose value for a decade. They never recovered it. Here's what the financial press isn't saying clearly: Trump has that same executive authority today. And his own advisors are now openly saying the reversal of what Nixon did is on the table. If he acts, it moves fast. There are two ways this plays out. Both of them move gold in the same direction. We put together a free briefing on exactly what Nixon did, why Trump is the first president positioned to reverse it, and the one move Americans can make right now to be on the right side of what comes next. Free. 30 seconds to request. Nixon didn't warn anyone before that Sunday night broadcast. Trump's advisors are warning you right now. | Reagan Gold Group does not provide financial, legal, or tax advice. body:
| | | Hi, Adam Schiff here. It's my honor to serve as California's Senator and one of your DSCC Vice Chairs, fighting to flip the Senate blue.

**[In a moment, I'm going to tell you why we _must_ take back the Senate majority to stop Trump's agenda. But first, I need to ask: Will you donate $7 to the DSCC to make it happen?](https://go.dscc.org/go/23065?amount=7&t=5&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=Pennsylvania&zip=18326&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&ask=7&amounts=7%2C14%2C28%2C70&code=DPE-FD-20260510-AdamSchiff-VCSchiffTrumpFRRF-Pros-sl1&refcode=DPE-FD-20260510-AdamSchiff-VCSchiffTrumpFRRF-Pros-sl1&akid=23780%2E9716520%2E43yP7X)**

Let me make this as plain as possible: **Donald Trump isn't fit to lead.**

We see it in his actions every day. Pardoning January 6th defendants on his first day in office, cutting Medicaid to pay for massive tax cuts for the wealthiest Americans, attempting to end birthright citizenship, turning his back on our allies ‐‐ **if you asked AI to invent a fictional politician hellbent on harming our country, they probably would look exactly like Donald Trump.**

But how have Senate Republicans responded to this shocking display? With shrugs, and ‐‐ more importantly ‐‐ _votes_ to let Donald Trump have his way with our government and continue on his authoritarian path.

**And that is exactly why we _must_ take back the Senate: Republicans will _never_ stand up to Trump, so if _anyone_ is going to stop this madness and hold him accountable, the responsibility falls to Democrats like us.**

**[DSCC leadership, myself included, is counting on this team to raise $40,000 by midnight to keep our plan to flip the Senate on track._Nothing_ could be more important in these crucial days. clean_body: | | | Hi, Adam Schiff here. It's my honor to serve as California's Senator and one of your DSCC Vice Chairs, fighting to flip the Senate blue. Let me make this as plain as possible: Donald Trump isn't fit to lead. We see it in his actions every day. Pardoning January 6th defendants on his first day in office, cutting Medicaid to pay for massive tax cuts for the wealthiest Americans, attempting to end birthright citizenship, turning his back on our allies ‐‐ if you asked AI to invent a fictional politician hellbent on harming our country, they probably would look exactly like Donald Trump. But how have Senate Republicans responded to this shocking display? With shrugs, and ‐‐ more importantly ‐‐ votes to let Donald Trump have his way with our government and continue on his authoritarian path. And that is exactly why we must take back the Senate: Republicans will never stand up to Trump, so if anyone is going to stop this madness and hold him accountable, the responsibility falls to Democrats like us. We need your help to fight for the Senate. ---|---|---
You might have heard about [Dan Meuser's crash out](https://link.sbstck.com/redirect/66ab68f6-ec14-46a6-a10b-b6b6cf04885d?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) last week when he told a reporter to "talk to the f***ing Democrats" and stormed off.
Not exactly the Pennsylvania way, Dan.
But I want to make sure you caught what he said before he totally lost it.
He said that when Congress goes home, **" we have conference calls, we do other things, and we work for our constituents."**
I would love to know what he counts as working for us.
It's definitely not holding a town hall, because he hasn't done that. It's not listening to us. It's not talking to us. It's not showing up. So what is it? Trading stocks on his laptop from home instead of in DC?
**" Conference calls" and "other things" aren't good enough. We deserve way more from our representative.**
Our tax dollars pay Dan's salary. It's time for us to let him go.
**[Chip in to help me fire Dan Meuser and deliver a representative who will actually do the job.](https://link.sbstck.com/redirect/7c36c280-b53d-46cb-93c3-91a85763142d?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)**
[ FIRE DAN MEUSER](https://link.sbstck.com/redirect/7c36c280-b53d-46cb-93c3-91a85763142d?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
Thank you,
Rachel Wallace
