name: Chip Roy
subject: OPEN NOW: Message from Chip Roy
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY TEXANS FOR CHIP ROY
body:
I've enclosed our latest campaign update on the status of this critical runoff election. Please Read: |
**MESSAGE FROM CHIP ROY**
Let me be direct.

Nearly two million Texans turned out in the Republican Primary for Attorney General—and despite being massively outspent and targeted by the political establishment and their wealthy backers, we forced this race into a runoff.

That didn't happen by accident.

It happened because the people of Texas still value truth over spin—and results over a bankroll.

My opponent poured more than $16 million of his own money into this race, only to finish at 39%. Meanwhile, we were hit by a California-based, left-wing PAC angry that I stood with Donald Trump to strip out hundreds of billions in Green New Deal-style subsidies from the so-called "Big Beautiful Bill."

**They thought they could buy Texas._They were wrong._**

The runoff election is May 26 - less than three weeks away - and with your help, we're going to finish what we started and prove, once again, that Texas isn't for sale.

[**CHIP IN TO
OUR RUNOFF FUND **](http://links.freedomtrainalert.com/u/click?_t=2d4f229f156142619b4e4f956d2d65c9&_m=684819bdd7f24abcafb3c6be4f4fa22a&_e=pWr6-wiRK8N4n2QRVzDt65lSjkOnzCA3S6vxeUFcZcZ8XF3avhbefFgRbZ1BGAB7wjcEsYeU_z8T83e7lEV0dm_A0tzqsiXxcg6T93n0Pl3I6SYbquNMsXk6JsbepIaBypha56HNMbw2I2Op36RNuwDwe8STvqS8pwjwMshpyrSaSAdGDNnkmjpo1QJMoBKwveD7E1bsJF-hpWqLDLP_OqoU02D3ySrXjDKdK-USqflsOvmpSSr1HMkxBfX-Sev_Do8mQO3UJn98YYS7q1vNnfUmPQlx_6TeEWjVuMhSwR9J_7YE4YXVRjgLCEsn0TPr2G2VMzWk6M583Vl8z1gW9SuRw7YjmF9YZsE1bXU0wY4XjapdE11tk9HZJ2_HM-QHzTVwB1Vy7h3nPTr0DNyCWpQ0FXAh2IdLFsWCdMnDj42jLth4QeD-JhaJsveNubBmKpy5d106431-LgCglyhEuWa39aWCVJIFMjbHmp4kx06G6UmMgUu-R6pk0kMDJ-beUqvSc2N_L7fTfOcegt9tolCee9cereixeBUFrn2lY2QK948XrLjFP4eyAjVM5xsbagiYD8sMbKO1aViExabxbeV2eM223nypQEWL_u178HbRJ_ikKQyMAtIHGKc3uvEpTbOkGNlCbmrmI3wzIMso7B3ZMPAqMDHP9497lsN-lEG_Wa2syJSBjxHG3Lb-0JJc)
But let's be honest about what's at stake.

This is no time to hand the Attorney General's office to someone who's never set foot in a courtroom.

Texas is facing serious challenges: a wide-open border, foreign adversaries buying up our land, and a radical agenda determined to reshape our state and our country.

**We need a proven conservative who knows how to fight - _and win._**

The Attorney General isn't a ceremonial role. It's the chief legal officer of the largest conservative state in America. It requires leadership from day one—building a strong legal team, enforcing the law without hesitation, and taking the fight wherever it's needed to defend Texas.

**I'm ready to do that. But I need to know if conservatives like you are in this fight with me.[Can I count on you to join our Runoff Fund by chipping in $5 or even $50 right now?](http://links.freedomtrainalert.com/u/click?_t=2d4f229f156142619b4e4f956d2d65c9&_m=684819bdd7f24abcafb3c6be4f4fa22a&_e=pWr6-wiRK8N4n2QRVzDt65lSjkOnzCA3S6vxeUFcZcZ8XF3avhbefFgRbZ1BGAB7wjcEsYeU_z8T83e7lEV0dm_A0tzqsiXxcg6T93n0Pl3I6SYbquNMsXk6JsbepIaBypha56HNMbw2I2Op36RNuwDwe8STvqS8pwjwMshpyrSaSAdGDNnkmjpo1QJMoBKwveD7E1bsJF-hpWqLDLP_OqoU02D3ySrXjDKdK-USqflijOapD9Koa8rDDrZVRn1ii_Ky7nPkHo1rcUKjWP28BDSEiLmfJAujhBlVU3QgR74z2m7smDsfR7QYXJcrWTMd0AUMXSgSW1rbrH21m4ceH6Cv7x0UPz4OU8Czuly1G_GEdCzikJekfnWElfWN8QdU7gFu18_Z21rYVK1YFoo-ZJRzpYcrdBPsnZ4_TilbwX1o8_1pyANiY2tKuK8kVjRA4RUEX3GdTdg5cNWBQduvoXOXyTJe_wLkbzP11eoP-rBaf1QEX5vxCuNHQZxvMkRYVeHoQsu5RM-Ypb3Jq-RVxtf80SARPQ0SauxHaEsF1bLgYp5C7qIa7cFeX7ECybqFcm5FPyRN2K7vnuUyhvDTCVIGpAyJDivKwJ0hEYrKgX6ZZcC161-4ovU1zL29Iyvj1jckP8-9gAtLdpbZWXJx64uStmWSs6eTBgw83EKGm24UWdQQsEMcaSNMGtzctCZW)**

Between now and May 26th, I'll be working around the clock to make sure Texans understand exactly what's on the line in this runoff.

Let's finish this.

[](http://links.freedomtrainalert.com/u/click?_t=2d4f229f156142619b4e4f956d2d65c9&_m=684819bdd7f24abcafb3c6be4f4fa22a&_e=pWr6-wiRK8N4n2QRVzDt65lSjkOnzCA3S6vxeUFcZcZ8XF3avhbefFgRbZ1BGAB7wjcEsYeU_z8T83e7lEV0dm_A0tzqsiXxcg6T93n0Pl3I6SYbquNMsXk6JsbepIaBypha56HNMbw2I2Op36RNuwDwe8STvqS8pwjwMshpyrSaSAdGDNnkmjpo1QJMoBKwveD7E1bsJF-hpWqLDLP_OqoU02D3ySrXjDKdK-USqfmjcMgz_OhreqyxnHLGVrGNKvvUwy5MptyWQ2wRxr0wypcXaoAuA6UUbsEtHsdo4R5Y1T5PDLSJJkGUA2eYHsnYhfpdHIcShG0TsWtfo09iA4_mkVldDde9Qb2hcmJ44CmKDxh8Pw1X0vJc6mLdxMRQhISMTJplZ04-FE0yTs-koJPqQ759zaUIraxlT4k9EuKLGDSfIhPSDisA6udDR1M_AQWmmnoeU-nKg8pCTIEJ2-ZZJzb8Y_Z1jj5TQEQ-DfR8MRz-vRSf6-sb9QKNkYcHBKCI9iLBJLttth2_0l5l3TDG5nEWdYx1f5zsuj7UA9FJxoRRVO_i2n4JQNtUhpDrvF4XeQFMG_v68Wry3n9-KsHfj_jZMUYeUmlzkUHuxyEZZL2CHw6Czv0JF0Ra_01Ud4_LJgcG8h7YIaeg-emujParQj-Uz84lze4ZPj_cKvSCK1PRr2skEiqMKdsnn9QV)

clean_body: I've enclosed our latest campaign update on the status of this critical runoff election. Please Read: | MESSAGE FROM CHIP ROY Let me be direct. Nearly two million Texans turned out in the Republican Primary for Attorney General—and despite being massively outspent and targeted by the political establishment and their wealthy backers, we forced this race into a runoff. That didn't happen by accident. It happened because the people of Texas still value truth over spin—and results over a bankroll. My opponent poured more than $16 million of his own money into this race, only to finish at 39%. Meanwhile, we were hit by a California-based, left-wing PAC angry that I stood with Donald Trump to strip out hundreds of billions in Green New Deal-style subsidies from the so-called "Big Beautiful Bill." They thought they could buy Texas.They were wrong. The runoff election is May 26 - less than three weeks away - and with your help, we're going to finish what we started and prove, once again, that Texas isn't for sale. But let's be honest about what's at stake. This is no time to hand the Attorney General's office to someone who's never set foot in a courtroom. Texas is facing serious challenges: a wide-open border, foreign adversaries buying up our land, and a radical agenda determined to reshape our state and our country. We need a proven conservative who knows how to fight - and win. The Attorney General isn't a ceremonial role. It's the chief legal officer of the largest conservative state in America. It requires leadership from day one—building a strong legal team, enforcing the law without hesitation, and taking the fight wherever it's needed to defend Texas. I'm ready to do that. But I need to know if conservatives like you are in this fight with me. Between now and May 26th, I'll be working around the clock to make sure Texans understand exactly what's on the line in this runoff. Let's finish this. Chip Roy | | PAID FOR BY TEXANS FOR CHIP ROY Don't want to receive any more of our emails? We hate to see you go, but .

name: Tim Kaine
subject: Sic semper tyrannis
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Kaine for Virginia
body:
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em-cgp-2026-va71011?amount=50 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em-cgp-2026-va71011?amount=50]
You might have heard Virginia’s motto: Sic semper tyrannis. Thus always to tyrants .
It’s the only state motto that also serves as a warning. The Virginians who designed our seal and flag that display the motto wanted us to know: tyranny is not just something in the rearview mirror.
Trump’s tyrannical attempts to tilt the midterms in his party’s favor are only gaining speed. But I believe Virginians will stay true to our state’s motto, 250 years after it was written — because that spirit is needed now more than ever before.
GOP-led states and judges are working overtime to support Trump’s brazen power grab, so we need to step up with even more energy and determination to support our Democratic leaders.
Today, please join me in supporting Rep. Eugene Vindman in VA-7, Rep. Suhas Subramanyam in VA-10, and Rep. James Walkinshaw in VA-11. [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em-cgp-2026-va71011?amount=50]
If you’ve saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:
DONATE $25 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em-cgp-2026-va71011?express_lane=true&amount=25]
DONATE $50 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em-cgp-2026-va71011?express_lane=true&amount=50]

OTHER [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em-cgp-2026-va71011?amount=50]
Re-electing these strong Democrats is a non-negotiable piece of our efforts to retake a Democratic House majority — and they need our support to win their races.
Thank you for always stepping up when it matters most.
—Tim Kaine

name: Voto Latino
subject: Welcome to Voto Latino!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Voto Latino
body:
#
Welcome to Voto Latino, Peter! We’re happy to have you as part of our team and even happier that you chose to be a part of our movement to unite and empower the Latino community.
For nearly **two decades** , Voto Latino has been on the frontlines of organizing and engaging our community through culture, community, and digital tools.
And since 2012, we’ve helped register more than **2 million voters** , helped more than **9.5 million people navigate the voting process** by making it easier to register, check their status, find their polling place, and make a plan to vote.
And in 2020 alone, we registered more than **650,000 voters** , and **82%** of those voters turned out to participate in our democracy.
But if there’s anything we’ve learned since Voto Latino was founded, it’s that registration is only the first step.**The real work is turning registration into participation, then working constantly to create a lasting political power. And the way this lasts is by showing up and doing the work consistently — in _every_ election and in _every_ community.**
That’s why this year, we’re continuing to build for the long term.
→ We’re organizing year-round to get our community registered, informed, and to the polls.
→ We’re training the next generation of leaders through Voto Latino On Campus.
→ We’re cutting through disinformation with trusted, community-driven storytelling.
→ And we’re running campaigns that expose extremism, demand accountability, and fight for what our families actually need.
Our work is only possible because of people like you, and we want to make sure we’re building with you, not just talking at you. **[Will you take a minute to complete our 2026 Priorities Survey and tell us what matters most right now and what you want to see from Voto Latino?](https://act.votolatino.org/survey/welcome-survey-2026-priorities/?source=20260510-112&t=1&akid=112%2E1366028%2E2-dVeU)**
**[Take the Survey ››](https://act.votolatino.org/survey/welcome-survey-2026-priorities/?source=20260510-112&t=2&akid=112%2E1366028%2E2-dVeU)**
After you complete our survey, you’ll hear from us with updates on the midterm elections, our advocacy work, our voter registration work, and issues that impact our community.
We won’t ask you for much, but we do ask you to stay in it with us, because that’s exactly how we continue to do this important work.
Thanks for being a part of our team, Peter.

— Voto Latino
**It costs $26 to register one voter, and if you’re in a position to support our work, [please make a contribution of $26 or any amount, which will help us keep building year-round power and register eligible Latino voters across the country. ](https://act.votolatino.org/go/311?refcode=em20260510-112&t=3&akid=112%2E1366028%2E2-dVeU)** **[Donate ››](https://act.votolatino.org/go/314?refcode=em20260510-112&t=4&akid=112%2E1366028%2E2-dVeU)**
---

**[Donate](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em-ms-voto-footer?refcode=em20260510-112-&t=5&refcode2=112_1366028_2-dVeU&akid=112%2E1366028%2E2-dVeU)**
---
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way we keep in touch with people like you, so thank you for reading to the end.
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://act.votolatino.org/signup/receive-fewer-emails/?t=6&akid=112%2E1366028%2E2-dVeU)
* [Update My Personal Information](https://act.votolatino.org/signup/update-your-information/?t=7&akid=112%2E1366028%2E2-dVeU)
* [Unsubscribe](https://act.votolatino.org/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=8&akid=112%2E1366028%2E2-dVeU)

Paid for by Voto Latino

name: Roy Cooper (via Cooper Victory Fund)
subject: I have to be direct
body:
The GOP is preparing to spend nearly $100M in NC
|
# [](https://act.roycooper.com/go/6532?source=&t=1&akid=1321%2E124072%2EWhhOaZ)
| | | |
---
Normally when writing these emails, I try to approach them differently from the other political emails you’d typically get. Peter, this time is different, so I have to be more direct:
**[I’m reaching out today with a last-ditch request for a contribution of $5, or anything you can spare now.](https://act.roycooper.com/go/10699?amount=5&t=8&akid=1321%2E124072%2EWhhOaZ) That’s because two Senate GOP super PACs have pledged to flood the North Carolina airwaves with nearly $100 million in attack ads to lie about my record and keep this seat red. **
To be clear: It is not normal for the GOP to write such massive checks six months out from Election Day.
This time, they know North Carolina is key to saving their majority. They know the polls show our opponent within striking distance. They will spare no expense to prop him up.
Though we knew these attacks were coming, we’re now facing way more outside spending _way earlier_ than we had expected. That means we’re going to have to ramp up our fundraising in order to fight back and set the record straight – and Peter, that’s where you come in:
**[While Republicans can easily direct their megadonors to drop tens of millions of dollars into this race, I’m relying on hundreds of thousands of folks like you – giving what you can, when you can – to compete in spite of their efforts to buy this seat out from under us. Now that you’re up to date, can I please count on you to chip in $5, $10 or anything you can spare right away to help me fight back?](https://act.roycooper.com/go/10699?amount=5&t=9&akid=1321%2E124072%2EWhhOaZ)**
| | [DONATE $5](https://act.roycooper.com/go/10699?amount=5&t=10&akid=1321%2E124072%2EWhhOaZ)
---
Thank you for everything you do, Peter.

– Roy
| |
* * *
[](https://act.roycooper.com/go/8188?t=2&akid=1321%2E124072%2EWhhOaZ)
Democrat Roy Cooper is running for U.S. Senate to help take back the Majority for Democrats. North Carolina is Democrats’ best chance to flip a seat from red to blue — the path to stopping Republicans in Washington starts here.

National Republicans will target North Carolina as a key battleground and invest heavily in defeating us.

Cooper is a former state legislator, Attorney General, and most recently Governor of North Carolina. North Carolina will be the most competitive Senate election of 2026, and Cooper enters the race as the most formidable candidate of either party.

Cooper’s signature achievements include helping to expand Medicaid and helping make NC the top state for business by creating thousands of jobs and growing the clean energy economy.

**_[Donate today to help win this seat and flip the Senate blue.](https://act.roycooper.com/go/6533?source=&t=3&akid=1321%2E124072%2EWhhOaZ)_**
| | [DONATE](https://act.roycooper.com/go/6297?source=&t=4&akid=1321%2E124072%2EWhhOaZ)
---
| | [DONATE MONTHLY](https://act.roycooper.com/go/6298?source=&t=5&akid=1321%2E124072%2EWhhOaZ)
---
| | [SHOP OUR MERCH STORE](https://act.roycooper.com/go/2133?t=6&akid=1321%2E124072%2EWhhOaZ)
---
[info@roycooper.com](mailto:info@roycooper.com) | [Privacy Policy](https://act.roycooper.com/go/825?t=7&akid=1321%2E124072%2EWhhOaZ)
Cooper Victory Fund
PO Box 1190
Raleigh, NC 27602
Paid for by Cooper Victory Fund, a joint fundraising committee authorized by Cooper for North Carolina, DSCC, and North Carolina Democratic Party – Federal.
---

Any donor history information in this email reflects what we have on file for this specific email address. If you have donated with a different email address, with a check, or with a spouse — thank you so much! We have that on file and cannot thank you enough for supporting this campaign.
By clicking the links above, you certify that you are responsible for paying all charges incurred in using the debit or credit card to be charged, and that your personal funds will be the true source of the contribution.
_

[You can unsubscribe from this mailing list at any time.](http://act.roycooper.com/cms/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?akid=1321%2E124072%2EWhhOaZ)
_If you wish to receive fewer messages from us, _[submit this form to let us know.](https://act.roycooper.com/signup/i-want-less-emails-cooper-north-carolina/?t=11&akid=1321%2E124072%2EWhhOaZ)_

name: Sign Your Name | Left Action
subject: Don't Let Trump & Blanche Weaponized Justice Department against Trump Critics
body:
Don't let Trump and Blanche normalize using DOJ as a weapon against Trump critics
| | | | |
---
| | |
# [Demand Trump & Blanche Drop Absurd DOJ "Sea Shell" Case against Comey](https://default.salsalabs.org/Tee224159-87d5-47f5-b859-880a608845be/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
| | [](https://default.salsalabs.org/T71f46ff7-d2d9-4c6e-af52-70a4712ab24f/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
| | | _(Already took this action?[Click here for others](https://default.salsalabs.org/T221a2cc3-6bec-4ec8-9f8d-3f244c963805/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9). Want to unsubscribe? See link below)_ Trump Justice officials, led by Acting Attorney General Todd Blanche, are [indicting](https://default.salsalabs.org/T3b1209d0-8bc2-4c94-a4d2-23da4ef46daa/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)[ James Comey](https://default.salsalabs.org/T9b72de5f-b539-4556-a0a0-a7bd8bb43300/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) because he took a [picture of sea shells](https://default.salsalabs.org/Te8d54d24-6fb9-4289-b463-249ebfb00013/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9), and because Blanche is an a-hole. Blanche, who is different from the Blanche on "Golden Girls," who was awesome, says that Comey's [picture of shells](https://default.salsalabs.org/T78283e64-d3ef-4add-b88f-c228f2805016/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) arranged in an "86 47" pattern was a deadly threat to Trump (really, they're that crazy) This is clearly bullshit, and hilariously so. But it's also very serious, and very dangerous. Blanche, in an effort to please Trump, is threatening to imprison one of Trump's critics. And while we all might assume the case will get thrown out by a judge, there is no guarantee that will happen. You may not be a fan of Comey for any number of reasons. But we can't let this crap become normalized against _any_ of us, or it endangers _all_ of us. [**Speak out, call them out, and don't let them get away with this. **](https://default.salsalabs.org/T9b2b424b-90aa-400c-b7df-fdb83dbbb700/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) [**Add your name, and demand the Justice Department Drop the case against Comey.**](https://default.salsalabs.org/Taf85fe64-fd36-41ec-838e-0c346ed66d96/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
| | | | [ADD YOUR NAME >>](https://default.salsalabs.org/T5fa4a34c-5099-4973-b331-b3ef77f703bd/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
| | | Thank you, and remember "Courage is Contagious," so SHARE THIS to help build support, and keep up the pressure! Left Action [(P.S. - Go here for other actions)](https://default.salsalabs.org/Te0a1c293-c746-4484-8677-41876cd6ddfb/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
|
---

* [Go here for more actions you can take](https://default.salsalabs.org/T88ac75a4-1bdd-4271-b68b-87bf5481b922/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)

Every year, May Day brings the same spectacle to Washington, D.C.: organized mobs of anti-Trump activists, many bused in, screaming outside the White House with unhinged signs like "86-47" combined with pro-Islamic messaging.

# [EXCLUSIVE VIDEO: May Day Exposes How The Squad-Aligned Left Is Converting Street Chaos Into Real Political Power](https://substack.com/app-link/post?publication_id=1123743&post_id=197154477&utm_source=post-email-title&utm_campaign=email-post-title&isFreemail=true&r=1hvr60&token=eyJ1c2VyX2lkIjo5MDUwMTE5MiwicG9zdF9pZCI6MTk3MTU0NDc3LCJpYXQiOjE3Nzg0NTQ3NzgsImV4cCI6MTc4MTA0Njc3OCwiaXNzIjoicHViLTExMjM3NDMiLCJzdWIiOiJwb3N0LXJlYWN0aW9uIn0.mFGDyGILc9S8cLqkP4402Ltpq12hg-bGCqY-D1KzaZg)

---
| | [READ IN APP](https://open.substack.com/pub/lauraloomer/p/exclusive-video-may-day-exposes-how?utm_source=email&redirect=app-store&utm_campaign=email-read-in-app)
---

| [](https://substack.com/redirect/59357642-e0a0-49f1-9598-876fd74209f4?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
Every year, May Day brings the same spectacle to Washington, D.C.: organized mobs of anti-Trump activists, many bused in, screaming outside the White House with unhinged signs like "86-47" combined with pro-Islamic messaging. But this year was different because it showed how the radical Left's activist wing is now operating in lockstep with elected Democrats, transforming fringe agitation into legitimate political power.
Outside the White House, protesters prominently carried "86-47 Epstein" signs, language that directly mirrors the rhetoric used by the would-be Trump assassin, who pushed the false claim that President Trump is a pedophile, as well as the "86-47" language James Comey used to allegedly threaten President Donald Trump. The Department of Justice has indicted Comey over the incident.
LOOMER UNLEASHED is a reader-supported publication. To receive new posts and support my work, consider becoming a paid subscriber.
[Upgrade to paid](https://substack..SXIDcNW16OtTfIhSMFvBqdGbw1Cjq7EiHhH7tYGAuP4?&utm_medium=email&utm_source=subscribe-widget-preamble&utm_content=197154477)
Women in burqas led portions of the march while waving Iranian flags. When we documented it, organizers physically attempted to block our cameras, clearly aware of how damaging this imagery is to their narrative.
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/69c71951-bcba-4bf3-9c90-9cef7eadcd84?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
The messaging escalated even further into outright vulgarity. Protesters staged a graphic display depicting Israeli Prime Minister Benjamin Netanyahu in a sexual act with President Trump, pushing the same propaganda promoted by the Iranian regime that Trump is controlled by Israel.
The claim that these demonstrations are "grassroots" collapsed under minimal scrutiny. After the event, we captured video of demonstrators boarding buses near the White House, many wearing identical CASA shirts and coordinated gear, confirming the operation was organized and funded.
Just days before May Day, the progressive organization Our Revolution [held](https://substack.com/redirect/17d811be-cc94-4f7c-aff3-2b2344003cc3?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) a Capitol Hill press event alongside Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez, Rashida Tlaib, and Progressive Caucus Chair Greg Casar. Then, on May Day, that same organization openly took credit for helping organize the protests outside the White House.
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/912b7156-16e9-42c8-b765-ded452b9f48f?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/943c1d16-fde3-4e17-9141-961fa7d741c7?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
They even [advertised](https://substack.com/redirect/09b6c0a4-bc37-43ef-b1cd-09a9a18ca0d3?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) it in advance:
> _" The next major mobilization event is MAY DAY. On May 1st, a massive coalition is taking a stand against Trump, Oligarchy and Injustice. We'll turn out in the streets."_
[Upgrade to paid](https://substack..SXIDcNW16OtTfIhSMFvBqdGbw1Cjq7EiHhH7tYGAuP4?&utm_medium=email&utm_source=subscribe-widget&utm_content=197154477)
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/762c673f-1e70-4d5e-9f9b-2aef13c4981d?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
This comes after Rep. Hakeem Jeffries' said his strategy is to engage in "[maximum warfare](https://substack.com/redirect/7829336c-147c-4d5a-8f14-a82cfdc882d5?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)" to fight Republicans and President Donald Trump. Elected Democrats are no longer distancing themselves from these movements. They are participating in them.
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/10da7927-78a1-406e-ab37-911dab874f64?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
New York City's socialist mayor Zohran Mamdani proudly took part in May Day events. Former Congresswoman Cori Bush appeared at a St. Louis rally alongside Hasan Piker, a figure who has publicly called for the death of President Trump and blames America for 9/11.
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/8503c672-2108-4c51-839c-48980f9049cc?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
Meanwhile, in Detroit, Democrat Senate candidate Abdul El-Sayed joined Rashida Tlaib and Bernie Sanders for a May Day rally that echoed the exact same messaging seen in Washington.
During his speech, El-Sayed pushed the same narrative promoted by protesters and foreign adversaries alike, claiming Trump is effectively controlled by Israel:
_" Benjamin Netanyahu has been searching for 40 years to find a President dumb enough to go to war with Iran and he finally found one in Donald J. Trump."_
El-Sayed called for abolishing ICE and implementing a wealth tax. He specifically thanked Rashida Tlaib, a sitting member of the House Financial Services Committee, which would have direct jurisdiction over drafting such legislation.
At the same time, Tlaib and other Democrats have repeatedly refused to condemn the rhetoric of Hasan Piker, despite his history of inflammatory and anti-American statements:
This convergence of rhetoric and policy is happening as Democrat leadership signals support for fundamentally changing America's constitutional order. House Minority Leader Hakeem Jeffries recently called for expanding the Supreme Court, a proposal also backed by Tlaib.
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/8dff4f05-b802-44e5-aeeb-6123ccb37eca?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
The same movement pushing extreme, often dangerous narratives in the streets is now aligned with elected Democrats who are openly discussing sweeping policy changes, from wealth taxes to court expansion. The activist base is no longer operating on the fringe. It is being integrated into the governing strategy of the Democrat Party.
May Day 2026 was not just a protest. It was a warning. The messaging, the organization, and the political alignment all point in one direction: the full consolidation of the radical Left's influence over the Democrat Party, and a coordinated effort to translate street-level agitation into lasting institutional power.
This should not be dismissed as noise. It is a roadmap for Democrats if they win the midterm elections, and it's up to voters to ensure Republicans hold the House of Representatives and the Senate.
You're currently a free subscriber to [LOOMER UNLEASHED](https://substack.com/redirect/e95ab2d1-e74a-4053-93a8-2e5cdd909d06?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg). For the full experience, [upgrade your subscription.](https://substack..SXIDcNW16OtTfIhSMFvBqdGbw1Cjq7EiHhH7tYGAuP4?&utm_source=substack&utm_medium=email&utm_content=postcta)

name: Mike Pompeo
subject: I’ve struggled with this for days, Peter.

name: Kimberly Bretches
subject: My husband saved Austin. Now he’s facing 99 years in prison.
body:
|
---
[ ](http://links.bestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_m=0f44bdc311254869ad04ea55c8047624&_e=l3rLhA33uzwKPBITGUTpPpGthQqmUumO3BIbdWUWxv8P6v_cO-DaXifTRWamBELN74VPLyhNxRi8pSDMUpPPoCrDLIHIOPQ2KJN2uUR_Xx-5AbfTHGiX2HAFb4VyqSMPXjc7bM9EB3LmIwlKUEpA26RwbKuRrH2HSuAvGm7O6TjVV2t1X9Z706K1QvvnE-D2zsX8j42pQHK9VlXK0_mDA5C6dF_vasVz0tZOdB5_J8G8bnapazvS8cpvDrnaZ_iaDBvmZ-Kusdz8xoLtnyvZg9VfGZr8wdLn0ecjcZ1YlEBMZCXgLLDGA2cawNJ46aSN5S9GlAou5agk9M93M1U1n40wqToKdqL9sdMY19pzuczLOsIJf2UYhLpqIe4gz8bVYfP8IbZDXif_Bz855EvL7_859XGNJ1ntJp11-86kETxkW9ZB9OzT1Mc-nBR_DMMt) Officer Chance Bretches and his family — Austin, Texas
* * *
Dear Friend, My name is Kimberly Bretches. I'm a wife and a mother of four young children. And I'm writing to you today because I am out of options and I am terrified. I'll be honest, asking strangers for help doesn't come naturally to me. But neither does the idea of my husband spending the rest of his life in prison for doing his job — so here I am. Chance is a police officer in Austin, Texas. He is, without question, the best man I know. He has spent his career keeping dangerous people off the streets, protecting a city that doesn't always make it easy to do so, and coming home every night to a family that needs him. His supervisors have praised him for his professionalism, for his instincts, for his dedication. He is exactly the kind of officer you want showing up when things go wrong. | By every measure, Chance did everything right. He used department-approved tools, following his training, to protect his fellow officers and the people of Austin.
---
And in May of 2020, things went very wrong in Austin. For three consecutive days, our city was under siege. Violent agitators hurled rocks, frozen water bottles, and exploding fireworks directly at police officers. Buildings were vandalized and looted. Police vehicles were set on fire. A rioter was caught with a Molotov cocktail. Officers were injured. The city was teetering on the edge of complete chaos, and everyone knew it.
On May 31st, the third day, when the mob was larger and more dangerous than it had ever been, Chance was on the front lines. He did what he was trained to do. He deployed non-lethal, department-approved beanbag projectiles to stop the aggression and protect his fellow officers and the people of Austin. The crowd eventually dispersed. The city held.
**No one questioned what he did that night. His supervisors praised his response. His department stood behind him.**
And then Austin elected District Attorney José Garza.
Instead of holding the rioters accountable — the ones who threw the fireworks, who lit the fires, who carried the Molotov cocktails — Garza turned his attention to the officers who stopped them. He launched an indiscriminate campaign against law enforcement, using the power of his office not to protect the public, but to make political examples out of good cops.
Chance became one of his targets.
| Chance now faces up to 99 Years in prison — for following his training.
---
My husband now faces up to 99 years in prison. Not because he did anything wrong. Not because his department found fault with his actions. Not because any credible review of that night concluded he acted improperly. But because one politically-motivated prosecutor decided the officers who held the line deserved to be punished for holding it. This case has been grinding through the system for years now. The trial has already been delayed several times and is **now scheduled for June of this year.** Every continuance, every filing, every hearing means more hours of legal work, and more bills our family has to find a way to pay. I am asking for your help because we cannot do this alone. The National Center for Police Defense has been in Chance's corner, and your donation goes toward funding his legal defense, ensuring he has the representation he deserves as he walks into that courtroom in June.
| [DONATE NOW TO SUPPORT CHANCE ›](http://links.bestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_m=0f44bdc311254869ad04ea55c8047624&_e=l3rLhA33uzwKPBITGUTpPpGthQqmUumO3BIbdWUWxv8P6v_cO-DaXifTRWamBELN74VPLyhNxRi8pSDMUpPPoCrDLIHIOPQ2KJN2uUR_Xx-GP5VaJ6VV1lt6xA8St7Scjy9uH3e_r0hI3zbECIBjNXFYCpc2EJiZeqleUpY-mNlDYr5YXxVIT9Taef-DZKIO5Otaut1vsWEftq5z5jpXkn_P8VZGBAdK4zqOoz_m2F5K77uT2QeRvFbv_azWA7GvAs4T7AV6vFBHosTAonwT6cP5-yxby3Ll79exZ5lksg2LuxJ0c2mvyy29xwNCZPMLlPxECRFoO6EO7HoHw0XnCN94TTUUy2G6wyvQMPyGF7aosdFC4J8RJdvq-khcRj1z9fKvUpHvkbhgBiHC4NRdeOAP-PCIRDJcg0MX6th7ufLJj98hHiOc4iN1Zaa1OW-r)

If you believe that the men and women who run toward danger deserve better than this, [please give today](http://links.bestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_m=0f44bdc311254869ad04ea55c8047624&_e=l3rLhA33uzwKPBITGUTpPpGthQqmUumO3BIbdWUWxv8P6v_cO-DaXifTRWamBELN74VPLyhNxRi8pSDMUpPPoCrDLIHIOPQ2KJN2uUR_Xx-oDieG95c8mMa5Gy4bU6htQpuX_uvy-LnpWjsrE4YteUV6AI22fA4p5TC7fYoo_ueV2FW2qiD_xeIEYR8x6Qt8KVyY4CFUEEe-h5lzZtJR_Gk79X2H7DrezrtRUUcw7AMo3IdVbyCk_xOSYEq8ZxhgpYHVNypJGP2iLb36_YGnC0fixEVEJQBID_KwAD0MbL4rZsbWSMgEso7XXSJJV4kMVZJeA5eXOXwkGH2NrGYscqyATIzbQnr4FvWqsjJWXU8q0wE01DIpATlxRZHrrCA-BR9O_Z8JNk7gEyoPHV43Tp9RMnfL-Elet5lveFSOzJ7j10UKfeFcl0aY6oleEOcY). Whatever you can. No amount is too small, and our family will not forget it. Chance stood between Austin and chaos on May 31st, 2020. He didn't hesitate. He didn't run. He did his job. Now I'm asking you to stand with him. With gratitude and hope, **Kimberly Bretches** Wife of Officer Chance Bretches, Austin Police Department
| **P.S.** Chance's trial is this June. We are closer than we've ever been to getting Chance in front of a jury that will hear the truth, but we need the resources to get there. **[Please donate today and help us finish this fight.](http://links.bestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_m=0f44bdc311254869ad04ea55c8047624&_e=l3rLhA33uzwKPBITGUTpPpGthQqmUumO3BIbdWUWxv8P6v_cO-DaXifTRWamBELN74VPLyhNxRi8pSDMUpPPoCrDLIHIOPQ2KJN2uUR_Xx-V7VH9jlRiUdMbKXOKyyPkieaCg5xuWeReth8g5ym0fXkjq5XcU_8RvKALt5Ig6YSZIuw6R7urNXS0wxrlPyIVwgHIH4jaIJO1DXuk0LE92AHqBUmRRCGnvNb0LO-ADAe6N-DoOC1h0IKY3YKW-UJ_lXrP9o9ydudodpzg0jCsoMDz0LcHY5-mUSHciz4Wuph-MgufeqfSywaWPMyT_d68I-DBQ8EKrtFPfsV6-ZF-rSmn9hgVXJPHtGcqZ-e-AUPl0y-jpt1SEQIwupsMaQy8DnodzEPUoJwkgPTxDg96wJV8FUYkSxiSi112zftlMSIG0rm5P2sbmwGIyTzvw4KC) **

He has spent his career keeping dangerous people off the streets, protecting a city that doesn't always make it easy to do so, and coming home every night to a family that needs him. His supervisors have praised him for his professionalism, for his instincts, for his dedication. He is exactly the kind of officer you want showing up when things go wrong. | By every measure, Chance did everything right. He used department-approved tools, following his training, to protect his fellow officers and the people of Austin. And in May of 2020, things went very wrong in Austin. For three consecutive days, our city was under siege. Violent agitators hurled rocks, frozen water bottles, and exploding fireworks directly at police officers. Buildings were vandalized and looted. Police vehicles were set on fire. A rioter was caught with a Molotov cocktail. Officers were injured. The city was teetering on the edge of complete chaos, and everyone knew it. On May 31st, the third day, when the mob was larger and more dangerous than it had ever been, Chance was on the front lines. He did what he was trained to do. He deployed non-lethal, department-approved beanbag projectiles to stop the aggression and protect his fellow officers and the people of Austin. The crowd eventually dispersed. The city held. No one questioned what he did that night. His supervisors praised his response. His department stood behind him. And then Austin elected District Attorney José Garza. Instead of holding the rioters accountable — the ones who threw the fireworks, who lit the fires, who carried the Molotov cocktails — Garza turned his attention to the officers who stopped them. He launched an indiscriminate campaign against law enforcement, using the power of his office not to protect the public, but to make political examples out of good cops. Chance became one of his targets. | Chance now faces up to 99 Years in prison — for following his training. My husband now faces up to 99 years in prison. Not because he did anything wrong. Not because his department found fault with his actions. Not because any credible review of that night concluded he acted improperly. But because one politically-motivated prosecutor decided the officers who held the line deserved to be punished for holding it. This case has been grinding through the system for years now. The trial has already been delayed several times and is now scheduled for June of this year. Every continuance, every filing, every hearing means more hours of legal work, and more bills our family has to find a way to pay. I am asking for your help because we cannot do this alone. The National Center for Police Defense has been in Chance's corner, and your donation goes toward funding his legal defense, ensuring he has the representation he deserves as he walks into that courtroom in June. | · · · or any amount you can give If you believe that the men and women who run toward danger deserve better than this, . Whatever you can. No amount is too small, and our family will not forget it. Chance stood between Austin and chaos on May 31st, 2020. He didn't hesitate. He didn't run. He did his job. Now I'm asking you to stand with him. With gratitude and hope, Kimberly Bretches Wife of Officer Chance Bretches, Austin Police Department | P.S. Chance's trial is this June. We are closer than we've ever been to getting Chance in front of a jury that will hear the truth, but we need the resources to get there. ** National Center for Police Defense · Defenders for Justice

I didn’t run for Senate to sit quietly on the sidelines. I’m a mom, a conservative, and a proud Alabamian—and I came to fight for the values that make America strong.

_**Faith. Family. Freedom.**_

The Left is doing _everything_ they can to tear it all down. But I didn’t come to Washington to play games. I came to fight for the people who feel forgotten, overlooked, and ignored.

From securing the border to protecting our kids and defending our way of life—I’m in this for the long haul.

**This fight isn’t easy, but it’s worth it. And I’m not going anywhere.**

Will you stand with me?

clean_body: Your number is being called today I put a bullet through Osama bin Laden's skull. It's Rob O'Neill. I'm a Navy SEAL. At my core, I am built to serve this country; I will do WHATEVER it takes to make America safe and prosperous. I hope you share that sentiment. And if you don't, then the rest of this message just isn't for you. Feel free to delete this email and move on with your life if you're not committed to American excellence. If you 're still reading, then I thank you for your commitment. And now, I'm counting on you to rise to the occasion. My Navy SEAL brother, Senior Chief Derrick Van Orden, needs your help. He served our nation for over 25 years in the Navy and fought extremists from the Taliban to Al-Qaeda. He's one of the most patriotic & hard-working men I know. Today, he's still serving our country by representing true American patriots like you & me in Congress. The Left is doing everything in its power to undermine and neutralize Derrick. They've launched vicious attacks and smear campaigns. They're spending THOUSANDS trying to get rid of this Navy SEAL! Just like on the Teams, Derrick fights for everyday Americans. He doesn't have liberal billionaires and DC lobbyists lining his pockets. He 's counting on support from folks like YOU! Your number is being called today. I know you won't hesitate to answer the call to defend a SEAL who's fighting for you. "I know you’ll step up to the plate and make the biggest impact you can. I know you’ll donate today because you’re a patriot who understands how critical it is that we keep Derrick fighting for us in DC!" From one patriot to another - I can't thank you enough for your support. God bless you and God bless America, Rob O'Neill Ret. Peter,

**Welcome to the movement — you’re officially on Team Pratt!**

This campaign isn’t politics as usual. It’s personal. I watched my own neighborhood burn in the Pacific Palisades while the politicians in charge ghosted the people they were elected to serve.

I’m not waiting around for someone else to fix LA. I’m running for Mayor because I believe we can fix this city, _but only if we do it together._

I’m not asking for anything right now, except this:

**Stick with me.**

You’re going to see emails from me and my team with campaign updates, polls, behind-the-scenes content, and calls to action. When I reach out, I need you to be there, because this movement is about all of us.

Let’s get L.A. camera-ready,
Spencer Pratt
_Candidate for Mayor of Los Angeles_

clean_body: This campaign isn’t politics as usual. It’s personal. I watched my own neighborhood burn in the Pacific Palisades while the politicians in charge ghosted the people they were elected to serve.Let’s get L.A. camera ready! Peter, Welcome to the movement — you’re officially on Team Pratt! This campaign isn’t politics as usual. It’s personal. I watched my own neighborhood burn in the Pacific Palisades while the politicians in charge ghosted the people they were elected to serve. I’m not waiting around for someone else to fix LA. I’m running for Mayor because I believe we can fix this city, but only if we do it together. I’m not asking for anything right now, except this: Stick with me. You’re going to see emails from me and my team with campaign updates, polls, behind-the-scenes content, and calls to action. When I reach out, I need you to be there, because this movement is about all of us. body:

Hey Peter,
I only have a few minutes to touch base, but I want to make sure you saw this:
**A leading Republican Super PAC just launched an attack ad targeting me, and it's critical that my team and I respond right away.**
And what’s worse is that this comes right as our fundraising has hit a slow point. Not great.
So, I’m asking: Can you rush a donation to support my campaign right now? We can’t afford to let Republicans define this race: [**https://act.electjon.com/go/donate**](https://act.electjon.com/go/32?c0=ossoff-em-may26.KE07xH&refcode=em260510-1-subs&t=2&akid=2245%2E5691347%2EapFT9l)
More soon,
Jon
